缇宝大人…该如何让{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}回应我们的呼唤，你有什么建议吗？
High Priest Tribbie... Do you have any suggestions on how we can get {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to respond to us later?
抱歉，阿蝶，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}从来都不是一位喜爱与人交流的泰坦。在这件事上，*我们*恐怕也爱莫能助。
Sorry... We wish we could help, Cas, but {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has never been a Titan to chat or interact with humans.
看来…我们只能依靠自己寻找方法了。
I suppose... we'll have to rely on ourselves, then.
我们不是能借用它的力量吗？
But don't they let us use their power?
借用跟统一阵线终归是两回事。假如那位泰坦不愿与我们合作…武力是最后的解决方式。
It's one thing to use their powers and another to be aligned with us in war. If that Titan refuses to be on our side... we'll have to resort to a fight.
听上去根本就是在碰运气…
Sounds like we're leaving it up to luck...
假如那位泰坦不愿与我们合作…武力是最后的解决方式。
If that Titan refuses to be on our side... we'll have to resort to a fight.
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它不是一位生性险恶的泰坦，希望我们不必走到那一步。
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... isn't an evil Titan at heart. Let us hope things won't reach that point.
Time is of the essence, everyone... We should get going.
我们到啦——「百界门」只能把各位送到这里。
This is it! The Century Gate can only take you this far.
命运三相殿虽然已经废弃许久，但它的周围仍然残留着祭司们编织的法界。以{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量贸然接近，恐怕会有很大的风险。

Although the Temple of the Three Fates has been abandoned for a long time, the magical barriers woven by the priests still linger around it. Approaching with {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power recklessly could be extremely risky.
我们理解。谢谢你，缇宝老师。
*我们*还要赶回奥赫玛协助阿格莱雅。小白，阿蝶——等顺利完成任务后，你们知道该怎么呼唤*我们*。
We have to go back to Okhema to help Aglaea. Snowy and Cas, we trust that you know how to summon us when you're done.
这个给你们，一定要拿好——<color=#dbc291ff>这是象征雅努斯祭司身份的石符</color>，只要在万径之门前举起它，大门就会为你们敞开。
Here, keep this with you. <color=#dbc291ff>This token is proof of a Janus priest</color>. Hold it up to the Gate of Infinity, and you'll be able to walk through unimpeded.
保重啦，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮你们的前程。
Take care, alright? May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} light your path forward.
接下来的每一步都至关重要。这不止关系到万敌…还有圣城的全体公民。
Important decisions will be waiting for us every step of the way. What we're about to do will not only determine Mydei's fate... but also that of every single resident in Okhema.
目的地是「命运三相殿」，也就是「万径之门」背后的建筑——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}栖身于神殿的最深处，我们必须找到它，说服它同我们合作。

The Temple of the Three Fates is behind the Gate of Infinity, and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is at the very heart of this temple. We're going to have to find {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and convince them to help us in our battle.
May everything go well for us...
是我们初次见面时的遗迹？看上去似乎有些…不一样。
Are these... the ruins we saw when we first arrived? They look... somewhat different.
那是…泰坦在说话，我想应该是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。
I believe that was a Titan speaking... I believe it was {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
我需要仔细聆听它的话语……
I have to listen closely to what they are saying...
「狡猾、粗鄙之人，在厄运将临之际，又打算侵扰我的安宁吗？」
"Devious and repulsive humans... Are you here to disturb my peace again, just as disaster approaches?"
You know what the Titan is saying?
How can you understand without subtitles?
<color=#dbc291ff>遐蝶小姐能解译泰坦的语言</color>——这也是此行必须有她在场的原因。
<color=#dbc291ff>Miss Castorice can understand the Titans' words</color>. That's exactly why we need her on this trip.
「停下来吧…在错乱的时空中迷失吧……」
"Cease your efforts... and let yourself be swallowed by the confusion of time and space..."
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}在抗拒？看来这第一步就算不上顺利。
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is turning us away? It seems like we've hit an obstacle on the very first step.
莫非这遗迹里呈现出的错乱风景，也是它给我们布下的障碍…？
Could the Titan have created this chaotic scene we see in these ruins as a barrier to hinder us?
无论什么障碍，我们都必须翻越。
We'll overcome any obstacle, no matter what they throw at us.
上次经过这里时，缇宝老师向我们展示了该如何应对…现在，该轮到我们复现「神迹」了。
Tribbie gave us a demonstration when we had to pass through here the last time... It's up to us to recreate these miracles now.
"...and once again stir the ripples of past reverie!"
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}又开口了……
「…你们有何资格役使我？你们因何能残忍至此？」
"...Who are you to command me? Does your inhumanity know no end?"
「神迹」…居然是一种强迫泰坦服从的方式吗？
Are we... actually forcing the Titans to do our bidding with these miracles?
没时间思考这些了，我们继续。
We can't afford to stop and think about that right now. Let's press on.
或许…<color=#dbc291ff>这扇大门只能在「正确」的时空下被打开？</color>
Perhaps... <color=#dbc291ff>this gate only opens in the right time dimension?</color>
那边——<color=#dbc291ff>那些「奇迹宝珠」也是「岁月」祭司们常用的仪器，说不定能派上用场。</color>
There! <color=#dbc291ff>Those Miracle Orbs are instruments often used by Time Priests. They could prove handy.</color>
看，<color=#dbc291ff>宝珠映照出了相反的时空。</color>
Look, <color=#dbc291ff>an inverse time dimension is reflected by those orbs.</color>
再施展一次「神迹」，或许我们就能通过了。
Let's summon another miracle. Perhaps this time we'll make it through.
这就是我们坠落的地点。我们乘坐的车厢遭到了攻击，我和{NICKNAME}险些丢了性命。
This is where we crash-landed. {NICKNAME} and I nearly died when our car was assaulted.
现在看来，那也是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的手笔。
Upon reflection, that was probably {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s doing, too.
从近处看，那座大门属实宏伟。
This gate looks just as magnificent up close.
它象征着「万径之门」{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神权。传说里，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}是命运三泰坦中最年长的一位…它创造了翁法罗斯的「空间」。

The Gate of Infinity. It represents the divine power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. According to legend, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} is the eldest of the Three Titans of Fate. They created the "space" of Amphoreus.
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在很久之前便已殒落。归还火种，接过它神权的半神，就是缇宝大人。
But the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan, Janus}Titan{RUBY_E#} has long fallen and surrendered their Coreflame. Tribbie is the demigod that inherited their divinity.
缇宝是怎么打败泰坦的…
How did Tribbie defeat a Titan...?
并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
Brute force isn't the only option. Some Titans can also be vanquished... in other ways.
但这不代表缇宝老师不够强大…她是翁法罗斯最值得被歌颂的英雄之一。
But that doesn't mean Tribbie isn't powerful enough... She's one of Amphoreus' most revered heroes.
看不出来，原来她很强啊。
I didn't realize she was that strong.
并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
Brute force isn't the only option. Some Titans can also be vanquished... in other ways.
但你说的没错，无需以武力衡量缇宝老师的强大，她是翁法罗斯最值得被歌颂的英雄之一。
But you're not wrong, strength is no measure for how powerful Tribbie is. She's one of Amphoreus' most revered heroes.
走吧。有了缇宝老师的符节，我们应该能顺利进入命运三相殿。
Let's go. With Tribbie's token, we should be able to go straight into the Temple of the Three Fates.
神殿已被废弃许久，无法判断门后藏着什么危险。从遗迹中传来的声音判断，恐怕那位泰坦也谈不上友善。

This temple has been forsaken for so long that we have no way of telling what dangers await us behind this gate. From the way Oronyx spoke to us in the ruins, I won't count on them being cordial toward us.
We need a translation for that.
「这里没有你们在找的东西…只有悲伤和消亡。」
"You won't find anything you desire here... Save for despair and demise."
是你在说话吗，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士？
抱歉——假如你不愿帮助我们——那悲伤和消亡就会变成世上仅剩的东西！
Forgive me, but if you refuse to help us, then despair and demise will be all that's left on this world!
白厄举起了{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的石符……
Phainon raises the stone talisman of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...
…从命运三相殿内传来了沉重的机关声。
...The sound of heavy mechanisms comes from the Temple of the Three Fates.
「你们不受欢迎…你们没有资格。」
"You are not welcome here... You have no right."
「挑战」？很好，至少它愿意建立沟通了，哪怕是要刁难我们。
A challenge? Great, at least they're willing to speak to us now. Even if they are only making things difficult for us.
Push onward, my friends. But watch your step.
「公正天秤」——我还是第一次目睹它的全貌。
The Scales of Justice. It's my first time seeing it in its full glory.
这也是哪位泰坦的象征物吗？
Is this also a symbol of a Titan?
{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，命运三泰坦的第二位。传说中，是它创造了世界运行的「律法」。
{RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, the second of the Three Titans of Fate. They were said to have created the laws that govern our world.
它的火种已经归位，但接替神职的黄金裔…如今不知所踪。
Talanton surrendered their Coreflame, though the Chrysos Heir taking over their legacy is... nowhere to be found today.
至少，维持世界运转的法则依旧稳定。无论那位半神身在何方，都践行了自己的使命。
At least the laws that govern our world are still in place. So that demigod must be performing their duty still, no matter where they are.
两边都无法通行，出口也被隐藏起来了。{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}真是不欢迎我们啊。
Neither of these are paths we can take, and the exit has been concealed from us. Looks like {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is bent on keeping us out.
「奇迹典籍」…只能用它碰碰运气了。
The Tome of Miracles... We'll just have to try our luck with this, then.
施展「神迹」…会令它如此痛苦吗？
Does performing a miracle really... subject them to that much pain?
看，破损的天秤变得完整了。
Look, the broken scales have been restored to their full form.
「不会…不能…不允许你们继续前进。」
"No... You cannot... You must not come any closer."
「天秤即是入口…天秤即是考验。」
"The scales are as much an entrance... as they are a challenge."
天秤…它是想让我们完成配平吗？
The scales...? Are they expecting us to balance it?
我…没有大碍。只是…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的痛苦在和我共鸣。
I—I'm fine. It's just... I can feel {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s misery.
能听懂泰坦的语言也是一种负担。快点结束这一切吧。
Being able to understand the Titans' words is as much an affliction as it is a gift. Let's get this over and done with.
那位泰坦，它真的想用这种「考验」刁难我们吗？
Does that Titan really intend to deter us with a challenge like this?
What do you mean, Mr. Dan Heng?
我不理解。如果它拥有神力，难道不该用更粗暴的方式阻拦来犯之人吗？
This doesn't make sense to me. Oronyx thinks of us as intruders, so isn't it far easier for them to forcefully stop us with their divine powers?
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…以我对它的了解，应该不是一位粗暴的神明。
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... based on my understanding, isn't the kind that resorts to brutality.
这样就算完成「考验」了吧？
Does this mean we've passed the challenge?
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士！我们已经完成了你的挑战，可以让我们通过了吗？
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}! We completed your challenge. Can you let us pass now?
「不允许…不承认…不允许你们继续前进。」
看来是位不守信用的泰坦啊。
Looks like this Titan doesn't like to keep their promises.
「考验…第二次。必须…阻止凡人进入。」
它是在故意拖延时间吗？没空陪它玩游戏了……
Are they just stalling for time? We don't have the time for games...
<color=#dbc291ff>「现在置于左侧托盘的配重…代表着翁法罗斯的命运。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Weights in the left weighing pan... represent the fate of Amphoreus."</color>
「找到…比它更重的砝码…将它置于右侧的托盘……」
"Find... something that weighs more... and place it in the right pan..."
<color=#dbc291ff>「找到比世界的命运…更为沉重之物。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Find something that has more weight... than the fate of the world."</color>
它似乎有些反复无常，就像是一位…孩童。
They seem somewhat fickle, much like... a child.
比「世界的命运」更沉重的东西？这题面真令人迷惑。
Something that has more weight than the fate of the world? That's a baffling riddle.
No movement at all... Not the right item.
...They really know how to get under someone's skin.
不行…这么做就是在浪费时间。
This won't do... We're just wasting our time.
令人不快的话语，应该无需再传译了。
I don't think there's a need for me to convey any words that'll only irritate you further.
看那边，那扇门后是不是摆着一个完全相同的砝码？
Look, behind that gate. Isn't that the exact same type of weight?
如果能用它配平天秤，再往托盘上加些配重，也许就能解开{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的谜题了。
If we can use it to balance the scales and add more weight to the pan, we might be able to solve {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s riddle.
直觉告诉我，事情不会如此简单…但现在也想不出更好的办法了。
My intuition says this won't be that easy... But I suppose we don't have any better solutions at the moment.
要是那位泰坦果真如此孩子气，也许它只是在同我们玩耍。那就陪它玩到满意为止吧。
If that Titan is truly so childlike, maybe they're just playing with us. In that case, let's play along until they're satisfied.
还有扎格列斯之手的石台，遍地都是。正好省了走回头路的麻烦。
There are also stone platforms for the Hand of Zagreus all around. This will save us the trouble of doubling back.
果然有效！这样就算再次配平了。
It worked! Now, the scales have once again been balanced.
已经陪你玩得够久了——该认输了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士！
We've played along with you for long enough. It's time you admitted defeat, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!
走吧，我们去完成它的考验。
Let's go and complete their challenge.
只要让这一侧的托盘沉下去就行，对吗？
We just have to make the weighing pan on this side drop, right?
Let's think about it... It shouldn't be that difficult.
Place the flaming lance and the baseball bat on it.
你将炎枪和球棍放在了天秤的托盘上……
You place the flaming lance and the bat on the scale's tray...
It didn't even move an inch...
我掂拿过{NICKNAME}那柄炎枪，很有分量。看来这个办法行不通……
I've held {NICKNAME}'s flaming lance before and it's quite heavy. Seems like this isn't going to work.
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它在嘲弄我们。
你一个箭步跳到了天秤的托盘上……
You dexterously leap onto the scale's tray...
...Have you thought of gaining some weight?
Come down, {NICKNAME}... Seems like this isn't going to work.
你卖力地用棒球棍击打天秤的托盘……
You swing the baseball bat hard at the scale's tray...
…但托盘纹丝不动，你的手臂被巨大的反作用力振得发麻。
...But it doesn't budge. And your arm feels numb from the strong recoil.
看来用蛮力通过考验不是一个选项。
It seems like we can't rely on brute force to clear this challenge.
我放弃！直接让我过关吧！
I give up! Just let me pass!
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}似乎有些气恼…因为我们把它设下的考验当成了儿戏。
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is frustrated... Because we're treating their challenge like a game.
也就是说，我们需要找到字面意义上比「翁法罗斯的命运」更为沉重之物？听上去是一道无解的难题。
Which means that we have to find something that literally has more weight than the fate of Amphoreus? It sounds like an impossible task.
对于翁法罗斯人，真的存在比这片土地更重要的东西吗？他们甚至没有逃向天外这个选项。
For the people of Amphoreus, is there really anything that has more weight than this land? They don't even have the option to flee beyond the sky.
比「世界的命运」更为沉重之物……
Something that has more weight than the fate of the world...
一定还有其它办法…更周全的办法。即使时间紧迫……
There must be some other way... A more comprehensive way. Even if our time is tight...
的确，对翁法罗斯人而言，「世界的命运」实在是过于沉重的砝码。
Indeed, for the people of Amphoreus, the fate of the world is a weight that is far too heavy.
但或许泰坦也想不到…对于我和{NICKNAME}这两位外来者，我们尚未打心底里融入这个世界的生死存亡。
But perhaps even the Titan did not expect that... For outsiders like {NICKNAME} and I, we still have not yet become fully involved with the fate of this world.
站在我们的立场，有一样宝物比这个世界——甚至比整片星空——更加重要。
From our perspective, there is something even more important than this world, or perhaps even the entire cosmos.
那就是与我们一同旅行至今的「同伴」。
And that's the companions that we have traveled with.
如此一来，就算是通过了泰坦的考验。
If this is indeed the case, we will have passed the Titan's challenge.
理智尚存的泰坦…真是神秘又伟岸。
A Titan who still possesses reason... both mysterious and awe-inspiring.
I really want to take a photo of them.
我理解，这样的奇观可不多见。
I understand. Such a spectacle is rare to witness.
每位泰坦都拥有截然不同的形体，有些甚至抛弃了物理的躯壳。
The Titans all have vastly different physical forms, with some of them even abandoning their physical shell.
似乎没有很强的压迫感。
不是每位泰坦都如{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}那般暴戾…而它也并非一直如此。
Not every Titan is as violent as {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They weren't always like that either.
「我已翻越千万道门径，我已经受天秤的审判。」
"I have crossed the myriad passages and been judged by the scales."
「它已宣我无罪，它已赐我果实」——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，我们恳求你的帮助！
"It has deemed me innocent and granted me fruits." — O mighty {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. We plead for your assistance!
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂正将翁法罗斯推向末日。它摒弃了荣耀，以疯狂的手段复制自身，意图毁灭天父和它庇护的文明。

The madness of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is pushing Amphoreus toward the end times. They have abandoned their honor, replicating themself through crazed means, and are fully intending to destroy the sky father and the civilization they protect.
请为我们揭示被迷雾遮蔽的过往，引导我们找到熄灭疯狂的办法！
Please reveal to us the past that has been shrouded in fog and guide us to a way to quench this madness!
「黄金裔…愤怒，残忍，黑暗的英雄啊……」
"Chrysos Heirs... Heroes that uphold rage, cruelty, and darkness..."
「你们追随那受诅咒的神谕…将我和同胞们视作猎物……」

这里也有被遗弃的扎格列斯之手，借用一下吧。

用「奇迹宝珠」或许能映照出通路。
Perhaps the Miracle Orbs can illuminate the way forward.
看，预言算碑。说不定可以靠它来打开栅栏。
There, a Prophecy Tablet. It could be the key to unlocking the way.
「你们以为自己赢了？傲慢…愚蠢……」
"You think that you've won? Arrogant... Foolish..."
Titan, are you still trying to hold out?
居然是这样的解法…幸好有丹恒和{NICKNAME}在我们身边。
That was an unexpected solution... Thankfully, we had Dan Heng and {NICKNAME} here with us.
我们通过了它的考验，我想{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}有些惊诧。
I think that even {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} themself is surprised that we managed to clear the challenge.
至少它遵守了承诺，打开了谒见的道路。
At least they kept their promise and opened the path for an audience.
像是一股寒流渗入了脑海，一双长着百指的手在搅动回忆。
It feels like a cold wave is seeping into the mind, and a hand with countless fingers is churning through my memories.
那些拥有美满人生的人，或许会享受这种干预吧……
Maybe people who have led wonderful lives would enjoy such an intrusion...
帮助我们吧，泰坦！为了防止这个世界因疯狂毁于一旦！
Help us, Titan! Help us prevent this world from being ruined by madness!
(It's the first time that the Express has felt so unfamiliar...)
(I want to take a look in the Parlor Car...)
啊，怎么又让我做场外支援？真无聊……
Ugh, why do I have to be the standby support again? So boring...
The melody of slaughter, how beautiful.
Together, we shall... set the seas ablaze.
In this script... I am the main character!
Stand still so I can beat you!
It's all about that adrenaline rush!
怪我作弊？哼，有种来封我的号啊！
Blaming me for cheating? Hmph, ban my account if you dare!
还好不用再骑大地兽进城了。辛苦了，缇宝老师。
Thank goodness we no longer have to ride the dromas into the city. Thanks for your hard work, Tribbie.
这种时候就别说客气话了。你们找到解决方法了，对吧？
No need for formalities at a time like this. I trust that you have found a solution?
长话短说：{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}不愿帮我们揭露悬锋城的过去。但不知为何，它对{NICKNAME}展现出了兴趣。
Simply put, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} refused to help us uncover the past of Castrum Kremnos. But for some reason, they showed interest toward {NICKNAME}.
它以…某种方式…赠予了{NICKNAME}这只宠物——
They... through some unknown means... gifted {NICKNAME} this pet—
——按丹恒的说法，这只生物和天外的神明有关。兴许能解决我们的麻烦。
According to Dan Heng, this creature is related to a god from beyond the sky. Perhaps they can help us solve the problem.
A god from beyond the sky...
缇宝老师，接下来我想兵分两路：由我立刻动身，赶往悬锋城支援万敌。
Tribbie, let's split up here. I'll make my way to Kremnos immediately to lend my support to Mydei.
而寻找{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}弱点的任务…{NICKNAME}，可以拜托你吗？这是我发自肺腑的请求。
As for the mission of finding out {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s weakness... Can I leave it to you, {NICKNAME}? I ask this sincerely from the bottom of my heart.
Just leave it to me and Mem.
当心，你可不是不死之身。
放心吧，我最擅长的事就是「大难不死」。
Don't worry about me, surviving the impossible is my specialty.
我和万敌在战场上等你。
Mydei and I will be waiting for you on the battlefield.
也带上我吧，白厄。与其在后方等待，不如让我也上前线，为你们分担压力。
Let me come too, Phainon. I'd rather be on the front lines, helping ease the burden.
...Thank you. I don't have any reason to refuse.
那就在此别过吧——我和丹恒即刻前往悬锋城，{NICKNAME}想办法破解蛮神不灭之躯的秘密。遐蝶小姐……

Then this is where we part ways — Dan Heng and I will head to Castrum Kremnos immediately, while {NICKNAME} works on uncovering the secret behind the barbaric god's indestructible body. As for miss Castorice...
我会跟在{NICKNAME}身边，保护{M#他}{F#她}的安全。
I'll stay with {NICKNAME} to ensure {M#his}{F#her} safety.
拜托了。缇宝老师——能再劳烦你一次吗？
I'll leave it to you. Tribbie... Could I trouble you once again?
当然，「百界门」就交给*我们*吧。
Of course, just leave the Century Gate to us.
现在只剩我们了…该去哪寻找消失的记忆呢？
We're the only ones left... Where should we go to find the lost memories?
Let's just believe in Mem's sense of smell.
障碍物挡住了去路…或许可以使用二楼的推球将箱子击碎。
Obstacles are blocking the path... Maybe the ball on the second floor can be utilized to break the box.
喔，这位温婉优雅的女士！您也是来听利波献唱的吗？
Oh, elegant lady! Are you here to listen to Lipos' song?
您想听些什么？古老黄金裔的情与爱…黄金战争的乱世…沿海百邦的崛起与没落…利波这里应有尽有！
What are you in the mood for? The love stories of the ancient Chrysos Heirs? The turbulent era of the Chrysos War? The rise and fall of the Seaside States? Lipos has it all!
请问…有没有诗歌描绘了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂，还有悬锋城隐于迷雾的秘密？
I wonder if there is a ballad about {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s madness as well as the mystery of Castrum Kremnos vanishing into the fog.
女士，您真是找对了人！利波的收藏中有这样一首诗歌，还从未飘入过他人的耳廓。
Ma'am, you have come to the right place! There is such a ballad within my collection that has yet to grace the ears of others.
那么，就由我来为各位吟诵——
Allow me to sing it for you—
「千年的战争进入尾声，世界即将遁入混沌长夜；骁勇英武的泰坦啊，你金黄的心灵因何变得支离破碎？」
"The war of a thousand years has drawn to its close. And now the world descends into a long night of chaos. O valiant Titan, tell me, how did your golden heart shatter into a thousand fragments?"
「神明啊，你厌倦了纷争吗？若是如此，该如何解释你的暴戾，笼罩你的幽暗该如何祛散？」
"O god, have you grown weary of endless strife? Then how do you justify your ruthless tyranny? And how shall you cast off the darkness that so deeply shrouds your divinity?"
「神明啊，你遗忘了荣耀吗？若是如此，该如何守护你的尊严，敬畏你的子民该去向何方？」
"O god, have you forgotten the glory of old? Then how will you defend your dignity? And where shall your faithful subjects find their home?"
「噢，伟大的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…我明白，我们都明白啊。你那不屈的神性并未死去，你只是暂时被那汹涌的黑潮给缠住了啊。」
"O mighty {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the truth is clear to us all. Your steadfast divinity is not vanquished. You are shrouded momentarily by that encroaching black tide."
「但你从未屈服！你也从未临阵脱逃过啊。你金黄的战士之魂，也终有一日会战胜黑潮，重塑那悬锋的王座啊。」
"But you never faltered, nor did you flee! Your golden warrior spirit, brave and bold, will conquer the black tide, as foretold. To the throne of Kremnos, you'll return once more!"
「我们的神，我们的王，为了支撑你永恒的战斗，我们准备了盛大的祭礼啊——」
"Our god, our king, to aid your timeless struggle, we have prepared a grand ritual—"
「请允许我们用卑微的十指触碰你的灵魂，为你编织盛装神性的剑皿…它将赐予你永恒的生命，贮存你永恒的荣耀啊。」
"Please grant us the honor to touch your soul with our humble hands, and present to you this sacred Sword Vessel... It shall consecrate your eternal life and enshrine your everlasting glory."
感谢你，拥有美妙嗓音的诗人。你的诗歌会被永远传唱下去，成为保卫奥赫玛的壁垒。
Thank you, esteemed bard with an enchanting voice. Your ballads will endure through the ages, serving as a bulwark for Okhema.
哈托努斯…这么说来，我是听说过它为悬锋城打造圣器的故事。
Chartonus... Come to think of it, I remember hearing about them making a holy vessel for Kremnos.
我记得，您曾受悬锋族人之邀，为他们打造某样圣物…不知您能否回忆起其中细节？
I remember the Kremnoans commissioned you to craft a divine object before. Do you happen to recall the details?
啊…此事，确有。你们为何问及？
Ah... Happened it did. Why ask, do you?
为了彻底打败尼卡多利。
千百件之多，我曾打造过的神兵利器。逐一记住，不可能。
Thousands of marvels of weaponry, I crafted. Remember them all, impossible it is.
异乡人，致歉。帮助，我难以给予。
Outlander, forgive me. Help, I cannot.
的确…大工匠活了太久，不可能记住经手过的每一件委托。还有别的方法吗……
That makes sense. With such a long life, the Grand Craftsman can't remember every single item he's made. Is there another way?
如何，大工匠？用于封印神性的「剑皿」，你造得出来吗？
Grand Craftsman, would it be possible for you to craft a Sword Vessel that can seal divinity?
我的锻锤无法打造的物件，不存在。
Anything my forging hammer cannot craft, there is not.
悬锋城最上等的石料，拿来。纷争泰坦的黄金血，找来。剑皿，我会锻造。
The finest stones in Kremnos, give me. The golden blood of Strife Titan, find me. The Sword Vessel, I shall craft.
看这意思，你答应下来了？
Does that mean we have a deal?
那报酬呢？我们在请求你打造一件惊世的圣器…不可能不支付酬劳。
And what of your payment? For a commission of this magnitude, proper compensation must be ensured.
和平，给我的族人。山之民，不再做悬锋城的奴隶或斗士，永远。
Peace, for my people. Mountain Dwellers, no longer servants or fighters for Kremnos. Ever.
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, are you feeling alright? You were—
我看到了大工匠的记忆。
I saw the memory of the Grand Craftsman.
啊…是这个小家伙的能力吗？真令人吃惊。
Ah, was it because of this little one? That's incredible!
窥探他人记忆的力量，听起来很容易被滥用。幸好掌握它的人是你。
The ability to look into others' memories sounds like something that could easily be misused. Luckily, you're the one wielding it.
那是…达米亚诺斯？阿格莱雅女士已经将他释放了吗？
Is that... Damionis? Did Lady Aglaea release him already?
那家伙，差点没把我们害死！
That guy... He almost got us killed!
他的确背负了些不好的名声…若不是他的作为，你和丹恒阁下也不会遭受阿格莱雅大人的审讯。
He certainly has a bad reputation. If it weren't for him, you and Dan Heng wouldn't have been interrogated by Lady Aglaea.
这哥们，一点版权意识没有。
Has that dude never heard of copyright before?
嗯，我听过和他有关的负面传闻…他有美学上的才能，但若不是他的作为，你和丹恒阁下也不会遭受阿格莱雅大人的审讯。
I've heard some bad things about him. He may have some talent in the arts, but if it weren't for him, you and Dan Heng wouldn't have been interrogated by Lady Aglaea.
如果迷迷认定他藏有宝贵的记忆，那就当面询问一番吧。
But if Mem thinks he has some valuable memories, we'd better ask him in person.
...Hmm? Who's that? I'm busy working on a scene, please don't...
啊，居然是「异乡人」阁下，别来无恙啊？离我们上次见面还没过去多久……
Ah, it's the esteemed "outlander." How've you been? It hasn't been all that long since we last met...
非常抱歉，之前都是我的错，我一心只想证明「天外之界」的存在……
My apologies, that was entirely my fault. I was determined to prove that a world beyond the sky exists...
幸好阿格莱雅大人十分仁慈。她只是让我立下誓言，然后就放我回家了。
Fortunately, Lady Aglaea is quite lenient. She let me go after I made a vow.
阿格莱雅大人十分仁慈。她只是让我立下誓言，然后就放我回家了。
Lady Aglaea is quite lenient. She let me go after I made a vow.
请放心吧！同样的错误，我绝不再犯第二次。退一万步说，假如我敢打破和那位女士的约定，那和自掘坟墓有什么区别？
Rest assured, I'm not foolish enough to make the same mistake twice. Breaking a vow with Lady Aglaea would be like... digging my own grave.
你有和悬锋城相关的记忆吗？
Do you have any memories related to Castrum Kremnos?
悬锋城？对于我们这些手无寸铁的平民，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领土可是禁地。就算是在从前……
Castrum Kremnos? For us unarmed civilians, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory is off-limits. Even in the past...
…等等，你提醒了我，阁下…我的确去过悬锋城。请给我片刻……
Oh, n–no... Wait, I just remembered! I did visit Castrum Kremnos once. Let me find it for you...
没错…对，就是这张！不可思议，我居然还留着它……
Y–Yes, yes, this is the one! I can't believe I still have it...
请问，这幅作品有什么故事？
Could you tell us the story behind it?
很多年前，黄金战争接近尾声时，悬锋城举办了最后一次祭典。但以当时的局势，根本没多少异邦的公民敢去参加竞赛。
During the final days of the Chrysos War, the final festival took place in Castrum Kremnos. However, due to the tense situation, few outsiders were willing to compete.
我鼓起勇气前往悬锋城，却发现那祭典的氛围…不同往常。悬锋族人更像是在准备什么神秘的仪式。
I gathered the courage to go there, but I found the atmosphere of the festival to be... quite strange. It felt more like the Kremnoans were preparing for a mysterious ceremony.
我感到事态蹊跷，只在城外拍了张照片就离开了…谁能想到后面发生的事呢？
Sensing something was off, I snapped a photo outside the city and then left... And what followed was something completely unexpected.
能将这张照片交给我们吗？我们…正在收集那个年代的线索。
Would you mind giving us the photo? We're... trying to piece together clues from that time.
当然，请拿去吧。如果可以，请把它当作我的补偿。
Sure, take it! Think of it as my way of making it up to you.
...It's time to head to Castrum Kremnos.
准备工作已经完成了吗？那该去跟白厄和万敌阁下汇合了。
Is everything in order? If so, we need to meet up with Lords Phainon and Mydei.
动身前…我想再和阿格莱雅大人确认一番。请稍等，{NICKNAME}阁下。
Before we leave, I'd like to check with Lady Aglaea again. Do you mind waiting for me, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?
这样就可以了。我们出发吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
Everything's set now. Let's head out, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.
Are you scared of Lady Aglaea?
害怕？不…我只是不想看见她失落的样貌。
Scared? No, I just don't want to see her disappointed.
你每件事都要向她汇报吗？
Do you always have to report everything to her?
我只是不想看见她失落的样貌。
I just don't want to see her disappointed.
阿格莱雅大人，她为奥赫玛做出的奉献值得更多感激。但大多数人只记住了她冰冷的一面。
Lady Aglaea's contributions to Okhema deserve more appreciation, but people mostly see her as distant and aloof.
现在不是说这些的时候…该出发了。希望这个小家伙能帮我们复现悬锋城的记忆。
We don't have time to talk about this right now... Let's set off. Hopefully, this little one will help us recreate the memories of Castrum Kremnos.
战斗仍在继续…听上去相当激烈。
The battle is still raging... I can feel the intensity even from here.
真想去正面支援他们啊…
I wish I could go and help them...
我能理解，{NICKNAME}阁下…但眼下我们还要奔赴另一片战场。
I understand how you feel, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. But right now, we must head to another battlefield.
We have our own battle to face.
没错，只有完成被托付的任务，才能真正帮到他们。
Exactly. We'll only be able to help them once we've seen our own mission through.
至少说明他们都还活着。
At least we know they're still alive.
想帮助他们，我们必须完成被托付的任务。
We'll only be able to help them once we've seen our own mission through.
这里，记忆，完整。交给我，碎片。
Here, memory, complete. Give me, fragments.
那就是通向往世的门吗？
Is that the gate to the past?
走吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。我们一起发掘{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的秘密。
Let's go, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. We will unravel {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s secrets together.
记住，阿格莱雅，无论黄金裔还是元老院，我们的地位都是由奥赫玛的公民赋予的。
Remember, Aglaea, whether it be the Chrysos Heirs or the Council, our positions are entrusted to us by the people of Okhema.
在你妄图僭越，做出超越本分的判断前，<color=#dbc291ff>仔细回想下黄金战争吧，想想那些「英雄」最后的下场。</color>
Before you attempt to overreach and make decisions beyond your place, <color=#dbc291ff>take a moment to recall the Chrysos War and what became of those "heroes."</color>
要是你对那段历史不甚熟悉，就让她再给你上上课吧。
If you're not well-versed in that history, have her refresh your memory.
请放心，凯妮斯阁下，在神谕的指引下，我们会推翻诸神；而在预言承诺的新世界，将不再有神明凌驾于凡人之上。
Do not be concerned, Elder Caenis. Following the prophecy's guidance, we shall cast down the gods — in the new world, no god will stand above humankind.
呵…我就姑且收下你的承诺吧。
Heh... I'll hold you to that promise for now.
当年娇生惯养的女孩，如今也长成了精明的政治动物。该说是可贺？还是可悲？
The pampered little girl has grown up to be a shrewd politician. Should I be pleased or concerned?
时代在剧变，人亦需要适应，我不是唯一一个下定决心改变的人，元老阁下。
Times are changing drastically, and people must adapt. I'm not the only one committed to making a difference, Elder Caenis.
我和吾师还有必须处理的要事，恕不远送。
My teacher and I have other pressing matters to attend to. Please see yourself out.
呵…我衷心希望，下次召开元老议会时，在圆环中央接受审判的不会是你。
Heh... I genuinely hope that at the next Council meeting, you won't be the one standing in the middle, facing the judgment.
不过又是空洞的威慑，和以往并无不同…都是他们内心恐惧的显化。
It's nothing more than an empty threat, much like before — a reflection of their inner fears.
真对不起，阿雅…如果*我们*能再成熟些，就不用让你一个人承担所有了……
So sorry, Agy... If we were more mature, you wouldn't have to face all this alone.
为何要道歉？你我只是在各司其职。
Why apologize? We each have our own responsibilities.
但是，看见你一直被他们刁难…*我们*还是会难过，也会气愤……
But seeing how they give you a hard time... makes us sad, and angry...
你希望我用金线割开他们的喉咙吗？这易如反掌。只需要你的认同，我便能让元老院成为历史。
Would you like me to slice their throats with golden threads? It would be done in a flash. All I need is your blessing, and the Council will be no more.
你、你在说什么可怕的话啊！别、别这样吓*我们*，阿雅！
Wh—What are you talking about!? D—Don't scare us like that, Agy!
就知道你在开玩笑…你安慰人的办法也太不同寻常了吧！
I knew you were joking... You certainly have an unorthodox way of cheering people up!
不过…你说完这句话后，*我们*居然感觉…有些畅快。谢谢你，阿雅。
However, after you said that, we somehow feel a bit better. Thank you, Agy.
因为我们人性尚存，才会想苦中作乐。
We find humor in hardship because our humanity still endures.
那…小白他们提到的「渗透」，你有头绪了吗？
So, about the "infiltration" Snowy mentioned earlier, did you find anything?
放心，即便没有他们的情报，我也已探查到城底的暗流。不过是些小小的麻烦，我能亲自解决。
Don't worry. Even without their intel, I've already detected hidden currents within the city. A trivial issue, nothing I can't handle on my own.
Do you need to inform the city guards?
那会惊动奥赫玛的公民。假使他们知晓敌人有绕过黄金裔、渗透奥赫玛的手段，局面可能失控。
That would alarm Okhema's citizens. If they learn that the enemy can bypass the Chrysos Heirs and infiltrate the city, the situation might spiral out of control.
那，你需要*我们*帮什么忙吗？
Is there anything you'd like us to help with?
不必了，吾师。依照此前的分工来吧，你要为「天谴之锋」做好准备。
It's fine, Tribbie. As we discussed earlier, you need to prepare for the Blade of Fury.
*我们*明白啦…阿雅，你要量力而为呀。
We got this! Don't exhaust yourself, Agy.
（渗透…这绝非{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}清醒时会做出的行为。）
(Infiltration... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would never resort to this if they were in their right mind.)
（究竟是什么让它丢弃了原本的神性？答案藏在迷雾后…希望遐蝶和那位异邦客能找到根源。）
(What exactly led to their loss of divinity? The answer lies behind the fog... I hope Castorice and that outlander can uncover the truth.)
衣匠，将若虫收集到的情报交给我吧。
Garmentmaker, can you give me the intel the nymphs have gathered?
（下城…渗透还未殃及浴场，很幸运。风险尚在可控范围之内。）
(The lower city... It's good that the infiltration hasn't reached the baths yet. The risk remains manageable.)
（在悲剧酿成前，要用金线缝补裂口。）
(The rift must be sewn shut with golden thread before disaster occurs.)
阿、阿格莱雅大人！您、您怎么会……
这些「异常」背后藏着腐败和疯狂。我必须亲手清理它们，以绝后患。
Corruption and madness are lurking behind these anomalies. I must deal with them myself to prevent further troubles.
但我不想因此招致公民的恐慌——我能信任你吗，光荣的卫士？
But I don't want to alarm the public. Can I trust you, honorable guard?
我明白了，大人！请您放心，我绝不会透露任何风声。
Absolutely, Lady Aglaea! You have my solemn vow that none of this will come to light.
谢谢你。不介意的话，就把这里交给我吧。
Thank you. If you don't mind, I will handle it from here.
{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祝福您，大人。
May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bless you, Lady Aglaea.
（那个年轻的卫士能读懂我的言中之意…若非末日临近，他必然前途无量。）
(That young guard reads between the lines well. If the end weren't so near, he would have a bright future ahead of him.)
(I'd better focus on the matter at hand first...)
千百根坚韧的金线探入污染的空洞，揪出了潜藏其中的恶意之物。
Hundreds of resilient golden threads reach into the corrupted void, extracting the hidden malevolence within.
被剥离了荣耀的兵卒，只能如蛆虫般寄生于秽物中——可悲。
It's truly pathetic. A soldier stripped of all glory, lurking in the margins like a parasite.
身边的女孩依旧无动于衷。
The girl beside you remains unresponsive.
（啊…原来是个听不见声音的孩子。）
(Oh... She's a child who can't hear.)
(Run your fingertips through the girl's hair.)
阿格莱雅伸出手臂，示意女孩也做出相同的动作。
Aglaea extends her arm, signaling the girl to do the same.
金色的丝线轻轻地裹住女孩的手掌…现在她们心灵相通了。
The golden thread gently wraps around the girl's palm... now their hearts are connected.
（我的…我的髀石护身符，掉进可怕的东西里面了……）
(M—My knucklebone talisman fell into this really frightening place...)
（很黑，很吓人…我不敢伸手去拿……）
(It's so dark and scary... I'm too afraid to reach in...)
（啊…我明白了。别着急，我来帮你。）
(Ah... I see. Don't worry, I'll help you find it.)
（你只需要帮我一个小忙…转过身去，在心里默念到三十，好吗？）
(Just do me a little favor, okay? I want you to turn around and count to thirty.)
你收回了金线，该处理眼前的污秽了。
You retract the threads, ready to deal with the filth before you.
千百根坚韧的金线探入污染的空洞，揪出了潜藏其中的恶意之物。
Hundreds of resilient golden threads reach into the corrupted void, extracting the hidden malevolence within.
连孩童的玩物也不放过…贪婪也是你原罪的一部分吗？
Even a child's toy isn't safe from your grasp... Is greed one of your vices?
(Yes! That's it! Thank you, big sis!)
（不…没什么。你要记得，以后不可以独自在街上玩耍…即便是在奥赫玛。）
(Nothing. But promise me you won't play on the streets alone from now on, even in Okhema.)
（你的…「弱点」，会成为他人恶意的靶标。对芸芸广众而言，作恶总比行善代价更小…这是经验之谈。）
(Your vulnerabilities will make you a target for others' malice. For many, it's easier to do wrong than to do good — believe me, I know from experience.)
（姐姐，你说的话好深奥…我听不太懂。）
(Big sis, your words are so hard to understand. I'm really confused.)
（…抱歉，看来我已经忘记了该如何与孩童沟通。你们身上的童真，离我有些远了。）
(...Sorry, it seems I've forgotten how to talk to a child. Your innocence feels so distant to me now.)
（没关系，虽然我听不太懂，但还是谢谢姐姐的提醒！我以后会注意的。）
(That's alright. I might not understand everything, but I still appreciate your advice. I'll be careful!)
（还有，姐姐你…真的好漂亮！简直就像石版上记录的{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}女神一样，金闪闪的！你的眼睛…也像两颗宝石一样，真让人羡慕！）
(Oh, and by the way, you look so pretty! Just like Goddess {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} on the teleslate — so shiny and sparkly! Your eyes are like two beautiful gems! I'm so jealous!)
（这块髀石护身符，就送给姐姐吧。希望你每天都能有好运气，将来也不要被任何人欺负！）
(I want you to have this knucklebone talisman, big sis. I hope it brings you luck every day and keeps you safe from bullies!)
(It's hidden in such an unassuming corner...)
（假若敌人从这里渗透，可能造成的损害无法估量。尽快处理吧……）
(If the enemy were to infiltrate from here, the damage could be catastrophic. I'd better deal with it at once...)
千百根坚韧的金线探入污染的空洞，揪出了潜藏其中的……
Hundreds of resilient golden threads reach into the corrupted void, extracting from within...
哎、哎哟！谁啊，哪个不长眼睛的——
O—Ouch! Watch where you're going, will you—
啊…啊！桀桀桀，原来是阿格莱雅大人！赞美「法刻勒」，您的每一寸肌肤都同那天上黎明机器一样光芒万丈啊！
O—Oh, it's Lady Aglaea! Teehee, what a delight to see you here! Praise Phakele, every inch of your skin is glowing like the dawn itself!
你还记不住天父之名吗？是刻法——
How can you still mix up the sky father's name? It's Kepha—
…罢了，我想你是故意为之。告诉我，贼灵，你为何要藏身于污秽中？
...Never mind. I bet you did that on purpose. Tell me, Spirithief, why are you hiding in the filth?
呃，当然是…当然是因为我们想为奥赫玛的公民除害啦，桀桀桀！
Uh, it's... it's we're just trying to get rid of any threats to Okhema, haha!
您看，原本藏在里面的疯子石头怪，咱可是已经靠着灵巧的手艺给它大卸八块了…桀桀桀！
See? We turned this crazy stone monster inside into pieces with our spectacular skills, teehee!
嗯…污染的痕迹确实消失了。
Hmm... the traces of corruption have indeed disappeared.
我们可不敢骗您啊，阿格莱雅大人~您可是整个奥赫玛最受尊敬的……
We would never dream of deceiving you, Lady Aglaea. In all of Okhema, you are the most revered—
省下那些油嘴滑舌吧，贼灵…你知道我能读出你的不安。
Save the smooth talk, Spirithief... I can tell you're feeling nervous.
转念一想，既然你已经在我面前现身…那就再回答我一个问题：<color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>身在何处？
On second thought, since you're right here, I must ask you one more question: Where is <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color>?
呃…您可能对我们这行有点误解？我和那位大人的确是同行，但这也不代表咱们是一伙的呀！
Uh... There seems to be a misunderstanding, Lady Aglaea. Even though she and I work in the same trade, it doesn't make us allies!
我俩之间的关系，应该算作「竞争对手」才对——冤家之间可不想狭路相逢呀，桀桀桀！
On the contrary, we're more like competitors! No competitor would want to cross paths with one another, teehee!
…罢了。若你下次遇见赛飞儿，替我转告她：<color=#dbc291ff>身为半神，我们永远不可能逃避职责。</color>
...Forget it. If you see her, let her know this: <color=#dbc291ff>As demigods, we can't avoid our duties forever.</color>
好的，好的，我们记下了，阿格莱雅大人！那、那么，要是没什么别的事，我就先走一……
Alright, alright. Understood, Lady Aglaea! If there's nothing else, please excuse—
等等…依我的推测，你藏身于污秽中莫不是为了藏匿赃物？
Wait... if my suspicion is correct, are you skulking about in the filth to keep something hidden?
留下你的非法所得，然后我会放你离开。
Return what you've stolen, and I'll let you go.
…嘁，这趟可真倒霉！怎么偏偏就遇上了这么麻烦的人物……
...Tsk! What rotten luck! Why did I have to bump into her...
{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}老祖，请让我抱紧您老的飞毛腿……
O venerable {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}, may I borrow a fragment of your fleetness?
还有什么解数？尽管使出来吧。
Got any more tricks up your sleeve? Let's see them all.
可恶…可恶啊！明明就差一点点！
Argh, darn it! That was so close!
拿走吧！把我辛辛苦苦得来的收获全都拿走吧！
Go on, take it all! Help yourself to everything I've toiled for!
这次算是栽在你手上了，女人！反正我就算是饿死了，这城里也不会有人愿意给我一个怜悯的眼神！
Well, you got me! Even if I starve to death, nobody in this city would so much as blink an eye at my plight!
真是可怜…但你压根就不需要进食，不是吗？
Oh, you poor thing... But you don't actually need to eat at all, do you?
你…你这给一颗黑心镀了金的女人！我不想再看见你了，再见！
Y—You heartless woman! I never want to see you again, not for all the gold in the world!
再见，巴特鲁斯——别忘了替我给赛飞儿递话。
Farewell, Bartholos. Be sure to get my message to Cipher.
谁在那？赶在金线还未沾染你的血滴之前，现身吧。
Show yourself now, before golden thread is stained with your blood.
啧啧，不愧是半神。连我这干了大半辈子「清洗」的刺客也逃不过你的感官啊。
Well, well, a demigod never ceases to impress. Not even a top assassin with a lifetime of "purging" experiences can slip past you.
凯妮斯阁下，你这是何意？
What are you up to, Elder Caenis?
呵…不必假装，你早就发现我的眼线了吧？
Drop the act. You noticed my informants a long time ago, didn't you?
你刻意没有戳穿，为的就是让我们放松警惕，认定你的一举一动皆在元老院的规矩之内——对吗？
You stayed silent to throw us off, so we'd let our guard down, while maintaining that everything you did abides by the Council's regulations — correct?
…要论阴谋心计，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}与元老院相比亦捉襟见肘。
...When it comes to schemes and manipulation, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} can't hold a candle to the Council.
Hehe, that's quite flattering, Chrysos Heir.
我们没有别的意思，只是想再提醒你一次——<color=#dbc291ff>黄金裔对圣城的管理是临时的，这只是非常时期的权力托管。</color>

We bear no ill will. We just want to reiterate that <color=#dbc291ff>the Chrysos Heirs' governance of the holy city is only temporary, a provisional transfer of authority during these extraordinary times.</color>
神有神的耳目，人也有人的应对。待到所谓的「神谕」破灭之时…奥赫玛的命运会重新被公民握在手中。

While gods see and hear more extensively, mortals have their own means of dealing with things. When that so-called prophecy crumbles... the destiny of Okhema shall once again rest in the grasp of its people.
回到公民手中…还是回到你的手中，凯妮斯阁下？
Rest in the grasp of its people... or yours, Elder Caenis?
不必如此咄咄逼人。当年的决议投票，可是有接近半数的元老拒绝将圣城交到你们手中，我不过是反对派里不起眼的一员。
Ease off on the hostility. You'd do well to remember nearly half of the elders stood against entrusting the holy city to you in that crucial vote. I am but one voice in the dissent.
接着走你自己的路吧，半神，用尽你的浑身解数来证明我们是错的…但一刻也别忘记，在翁法罗斯，即便是「神」也不能为所欲为。
Keep following your chosen path, demigod, use every bit of your power to show that we are mistaken... but don't forget for a second, in Amphoreus, even "gods" are not above the law.
我也想看看，你这事事皆要亲力亲为的行事风格能坚持多久…呵呵。
I'm quite interested to see how long you can stick with this hands-on way of doing things... heh.
我会尽己所能拯救翁法罗斯，凯妮斯阁下。不论是从诸神手中……
I will employ every means at my disposal to save Amphoreus, Elder Caenis. Whether it means wresting it from the grasp of the gods...
城中的威胁已经排除了，我已将污秽逐一清理。
The dangers lurking within Okhema have been eradicated. I've also cleansed the city of filth.
感谢你，阿雅。那位元老…她又给你添麻烦了吗？
Thank you, Agy. That elder just now... Was she causing you trouble again?
并无大碍。不必为我担心，吾师。
Worry not. I'm capable of handling it, Trinnon.
你应该知道的，凯妮斯，她在黄金战争时……
You should know that during the Chrysos War, Caenis was...
…她是专职「清洗」黄金裔的刺客。我明白。
...An assassin known for purging the Chrysos Heirs. I am aware.
如我所言，元老院并非我们的敌人…至少现在不是。还是回归迫在眉睫的议题吧。
Like I mentioned before, the Council is not our adversary... at least not now. We should be focusing on the more pressing matter at hand.
…嗯。我们已经做好了应对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的准备。这并不容易…缇安已经接近极限了。
...You're right. We've taken all possible precautions against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. It... did not come easy, though... Trianne is already near her limits.
...How much of her power is left?
算上这一次的话…<color=#dbc291ff>也许还能开启三…不，还能开启两次「百界门」吧。</color>
Taking this time into account, <color=#dbc291ff>she should still be able to open the Century Gates three... no, maybe just two more times.</color>
依照先前的约定，缇宝会接过「门匠」的职责。
Tribbie will take over as the gatekeeper, according to what we've agreed on.
看来，我们现在能做的就只有等待了。
Waiting seems to be our only plan now.
嗯。就在这花园静候片刻吧，阿雅。
Indeed. Let us wait here in this garden, Agy.
在你眼中的世界，预言仍如第一日那般清晰吗？
In the world as you perceive it, does the prophecy remain as clear as it was when it first descended?
金色的符文在碧空中闪烁，数不清的只言片语在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}身边起舞。神谕一如既往地清晰。
Golden runes shimmer against the azure sky, and myriad fragments of words dance around {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. The prophecy remains as clear as ever.
它诉说了白厄一行的胜利吗？
Does it foretell the triumph of Phainon and the others?
它…缄口不言。它仿佛知道答案…却不想在这一时刻同我们分享。
It... remains silent, seemingly cognizant of the outcome... though it's unwilling to let us in on the answer just yet.
看来这一次，我们无法从神谕口中得到慰藉了。
We're not going to be finding our solace in the prophecy this time, then.
如此也好。若他果真是被命运选中的孩子……
So be it. If indeed he is fate's chosen child...
…那预言也不过是他故事的旁白。
...then the prophecy is nothing more than a footnote to his tale.
在{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}闭目之前，它原来是这副模样。
So this is how it looked like before {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} closed their eyes.
战士之城，它的壮观名副其实。
The City of Warriors, its magnificence certainly lives up to its name.
首先，得弄清我们回到了哪个时代。
We should first figure out which era we've traveled back to.
为迷迷收集的记忆全都指向黄金战争的尾声，或许能以此为基点来做推断。
The memory fragments we gathered for Mem all point toward the final stage of the Chrysos War... We might be able to use that as a starting point for our deductions.
But we can just ask around!
怕是…会被当做可疑的人吧？悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
...We may draw suspicion this way. Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.
这就是当穿越者的感觉吗？
Ooh, so this is what it feels like to be a time traveler?
的确…有些奇妙。悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
It's... quite intriguing, indeed. But Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.
先在外围调查一番吧，或许能从只言片语中获取有用的信息。
Let's start with the city's surroundings. We might be able to gather some clues by listening and observing.
请问，您是来参加竞赛的吗？
...May I ask if you're here to join the competition?
不…我对无聊的运动并无兴趣。
No... I have no interest in meaningless sports.
那…您是为了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的祭典而来？
So... you're here for {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s festival?
在那个年代，因战争留下创伤的人并不少见。不用太过介意……
War has left its mark on many from this period, so please don't take it personally...
Crown prince? Chrysos Heir? What a joke!
迈德漠斯是个懦夫！随他离开悬锋城的人愧对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的名…耻辱的逃亡者，此生将无法再沐浴荣光！
Mydeimos is just a coward! Those who deserted Kremnos with him have brought shame upon the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... Despicable traitors will never bask in glory again!
但迈德漠斯确实是我们之中最强大的战士…如今他也选择了离开，我们还能追随谁？
But Mydeimos is undoubtedly the mightiest warrior among us... Who else can we turn to now that he's gone?
你在胡言乱语什么？王欧利庞——悬锋城真正的领导者——还没有倒下！他仍坚守在这座城邦，也未曾放弃唤醒伟大的泰坦。
What nonsense are you spouting? King Eurypon, the rightful ruler of Castrum Kremnos, has not fallen! He still stands firm in this city and has never given up on awakening the great Titan.
只要坚定地站在他身边，我们就能找回昨日的荣光，继续给敌人带去血光和征服……
As long as we remain steadfast at his side, we'll reclaim our former glory and sow bloodshed and conquest amongst our foes...
啊，当然…当时的人们还不知道那位旧王的结局。
Right, of course... The people of this time wouldn't know the fate of that old king yet.
不…我不认为万敌阁下的出走是出于怯懦…相反，那是勇敢的决定。
No... I don't believe that Lord Mydei left out of cowardice. It was, in fact, a courageous choice.
他们有理由愤慨…因为万敌阁下曾是悬锋城的英雄。
They are entitled to that rage... because Lord Mydei was once the hero of Castrum Kremnos.
但他并非因为怯懦出走…相反，那是勇敢的决定。
But he did not leave out of cowardice... It was, in fact, a courageous choice.
如此一来，我们所处的时代已经比较明朗了。
With that, we should have enough to determine the time period we are currently in.
是用通用语书写的卷轴，读读看吧。
It's a scroll written in the common tongue. We should see what it's about.
鼎盛时的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}配得上这些词语。但现在……
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} did live up to these values in their prime, but now...
看来此时的悬锋城正在举办祭典，胜出的战士可以觐见城主，获得荣耀。和达米亚诺斯先生说的一样。
Kremnos seems to be hosting a festival, where its victor can go on to have an audience with the ruler and be bestowed with honor. It's just as Mr. Damionis described.
如果能假扮成参赛者，我们或许可以进入城内……
If we can pose as participants, we might be able to get into the city...
上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!
大工匠哈托努斯亲手打造的角斗剑！锤矛！圆盾！
Gladiator swords, maces, and bucklers crafted by the Grand Craftsman Chartonus himself!
想在悬锋祭典上杀敌如麻？来我这里购入最上等的武器吧！
Looking to breeze through your foes at the Kremnos Festival? I've got the best weapons right here for you!
呵…那帮斗士都是群粗人，压根就不识货！
Hmph... Those boorish warriors know nothing about quality gear!
Are these really crafted by Chartonus?
童叟无欺！要怪就怪那帮粗野的斗士，压根就不识货！
I'm as honest a merchant as they come! Those boorish warriors know nothing about quality gear!
但您就不一样了！瞅您这气质，肯定是来自哪个大城邦的名家贵族吧？来来来，我的存货，给您过过眼……
Ah, but you're not like them! With your air of sophistication, you must be a noble from one of the grand city-states, right? Here, let me show you what I have in stock...
从武器的制式可以判别年代…浅浅浏览一下商品也无妨。
The craftsmanship of a weapon reveals the time period it's made... We can afford to take a quick look.
虽然我们身处记忆中，{NICKNAME}阁下…但还是克制下消费的欲望吧？
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... Much as we're in a memory of the past, impulse buying is still an undesirable behavior.
嘿嘿，您出手可真是大方！欢迎惠顾，下次再来！
Wahaha, you're quite the high-roller! Thank you, and please come again!
可以让我看看那把武器吗，{NICKNAME}阁下？
May I take a look at that weapon, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?
我本以为你是会冲动消费的类型，{NICKNAME}阁下…有些刮目相看了。
I thought you'd be the kind to make impulsive purchases, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss.} {NICKNAME}, but you've certainly proven me wrong.
呃…只看不买？真浪费时间……
Tsk. So you're just window shopping? What a waste of my time...
商人阁下，介意让我看看你手上的武器吗？
Mister, can I please have a look at the weapon you're holding on to?
哦？这位恬静的女士居然对兵器感兴趣？可以可以，请随便看！
Oh? A gentle lady like you taking an interest in weapons? Why, of course! Please, feel free to take a closer look!
遐蝶小心翼翼地接过武器，放在手中仔细端详了片刻……
Castorice carefully takes the weapon in her hand and examines it closely for a moment...
嗯？不再看看别的货了吗？
Leaving already? Don't you want to browse through my other wares?
那…两位，要是你们能活过今天的祭典，欢迎下次再来光临。
Well then, come back anytime... if you make it through the festival today.
那些武器上有血腥味。他很努力地掩盖，但死亡的痕迹没那么容易清除…至于那些商品是哪来的，我不愿联想。
Those weapons reek of blood. He made an effort to conceal it, but traces of death aren't something you can easily erase... I shudder to even consider where he got his goods from.
但他没有撒谎，那把兵器的确出自哈托努斯之手。从上面的铭刻，我大致能推断出所处的年代。
He didn't lie about the weapon being one of Chartonus' handiwork, though. Thanks to its inscription, I now have a fairly good guess of the time period we're in.
上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!
等等，{NICKNAME}阁下，最好先别去那边……
Please wait, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. It's best not to go there yet...
还是先在附近收集下线索吧。
Let's try to find more clues around here first.
总结下现有的信息，{NICKNAME}阁下。
Let's run through everything we know so far, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.
万敌阁下已经带着族人投奔了奥赫玛；旧王欧利庞仍然在世，但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}却陷入了沉眠；悬锋城正在召集勇士，召开祭典……

Lord Mydei has gone to seek refuge in Okhema with some of his people. Old King Eurypon still reigns, though {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen into a slumber. And Castrum Kremnos is now gathering warriors from all over in preparation for their festival...
看来我们回到了黄金战争的末年，悬锋城正面临内部分化和泰坦失神的两重打击。
It seems that we've traveled back to the last years of the Chrysos War, a time when Castrum Kremnos grappled with both internal strife and the Titan's waning divinity.
Do you have a plan in mind?
Talk is cheap. Let's charge in!
这么做风险太大，阁下…何况，我可能会变成你的累赘。
That's too risky of a plan. And I might even become a burden to you.
It's about time you used your powers.
我…无法那么精确地控制力量，这么做风险太大。
I... can't control my strength with that much precision, the risk is too great.
最稳妥的方式还是融入规则…既然城中正在举办祭典，也许我们可以前去报名。
The safest bet is to play by the rules. They happen to be hosting a festival in the city... We can try entering as participants?
先进入城中，再找机会行动吧。必要时…我会解决{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的眷属。
Let's make our way into the city first, we can then wait for the right opportunity to strike. When it comes down to it... I will take care of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s kin.
That should be the place to sign up.
…多么可惜！那三位斗士只差一点便能通过试炼，觐见雄伟的欧利庞王，摘得悬锋勇士的桂冠……
...Such a pity! Those three warriors were so close to completing the trial, to emerging as victorious Kremnoan warriors, and to earning an audience with our glorious King Eurypon!
但他们还是倒在了最后一步！天谴先锋手起刀落，将他们剁成了肉泥…愿{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}承认他们的骁勇，接收他们的英灵。

And yet, they collapsed at the final hurdle! The Furiae Praetor swiftly hacked them down, reducing them to mere mincemeat... May {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} recognize their valor and embrace their heroic spirits.
…下一组！下一组前来挑战的斗士在哪？欧利庞王还在等待，等待第一位能活着站在他面前的勇士！
...Next! Do we have any more warriors ready for the challenge? King Eurypon awaits, longing for the first brave soul to survive and stand before him!
Is this competition really that hardcore?
那是生命比面包更廉价的年代，人们见惯了蛮荒和死亡。
This was a time when life was valued far less than bread. People hardly bat their eyelids at the savagery and death that had become commonplace.
没人胆敢迎战吗？你们难道不愿赌上荣耀，在悬锋的光辉下燃烧自己的生命吗？
Does no one have the courage to take up the challenge? Are you not prepared to wager your glory and set your lives ablaze under the splendor of Kremnos?
又是你，话都说不清的愚氓！你手无寸铁，也妄想加入悬锋祭典？这是对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的不敬！
Why, it's you again, inarticulate fool! Pfft, unarmed, and yet you dare to think you can join the Kremnos Festival? That's an insult to the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}!
我已强调过了——这是同时考验三人的试炼！若是连愿意和你出生入死的同伴都找不到，还是尽早回家放牧吧！

I've told you before — this is a trial for three! This is a trial that requires three people! If you can't even gather enough comrades to stand by you in life and death, it's time you went home and took up herding!
看来你不止是口齿不清，连耳朵也不怎么好使…你如果继续胡搅蛮缠，休怪我们不客气。
Hmph, so you're not just inarticulate, but also hard of hearing... Keep up this act of nuisance, and I'll be sure to show you how uncivil we can get!
{NICKNAME}阁下，这也许是个机会…我们可以和那个人一起进城。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, this might be our chance...! We can enter the city with him.
Pfft... I see what this is.
无妨！既然你找到了愿意一同赴死的战友，那便上前来吧，愚氓！
As you wish! Good for you, you now have allies to court death with. Come on up here, fool!
血脉偾张的戏码已经快让人审美疲劳了，加入一组实力相差悬殊的「插曲」亦是不错的调剂。
The adrenaline-pumping scenes are becoming a bit tiresome, so adding a wildly mismatched "interlude" would make for a refreshing change and spice things up.
来吧——「生存」就是唯一的规则！只要你们还有一丝呼吸，要么克服所有难关，赢得此世的荣耀——要么把灵魂留在悬锋城，成为「纷争」的养料！

Let the trial begin, then! Your only goal is to survive! As long as you still hold the breath of life, you'll either triumph over every trial and claim worldly glory — or leave your soul in Kremnos to become fuel for Strife!
要坚定，{NICKNAME}阁下…想想白厄和万敌，我们也要拿出同样的决心。
Have faith, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei are still fighting. We must match their unwavering resolve.
这么着急赴死吗？很好，那就让试炼开始吧！
Eager to meet your demise? Very well then, let the trial begin!
报上你们的名字，勇士们。
银河球棒侠，遐蝶，格奈乌斯……
能借着天谴之锋的耀光看清各位的面庞，我倍感荣幸。
It is an honor to see your true faces revealed by the radiant glow of The Blade of Fury.
「勇气，荣耀，理智，坚韧，牺牲」——以{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的五大美德之名，穿过圣城的大门，去迎接你们的末路。
In the name of the five virtues of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} — courage, honor, reason, tenacity, and sacrifice — stride through the holy city's gate and embrace your fate.
愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.
以{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的五大美德之名，穿过圣城的大门，去迎接你们的末路。
In the name of the five virtues of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, stride through the holy city's gate and embrace your fate.
愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.
似乎没有太多守卫。我本以为场面会更加…激烈。
They have fewer guards than I expected. I thought we'd be greeted with something more... intense.
Observing formalities before aggression, now that's a thoughtful approach.
Do these battle-hardened people also have a taste for puzzles?
让注定赴死之人浪费时间，用意何在？
Why stall those charging for Death's door?
我们没有赴死的打算，阁下。想办法解开他们布置的难题吧。
Death is not part of our plan, Lord Gnaeus. We should work on solving the puzzle they've set for us.
看，那面墙壁上悬挂着两个火盆。也许…这是某种提示？
Look, there are two braziers on that wall. Could they be... some sort of hint?
那些突出地面的机关，是要我们想办法激活它们？
And those mechanisms protruding from the ground... Should we attempt to activate them?
利用场上的工具解开谜题吧，两位阁下。
Let's make use of the tools here to solve the puzzle.
是出口吗？好像被锁上了。
Is this the exit? Oh, it's locked.
先集中精力点燃火盆吧。
Let's focus on igniting the braziers first.
Barricades... We must find a way to remove them.
是专为扎格列斯之手设计的试炼吗？靠近些看看吧。
Could it be a challenge that requires us to use the Hand of Zagreus? Let's get closer and find out.
如此一来，前方的道路就畅通了。
The way ahead is now clear.
格奈乌斯阁下，继续前进之前…有一件事，我们必须同你说明。
Lord Gnaeus, before we move on... there is something we must explain to you.
…我明白。你们并非为这愚蠢的竞赛而来。
...Hm. You're not here for this foolish competition.
这一路你都在压制体内的暗潮…你欺骗不了我。
You've been fighting to suppress your true thoughts within you all this while... You cannot deceive me.
你们对那庸王编造出来的虚伪荣光毫无兴趣。我无意过问你们的目的，只要不妨碍到我……
I know you have no care for that fatuous king's contrived glory. You can keep your motive to yourselves, so long as you stay out of my way...
我已经说过一遍——粉碎盘踞在悬锋城深处的愚蠢。
I've said it before: To obliterate the deeply entrenched roots of foolishness within Castrum Kremnos.
真正的挑战来了…艰难的部分才刚开始。
Now the true challenge begins... This is where it gets difficult.
无谓的磨损，他们本该倒在战场上。若执意阻拦…就带他们去见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧。
Meaningless forestalling. They are meant to taste defeat on the battlefield. Deter us further... and I shall send them to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
Got a crick in your back?
等不了，战斗的欲望正在高涨！
No can do, I'm already itching to fight!
Looks like I've hit the jackpot this time...
装作什么都没听到，一切如常。
Pretend you did not hear anything. Act oblivious.
会找到机会让他现身的。
We'll find a way to make him come out of hiding.
哈…跑得可真快，一袋都快装不下了……
*pant* They sure are quick on their feet. One bag won't be enough to hold everything...
这一趟下来，接下来几天应该都不用捡剩饭填肚皮了吧？嘿嘿…真希望这祭典能多持续一阵啊。
After this haul, I shouldn't have to scrounge for leftovers for the next few days. If only this festival could go on longer...
…怪不得你出售的武器上有血腥味。
...That's why all of your weapons reek of blood.
呃，呃呃，那个…三位勇士，我可以解释！你们看啊，我这……
Uh... ahem, well... I can explain myself! You see, I—
如狗鼠般卑劣的清道夫…让我送你去见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧，窃贼。
Looting the arena like a despicable lowlife... Prepare to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, thief.
这样做不对。请…放他走吧。
This isn't right. Please... let him go.
回头看看那些碎裂的尸骸，女孩——你能毫不犹豫地杀死那些战士，却要怜悯这只肮脏的狗鼠？
Turn around, girl. Look at the corpses of those we crushed. You can cut down warriors without a second thought, yet you show compassion to this scum?
给我一个解释…证明你并非同那群乌合之众一样愚蠢。
Give me a reason... show me you're not as dumb as those ignorant fools.
因为…他还对死亡心存畏惧。尽管卑劣、肮脏，但他罪不至死，不应沦为{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}的祭品。
Because... he still knows how to fear death. Despicable or scum he may be, but he doesn't deserve to die here, nor become a sacrifice to the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}.
它是世间最可怕的幽暗，如果任其生长…一切光亮将被吞噬。
It is the darkest force in this world, and if left unchecked... all light will be consumed.
回答你的提问，驱使我挥剑的从来不是对杀戮的热忱，而是对死亡的恐惧。
To answer your question, it is never the desire to kill that drives me to wield a sword, but rather, the fear of death.
…滚吧，狗鼠。你今天捡回了一条命。
...Get lost, scum. Consider yourself lucky today.
谢、谢谢、谢谢你们！我…我不会再出现在这座城邦周边了，我保证！
Th—Thank you! Y—You won't see me around this city again, I promise!
谢谢你手下留情，格奈乌斯阁下。
Your mercy is appreciated, Lord Gnaeus.
别误会。这不过是对你胆识的嘉奖，不代表我赞同你的理论。
Make no mistake. This is simply a commendation for your courage, not a sign that I agree with your ideas.
依照你的说法，在刚才的瞬间…你一定是克服了莫大的恐惧，才胆敢拦在我的剑前。
If I understand you correctly, you must have overcome tremendous fear to dare to stand in the way of my sword.
This trial isn't over... We should keep going.
又是相同的机关…需要点燃两个火盆才能打开通路。
It's the same mechanism... We need to ignite the two braziers to unlock the way forward.
上等的石料…可惜出现在了不该出现的地方。
An exquisite stone... It's a shame it appeared somewhere it doesn't belong.
也许用「宝珠」可以让它暂时消失？
We may be able to temporarily remove it with the orb?
大门不能在这个时空下打开…去典籍那里回收「奇迹」吧？
The gate won't budge in this time dimension... How about recovering the "miracle" from the tome?
勇者…勇者！靠近些…让我看清你啊……
Brave one... O Brave one! Come closer... Let me get a good look at you...
Are you calling out to me, lion?
没错…没错。你身上的光环啊…我许久未见如此滚烫的灵魂啊。
That's right... I am. You have an unusual aura about you... I have not seen such a blazing soul in a very long time.
悬锋城最灼热的流星，已经飞离了我们啊…剩下的只是一簇随时可能熄灭的残烛。
The blazing star of Castrum Kremnos has drifted far from us... all that remains is a dim candle, on the verge of being extinguished.
年迈又昏聩的王，在密谋着不可言说的计划…他们想要亵渎{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性、它的灵魂、还有它留给悬锋城的遗产啊。
The aging and feeble king is plotting something unspeakable... One that seeks to defile {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, their soul, and the legacy they left to Kremnos.
我们需要拯救…需要一位勇士带给我们希望啊。
We need salvation... we need a champion to reignite our hope.
…我不是来拯救谁的，老狮子。我来到这里只是为了响应召唤…粉碎愚蠢和贪婪。
...I did not come to save anybody, old lion. I am here to answer a call... to crush greed and foolishness once and for all.
或许…那正是我们急需的东西啊。
Perhaps... that's what we desperately need.
前进吧，勇士…去回应召唤吧。我已年迈…疲倦…但我会目送你远离这里，为你念诵战无不胜的祷言啊……
Forge on then, warrior... heed the call. I am elderly... and weary... but I shall watch you depart and pray for victory in every battle encounter...
如此惨烈…这祭典究竟是为了满足谁的欲望？
Such carnage... whose desires does this festival truly serve?
失去目标的野兽，只是在凭本能追踪血腥罢了。
A beast that has lost sight of its target and is now guided only by its innate bloodlust.
格奈乌斯阁下，我们已经深入悬锋城的心脏…该让你知悉我们的目的了。
Lord Gnaeus, now that we're at the very heart of Castrum Kremnos... it's time to let you in on our goal here.
我们不奢望合作，但求不生冲突。
While we do not expect you to work with us, we do not wish for conflict either.
我们为找到毁灭{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的方法而来。我们收到了…一则情报，失去理智的纷争泰坦正在为自己打造不朽的躯体。

We came here to find a way to destroy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. We received... intel that the Titan of Strife had lost their reason and is now trying to create an immortal vessel for themself.
如果不加以阻止，它会对后世的翁法罗斯形成巨大的威胁。
If we do not stop them now, they will pose a grave danger to the future generations of Amphoreus.
我们的目标并不冲突，女孩。找到泰坦，我们便能各取所需。
Our goals are not in conflict, girl. Find the Titan and we can both get what we came for.
Will we have to battle them...?
我嗅到了恐惧…你胆怯了？
牺牲者的灵魂还在这大厅里彷徨…无意义的牺牲令他们蒙受冤屈，悲嚎不绝于耳。
The souls of the sacrificed are still wandering this hall... I hear their endless bemoaning, their senseless deaths have left them wronged, their mournful wails echo endlessly.
也许我能从他们那里听到些什么……
Perhaps I can learn something from their cries...
现身吧，战士之魂…我知道你尚未安歇。
Reveal yourself, O warrior spirit... I know that you have yet to rest.
引导我们吧，让我们看见你曾看见的，听到你曾听到的……
I ask for you to guide us. Let us see what you once gazed upon, let us hear what your ears once heard...
未能安眠者…请告诉我们，你听到了什么？
O, ye who cannot rest in peace... Tell us, what have you heard?
「真的不用处理掉吗？这里的腐臭…已经令人难以忍受了。」
"Do we really just leave them like that? The putrid stench of decay here is almost too much to bear."
「不，你难道没听清吗？这是仪式的一部分，是为泰坦奉上的献祭。」
"Yes. Didn't you hear? This is part of the ritual. We need to offer up sacrifices to the Titan."
「继续迎接挑战者，让他们一直战斗下去…只有让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}沉醉在战争的气息中，才能压制它的疯狂。」
"Keep the challengers coming and have them fight till the end... only by letting {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} revel in the chaos of war can we control their descent into madness."
他们在营造一场虚假的战争，企图用这种方式令泰坦镇静。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…它的确已经丧失了意志。
Hmph, fabricating a spurious war in an attempt to calm the Titan. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... has indeed lost their will.
看来这种野蛮的方式奏效了。
This barbaric method of theirs clearly proved to be effective.
灵魂…它还可以为我们展示更多。
The soul... can reveal even more to us.
尚未安眠的亡魂，咳…你听到了什么？
O, restless soul... *cough* Tell us, what have you heard?
「祭典还要持续多久？欧利庞王…他还在拖延什么？」
"How much longer is this festival going to last? What is King Eurypon waiting for?"
「耐心些，计划尚未完成…<color=#dbc291ff>封存泰坦的灵魂并非易事</color>。祭司们已经在加班加点……」
"Be patient, for our plan is still underway... <color=#dbc291ff>Sealing a Titan's soul is no easy endeavor</color>. The priests are already working as fast as they can..."
「从其它城邦虏来的祭司，谁能保证他们的忠诚？我看还是要杀鸡儆猴，哼……」
"Priests captured from other city-states — who can guarantee their loyalty? Hmph, I say we punish one of them so they know to behave..."
莫非是利波的诗歌中提到的「剑皿」？出自哈托努斯之手的……
Could it be the Sword Vessel in Lipos' ballad? The one that Chartonus crafted himself...
「愚蠢」…现在你们或许能理解这二字的意义。
Foolishness... Perhaps now you begin to understand the weight of that term.
懦弱——他们惧怕失去信仰和指引。
Out of cowardice. They are afraid of losing their faith and guidance.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}在与无形之物战斗，无暇顾及凡人的愚蠢。
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} fights against the unseen, they have no time for the folly of mortals.
尼卡多利就这么任他们摆布？
So Nikador is at their mercy?
它此刻在与无形之物战斗，无暇顾及凡人的愚蠢。
They are fighting against the unseen, they have no time for the folly of mortals.
懦弱之人…他们惧怕失去信仰和指引。
Cowards... They are afraid of losing their faith and guidance.
格奈乌斯阁下…你对那位泰坦似乎十分了解。
Lord Gnaeus, you seem to know a lot about that Titan.
或许在我耳边低语的，正是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}本尊。
The whispers I'm hearing may very well be from {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} themself.
彼岸在呼唤…继续指引我们吧，亡魂。
They're beckoning to us from the other side... Continue to guide us through, O wandering soul.
Is this one taking more out of you?
Do you need a break, Castorice?
我…我很好，{NICKNAME}阁下。不必担心。
I... I'm fine, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. There's no need to worry.
亡魂…告诉我，你听到了什么？
Lost souls... Tell us, what have you heard?
「听说了吗？欧利庞王的谋臣们正在拟定计划，他们好像打算对奥赫玛发动总攻。」
"Have you heard? King Eurypon's advisors are coming up with a plan to launch an all-out attack on Okhema."
「以现在的兵力？这是彻头彻尾的疯狂……」
"With just the handful of soldiers we have? They're absolutely out of their minds..."
「这是长远的战略。眼下的第一要务还是完成对神王的…『工程』。」
"That's the long-term plan. Our priority for now is still to complete the god-king's... 'project'."
袭击奥赫玛的计划，在如此久远的年代就已有雏形了吗？
So their plan to attack Okhema was conceived that long ago?
原来那不是尼卡多利的设计…
Looks like it wasn't Nikador's idea...
始作俑者恐怕早就化成灰了。
Whoever hatched that plan must've long since turned to ash.
我早已发现，你们与此地…不，是与这个年代格格不入。
I've long suspected that you two are not from here... No, not just that. You're not from this era.
是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}吗？不…哪怕是它，也没有如此强大的神力。
Is it {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}? No... they would not be capable of such power.
Looks like we'll have to silence him for good!
冷静，{NICKNAME}阁下…我认为他没有恶意。
Calm yourself, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I believe he has no ill intent toward us.
你没猜错…咳…格奈乌斯阁下——我们的确不属于这个时代。
Your guess is correct, Lord Gnaeus... *cough* We are not from this era.
遥远未来的某日…陷入疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会把我们的伙伴和家园逼上绝路。我们回到这里…就是为了寻找阻止末日降临的方法。

Some day in the distant future... a mad {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will drive our companions and our homeland to the brink of destruction. The reason we came back here... is to find a way to prevent Amphoreus from falling to its doom.
…它的疯狂会延续至千百年后？人的愚蠢所能造成的破坏难以丈量。到头来，原来我们的目标完全一致。
...Their madness will last for thousands of years? The destruction created by human folly is more than anyone could imagine. It so happens that we have the same goal.
咳、咳…灵魂…还未散去。继续前进吧……
*cough* *cough* The souls... are still lingering here. Let us keep going...
Why don't you take a break...?
亡魂…告诉我，你听到了什么？
Lost souls... Tell us, what have you heard?
「勇气。荣耀。坚韧。牺牲。将它的神性分成五份…但仍有一瓣缺失。」
"Courage, Honor, Tenacity, and Sacrifice. Their divinity was split into five parts... but we're missing one fragment."
「神王啊…你将自己的<color=#dbc291ff>理智</color>丢弃到了何处？」
"Oh god-king... Where did you lose your <color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>?"
「我们会继续寻找。我们一定会找到……」
"We will keep searching for it. We must find it..."
咳…为被夹在生死两界之间的灵魂引渡，居然如此痛苦……
*cough*... I never knew ferrying souls stuck in limbo could bring this much pain...
要是这世上没有死亡就好了。那样，他们就不必在这里彷徨…我也不必受此折磨。
If only death didn't exist in this world. That way, they wouldn't have to linger here... and I wouldn't have to suffer.
…不必再聆听亡者之声了，现在的信息已经足够。悬锋城人对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂动了手脚，我们只需找到他们渎神的现场。

...You don't have to listen to these spirits any longer. We've learned enough from them now. The people of Kremnos have tampered with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul in some way. What we need to do is find the place of their blasphemous act.
别倒下——我们还没到终点。
Stay strong. We have not reached the end yet.
…马上就好。给我几秒钟的时间…让我将这个陌生的灵魂送到温柔乡吧。
...I'll be fine. Just give me a few moments... Let me send this lost soul into the gentle embrace of death.
彼岸在呼唤…安心睡去吧，亡魂……
The other side is beckoning to you... Go on, lost soul, rest in peace...
失去理智了吗？可悲的造物。给它个痛快吧。
Has it lost its sanity? What a woeful creation. I shall put it out of its misery.
No... I doubt it'll be that simple.
那庸王欧利庞，他试图剥离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性，并以精心打造的容器永久贮存。
King Eurypon wanted to strip {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} of their divinity and seal it within an intricate vessel for all eternity.
如此一来，便能令{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神躯不死…但在开始对泰坦的改造之前，他要先用眷属进行实验。
That's how he would immortalize {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divine body... Of course, he had to test it out on a Titankin before going on to remold the Titan.
How are you so sure about it?
…因为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}四分五裂的灵魂就被贮存在这些雕像中。我听见的召唤…就来自于它们。
...Because the fragments of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul are sealed in these statues. The calls that I've been hearing... are coming from them.
重新拼合它的灵魂，让它的神性核心再度合而为一。如此一来，它便能找回身为泰坦的尊严，你们也能获得一个正面战胜它的机会。
As long as we reassemble their soul and unite their divine core, they will recover their dignity as a Titan. You will then have a chance to triumph over them in battle.
终于，我们找到一切的源头了……
We've finally found the root of everything...
我来拖住它吧。对于已经失去理智的眷属，死亡的气息就是能令它们沉醉的蜜霜。
I'll find a way to stall it. To Titankin that have lost all reason, death is as intoxicating as nectar is to bees.
两位阁下，请你们找到让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂重归完整的办法。只有修正了这段历史…翁法罗斯才能拥有未来。
Please, you must find a way to make {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul whole again. It is only by fixing this point in history... that we can salvage the future of Amphoreus.
可以再次利用时空的力量。
We can tap into the power of time again.
准备好穿越了吗，角斗士？
Ready to travel through time, gladiator?
给我看看你的能耐吧，记忆行者。
Let's see what you can do, delver of memories.
用更悬锋的方式前进！<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
Progress forward in the way of Kremnos! <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>
Let's see what you can do.
No worries, let me ponder on it a bit more...
没啥头绪，该怎么办？<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
I have no clue, what can I do? <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>
没有头绪…只能先付诸行动。
There's no trace... Let's just start with these first.
No worries, let me ponder on it a bit more...
留在这里，战士…不要离开你的死亡女神。此处的鲜血芬芳只为你而盛开……
Stay here, warrior... Do not leave your Goddess of Death. The enticing scent of blood here is meant for you, and only you...
如此昏暗破败，这就是悬锋城的未来吗？
This dark and derelict place... is this the future of Kremnos?
连我自己也依旧感到神奇。
I can barely believe it myself.
你与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}之间的共鸣一定十分牢固。
The resonance between you and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} must be strong.
这些年里一定发生了很多事。
Kremnos must have been through a lot since then...
历史走上了错误的轨道…需要修正。
History has taken a wrong turn... and must be set on the right course once more.
物换星移，但泰坦的灵魂依旧四分五裂。庸王和他的仆从大概早已化作齑粉…无人知晓曾经于此发生的一切。

Much time has passed, yet the Titan's soul remains fragmented. That covetous king and his servants would have turned to dust by now... Their scheme that once unfolded here has likewise been buried with them.
你我都为终结这荒谬而来。那就结伴而行，将死亡还给那位泰坦吧。
You and I are both here to bring an end to this absurdity. So, join me comrade. Let us bring death unto that Titan.
在一个十分接近的时空里…
From a time dimension very close to ours...
…我的同伴在和尼卡多利战斗。
在这破碎的时代，仍有凡人在反抗命运——了不起。
So, there are mortals who fight against fate even in this hopelessly bleak era. I am impressed.
但只靠力量无法消灭不死的躯体…所以你和那女孩才会来到这个时代寻找答案。
But strength alone will not help them destroy an immortal body... That's why you and that girl went back in time seeking answers.
此处的铸魂雕像只有四尊。假使他们的确将{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性分成了五份，也仍旧有一瓣灵魂不知所踪。
There are only four soul-forged statues here. If they did split {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity into five parts, there is still one fragment of the soul that is missing.
无论如何，要先行动起来。
Let's just start with these first.
没有头绪…只能先付诸行动。
There's no trace... Let's just start with these first.
来吧，帮助我将「纷争」的神性拼凑完整。
Come, help me piece together Strife's divinity.
I can hear... I hear it.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它神性的一部分被封存在这里……
A part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity is sealed within this...
「吾等，将神王的『勇气』封藏于剑皿之中。」
"We shall hereby seal the god-king's Courage within this sword vessel."
「以此为证：它从未在战场上退缩过一步。」
"A testament that they have never once retreated from a battle."
「即便面对那来自迷雾彼端、不可触及的黑潮，它亦孤身举剑，赫然迎战……」
"Even against the formless black tide from beyond the dense fog, they alone have raised their sword and faced the enemy head-on..."
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「勇气」——
Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.
铸魂雕像的长剑未能归位，此处还缺了些什么。
The Sword of the Soul-Forging Statue failed to return to its original place. Something is still missing here.
也许你应该尝试用扎格列斯之手将<color=#dbc291ff>雕像的底座复位。</color>
Perhaps you should try using the Hand of Zagreus to <color=#dbc291ff>restore the statue's base.</color>
铸魂雕像的长剑未能归位，此处还缺了些什么。仔细观察，雕像的本体并不完整。
The Sword of the Soul-Forging Statue failed to return to its original place. Something is still missing here. Upon close inspection, you notice the body of the statue is incomplete.
也许你应该尝试<color=#dbc291ff>用欧洛尼斯宝珠映照出它的全身。</color>
Perhaps you should try <color=#dbc291ff>using the Oronyx Orb to reflect its whole body.</color>
The voices... are starting to pour in.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，此处有它神性的一瓣……
Here lies another fragment of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity...
「吾等，将神王的『荣耀』封藏于剑皿之中。」
"We shall hereby seal the god-king's Honor within this sword vessel."
「以此为证：它从未将神矛刺入任何敌人的后背。」
"A testament that they have never plunged their divine lance into an enemy's back."
「纵使腹背受敌、内外交患，它亦从未向邪劣的诡计妥协，守护着战士的尊严……」
"Even when enemies close in from all sides, they have never conceded to evil schemes, fiercely guarding the warrior's dignity..."
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「荣耀」——
Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.
Go on... Tell me your tale.
「吾等，将神王的『坚韧』封藏于剑皿之中。」
"We shall hereby seal the god-king's Tenacity within this sword vessel."
「以此为证：它在以不屈的意志与那不明源头的灾厄搏斗。」
"A testament that their will is unyielding in the fight against the calamity of unknown origin."
「即便那黑潮如此强大、足以腐蚀神明的意志，它亦站立至今，对抗那浊世的阴霾……」
"No matter how powerful the black tide may be, enough to corrupt the wills of other gods, they stand tall and upright in defiance of the turbulent fog, even till today..."
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「坚韧」——
Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.
这尊雕像中亦存有神性。
为我讲述吧，此处发生的一切……
Tell me everything that happened here...
「吾等，将神王的『牺牲』封藏于剑皿之中。」
"We shall hereby seal the god-king's Sacrifice within this sword vessel."
「以此为证：它陷入沉眠前最后留下的话语，是为世界抵御黑暗浪潮的誓言。」
"A testament that their final words before sinking into dormancy were a vow to defend the world against the black tide."
「它将以自身为城墙，阻挡无尽蔓延的疯狂。它深谙：若末世降临，世间将无物可供征伐……」

"They use their own body as our city walls, keeping out and protecting us from the pervasive spread of madness. They are acutely aware that if the end times were to arrive, there would be nothing left in this world to conquer..."
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「牺牲」——
Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.
嗯…只剩下那最后缺失的一瓣神性。
Hm... We're now left with the final missing fragment of divinity.
我知道该去哪里寻找了。
I believe I know where it is.
该去哪找缺失的那份神性？
Where could the missing fragment of divinity be?
我想错了，那最后的一瓣神性并没有遗失……
I was wrong all this while. The final fragment of divinity was never lost...
我知道该去哪里寻找了。
I believe I know where it is.
快要成功了吗，格奈乌斯阁下？
Lord Gnaeus, are we almost there?
嗯…只剩下这最后一步了。
Yes... There is just one last thing to do.
不知何时，从遥远的地平线外诞生了黑潮——它缓慢地逼近翁法罗斯的边界，而{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是第一位与之接触的泰坦。

No one knows when the black tide first appeared beyond the distant horizon, but when it slowly encroached upon Amphoreus' borders, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} was the first Titan to venture forth.
在和黑潮的抗争中，它的神志开始消逝…鼎盛时的泰坦只一剑便能令群岛灰飞烟灭，却无法斩除腐蚀的根源。

During the battle against the black tide, their sanity began to slip away... In their prime, the Titan could obliterate an entire archipelago with a single slash, yet they could not sever the root of this corruption.
它凭着意志与黑潮缠斗，但终究落败。在神性被彻底污染前，它将自己的一部分剥离了出来……
They battled the black tide by sheer will alone, but ultimately succumbed to it. Before their divinity could be completely corrupted, they removed a part of it...
它剥离的那部分神性——它最想完整保存的部分——即为「理智」。
The fragment of divinity that they stripped away — the fragment they wanted to preserve the most — was Reason.
泰坦相信，它的「理智」终有一日会响应召唤，回到神明的躯体身边…完成它应尽的使命。
The Titan believed that their Reason would someday respond to their calling, to return to their body... and fulfill their sacred mission.
Are all these... versions of you from the past?
你是…尼卡多利的一部分？
他们代表了无数次失败的尝试。在你们的帮助下，我终于能给这一切画上句号。
They represent countless failed endeavors. With your help, I can finally put an end to everything.
格奈乌斯阁下…你打算怎么做？
Lord Gnaeus... What do you intend to do?
勇气、荣耀、坚韧、牺牲，它们皆是我的分身…从灵魂碎片的低语里，我已经得到定论——
Courage, Honor, Tenacity, and Sacrifice... they're all versions of me. Hearing the murmurs of these soul fragments has led me to a conclusion.
{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>纷争之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>尼卡多利</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的灵魂已经腐烂，再无被救赎的可能。</color>
{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Strife Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Nikador's</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff> soul is corrupted beyond the point of salvation.</color>
有什么事是我们能做的？
How do we stop them then?
There is only one way to do so.
束缚着神性的封印已经解除。只要在此完成铸魂，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就能重归完整。
The seal that binds their divinity is already broken. As long as we complete the soul-forging here, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will be whole once more.
<color=#dbc291ff>你们将与一位几近鼎盛的泰坦战斗；同时，弑神的荣光也将在你们面前绽放。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You will go into battle with a Titan nearly at the zenith of their powers. And when that happens, the glory of slaying a god will also be presented before you.</color>
我将回归本源，成为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神性的一个片段。
I will return to where I came from and become a part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity once more.
腐蚀大概会将我吞没吧？但为了终结疯狂，这一步无可避免。
In all likelihood, I will also be consumed by corruption. An inevitable course of action if we hope to end this madness.
你愿意为一个…自己无法见证的未来做出牺牲？
You are willing to... sacrifice yourself for a future you won't get to witness?
那是我的本源，我的使命。我并非凡人，也不惧怕死亡——即便如此，你也打算为我哀哭吗？
This is my purpose, my origin. I am no mortal and I do not fear death... Even so, will you still weep for me?
这世上的离别皆是哀伤，阁下。
All farewells in this world are sorrowful, Lord Gnaeus.
我们相识不久，但我已从你身上学到很多。那么，让我在临走前也教你一课吧——
While we haven't known each other for long, I have learned much from you. In return, I'll teach you a lesson of mine before I go...
不要嫌恶你的天赋，不要憎恨死亡。<color=#dbc291ff>征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，皆因万物终有逝去之时。</color>
Do not detest your talent and do not abhor death. <color=#dbc291ff>Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust.</color>
…身为「纷争」的化身，却在向我讲述世界的壮美吗？真是讽刺……
...The embodiment of Strife telling me about the majesty of the world...? What an irony...
只有被置于纷争之下，文明方能成长。人生来便憎恶苦难，但唯有苦难能教人屹立……
Civilizations only grow under strife. Humans instinctively loathe suffering, yet suffering is the only thing that teaches them to stand unyielding and tall...
We can't put this off any longer.
I will do as you wish.
若必须与你一战…那便战吧。
If this is meant to be... then I will fight you.
{F#她}{M#他}比你更懂得战斗的意义，也许能成为你的启迪。
{F#She}{M#He} knows what it truly means to go to battle. Perhaps {F#she}{M#he} can be your inspiration.
你若死在我的矛下，便无需再试着理解这些话语；你若能将我埋葬…答应我，你们会将火种当作柴薪，升起烈焰，继续与黑潮抗争。

If you die by my lance, then there's no need to reflect on what I said. But if you should send me to my grave... promise me that you will use my Coreflame to fuel a roaring blaze and continue the fight against the black tide.
我…代表全体黄金裔，答应你的请求。
On behalf of all the Chrysos Heirs, I... promise you.
我是天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}——乱世的使者，纷争的化身！
I am {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Lance of Fury, the messenger of turmoil, and the embodiment of Strife!
记住——<color=#dbc291ff>我是这世间必要的伤痕！</color>
Remember this: <color=#dbc291ff>I am the scar that this world needs!</color>
你又进入了…和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}那时一样的状态。
You were in the same state as when you were with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
...How can we go back to the past?
That battle cry... Is that Lord Mydei?
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…他们还在战斗。
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They're still locked in battle.
（若虫已经定位到扰动的源头了…去找衣匠收集情报吧。）
(The nymphs have located the source of the disruption... I should check with the "Garmentmaker" for intel.)
Should I report it to the captain?
（不能留下痕迹，避免他人起疑。）
(I need to ensure I leave no trace behind, so that no one suspects anything.)
(Time to move on to the next nymph.)
（若虫标记出的威胁还剩一处。）
(There's one more threat marked by the nymphs.)
（天父{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，指引我…一切都还在掌控之中。）
({RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, sky father, I seek your guidance... May your hand keep all things in order.)
毫无新意的把戏…你真以为能逃出我的罗网吗？
How predictable... Did you truly think you could outrun me?
桀桀桀！不试试又怎么知道？
Teehee! It was worth a try, wasn't it?
（若虫找到的污秽都已经清理完了。）
(All the filth marked by the nymphs has been cleansed.)
…缇宁？看来她已经在为保卫奥赫玛做准备了。
