相较凡人，泰坦在空间和时间的尺度上更为宏大，因而「死」的过程也更为漫长。所谓「陨落」，不过是凡人出于无知的曲解。
In contrast to mortals, Titans exist on a grander scale of space and time, thus elongating their passage into death. The notion of their "fall" is but a misinterpretation born of mortal ignorance.
有趣的见解，可惜难以证明或证伪。毕竟自幻灭世以来，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}便不再言语。无论学者还是祭司，皆对尊神的陨落作出了宣言。

An intriguing concept, albeit challenging to substantiate. After all, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has maintained a profound silence ever since the Era Erasa, while scholars and priests alike have conveyed the message of the gods' imminent fall.
或许只是众神太过傲慢，认为他们没有沟通的资格。
Perhaps the gods, in their arrogance, deemed it beneath them to reveal their perspectives to mortals.
Could you elaborate on your statement?
{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，神话中天父的同袍，如今正寄居在我的脑子里。若由我来提问，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}想必没有拒绝的理由。

{RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, the kin of the sky father as recounted in myths, now resides within my brain. Were I to inquire, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would have no cause to refuse.
不无道理。可如果负世的尊神仍不应答呢？
That very well could be true, but what if the Worldbearing Titan still chooses to remain silent?
呵，那就说明翁法罗斯人编撰的神话，连笑话都不如。
Heh, in that case, the myths crafted by the people of Amphoreus are nothing more than pitiful jests.
那不妨试试看吧。我也十分乐见您的理论开花结果，看它将为这濒毁的世界带来何种变革。
It's worth a try, I believe, and I'd love to witness the fruits of your theory and the change it may bring to this imperiled world.
因为，您有一点说得十分在理：倘若泰坦已至终结，它便绝无可能作出回应——
Because I completely concur with you on this aspect: If the Titan has indeed met their end, any response from them would be impossible...
呵…诸位人子的创造可真是壮观哪。
Heh... The children of humanity have indeed created a spectacle.
欢迎来到「黎明云崖」。相较云石天宫的喧嚣凡俗，这里的一切都更为庄重，非受邀者不可往来。
Welcome to Dawncloud. The atmosphere here carries a greater sense of solemnity than the mundane clamor of the Marmoreal Palace, with entry permitted only to the invited.
我曾在此接待过祭司、学者、斗士，往来于此的皆是崇高之人。现如今，我们甚至迎来了一位泰坦，可喜可贺。
Only esteemed beings grace this place, and among them, I've received priests, scholars, warriors... And now, we even have the honor to be in the presence of a Titan. What a joyous occasion!
哼…从渎神者摇身一变，成为崇高神性的替身，我倒该为此感到荣幸了。
Hmph... Once deemed a blasphemer, now a surrogate for revered divinity. The honor should rightfully be mine, shouldn't it?
我将召集凯妮斯一派前来会晤，且请阁下稍事等待，随后会有传令士兵为您带路。
I'll notify Caenis and the others of your arrival. Kindly wait for a moment. A soldier will be here to guide you shortly.
期间，阁下可在附近随意游览。但还请不要离开卫兵视线，以免贻误紧要事机。
In the meanwhile, you are welcome to explore the vicinity, but kindly remain within the guards' view. Delaying the crucial meeting is something none of us wish to see, I presume.
我清楚凯妮斯的做派，不用刻意强调。
I'm well aware of Caenis' methods. There's no need to emphasize that.
谨遵吩咐。感谢您的配合。
As you wish. Your cooperation is much appreciated.
啊呀…本以为你有何奇谋，不成想是从一座牢笼进到另一座来了哪。
Alas... I had hoped for a brilliant plan from you, but it turns out you just left one cage to enter another.
我自有把握，犯不着操多余的心。
Save your concerns. I know very well what I'm doing.
呵呵，那吾便去周围转上一遭好了。
Hehe, I shall depart to explore the surroundings, then.
四下望去…此地可有描绘吾的壁画？吾倒是好奇，树庭以外的人子，如何看待别尊泰坦呢。
Now that I look around... I wonder if there are any murals bearing my portrait around here. I'm quite intrigued to see how the children of humanity beyond the Grove perceive another Titan.
Off you go. I won't be joining you.
（这泰坦倒是悠哉…先探探元老院最近的动向好了。）
(This Titan appears to be quite at ease... I should investigate the Council of Elders' recent activities first.)
Be aware, I can hear you perfectly well from here.
那刻夏老师？听说树庭的学者为了抵御黑潮英勇牺牲，想不到您还安然无恙…真是命运垂青！
Professor Anaxa? Word has it that the scholars of the Grove valiantly perished resisting the black tide. To find you here safe and sound... Thank the fates!
倒不如说是命运弄人吧。
You could say it's the fates toying with us.
哈哈，只有悬锋人和哀地里亚人才会通过死亡追求荣耀，您能幸免于难就是好事，好事！
Haha, it's only the Kremnoans and Aidonians who chase glory through death. But your survival is a victory in itself! I'd settle for that gladly!
这么说，您此行是来向元老院禀报事件始末的么？我听说，不仅树庭被黑潮吞没，奥赫玛也不远了。就算有「纷争」的半神站在人类这边……

So, are you here to report the incident to the Council? I heard that after the black tide devoured the Grove, Okhema would be next in line. Even with the demigod of Strife standing alongside humankind...
告诉我，元老院对黑潮了解多少？
Tell me, how much does the Council of Elders know about the black tide?
凯妮斯一派此前得知{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}先后陨落，便在元老院中大肆鼓吹逐火派已无力抵抗灾厄，独木难支……

Once Caenis and her followers learned of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} fall, they proclaimed in the Council that the Flame-Chasers could no longer stand against the calamity alone...
但等到{RUBY_B#万敌}那位王子{RUBY_E#}登神，阻退黑潮，她又马上调转枪头，声称奥赫玛以外大势已定，唯一的威胁只剩阿格莱雅及其党羽。大概下一次公民大会，她们就该发难了吧。

Yet, when {RUBY_B#Mydei}the crown prince{RUBY_E#} ascended to godhood and repelled the black tide, she immediately altered her tune, declaring that all was resolved beyond Okhema, with the only remaining menace now being Aglaea and her adherents. They might well make their move at the upcoming citizens' assembly.
不出所料，见风使舵的家伙…感谢你坦诚相告，正直的学生。
No surprises there, those shifty opportunists... Thank you for your honesty, virtuous student.
呵呵，见风使舵也不失为一种辩论的智慧哪……
Hehe, being an opportunist could very well be a facet of wisdom...
你不是要去找自己的壁画么？别在我耳旁喋喋不休了。
Shouldn't you be searching for murals of yourself? I've had enough of your prattling.
吾实在好奇，汝要如何在双方的矛头下委曲求全，便来旁听了。
I was really curious to see how you would find the middle ground between both factions, so I came to listen in.
不过乍看来，这位凯妮斯比起阿格莱雅要狠毒得多呢…汝怎会想得寻她做靠山？莫非是觉着死兆将至，索性将这副躯壳拱手相让了？

But it seems as though this Caenis is much more ruthless than Aglaea... If so, why do you want to work with her? Could it be that perhaps you've decided to readily surrender this hollow shell of yours just because you feel like death is fast approaching?
Hmph, I'm afraid you'll be sorely disappointed if that's what you truly think.
呵，阿那克萨戈拉斯？我本以为你也跟着其他学者一道，死在那黑潮里了。
Hah, Anaxagoras? I thought that you had died to the black tide, just like the other scholars.
身为刻法勒的祭司，竟不知道尊重死者的道理么？
As Kephale's priest, are you not aware of the decorum of respecting the dead?
笑话！你们这群渎神的异端，配不得至高之神尊重。
Surely you jest! You blasphemous heretics are not worthy of respect from the supreme being.
好心提醒你，此行在黎明云崖，收起那些谵妄之语吧。我已不是当年那位只能看人眼色的辅祭了，对付你有的是手段。

Let me remind you that you're currently in Dawncloud, so you had better keep your deranged language to yourself. I am no longer that altar servant from years ago who could only acquiesce to the commands of others. Now, I have plenty of ways to deal with people like you.
造化之神竟能创造出你这种信徒，真不知是该感到可笑还是可怜。
I'm not sure whether I should laugh or cry right now... I can't believe that a follower such as you could have been made by a Creation Titan.
依我看，已死的泰坦给不了你如此底气吧？那是谁，凯妮斯？
As I see it, a dead Titan can't provide you with this level of confidence, right? Then who is it, exactly? Could it be Caenis?
哼…看在凯妮斯元老青睐有加的份上，姑且放你一马。走吧，别再妨碍至高之神降福于我等。
Hmph... Seeing how fond of you Elder Caenis is, I shall let that slide for now. Leave immediately and don't impede us from receiving the supreme being's blessings.
（能从旁人口中听到这件事，看来凯妮斯确实带着些诚意。事情或许比我想象得要顺利些……）
(Seeing as we were able to hear of this matter from the mouths of others, it seems that Caenis is indeed quite sincere toward us. Perhaps this affair will proceed smoother than I had anticipated...)
啊呀…好一场精彩的交锋，不愧是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的信徒。
Oh my, what a thrilling confrontation... As expected of one of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s followers.
是褒义喔。身为救世之神的信徒，自当是嫉恶如仇。
Praising him, of course. As a believer of the god of Deliverance, it is only natural that he detests evil.
我说了，走，走远点！别像个疯人自言自语，妨碍我冥想！
Didn't you hear me? I asked you to leave! Go as far away from here as possible! Don't mutter to yourself like some sort of madman and disturb my meditation!
（真是受够了…第十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}能不能快点来？）
(I've had enough of this... Could the <unbreak>15</unbreak>th {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} arrive any faster?)
每一株植物、每一条枝蔓、每一片林叶都可能是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的化身……
Every plant, every tendril, no, even every leaf could be the embodiment of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}...
正因此，凡人无从得知它真实的模样，便将泰坦绘作巨树，智慧描摹成果实，以此象征它将知识平等分享给众人…实在是精妙绝伦啊！

As a result, mere mortals who did not know what the Titan actually looked like chose to paint them as a giant tree instead. Their wisdom was portrayed as fruit to symbolize how they shared their knowledge equally among the masses... Such exquisiteness indeed!
这壁画，着实有些抽象了。
真分不清你是在夸赞还是贬低自己。我很好奇，理性之泰坦学过修辞吗？
I really can't tell whether you are praising or demeaning yourself. Now I'm quite curious whether the Reason Titan has studied figures of speech before?
呵呵，哪里的话，吾当然是觉得有趣咯？
Heheh, of course I find such stylistic devices interesting.
说不好，这就是<color=#dbc291ff>「『我们』究竟为何物」</color>的答案呢。
For all we know, this could be the answer to the question, <color=#dbc291ff>"What exactly are we?"</color>
哼，我可不想承认自己是这种丑陋的模样。
Hmph, I, for one, am not willing to admit that I could look this ugly.
呵呵…难道说，汝是出于这种缘由，才在树庭遇袭时妄图炼化吾之灵魂不成？
Heheh... Was this the reason why you failed in your attempt to refine my soul when you were ambushed at the Grove?
既然你这么清楚，当时又何必出手将我救下？
Since you are aware of this, why did you save me back then?
在吾看来，汝仅持这点便足以与凡夫划清界限哪。
From my perspective, this point alone was enough to separate you from the average person.
哎…一颗脑袋里怎么会同时住着两个疯子？
...How do two lunatics coexist in the same brain?
所以，汝此行前来黎明云崖，莫不是仅为了寻求庇护吧……
Therefore, it seems that your journey to Dawncloud this time is not just to seek protection...
...What, then, is the intention behind your actions?
全盘计划就在我的脑子里，你不妨自己找找看。
The entire plan is stored in my memory, so why don't you look there?
Heheh, then don't mind if I do...
One year old, two years old...
啊呀，大名鼎鼎的七贤人竟非得抱着大地兽玩偶入睡哪？有趣……
Oh my, even a member of the preeminent Seven Sages must hug his dromas doll to sleep? How interesting...
汝的灵魂在颤抖哪，少见。那玩具背后，想必有一段不为人知的秘辛吧？
How unusual, your soul is actually trembling. This must mean that behind this toy hides a secret that nobody knows, right?
哼…反正你我都时日无多了，说说也无妨。
Hmph... Since our days are both numbered, I don't mind telling you more about it.
那是姐姐给我的礼物，按照家里宠物的模样做的玩偶。
This is a present that my sister gave to me. It's a doll that was made to look like our family pet.
汝还有家人哪，他们也在这奥赫玛城中？
So, there are other members in your family, eh? Are they also living in Okhema?
你不是爱看我的脑子么？继续往后翻。
Don't you just love to pick through my brain? Go on, continue flipping through my memories.
用不了多久…到五岁那年，你就知道答案了。
It won't take long... You'll discover the answer when you reach the memories of when I was five.
The black tide is everywhere... I can't bear to look.
年幼的我同样不能接受这个结果。{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}…当然，还有你。能求的泰坦我求了个遍，可惜，都无济于事。

When I was young, I couldn't accept this outcome either. {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#},\n{RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}... and you, of course. Although I prayed to every Titan that I could think of for help, my efforts were ultimately futile.
这…莫非就是汝研究「炼金」的开端？
This... Could this be the inception of your research into alchemy?
正是，一切始于你那座绿意盎然的庭院。我在那里求学的时候，自然也接触到了{RUBY_B#「最初的学者」}塞勒苏斯{RUBY_E#}的理论。

Indeed it was. Everything started from that verdant courtyard of yours. When I was pursuing my education there, I naturally also came to learn of {RUBY_B#The First Scholar}Thalesus'{RUBY_E#} theory as well.
喔，吾记得他。就是他首先提出了「灵魂」的概念，没错吧？
Oh, I remember that person. He was the one to come up with the concept of "souls," right?
不仅如此，他还认为所有生命和物体的组成、运动和变化全都源自「灵魂」本身。于是，我想……
Not only that, he also believed that life, as well as the composition, movement, and transformation of matter, all stem from souls themselves. This is why I thought that...
既然一切生命皆出于同一根源——为何我不能以自己为代价，让至亲复活呢？
Since all living things stemmed from the same origin, why could I not sacrifice myself in order to resurrect my nearest and dearest?
这、这可是渎神哪…即便自由如树庭，此举也足以将你送上火葬的尸床…！
B—But this is absolute blasphemy... Regardless of how much freedom the Grove provides, such an act could cause you to be burned at the pyre...!
你那至亲…她现在身在何处？快将她送离树庭，去到人寻不得的地方，否则你我都将接受七贤人会的审判哪…！

Your beloved... Where is she now? Send her away from the Grove at once, to a place where nobody will ever be able to find her. Otherwise, the both of us will be judged by the Council of the Seven Sages...!
放心吧，老师。我的姐姐，她……
Calm down, teacher. My sister, she...
She's still not in the mortal realm... even to this day.
单凭一只眼睛为代价，就想从{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}手中夺回逝者，还是太过天真了……
It was naive of me to think that I could snatch the deceased from {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' grip by merely sacrificing one eye...
等价交换…我所能得到的，不过见她最后一面，仅此而已。
Equivalent exchange... All I received for that price was but an opportunity to see her for one final time. Nothing more.
收手吧，那刻夏。你是我最好的学生，我不能眼睁睁看着你误入歧途。
Let it go, Anaxa. As one of my best students, I cannot watch you go down the wrong path without doing anything to stop it.
永远别再触碰禁忌：别再辜负逝者，别再伤害自己。这样，这座教室还能属于你，你还有机会活出自己的人生。
Never do something taboo ever again. Don't disappoint the deceased and never harm yourself. If you can do that, this classroom will still be yours and you'll have a chance to live out your own life.
既然见过她最后一面，我已别无所求……
Since I was able to see her one last time, I have no other desires...
你说得对，老师。我也该开始新的人生了。
You're right, teacher. It's time for me to start a new life.
我由衷为你感到欣慰，孩子。接下来，你想研究怎样的课题？
I am sincerely glad for you, child. Now then, what topic would you like to study?
我想继续塞勒苏斯的研究。
I wish to continue Thalesus' research.
继续「灵魂」的研究？可你知道，树庭早已对他的思想明如指掌，即便继续深挖，恐怕也是徒劳……

Continue the research into souls? But you know that the Grove has long since understood his philosophy like the back of their hands. Even if you continue digging into this subject, your efforts will likely be futile...
不，老师。我于死雾中匆匆一瞥后，终于晓得一个道理：从古至今，我们对「灵魂」的理解不过冰山一角。
No, teacher. After my fleeting glimpse of the deathly fog, I finally understood a single truth: Since ancient days, our understanding of souls is but the tip of the iceberg.
我失去了一只眼睛，视野却比任何时候都更加明朗……
I may have lost an eye, but my view of the world has become clearer than ever...
真理已尽在我手…看我如何令这个有悖常理的世界天翻地覆吧。
I have grasped the truth with my bare hands... Watch as I turn this farcical world upside down.
喔…汝那厚重的眼罩下，竟掩藏着如此秘密。
Hmm... Who would have thought such a secret lay concealed beneath that hefty eye patch of yours?
不过，这个故事与汝所盘算的不能说瓜葛相连…只能说毫无干系哪？
However, this story doesn't seem to be connected to your plan... In fact, I'd say that they aren't related at all?
答案就在其中。如果你连这都想不明白，不妨把「理性」的权柄让渡给我吧，留着也是浪费。
The answer lies within my tale. If even you cannot understand it, perhaps you should relinquish the divinity of Reason to me? After all, it'd be a waste for you to hold onto it.
我的故事就到这里，该说说你的秘密了。正所谓「等价交换」，对吧？
My story ends here. Now, it's time for you to tell me your secret. After all, this is what equivalent exchange means, correct?
果不其然，为吾留了陷阱哪……
As expected, you laid a trap for me to step into...
可惜…即便吾有意述说自己的过去种种，可吾所知者，未必比汝等更多呢。
Unfortunately, even if I was willing to talk about my past, I may not know more about it than you do.
哦？大名鼎鼎的理性之泰坦承认自己不够智慧，你这帮信徒可要失望了。
Oh? Are you saying that the renowned Reason Titan is now admitting a lack of wisdom? Your followers are going to be sorely disappointed by this.
人子啊，记住了：知晓自身的无知便是最大的睿智。
Child of humanity, remember this: Being cognizant of one's ignorance is the greatest wisdom of all.
难怪你要拜托我来解答你那没头没脑的问题。
Now I understand. No wonder you asked me to answer your random, nonsensical questions.
不仅如此，是惟有汝能解答吾之所惑——正所谓「旁观者清」嘛。
Not only that, you're the only one who can shed light on my query. As the saying goes, onlookers see most clearly.
看您刚刚在自言自语，是正在进行让自我陷入迷狂的思考吧？抱歉打断您，但时间紧迫……
I saw you muttering to yourself and was wondering whether you were caught in a delirium of reflective thought? I'm sorry to interrupt you, but time is of the essence...
在下奉来古士大人之命前来通报：凯妮斯大人已莅临元老院，敬候阁下光临，还请即刻移驾。
I have a message from Lord Lygus: Lady Caenis has met up with the Council of Elders and is awaiting your arrival, so please depart forthwith.
刻法勒，创世亦是负世之神啊……
Kephale, the one who created the world, and the one who bears the world...
倘若汝果真未曾迎来终结…又将如何回应悖逆之人的诘问呢？
If you truly have not met your end... how will you answer the challenges of those who defy you?
阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下！久仰大名——
Lord Anaxagoras! I've heard so much about you...
神悟树庭「智种学派」掌门人，恶名昭彰的「渎神者」，身怀{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种的黄金裔，树庭惨案的幸存者……
Head of the Nousporists of the Grove of Epiphany, notorious blasphemer, a Chrysos Heir who bears {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame, a survivor of the Grove calamity...
不知是否有所遗漏？若有，还望阁下不吝赐教，补阙拾遗。
Did I miss anything? If so, please be so kind as to enlighten me.
看来凯妮斯阁下已对我相当了解，倒也免了自我介绍的工夫。
Since Lady Caenis is already well acquainted with me, I won't waste any effort introducing myself again.
不过，或许是风俗不同？在我的家乡，有一种名为「主宾」的礼仪：主人待客应热情盈怀，赐以美酒清水、温床安睡……

But then again, perhaps the customs are different here? Back in my hometown, there is a form of etiquette known as "honoring guests": The host will welcome their guests with warm hospitality by treating them to fine wine and a cozy bed...
可我此番前来，不见主人殷勤献礼，反倒遭了质问。更荒唐的是，这位主人还磨好了屠刀，教侍从在暗处候着——

And yet, ever since I arrived, I have not been welcomed with warm courtesy or ceremonial gifts. Instead, I am met with intense scrutiny. Even more absurd, the host has sharpened their blade and instructed their servants to lie in wait in the shadows...
阁下是要剖开我的心腹，取出火种，再为来宾大摆筵席不成？
Perhaps you intend to cut open my heart, retrieve the Coreflame, and then hold a grand feast for all of the guests?
感谢理解。我不过一介孱弱书生，闻不惯铜臭和鲜血的味道。
Thank you for understanding. I am but a feeble scholar who is not used to the stench of avarice and blood.
不必自谦，阁下。在我看来，您的胆识和魄力不愧于七贤人之名，足以胜任我等蹈锋饮血的事业。
No need to be humble, my lord. From my perspective, your courage and gumption are worthy of the reputation of the Seven Sages. Your bravery is more than adequate to accomplish our perilous endeavor.
So, you wish to start a war?
黄金裔们呼唤战争，我们就回应以战争。冲突必将发生：既然阿格莱雅妄图用金血的力量压制善良的民众，我们就不惮彰显奥赫玛公民应有的权利和气概。

Well, since the Chrysos Heirs are calling for war, we will respond in kind. Conflict is inevitable. Since Aglaea endeavors to suppress the virtuous commoners with blood of gold, we will not hesitate to display the rights and mettle that the citizens of Okhema are so entitled to.
你问我和平的希望是否还有一丝尚存？我只能说：一切取决于下一场公民大会，他们能否在人民的呼声中幡然醒悟——

As to your question of whether peace is still a viable option? Well, to that, I can only say this: Everything hinges on the next citizens' assembly and whether they have a sudden epiphany amid the clamor of the masses...
——而身为黄金裔的您应邀前来，实为我们增添了希望的曙光。
...And since you, as a Chrysos Heir, accepted our invitation, you have indeed given us a glimmer of hope.
呵，大言不惭。方才退下的、你忠心耿耿的「清洗者」们听到的说辞，恐怕和这番话截然不同吧。
Hah, what brazen arrogance. What you're saying right now is worlds apart from what you were saying before you retired your "cleaners."
实不相瞒，正是。毕竟他们的工作是清理害物。而就在刚才，您还站在黄金裔那边……
I don't deny it. After all, they're responsible for cleaning up any threats and just a moment ago, you were on the side of the Chrysos Heirs...
…当然，现在您是这边的一员了。请，为免隔墙有耳，我们换个地方继续。
...But now that you're an ally of ours, we can continue talking somewhere else. As you know, these walls have ears.
欢迎回到「半神议院」中心，阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
Welcome back to the hub of the Demigod Council, Lord Anaxagoras.
相信您一定记得：这里站立过无数口若悬河的雄辩家，以煽惑人心的语言，奏凯而归；也站立过无数渎神的哲人，因拒绝为自己申辩，饮鸩赴死。

Surely you remember that countless eloquent orators have stood in this spot before and emerged victorious by stoking public sentiment with their words. And yet, there have also been innumerable blasphemous philosophers who set themselves up for failure because they refused to defend their actions.
这片小小的舞台，正是奥赫玛千百年来最深刻的缩影。而在十五个日夜后，此地也将成为奥赫玛历史最重要、也是最后的转折点……
This tiny stage is the most profound embodiment of Okhema in centuries. In fifteen days, this site shall also become the most important, as well as the final turning point in Okhema's history...
<color=#dbc291ff>但愿你我皆能不辱使命，带领世人重返那没有「死亡」、「纷争」和「诡计」的黄金治世。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>May the both of us carry out our duties with honor and lead the masses back toward the Era Chrysea, a golden age with no Death, Strife, or Trickery.</color>
啊呀，十五个日夜…那正是汝的死期呢，天下竟有这样巧的事么？
Oh my, fifteen days and nights... that aligns perfectly with the date of your demise. Could such a coincidence truly exist?
Using death to prove myself fits my intentions perfectly.
多么掷地有声！不愧是敢与那位「金织」分庭抗礼的英雄。
What strong conviction you have! As expected of the hero who dared to stand up to the Goldweaver.
Hehe... As expected, she misunderstands you.
行了，凯妮斯阁下，免去客套话吧。我是为与元老院诸君共济世业才应邀前来，别用这些繁文缛节测试我的耐心。

That's enough, Lady Caenis. Dispense with the niceties. I only accepted your invitation so that I can serve the commoners alongside the members of the Council of Elders. Don't test my patience with such superfluous formalities.
话是这么说，阁下也需得我出手助力，才能在金线追缉下保全性命吧？
You say that now, but surely you also require my aid as well, so that you can stay alive, even when being pursued by the golden thread?
你多虑了。她还需要在公民大会上争取人民支持，定然不会随意出手。
You worry too much. She won't show her hand too freely, as she still needs to garner support from the masses at the citizens' assembly.
连我都看得出她的人性所剩无几。难道阁下就能断言，她必定会按常理出牌？
Even someone like me can tell that only a sliver of her humanity remains. Surely you're not asserting that she will definitely act in a rational manner?
诚如你所见，阿格莱雅觊觎我怀中的火种。这是我、也是各位同她周旋的资本，但相应地，我也需要元老院提供包括护卫在内的一切支持。

As you're no doubt aware, Aglaea covets the Coreflame that I possess, which makes it the bargaining chip that allows me and the rest of you to negotiate with her. However, in return, I'll need the Council of Elders to support me as much as possible. Naturally, this includes the guards as well.
{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，它在你苦苦追求的黄金世中有多少分量，你比我更清楚……
You're well aware how valuable {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame will be in the Era Chrysea that you are desperately pursuing...
Talk is cheap, so you'd better act prudently as well.
当然，我明白。所谓博弈不过各取所需，只要诉求合理，元老院向来不会亏待他的盟友。既然你我都有合作的意愿，不妨打开天窗说亮话——

I understand. After all, this battle of wits is just a means for each party to acquire what they need. As long as your request is reasonable, the Council of Elders never shortchanges its allies. Since we're both intent on mutual cooperation, let's not mince words and just speak plainly to each other...
让我们像真正的哲学家那样，通过话语和智慧决定你我究竟能为自己争取多少，又能为之牺牲多少吧。
Let us decide how much we can secure for ourselves and how much we're willing to sacrifice, like true philosophers — with our words and wisdom.
若要厘清思绪，请自便。不过，切勿离开太远，以免…节外生枝。
If you need to organize your thoughts, please go ahead. But please don't go too far away, lest... complications arise.
让我们像真正的哲学家那样，通过话语和智慧决定你我究竟能为自己争取多少，又能为之牺牲多少吧——准备好了吗，阁下？
Let us decide how much we can secure for ourselves and how much we're willing to sacrifice, like true philosophers: with our words and wisdom. Are you ready, my lord?
若要厘清思绪，请自便。不过，切勿离开太远，以免…节外生枝。
If you need to organize your thoughts, please go ahead. But please don't go too far away, lest... complications arise.
就延续方才的话题，让我们聊聊那位共同的敌人，阿格莱雅吧。
Continuing from the earlier topic, let us discuss our common enemy: Aglaea.
她是奥赫玛众黄金裔中资历次长者，在岁月磋磨与火种烧蚀中逐渐丧失人性…是一位可敬可畏的对手。

She is the second-most experienced Chrysos Heir across the whole of Okhema, who has gradually lost her humanity to the ravages of time and the ablation of the Coreflame... A formidable opponent indeed.
诚然，她有充分的理由对你痛下杀手，可阁下所说也不无道理：身为老练的政治动物，她是否真会跨越那道底线还犹未可知，况且她还需要您来完成泰坦的试炼……

Admittedly, there is ample reason for her to take your life. Yet, your previous reasoning is quite sound. As a seasoned political animal, it's unclear whether she will actually cross that irreversible boundary. Moreover, she still needs you alive so that the Titan's trial can be completed...
在场众人里又有谁能向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}誓约封证，您此次赴约前没有和那女人沆瀣一气，只为掩人耳目，助长她的暴行？

Is there anyone present who can swear by the sacred vow of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and guarantee that you weren't in league with that woman before coming here? Are you just trying to pull the wool over our eyes and aid her in her savagery?
她早就准备好对我处刑了。
She is prepared to execute me.
执刑者遐蝶，相信你对这个名字并不陌生。早在我返回奥赫玛时，阿格莱雅便派她来监视我了。如果我没能及时赴约，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}必将先一步找上我。

I believe you're aware of Castorice the executioner. Long before I returned to Okhema, Aglaea had already dispatched her to monitor me. If I weren't able to reach this place in time, I would have been forced to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} first.
比起结果未知的「周全之法」，直接剖开我的胸膛取出火种，岂不省得她夜长梦多？万事早已俱备，她只需要一个合适的时机。

As compared to a comprehensive plan with uncertain results, if you decide to cut open my chest and remove the Coreflame, wouldn't that settle her nerves even more? Everything is in place — she just needs the right timing.
她只需要唯命是从的附庸。
She just needs vassals who will do her bidding without question.
若阿格莱雅需要一位足够智慧的黄金裔，那非我莫属。但显而易见，她不需要一位随时都有可能脱离控制的黄金裔。

If Aglaea required a suitably intelligent Chrysos Heir, then I'm the best fit for her needs. However, it's quite evident that she has no need for a Chrysos Heir who could break free of her control at any time.
我不信泰坦，不信神谕，更不会心甘情愿走在她宣扬的道路上。她的眼中向来揉不得沙子，又岂会容下我这个异端？

Since I believe in neither Titans nor the prophecy, there's no way that I would willingly walk on the path that she extols. Given how rigorously she enforces her principles, how would she ever accept a heretic such as me?
呵…阁下的意见，我明白了。
Hah... I understand what you mean.
至少，你我都同意这位穷奢极欲的暴君正是奥赫玛和平最大的敌人。元老院愿意捍卫您生存的权利，正如我们捍卫每一位遭到压迫的公民。

At the very least, the both of us agree that this tyrant who wallows in extravagance and greed is the greatest threat to achieving peace in Okhema. The Council of Elders is willing to defend your right to live, just as we defend every oppressed citizen.
然而，遗憾的是，支持黄金裔、支持阿格莱雅的思潮依旧水涨船高。我们希冀的和平，以及所热爱的一切，都将化作城市的灰烬、公民的鲜血……

However, I regret to say that sentiments in favor of the Chrysos Heirs and Aglaea are only growing in magnitude. The peace that we are aspiring toward, as well as everything that we hold dear, will be destroyed completely. The city will be burned to ashes and the citizens' blood will be shed...
告诉我，阁下：你能为我们高贵的公民奉献多少力量，以便他们击溃城邦的仇敌？
Tell me, what are you willing to do for our esteemed citizens so that they can vanquish the enemies of our fine city?
我的支持代表树庭全体的支持。
Garnering my support is equivalent to garnering the support of the entire Grove.
虽然令人感到遗憾，但客观来说，树庭遭袭之后，学院的实际权力者变成了我。
Although the circumstances are rather unfortunate, from an objective point of view, it is an undeniable fact that ever since the Grove was attacked, I have become the de facto leader of the Grove.
要想扳倒阿格莱雅，元老院需要支持，而整个学院的分量显然足够强而有力。
The Council of Elders needs more backing if it wishes to topple Aglaea and it's evident that the academy wields considerable influence.
退一步说，我早就是树庭在奥赫玛的特派公使，在公民大会上自然也保有关键的一票。
At the very least, I have served as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema for a significant amount of time. Of course, this also means that I will hold a crucial vote at the citizens' assembly.
我会击溃阿格莱雅的自以为是。
I will be the one to shatter Aglaea's self-righteousness.
阿格莱雅专制、自负、傲慢，这让她在绝大多数时间里主宰一切，却也是她的软肋。只要令其经历惨痛的背叛而无能为力，就能使她一蹶不振。

Aglaea's authoritarianism, conceit, and arrogance have granted her unfettered control for the most part. Yet, these traits are also her greatest weakness. If I can render her helpless by forcing her to experience the agonizing pain of betrayal, I am certain she will never recover from such a setback.
呵，阁下是觉得，这场小小的背叛足够让她无计可施么？
Heh, surely you don't believe that such a tiny betrayal will be enough to push her to her wits' end?
不仅如此，还有太多默不作声的人，正在观望我能掀起多大的风浪…而黄金裔们也从来不是铁板一块，你心里清楚。
What's more, there are many who remain silent, merely watching to see how much chaos I can unleash... Not to mention, you know full well that the Chrysos Heirs have never been a united front.
以{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的名义，奥赫玛感谢您的诚意和宝贵意见。
In the name of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema thanks you for your sincere and valuable thoughts.
话已至此，你我想必已对能在这场辩论中攫取何种利益心中有数了。就让我这么说吧：元老院向来以公正闻名，而公正建立在真诚的基础上……

At this stage, it's clear that you and I understand the benefits to be won from this discussion. Let me put it plainly: The Council of Elders has always been renowned for its fairness, and that fairness is built on a foundation of sincerity...
元老院宣誓对奥赫玛全体公民永远忠诚——至于你，阁下，你要如何保证自己配得上这份诚意，而不会像你现在背叛阿格莱雅一样，择机背叛奥赫玛战无不胜的人民？

The Council of Elders has vowed to all citizens of Okhema that it will always remain loyal to them. As for you, my lord, how will you guarantee that you will be able to live up to such earnestness and will not betray Okhema's indomitable citizens when the opportunity presents itself, just as you now betray Aglaea when it suits you?
可笑，我的忠诚无需任何证明。
How absurd. My loyalty is unquestionable.
哼，可笑。我的忠诚无需证明，但元老院要求证明忠诚本身已经无异于背叛。
Hmph, surely you jest. My loyalty does not need to be proven. The fact that the Council of Elders is asking for proof of my loyalty is itself akin to a form of betrayal.
能够看到两位以文明的方式握手言和，是我莫大的荣幸。然而，请容我稍事打断——
I am incredibly honored to have witnessed the both of you bury the hatchet in a civilized manner. However, I'm afraid that I must interrupt for a brief moment...
以「神礼观众」之名，我见到：「金织」阿格莱雅阁下正动身前来黎明云崖。
As the Theoros, I have observed the following: Lady Aglaea, the Goldweaver, is currently on her way to Dawncloud.
哦？我们今天的客人似乎有些过多了。
Oh? Well, I do believe that we might have a slight overabundance of guests today.
不甘心吧，凯妮斯阁下？元老院高居云崖，却仍要仰头看黄金裔的脸色。
Feeling dissatisfied, Lady Caenis? Despite the Council of Elders' lofty residence on Dawncloud, it must still tolerate the whims of the Chrysos Heirs.
呵，没想到阁下还是留了一手，是我棋差一着。不过，我个人倒是十分乐见她的出现……
Heh, so you were holding back just now? Seems like you are better at playing this game than I. In any case, I am glad that she's arriving here...
告诉我吧，阿那克萨戈拉斯：如今你已身为盟友，倘若阿格莱雅来问我要人，我该怎么做呢？
So, tell me, Anaxagoras: Now that you're an ally of mine, if Aglaea were to demand that I hand you over, what should I do?
你可以把我交出去，告诉她元老院只想找我聊聊天，并无任何冒犯之意。
You can do as she says. Tell her that the Council of Elders merely wished to chat with me and had no intention of offending her.
不过，如此一来，元老院的威严成了一张浸血的莎草纸，一戳就破，还痛失了一枚宝贵的火种……

However, by doing so, the authority of the Council of Elders will be as thin as papyrus that has been soaked in blood. Not only can it be destroyed at the slightest touch, but the Council will also lose possession of a valuable Coreflame...
No, more like two Coreflames. After all...
在下一次公民大会上，那位{RUBY_B#遐蝶}与死亡如影随形的少女{RUBY_E#}也会站在我们这边。
At the next citizens' assembly, {RUBY_B#Castorice}that young lady who is synonymous with death{RUBY_E#} will also be standing on our side.
Oh? How can you be sure of that?
这很重要吗？我有的是办法。依我看，你还是多关心关心迫在眉睫的威胁吧。
Is that of importance to you? All you need to know is that I have a plan. In my opinion, you should be more worried about the impending threat.
阿格莱雅，今天她能在众目睽睽之下把我带走，明天她就能大手一挥，彻底废黜元老院，而我们方才议论的种种也都成了笑话——

If Aglaea can seize me in full view of the masses today, she could also dismiss the entire Council of Elders in one fell swoop tomorrow. If that happens, the discussion that we've just had will turn into an utter joke instead...
这是你希望看到的吗，凯妮斯阁下？
Is this the outcome that you wish to see, Lady Caenis?
呵呵…明白了。我会妥善处理此事。
Fine, I will handle this matter appropriately.
不过，阁下，记住了：愚弄人民者必得报应。这次我就睁一只眼闭一只眼，但绝不会有下次……
But you'd do best to remember this: Fool the people and karma will be on your tail. I'll overlook it this time, but don't count on there being a next time...
…除非你爱好酷刑，善于在痛苦中思索灵魂的真谛。
...Unless, of course, you crave cruel punishment and consider suffering the perfect state to ponder the true nature of souls.
你知道吗？这恰恰是我最宝贵的天赋之一。
Well, what do you know! That happens to be one of my rare talents.
那就让我们拭目以待吧。
啊呀，汝着实再次令吾刮目相看…不过，汝所求者，莫不是太少了些？
Ah, I've got to say that you've managed to really impress me again. But... shouldn't you be going after more?
你就那么好奇我想干什么？
Dying to know what I'm after, huh?
毕竟吾乃理性之泰坦，生而为求索哪。
I mean... I'm the Reason Titan, after all. It is in me to ask and seek answers.
Easy there, you'll learn the answer soon enough.
我刚才没在她面前提，只因为她给不了我真正想要的。毕竟「旁观者清」——
I didn't bring it up with her purely because she doesn't have the means to give me what I truly want. It's as they say, onlookers see most clearly.
黎明云崖真正的主人，始终是那位纵览全局的「神礼观众」啊。
The true master of Dawncloud has always been the Theoros, who watches over everything.
…如我所料。再次欢迎您的到来，阁下。
您知道吗？其实，您可以跳过那些无足轻重的辩论，直接向我要求<color=#dbc291ff>觐见</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>负世之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的资格</color>。

You know, you could actually skip all the pointless debate and come straight to me to <color=#dbc291ff>seek an audience with</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Worldbearing Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Kephale</color>{RUBY_E#}.
我没有任何理由拒绝您，不是么？
I have no reason to refuse you, do I?
你当然没有理由，但凯妮斯有。谁能掌握{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种，谁就能掌握奥赫玛……
You may not, but Caenis has. Whoever gets hold of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame will get to rule over Okhema...
她忌惮我，我得博取她的信任。方才那场辩论非常必要。
She's wary of me, so naturally, I had to gain her trust. I would say that debate was not at all pointless.
依我看，此子费尽心思接近刻法勒，备不住是妄图对泰坦行不轨之事呢。
In my view, this individual has gone to great lengths to get close to Kephale. He might very well be plotting something nefarious against the Titan.
即便如此，汝也甘愿为此子放行么？
Are you still willing to let him pass knowing this?
当然，即便如此。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的奥体始终欢迎一切生命，此乃负世者命运使然。
Yes, very much so. All living creations are always free to visit {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s transcendent vessel. This comes with being the Worldbearer.
呵，能听到这家伙说话还真是方便……
Hmph, how convenient it is to be able to hear what they say...
能与尊贵的泰坦直接对话，是我至高无上的荣幸。
It is truly my honor to speak to a venerated Titan in person.
走吧，阁下，让我与你们同行一程。
Please, go ahead. Let me join you both on this journey.
去吧，阁下。透过这道<color=#dbc291ff>「雅努斯密径」</color>，你便能步上朝圣的长阶了。
Go on ahead. Take this {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Janus's Hidden Passage</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"Janus shortcut"</color>{RUBY_E#} and the long pilgrimage stairway will be waiting for you at its end.
实话说，我没想到你竟然连理由都不会过问。
I have to admit I never expected you to not ask me anything, not even my motive.
因为我十分清楚阁下所求为何物。同样地，正所谓「君子成人之美」：我有预感，阁下的理论能够在此行终点付诸证明——
Because I know very well what it is you are after. As the saying goes: A gentleman helps others achieve their goals. I have a feeling that your theory will be validated at the end of this journey—
我相信，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}绝不会拒绝您施行<color=#dbc291ff>向泰坦提问</color>的权利。毕竟，阁下身为将死之人，如今应是与刻法勒最为相近的存在了吧？

I believe {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} will not deprive you of your right to <color=#dbc291ff>ask your question</color>, especially now that you're on the brink of death... you must be closer to Kephale than anyone else, wouldn't you agree?
Ha... I hope things go as you say, then.
正义之子面对有悖常理的世界，会让世界天翻地覆……
Putting a child of justice into a farcical world is bound to turn it upside down...
愿您能为这濒毁的世界，带来真正的「变革」。
It is my hope that you bring a much-needed change to this world which is on the brink of destruction.
老实说，这是我第一次登上黎明云崖的山巅……
Honestly, this is my first time going up to Dawncloud's peak...
好景致哪…这下，汝也该承认泰坦十足壮观了吧？
What a splendid view... Isn't it about time you recognized the magnificence of us Titans?
哼，我反而觉得它和城中的神殿没有区别，虚有其表……
Hmph. Well, I don't see how this place is different from those temples in the city. All they have are magnificent facades...
即便到了这时候，我也仍在怀疑它到底能否给我带来有价值的线索。
And even though I've come this far, I'm still doubtful about getting useful clues from him.
呵…会期待汝说些中听的话，是吾自作聪明了。
Hmph... I must be getting ahead of myself to be expecting to hear something nice from you.
你在我的脑子里也算待了有段时间。怎么，还没有习惯身体主人的态度？
Oh? Haven't you been in my head for some time now? It's high time you get used to how I feel about things.
行了，距离{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}只有几步之遥，别浪费时间……
Alright, we're just a short hike away from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. No time to waste here...
看来方才的智辩实属枯脑焦心哪…若翁法罗斯有来生，记得多加强身健体，也别再逃避人情酬应了。
So, the intellectual debate from earlier was too draining for you, huh... If Amphoreus gets a new lease on life, you should focus on strengthening your body and stop shirking social interactions.
眼前距离泰坦仅有几步之遥，汝还撑得住么？
The Titan is in sight. Can you make it?
哼…就算我撑不住，你还能把我抬上去不成？
Pfft... Why? Are you going to carry me up if I were to fall now?
我自有把握，闭嘴跟着就是。
I know how far I can go, so just hold your tongue and come along.
好，好。那吾也不多费口舌了，就只待汝魂息彻底散去，径自执掌躯壳罢。
Fine, then. I guess I won't say any more. I'll just wait till your soul dissipates completely to gain control over your body.
Hm? What should I be looking at?
（还是说，人在濒死之时，连灵魂也能看见了呢……）
(Or do we even get to see souls when we're close to dying...?)
咦？格奈乌斯阁下，此行怎不见汝那伴身的爱枪了？
Oh? Why didn't you bring your favorite spear with you on this trip, Gnaeus?
(Gnaeus? I know I've heard this name somewhere...)
我的「喀利斯」，不久前已被黑潮彻底毁蚀了。
The black tide destroyed every last inch of my Kalyx.
就连{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}宝矿和熔火的造物…都难逃毁灭的命运么？
Even a creation of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, from their prized ores and molten fire, couldn't escape the fate of destruction...?
喂，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}…我问你，你可认识名为格奈乌斯的人？
Hey, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}... Do you know a certain Gnaeus?
格奈乌斯？从未听说过。怎地突然想起这样一个古怪的名字？
Gnaeus? No, not that I remember. How did you even think up such a strange name?
我刚才看到了：格奈乌斯，似乎是一名战士，与你就在此处交谈……
I just saw him. Gnaeus... a warrior-like figure who was just chatting with you here...
啊呀…吾可不记得有这样的回忆，只怕是错觉吧？
No, I have no such memory. Could you be hallucinating?
不说我的事了。卡厄斯之前回应过你么？
Enough about me. Did Khaos ever reply to you?
…成为半神的代价，远比我们想象得要沉重啊。
...Seems like the price of becoming a demigod is a lot heftier than we thought.
（我从未听过这号人物…他接过的是哪个泰坦的权柄？）
(I've never heard of this person... Which Titan's authority did he inherit?)
乐观些，格奈乌斯。吾等既已找上门来，他总该不会让旧友颜面扫地吧？
Look on the bright side, Gnaeus. Since we've come all this way, I doubt he'd snub his old friends, would he?
呵…但愿我们在他心里的分量，能与整个世界相当。
Hmph... Let's just hope we mean as much as the world to him.
人子啊，汝又看到方才那幻觉了？
Hey? Are you seeing that same hallucination again?
是啊…还是你和格奈乌斯，在讨论另一个叫卡厄斯的人，大概是你们的同伴吧。
Yes... It's still you and Gnaeus, but you're now talking about a certain Khaos. I'm guessing he's one of your companions?
卡厄斯？这名字也十足陌生……
Khaos? This name sounds just as strange to me...
算了，我大概有点头绪。如果不出我所料，他们应该不是幻觉，而是……
Never mind, I think I know what this is about. If things are as I thought, then they aren't hallucinations, but...
啊呀…倘若那当真是死魂灵，那吾又是什么东西？
Wha... But if those are the souls of the dead, then what am I?
哼，不知道…没准你才是我临死前臆想出来的幻象呢。
Hmph, beats me... For all I know, you're just an illusion I conjured up in my dying moments.
先走吧，只要能看到更多，听到更多故事……
Let's just keep going. As long as I take in more sights and hear more stories...
量力而行罢——要是在死者当中走得太远，可连吾都将束手无策喔？
Know your limits. Wander too far among the dead and even I might not be able to save you.
哎呀，真是的…早知道要爬这山，吾便拒绝汝等邀请了……
Tsk... If I knew we had to climb a mountain, I wouldn't have come along with you...
这也是「负世」之重的一道侧写吧。如果翁法罗斯真有来生，记得多锻炼啊。
I guess this also counts as one aspect of the Worldbearing burden. If Amphoreus does have a next life, you may want to get your body in shape.
(Tsk... I'm not getting anything of value from them.)
吾…就是从这里跳下去，跌落谷底…也绝不会锻炼分毫……
I... would sooner throw myself off this cliff and hit rock bottom... than exercise even a little.
否则…吾，大名鼎鼎的七贤人，卡吕普索…与那「曳石学派」的野蛮人，又有何区别…？
I... I am Calypso of the eminent Seven Sages, after all... Training would make me no different from those Helkolithist barbarians...!
（卡吕普索？她是七贤人…树庭的人？）
(Calypso? She's one of the Seven Sages... A member of the Grove?)
（不可能，如果真是七贤人，我应该记得才对……）
(No, she can't be. I would know her name if she really were one of the Seven Sages...)
喂，瑟希斯！你对卡吕普索这个名字可有印象？
Hey, Cerces! Does the name Calypso ring a bell?
终于到头了啊。质问泰坦不成，倒是得到了你们这些意外之喜……
We're here, finally. So, I don't get to ask the Titan my question, but all of you make for a pleasant surprise, nonetheless.
Very well, then. Let me uncover the truth for myself...
Did I... still fail to make it in time...?
我听到了，在潮汐深处，{RUBY_B#冥界}乌有之界{RUBY_E#}的门关之后，那里有一道声音，将要向我述说——
I hear it, from the depths of the tides, behind the closed doors of {RUBY_B#nether realm}the void world{RUBY_E#} — a voice ready to tell me something—
这一次，那声音前所未有的清晰——
This time, the voice is a lot clearer than before.
That's... a lot to take in at once.
阿格莱雅大人，请听我一言。
Lady Aglaea, please, let me explain.
您也知道，「死亡」的火种始终是「再创世」最大的未知数。无论是凯妮斯，还是您，都希望在接下来的公民大会中，赢得决定这颗火种命运的权利。

You know that the Coreflame of "Death" has always been the greatest unknown regarding the Era Nova, which is why both you and Caenis desire to gain the power to control that Coreflame in the approaching citizens' assembly.
那刻夏老师，他与凯妮斯达成一致：回收{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的火种后搁置试炼，以求让「死亡」从世界上消失。这样不必继续逐火之旅，奥赫玛也能永享安宁。

Professor Anaxa has come to a consensus with Caenis — They want to suspend the trial once {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame is reclaimed, hoping thus to eradicate "Death" from this world. If they're successful, then the Flame-Chase Journey will cease, and Okhema can enjoy everlasting peace.
但我清楚，这与您的理想相悖：若不完成「再创世」，黑潮就无法根绝。即便有万敌阁下…黑潮还离我们很远。

But I know this runs counter to your wishes. So long as we do not usher in Era Nova, the black tide will never be eradicated. Even with Lord Mydei on the front line, and the black tide not posing an immediate risk, the danger nevertheless remains...
实话说，我难以权衡其中利弊…可无论如何，在围绕火种展开谈判前，得有人把它带回来。
Honestly, it's difficult for me to assess the pros and cons in this decision... But someone must bring the Coreflame before we can begin negotiations over it.
泰坦可能近在咫尺，我无法忽视这个机会…为了挽回{NICKNAME}阁下的灵魂，也必须有人行这一程。
The Titan could be very near. I cannot let this chance slip by. Besides... someone has to make this trip to bring back {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}'s soul.
本来，你就有足够的理由去觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。只是那大表演家利用了你的愿望…让我们不得不陷入两难的处境。
You already had every reason to seek an audience with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. It's that Great Performer who has weaponized your wishes and placed us in this difficult situation.
没有「死亡」的世界…那也是你的所求，是么？
A world without "Death"... Do you desire that, too?
如果命运注定要我与您走向对立，我会试着抗争，尽一切可能捍卫我所希冀之物。
If fate dictates that my path must oppose yours, I will do all I can to resist it, and protect what I aspire to achieve.
万敌阁下向我证明了这一点：如果不踏出最开始的一步，往后的一切都无从谈起。
Lord Mydei showed me that without taking the first step, all talk of what follows is moot.
*unsure of what to say, but offers a smile*
Have mercy, Aglaea! Stay your threads!!!
...I'm not going to punish her for that.
蝶，我一直希望你能直抒胸襟。很高兴你这么说。
I have always hoped to hear you speak your mind, Cas, and I am glad to have heard your true thoughts.
斯缇科西亚，我也曾到访过那里。即便已被冥河围作孤岛，也不难看出它在过去的岁月里是何等恬美……
Styxia... I've visited that place in the past. Though it is now an island surrounded by the River of Souls' torrents, it's not hard to see its former splendor...
去吧，我不会阻止你。还有{NICKNAME}，身为亲身欺瞒死亡之人，我想你有充分的理由和遐蝶同行，与「死亡」的尊神见上一面。

Go. I will not stand in your way. As for {NICKNAME}... you are someone who has cheated death. I believe you have more than enough reason to make the trip with Castorice and meet the god of "Death" themself.
我也很期待，遐蝶，当你的故事甄于完整，又将为逐火的旅途新添何种诠释。
Castorice, I too look forward to your journey. I wonder what kinds of new interpretations your completed story will bring to the Flame-Chase Journey.
各位，我无意打破美好的气氛，但……
I hate to put a damper on this heartwarming moment, but...
既然斯缇科西亚「已被冥河围作孤岛」，我们要怎么才能去到那里？缇宝大人恐怕已经……
If Styxia is now "an island surrounded by the River of Souls' torrents," then how do we find a way in? Lady Tribbie is probably...
神话中，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}曾将亡者的领域作为自己的藏宝地，它能于冥界畅行无阻。
In the myths, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} once made the domain of the dead their treasure vault — that is to say, they could enter and leave the nether realm as they pleased.
若它能够做到…那接替了它神权的半神也至少该有这点本事。
And if they could do that... then it follows that the demigod who inherited their divinity must be capable of the same.
明日{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}，云石天宫见——届时，<color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>将成为诸位的向导，带你们找到那座古城。
I'll see you at Marmoreal Palace at {RUBY_B#noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#} tomorrow. <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color> shall be your guide to finding that ancient city.
跌宕起伏的一天终于结束。众人散去，各自整理思绪……
The tumultuous day finally comes to an end. Everyone disperses, each lost in their own thoughts...
呀，伙伴，辩论会终于结束了？你们赢了吗？
Hey, friend! Is the debate finally over? Did you win?
The upper hand is ours. We thrashed them.
Really? But the look on your face says otherwise...
We're tied with the Council of Elders.
喔…那就是胜利在望的意思了！
Oh... that means victory is around the corner!
我们赢得了一场酣畅大败…
We managed to win ourselves a glorious defeat...
赢得大败…你还挺乐观的嘛。
Won a glorious defeat... You sure know how to look on the bright side.
好啦，先不说这个。你参加辩论的时候，人家也没闲着。
Well, moving on! Hehe, I was hard at work even while you were at the debate.
人家从小蝶那里借了好多书，想试试能不能解决你的问题。现在还差……
I borrowed a mountain of books from Cas to see if I could find a way to solve your problem. Let's see... I still have...
别担心，我们找到办法了。
It's okay, Mem. We've found a way.
咦？真、真的？那太好了！真是功夫不负有心人…还有有心迷迷！
Really!? That's fantastic news! I knew it! Hard work always pays off! Especially if you're as diligent as Mem!
人家心里的一块大石头，总算能落地了…呼……
Phew. I feel like a huge burden has finally been lifted off my shoulders...
Why are my eyelids... so heavy... all of a sudden...?
There's nothing more we can do for now. Let's get some rest.
You're right... Then I'll... go back to...
就像往常那样，迷迷以一种神乎其技的方式，回到了它不为人知的…小窝中。
As was their custom, Mem, with astonishing dexterity, slipped back into their secret... little hideaway.
(...Uh, it IS night time now, right?)
Maybe I can go for another walk outside.
就像往常那样，迷迷以一种神乎其技的方式，回到了它不为人知的…小窝中。
As was their custom, Mem, with astonishing dexterity, slipped back into their secret... little hideaway.
（无名客的字典里，没有「睡觉」二字……）
(The word "sleep" does not exist in the Nameless' dictionary...)
(No one can stop me from trailblazing!)
(It's been a long day. Time for a good rest...)
There's nothing more we can do for now. Let's get some rest.
(...Uh, it IS night time now, right?)
Maybe I can go for another walk outside.
（无名客的字典里，没有「睡觉」二字……）
(The word "sleep" does not exist in the Nameless' dictionary...)
(No one can stop me from trailblazing!)
晚些时候 奥赫玛某处
我想在出发前，和缇安大人再说说话。
...I just wanted to speak to Lady Trianne for a bit before I set off.
无论斯缇科西亚过去多么美丽，现在也已是死者的领域…很难说我们会在那里遇到什么。
No matter how breathtakingly beautiful Styxia once was, the place is now the domain of the departed... There is no telling what we'll encounter there.
I... don't want to have any regrets.
有人说过，今天你的眼睛明亮了许多吗？
Has anyone told you that your eyes are sparkling today?
Is that a figure of speech...?
以前的你…虽然偶尔也会露出微笑，但大家都能感觉到，那笑容里有一层若有若无的阴霾……
In the past... When you did smile once in a while, all of us could see that your heart remained troubled even as you smiled.
缇宝大人，你分明知道…那句*明天见*只是一个善意的谎言。
Lady Tribbie, you know perfectly well... that see you tomorrow is nothing but a white lie.
我不希望你的坚强…只是强颜欢笑的孤独。
I hope your toughness is not a mask hiding a lonely heart.
除了阿雅，大家都不知道你过去经历过什么，你也很少提起。但我们清楚，那一定是段沉重的往事，就像每一位黄金裔注定要背负的命运。

Cas... You hardly ever talked of your past. None of us knows what you went through apart from Agy. But we know it must have been filled with pain and hardships, as it is the fate every Chrysos Heir is destined to live out.
…很高兴属于你的那颗火种，终于从密布的阴云中现身了。
...We are just happy for you that the Coreflame you're meant to inherit has finally surfaced.
Isn't it a little too soon to say that?
但你已经知道「明天」在哪里了，对吗？
But you already know where "tomorrow" is, don't you?
不需要依赖任何人，记得全力以赴，别留下遗憾：我一直相信，你的拥抱和别人没有区别。
There is no need to rely on anyone else. Just give it your all and leave no regrets. We have always believed that your embrace is just as warm as everyone else's.
毕竟「拥抱」的意义就是传递温暖，而阿蝶…是最温柔的黄金裔呀。
Because we embrace others to comfort them, and Cas... you're the kindest Chrysos Heir we know.
这种感觉…不可思议。出发前，我忽然多了许多心愿…想要完成。
This feeling... It's hard to put into words. I suddenly found myself with so many wishes... so much I want to accomplish before setting off.
缇安她…偷偷为你准备了一份小礼物，可惜没能完成。*我*和缇宁正在加工，一定送到你手上。
Trianne... was actually working on a surprise gift for you. It's a pity she didn't get to finish it, but now Trinnon and I are working on it, and we'll make sure to give it to you.
所以，等你从斯缇科西亚回来，我们再回来这里见面吧。一路平安——明天见！
So, let's meet back here when you return from Styxia. Safe travels — see you tomorrow!
希望没有打扰到你休息。
I hope I didn't wake you.
我这个年纪，根本睡不着觉。
Sleep is a luxury when you are at my age.
阁下依旧这么有活力，我也心安了些。
I'm glad to see you're as full of life as ever.
阿格莱雅又要派任务了？
Is it another mission from Aglaea?
其实，我冒昧登门拜访，是出于一些…私人的心愿。
I'm here because of private matters, actually...
敢请阁下…听听我的请求。我想拜托阁下陪我去取一样东西。
If it isn't too much to ask, I'd really like it if you could come along with me to retrieve something.
阁下都不问问是什么吗…？
...Aren't you going to ask me what it is?
Not to worry — it's nothing heavy.
Wow, I feel so sleepy all of a sudden...
啊，难道阁下的灵魂正在……
Oh... then I'm glad you're feeling fine.
精神意志已回归宇宙，再见…
My will has become one with the universe. Goodbye.
咦，可是阁下的魂息，并没有飘离身体……
Huh? But I can still sense your soul here...?
...Ah, sorry! I didn't realize it was a joke.
从这里出发，应该用不了多久。我们…走吧？
It isn't a long way from here. Shall we?
我要投票！我要投票！怎么投票？
I want to vote! Tell me how I can vote!
拿着你那枚带有{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}符文的陶片，在心中选择元老院并默默祷言，直到陶片记录下你的选择，再将陶片丢进陶罐里。

Take your ceramic shard engraved with the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} rune, select the Council of Elders in your heart, and pray silently until the shard registers your choice. Then toss it into the dolium.
元老院？元你个头！我的家乡早就被黑潮吞没了，还回到黄金世？我看是回到奥赫玛的黄金世还差不多吧！

The Council of Elders? More like the council of buffoons! The black tide took my hometown long ago! Who are they kidding with bringing back Era Chrysea? It's all a sham to create their own Era Chrysea in Okhema!
泰坦们总是公平的…只要我们不再侵犯它们，就不会遭受神罚。
The Titans are just... So long as we do not overstep our bounds again, we will not incur divine wrath.
真是个老腐朽。陷入疯狂的泰坦，早该让位于半神。我们走着瞧！
Oh, please. The time when these deranged Titans should have vacated their spot to the demigods is long overdue! You'll see soon enough, you old fogey!
我倒想教{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}用秤砣砸醒你。走着瞧就走着瞧！
And I pray that {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} smacks some sense into you with their scales. We shall see how this turns out!
Just another peaceful day in Okhema.
是吗？没有真正打起来，勉强还算和平…吧……
...I suppose "peaceful" is technically correct if no actual violence happened...
Yeah, watching people squabble is kind of fun.
欸？阁下竟然有这种兴趣吗，那你应该…很喜欢奥赫玛的氛围。
Hm? You're interested in that? Well, you'll feel right at home in Okhema then.
时至今日，我仍会觉得不可思议。在摇摇欲坠的翁法罗斯，唯独这里依旧是一片光明。奥赫玛的人们还会用投票来解决问题……

To this day, I still find it almost unreal that Okhema is the only place illuminated by light amidst the crumbling ruins of Amphoreus, and its people are even holding votes to reconcile differing opinions...
这幅和平的光景…简直不像是末日。
This peaceful sight is making me forget that this is the end times.
这就是逐火之旅的意义。
This is what the Flame-Chase Journey is all about.
Shouldn't you have gotten used to it by now?
在来到这里前，我曾在一座名为「哀地里亚」的雪国居住过很久。那是信仰{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的城邦，以独特的丧葬文化闻名世间。

Before coming here, I had lived for many years in Aidonia, a city of rime and frost. The people there were devotees of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, and were well-known for their unique burial rites and traditions.
而我，曾是那传统中重要的一环。
...Traditions that I played a major role in.
Because of the curse on you?
没错。现在，我是奥赫玛的「入殓师」……
Yes. You now know me as the mortician of Okhema...
但在过去，我是哀地里亚的「督战圣女」。
But back in those days, I was Aidonia's Maiden of War.
哀地里亚人在冰原中找到了踽踽独行的我，将我的诅咒视作{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福。他们相信我的双手能终结黄金世的错误，带人们觐见伟大的死亡之神。

I was trudging across the frosty plains on my own when the Aidonians found me. They saw the curse in me as a blessing from {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, and believed that my hands could correct the Era Chrysea's mistake and lead them to meet the great god of death.
他们为我提供了归宿，作为交换……
They provided me shelter, but in return...
我需要对死囚、战俘和英雄们一视同仁，赐予他们「仁慈的死亡」。
I was expected to grant "merciful deaths" to war captives, prisoners bound for execution, and heroes alike.
Is that some sort of end-of-life care?
阁下也是这么想的吗？但……
Is that how you see it too? But...
在我看来：无论暴烈，还是体面，死亡就是死亡……
No matter how kind or cruel the means, nothing can change the essence of death...
剥夺他人的生命，从来不是一件值得信仰的事……
Taking away someone's life is never worthy of religious worship.
他们的声音…哀求也好，感谢也罢，全都那样刺耳……
Their voices... They pierce my ears... The pleading, the thanks...
呵，孩子，我明白。我也曾有过如你这般的迷茫。
Ahh. I know that feeling, child. I was once as lost as you are now.
但你应当敬重赴死之人。同样地，身为予人以光荣和解脱的圣女，你应当尊敬自己。
But you must respect those walking towards death, just like how you should respect yourself as the Holy Maiden granting humans glory and liberation.
您要我做的事，根本和处刑人无异，我要如何尊敬自己？
What you're asking me to do is no better than the task of an executioner, and yet you want me to respect myself?
无论拥有怎样的名目，这都是在夺走他人的性命……
No matter the titles, I am still taking away human lives...
狂热如哀地里亚的冥军战士，接纳死亡也不在一朝一夕。第一次踏上战场时，新兵往往都会变成逃兵。
This won't be the first time that Aidonia's fanatical netherwarriors have faced death. On the contrary, recruits new to the battlefield often run away from their first fight.
因为死亡是天地间至高至难的力量。而你能将其掌握，你便配得上这敬意。
Death is the mightiest and gravest power in this world. The fact that you can wield it means you are deserving of respect.
...Then, let me tell you a story.
为了纪念德拉孔，一位老行刑人，哀地里亚行刑官常用的重剑被称作「德拉孔尼安」。
In Aidonia, the greatswords commonly used by executioners are called "Drakonian" in memory of Drakon, an elderly executioner.
它的剑身上有三道气孔。如果这柄剑能不偏不倚，迅速落下，三处气孔便不会发出任何声音，受刑者也能在一瞬之间离开人世……
The sword has three air holes along its body. If the sword is swung down swiftly and accurately, the holes would make no sound, and the executed would also depart this world quickly and painlessly...
但如果有所犹豫，它们便会发出刺耳的噪声。随后，行刑官也必定会听见受刑者的哀嚎。
But should the executioner have any hesitation, the holes will produce a piercing whistle. On that cue, the screams of the executed are sure to follow.
自德拉孔起，行刑者必须日夜磨砺处决的剑技。他们每一次挥剑都要比上一次更为坚决，以免痛苦滋生。

Every executioner after Drakon is to hone their sword skills every day in preparation of future executions. Every swing of their blade must be more resolute than the last, for failing to do so will bring pain.
既是为了赴死者，也是为了自己。
Pain for the dying... as well as pain for themselves.
…恕我无法对这种行径感到麻木。
...No. I can never get used to this.
不，孩子。我不想你对此习以为常。
You misunderstand, child. I am not telling you to get used to it.
我只要你思考死者为何而痛苦。然后让你的每一次触碰，都比上一次更加坚决。
I'm asking you to consider the source of the dead's suffering, and use that knowledge to fortify your future touches with more and more determination.
与死者同行，敬爱他们如同你敬爱生命…你将再也听不见那些杂音。
Go walk with the dead, and love them as you love life... Then you'll no longer hear those noises.
别杀我…求求你，我不想死……
Please... Don't kill me... I don't want to die....
这是你的义务。记住，思考死者为何而痛苦，然后向他们献上敬意。
This is your duty. Remember, consider the source of the dead's suffering, then give them the respect they deserve.
谢、谢谢你…别听她的，求求你……
Th—Thank you... I beg you... Don't listen to her...
若你无法学会接纳死亡，便不能为哀地里亚所接纳。
If you cannot learn to accept death, then Aidonia has no place for you.
这是最后一次机会：动手。
This is your last chance. Do it.
不…我不想死…求求你了，求求你……
No, please... I don't want to die... Please, I'm begging you...
你用手指轻触囚犯的额头。他面色苍白，目光闪烁，眼中满是惊恐，身体止不住地痉挛。
You gently touch the prisoner's forehead with your finger. His face is pale, his eyes flicker with fear, and his body trembles uncontrollably.
因为恐惧、愤怒、憎恨，还是你所谓*仁慈的死亡之触*根本就是个谎言？
Is it because of fear, anger, and hatred, or is your so-called merciful Touch of Death simply a lie?
黑紫色的淡斑如同花瓣，在死囚的脸上舒展，随后又仿佛泉水淹没身体。他的震颤停止了，方才止不住求饶的呼喊声逐渐变为似叹息的呜咽，兀自咕哝着。

The dark purple mottles spread like petals across the death row inmate's face, then seemed to be submerged by springwater, flooding his body. His trembling ceased, and the cries that had once begged for mercy slowly turned into a sigh-like whimper, as he murmurs to himself.
很快，一切陷入死寂，化作漆黑的露水随风散去。你听到自己的心跳盖过剧烈的呼吸声。
Quickly, everything falls into a dead silence, turning into pitch-black dew that scatters with the wind. You hear your own heartbeat drown out the sound of heavy breathing.
希望斯人牺牲能令你有所感悟。
May you gain some insights through his sacrifice.
作为「督战圣女」，你的人生才刚刚开始。
This is just the beginning of your life as the Maiden of War.
...What are you trying to do with me?
我老了，必须响应{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的召唤，去往它的国度了……
I have aged... The time has come for me to heed the summons of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and journey to their domain.
这…也是每一个哀地里亚人的归宿。
...The final resting place of every Aidonian.
您还远没有衰老到那种地步，还有许多岁月可活……
You're not that old yet... You still have many, many years ahead of you...
我对加诸此身的衰老，还有临近的死亡…开始感到恐惧了。
For I have come to fear... my declining health and impending death.
所以，遐蝶，你能给我最后一次机会，让我向那恐惧发起冲锋，证明自己并非懦夫。
Castorice, will you give me one last chance to charge towards fear and prove that I am no coward?
I... I can't take this anymore...
孩子，是我从冰原中带回了你，令你荒唐的命运开始转动。身为哀地里亚的行刑官之首，也是我将「处刑」这道重任不由分说，强压在你肩头。
Child, it was I who brought you here from the frosty plains and set your farcical fate in motion. It was also I, chief executioner of Aidonia, who forced the heavy duty of executing others onto you.
我深知，你始终都对我…对{RUBY_B#哀地里亚人}我们{RUBY_E#}信仰的一切感到困惑，甚至愤怒……
I've always known... that you have doubts and even anger about {RUBY_B#Aidonian}my{RUBY_E#} faith... and about me...
是啊，我们的所作所为与绑架无异。
所以，只要你轻轻一触，一条罪恶的生命便将就此凋零。逃离对你而言，不是易如反掌？
Yet you can end any sinful life with just a touch of your fingers... Shouldn't it be easy for you escape from here?
就算哀地里亚人再怎么不加思考，视死亡如儿戏，但…我做不到。
It doesn't matter how lightly the Aidonians take death, or how readily they accept it... I simply can't do it.
呵呵，所以…我果然没看错你。
Haha... I knew I was right about you.
我一直把你当成女儿，悉心培养，因为你生来受赐如此{RUBY_B#诅咒}祝福{RUBY_E#}，这世上没有人比你更明白生命和死亡的重量。

I've taught you and cared for you as my own daughter all this time... because of this {RUBY_B#curse}blessing{RUBY_E#} that's been with you since your birth. I know no one else in the world would understand the weight of life and death more than you do.
若用哀地里亚人的眼光看待「死亡」：它是一切生命的终点，是我们每个人的必由之路。人不应抗拒，而要学会如何迎接它。
In the eyes of an Aidonian, "Death" is the end of all life, a destination we will all eventually reach. Humans should not resist it, but learn how to face it.
只有在彻悟这个道理后，你才能好好活下去。
You can only live your life to the fullest after understanding this principle.
哪怕你终将离开哀地里亚的庇护——哪怕永远肩负着{RUBY_B#祝福}诅咒{RUBY_E#}——你也可以像普通人一样，昂首挺胸地活下去。
And when you do, even if you eventually leave Aidonia's protection... even if you must carry the {RUBY_B#blessing}curse{RUBY_E#} forever... you can live with your head held high, like everyone else.
来，动手吧。我已教给你我此生所能领悟的一切……
Come now. It's time. I have already taught you all that I know...
证明自己是个合格的圣女，或是具备如此决心吧。
Show me that you are a fitting Holy Maiden... or at least, that you possess the resolve to become one.
我最后一次服从她的指示，轻轻触碰了眼前的老人。
This was the last time I followed her command. I gently touched the elderly woman before me.
这位见惯了死亡的处刑人，她的消逝与常人并无不同：喉头的呜咽，眼中的遗憾，还有…微不可见的颤抖从指尖传来。
The executioner who had seen too much death died the same way as everyone else... A gasp for air, a wistful look in her eyes, and a barely perceptible tremor in her fingertips.
阿蒙内特，试图向我传授「死亡」的人，也最终如朝露消失在晨雾中。她一生都在贯彻哀地里亚人的信仰，而当死亡真正来临，她也如那信仰所述……

Elder Amunet, the person who tried to teach me about "Death," ultimately vanished like dew in the morning mist. She spent her life embodying the beliefs of the Aidonians, and when death finally came, she embraced it exactly as their doctrine had taught...
I have nothing but respect for her.
我在哀地里亚城外的沼泽间，为她树立了一座衣冠冢，将她留在我亲手送葬的一众死者间。然后，为了觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，我再次踏上了流浪。
I erected a cenotaph in her honor in the marshes outside Aidonia's city walls with the others I had laid to rest. Then, I set out once more in search of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
那是一段很长、很长的路，我听过太多对死亡的议论。「生命从死亡中寻获意义」、「万物因终结而前进」……
It was a long, long journey... I heard so many discussions about death along the way. "Life finds meaning in death." "The world improves because there is an end"...
仿佛世间最可怕的幽暗，所有人都在讲述它的沉重，或是抵抗、或是崇拜、或是敬畏……
It seems the most terrible darkness in this world. Everyone talks about its heavy weight. Some resist it, some worship it, and some even revere it...
一尊去向不明的泰坦，何以成为人们心中最深的恐惧……
How did a disappeared Titan become the deepest fear of humankind...
…为何，会在我的梦中萦绕不去？
...And why do they haunt my dreams?
为了这个问题的答案，我继续旅途。起初是逃离，而后变成了寻索，最后……
I continued my travels to seek an answer. Initially, I was running away. Then, I started searching for it. And now, at the end...
我想知道，是否，我的触碰，我的拥抱…并非只能剥夺……
I just want to know if my touch... if my embrace... can do more than taking things away...
而是也可以，留下些什么？
Can I make anything...? Can I leave anything behind?
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}试炼完成的那一天，{NICKNAME}阁下一定也很困惑吧？
On the day that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Trial ended, you must have had many questions, {NICKNAME}.
因为我也是：我不明白，为什么阁下身为天外之人，会以这种残忍的方式早早卷入翁法罗斯的命运……
I felt just as confused. Why, as someone from beyond the sky, were you so cruelly dragged into Amphoreus's fate?
…我想做些什么，可即便尽力表现地更自然些，也无法像普通人那样，理所当然地与生者相碰。
...I wished I could take action, but no matter how hard I try, I cannot simply interact with the living as ordinary people do.
哪怕早在树庭，我们就有过无心的接触。那时明明什么都没有发生……
Even when we brushed against each other unintentionally in the Grove... and it was obvious that nothing had happened...
当我心中终于涌起近乎奢望的希冀……
When an almost unattainable hope finally welled up in my heart...
当我以为自己的触碰，或许不会再带来悲伤……
When I thought that perhaps my touch would no longer bring sorrow...
可命运却要告诉我，不是「死亡」的诅咒终于可以治愈……
Fate declared to me: It wasn't that the curse of "Death" had finally been lifted...
而是阁下的灵魂不再属于人间…我的双手早已夺无可夺，仅此而已么？
...but that your soul no longer belonged to this world... and there was nothing left for my hands to take. Nothing.
是啊，难道这一次就会有所改变吗？我不是不明白，只是不愿意接受现实罢了。
And did I really think this time would be any different? It's not that I don't understand this reality — just that I'm unwilling to accept it.
明明都走过了如此漫长的旅途，我仍找寻不到生与死的答案，永远无可奈何……
Having walked such a long road, I am still unable to find the answer to life and death. I am resigned to eternal despair...
想要留下些什么，也只能任由「死亡」将它们从指缝间带走……
Anything I wish to hold on to, "Death" will inevitably wrest from my grasp...
可在那之后，我甚至都没有再次确认的勇气…直到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}剖白残酷的事实，带来你我面前。
And from that moment on, I lacked the courage to confirm it again... Until {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} laid bare the cruel truth before us.
遐蝶和你谈起她送给其他黄金裔的礼物，不知不觉就走到「你的礼物」前。
Castorice talks to you about the gifts she gave to other Chrysos Heirs, and before you know it, she arrives at "your gift."
但，现在…或许我还有最后一次机会。
But now... perhaps I might have one last chance.
很久以前，缇宁老师为我解读过一则预言。她说：<color=#dbc291ff>「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖；相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」</color>

Long ago, Trinnon read a prophecy to me: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace... there shall be eternal separation."</color>
很高兴你能对我坦诚相见。
Thank you for telling me your thoughts.
这样…也算是不留遗憾了吧。
With that... I won't have any regrets.
呃…这些需要我当没听到吗？
...Should I pretend I didn't hear any of that?
抱歉，说太多了…希望没有让阁下感到困扰。
I'm sorry. I probably said too much... I hope I didn't make you uncomfortable.
先不说这个了。我们到了，阁下。
Let's put that aside for the moment. We've arrived.
想要阁下陪我取的东西，是我为你准备的一件小礼物，手工制作的，就像先前送给缇安大人的饰品…我想给大家都留下一份心意。
I want to retrieve a small gift I specially prepared for you. I made it myself, like the trinket I gave Lady Trianne... I want to leave something for everyone, if possible.
觐见「死亡」泰坦，此行恐怕也前途未卜…我想，要是能抓住临行前的每一刻，不留遗憾就好了。
The journey to seek an audience with the Death Titan cannot be an easy one... I want to make full use of every moment I have before we depart, so that I don't have any regrets.
Is it a brooch with my face on it?
No, it isn't. You'll know when you see it.
这…还请阁下先过目，如果不喜欢，拒绝也不迟。
Then... Perhaps you can have a look at it first? You don't have to take it if you don't like it.
对此我并不惊讶，因为她说的仿佛并非预言，而是我过去的全部写照。
I found no surprise in it, for her words sounded not like a foretelling, but a perfect reflection of my past.
世上的拥抱本该为相逢而生，可我的双手只能诉说告别。那时的我也有理由相信，这道宿命终将贯穿我的一生……
Embraces in this world are born of reunions, yet my touch speaks only of farewells. In that moment, I had no doubt that this destiny would weave itself through the entirety of my life...
可现在事情迎来了转机：既然终于能够觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…那我就还有机会为那注定的预言，写下另一种诠释。
And yet things have taken a turn for the better: Now that I can finally have an audience with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, perhaps I can rewrite the meaning of that fated prophecy.
我没有理由不倾尽全力……
I have no reason not to give it my all...
...for your sake, and for my own.
Looks like someone left something behind.
不会是很贵重的东西吧…
I hope the gift wasn't expensive...
只是一些手工制品，按理说不会被窃贼盯上才对……
Just some handcrafted trinkets... Things that shouldn't catch the eye of thieves anyways...
你惹上什么神秘怪盗团了？
Did you get into trouble with some phantom thieves?
我、我也不是什么腐败的大人吧……
{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的硬币，还有这块石板……
The coin of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}, and a slate...
不会错，这就是她最爱用的象征。
No doubt about it. This is her favorite symbol.
<color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>阁下，阿格莱雅大人早先说过的，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的半神，在翁法罗斯各地留下过神话传说的飞贼……
It's Lady <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color>, the demigod of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} whom Lady Aglaea had spoken of. She's a master thief who's left legendary tales all over Amphoreus.
好久不见，她的登场方式依旧这么…「恶劣」。
So many years have passed, yet she's still announcing herself in such a... "crass" manner.
阁下，我们先按石板上说的，找到赛飞儿阁下吧。
Let's just do as the slate says and look for Lady Cipher.
为了取回礼物，也为给猫咪怪盗一点教训，你们动身前往市集，并找到了她留下的短矛。
To retrieve the gift and teach Kitty Phantom Thief a lesson, you head to the market and find the short spear she left behind.
...This is a trick she left for us.
...Exactly the kind of thing she would do.
这就是怪盗信中提到的「黄金短矛」。
This is the "Golden Short Spear" mentioned in the thief's letter.
似乎由于某种力量限制，它无法被修复。
Due to some kind of power restriction, it cannot be repaired.
...This is a trick she left for us.
很显然，猫咪怪盗想和你玩一个小游戏——两根短矛，一个正确，一个错误。
Clearly, Kitty Phantom Thief wants to play a little game with you — two short spears, one correct, one wrong.
Let me check the hint on the scroll.
只有刻着真话的黄金短矛能带你们找到猫咪怪盗。
Only the Golden Short Spear engraved with the truth can lead you to Kitty Phantom Thief.
Inspect the left Golden Short Spear.
左边的短矛上刻着字——你别被耍了，右边的短矛刻着假话。
The left spear is engraved with the words: "Don't be fooled, the right spear is engraved with lies."
Inspect the right Golden Short Spear.
右边的短矛上刻着字——相信我灰子，这两根短矛都刻着真话。
The right spear is engraved with the words: "Trust me, Gray Mystery, both spears are engraved with the truth."
卷轴上的话应该是真的，那么你想修复的是哪一根短矛呢？
The words on the scroll should be true, so which short spear do you want to repair?
Repair the left Golden Short Spear.
Repair the right Golden Short Spear.
真是性格顽劣…阁下，跟我来！
这根短矛飞了一圈回到了原地，又若无其事地假装自己是一道新的题目。
The short spear flew in a circle and returned to its original spot, nonchalantly pretending to be a new puzzle.
...Exactly the kind of thing she would do.
Repair the left Golden Short Spear.
Repair the right Golden Short Spear.
你注意到遐蝶并不想浪费时间，便直接修复了左边的短矛。
You notice Castorice doesn't want to waste time, so you immediately repair the left spear.
赛飞儿——如果这头大地兽真的是她——那么她看起来似乎十分惬意，眼神里饱含三分真诚、三分赞许、三分得逞，和三分「哈哈，灰子，认真你就输了」。

Cipher — if this dromas truly is her — appears to be quite content, her gaze filled with three parts sincerity, three parts approval, three parts triumph, and three parts "Hahah, Gray Mystery, you've lost if you take this seriously."
见到你对待大地兽也如此郑重，她总计十二分的复杂情感立刻转变为十分佩服。
Seeing you treat the dromas with such seriousness, all twelve parts of her complex emotions immediately transformed into one of admiration.
I see. So a dromas is a cat.
她似乎在说：「对的，哦不对，对的对的，对的。」
She seems to be saying, "Right. Oh, no, yeah yeah, yes."
她在一阵自我拉扯中得出了肯定的结论：大地兽确实就是猫咪。
After a moment of inner conflict, she reached a definitive conclusion: The dromas is indeed a cat.
再说一遍，你管我叫什么？
What did you just call me!?
她似乎在说：「啊哈哈，赛飞儿不知道哦。」
She seems to be saying, "Ah hahah, Cipher does not know."
Hmm, so. She says she doesn't know.
你呀，还是这么不小心。重要的礼物，不该揣在怀里小心护着吗？
Tsk. You're still careless as ever. Shouldn't you keep such a precious gift near your bosom?
既然你知道这是一件礼物，就请还给我吧。不要混在人群里千里传声了。
Since you know it's a gift for someone else, please give it back to me. Stop hiding among the people and letting the wind carry your voice.
既然我知道是礼物——那自然要开个高价啦！风的子民可不会在一个地方停留太久，除非你的诚意能让风驻足。怎么说，嗯？

Now, now. Since I know it's a gift — That just means I need to milk its worth! The children of the wind never stay for long in one place, unless your offer is tempting enough to still the wind. What say you?
你要多少我给多少，开个价吧。
Name your price. I'll give you however much you want.
If you don't want the money, I'd gladly take it off your hands...
Ah... I'm sorry. Bargaining is really not my forte...
哈哈哈哈哈——「蜗居公主」的雅号，果然名不虚传——！
Hahaha! No wonder they call you Princess Homebody!
那两位，来我府上作客吧，换个更正式的场合谈生意。循着我播下的风，找到我的住处，没问题吧？
Tell you what, why don't you two come over to my place? It'll make a better venue for proper business discussions. You can find where I live through the winds I've sown, right?
能探到你的魂息就够了…轻而易举。
Piece of cake... I can do that even if I can only sense your soul.
Alright, I'll see you there! Oh, by the way...
谈拢前，我先收个押金，没意见吧？嘿，走你——
Everyone cool with me collecting a deposit before we reach an agreement, right? Hehe. Now, come this way...
<color=#eb4d3dff>背包中的「神血蜜露」被偷走了。</color>
<color=#eb4d3dff>The Dew of Divine Blood in the backpack has been stolen.</color>
Over here, over here! ...No, not that way. This way!
我要真想藏起来，又何必当着你的面出现呢？
Come on. If I really wanted to hide, you'd never find me.
各位，别像只炸了毛的猫嘛，我也没那么恐怖吧，喵？
So, relax, you two! No need to get your hackles up. I'm not that scary, am I? Meow!
出现了！说话带「喵」的角色…
At last! A character that meows has appeared!
哈哈，怎么可能？千年以前没准还有人喜欢这口癖，现在早就不流行了。
Haha, no way! Some people might have been into that a millennium ago, but it's long since gone out of style.
哈哈，瞧你那嫌弃样！干嘛啦，我就是表演一下——千年以前没准还有人喜欢这口癖，现在早就不流行了。
Whoa! That upset? Calm down. I'm just putting on a show with the meowing. Some people might have been into that a millennium ago, but it's long since gone out of style.
来吧，轻松点，来谈谈正事？
Loosen up, buddy! Shall we get down to business?
先把首饰还给我…否则一切免谈。
Give me the jewelry piece first... or everything's off the table.
And my Dew of Divine Blood!
The gift is a piece of jewelry?
用料朴素，但做工一如既往地精湛。好久没见，手艺不减啊。而且…还特别用心。
The materials are nothing to wow at, but the workmanship is superb as always... You're still skilled as ever even after all this time. And you've put a lot of heart into this one... Hehe.
哎哎，别这么剑拔弩张。放轻松，放轻松……
Oh, come now! Don't be so upset. Relax! Relax...
看！这地方视野不错，对吧？每个人在做什么、要去哪里，全都一览无余，还不会被人发现。
Look! Isn't the view here just great? You can see what everyone is doing and where they're going, and they won't even know you're here.
暖场也暖得差不多了，那咱们开门见山吧：方才只是开个玩笑，我邀请两位前来，主要是为了三件事……
Now that we've broken the ice, let's get to the point — Everything I've said so far has been a joke. I'm inviting you two here for three things:
一，裁缝女找到我，说希望我带你们前往斯缇科西亚，寻找死亡泰坦。
One, the seamstress found me and wants me to take you to Styxia to look for the Death Titan.
二…呵，元老院也找到我，让我确保{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的火种能被交到他们手中。
Two... Ha, the Council of Elders also found me and wants me to make sure the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} ends up in their hands.
Look at you! Having your finger in both pies.
那是。别看我低调，可是名副其实的半神。
Of course. I may keep a low profile, but I'm still a bona fide demigod.
金织、控制狂、奥赫玛第一美人、阿格莱雅妈妈…还要我多说几个外号吗？
Goldweaver, control freak, number one beauty of Okhema, Aglaea the Mom... How many more nicknames do you wanna hear?
我找到二位，并告诉你们：以上两件事，我都不想干。
I'm telling you that I'm not interested in doing either of those things.
别去找什么死亡泰坦了——就这么简单。
Don't go look for the Death Titan. The end.
Whoa, this is some high-quality stuff...
这一屋子叮呤咣啷的，得值多少钱啊…全是你靠「再创世」的噱头挣的？
And this room is full of it... How much are these worth, hmm? Did you get all of this through that Era Nova gimmick?
一些是家族财产，另一些来自改衣师的副业。别把逐火的事业与你惯常的勾当相提并论。
Some of it is family fortune, while the rest came from my business as a dressmaster. Don't liken the Flame-Chase work to your shady dealings.
好家伙…早知道我就撬你家大门去了，哪儿还犯得着流窜作案哪。
Wow... I should have busted down your door instead of going around like a thief.
说吧，好容易割下这么大一块肉给我，什么意思？
Well, spill. Why are you giving me so much money?
花钱请人办事。你值得这个价格。
Payment for doing work. You're worth this much.
你忘了？我应该表明过自己的态度吧。
Did you forget my stance to all this? I thought I made myself very clear.
逃避。逃避责任、逃避神谕、逃避命运——<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文。」</color>
You wish to run away. Run away from your responsibilities, from the prophecy, and from your destiny. <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change."</color>
当然，我明白，这道预言对你无比沉重，我也从未对「诡计」半神的逃避有所苛责。
I understand this prophecy weighs on you immensely. That is why I have never reproached the demigod of Trickery for running away.
但现在，我需要你。请你不要拒绝我的请求。
But I need you right now, so don't turn me down.
知道么，阿格莱雅？或许是神用金线掐住了你的喉咙，我从你的请求中听不出半点诚意。
You know, maybe the gods got your tongue with their golden threads, Aglaea. I'm not hearing any sincerity in your words.
给我一个让你低下高贵头颅的理由。
Give me a reason why you're bowing your noble head to me.
「门径」的神力已所剩无几。我需要另一位半神护送遐蝶，去完成她毕生之所求。
The divine power of Passages is running out. I need another demigod to escort Castorice and help her fulfill her lifelong wish.
噢，我可算是听明白了：你想让遐蝶白白送死，还想搭上我。
Oh, I get it now. You're sending Castorice to her death, and you want me to die with her.
这是遐蝶自己的请求。我从未见她如此坚决。
This is Castorice's own request. I have never seen her so determined.
她…主动提的？你没在诓我？
She... brought this up herself? You're not pulling my leg?
她也下定决心，要从布满迷雾的过去中走出。
She's also made up her mind to leave her confused past behind.
而你，赛飞儿：当你不再迷茫时，也必然会做出同样的选择。
...As will you, Cipher, when you finally make up your mind.
话可别说的太死。时间让你我建起了城府，而她始终纯净得像朵花蕾……
Don't be so sure. Time has hardened the likes of you and I, but Castorice remains pure as driven snow.
也许她会想到牺牲的缇安，想到无数惨死的黄金裔，想到半截身子入土的你——最后一刻还没到呢，她到底想做什么，我还真没法替你乐观。

She can always turn back before the end, you know? Maybe she'll remember Trianne's sacrifice. Maybe she'll remember the countless martyred Chrysos Heirs. Maybe she'll remember you, with your one foot in the grave — I ain't as optimistic as you about what she'll want to do.
这样吧！不如先让我替你收着这一屋子宝贝，咱俩来打个赌吧？
Tell you what, why don't I take this room of treasures as a security deposit and we make a bet?
我赌她一定会打消这个念头。如果我输了，我不光会帮你做事，把这堆叮当响的好东西全数奉还，还会额外再送你一屋子满满当当的财宝，怎样？
I bet she'll change her mind and turn back. Now, if I lose, I'll do what you want me to do, return this deposit to you, plus giving you another roomful of treasures. How does that sound?
你说起话来眉飞色舞，仿佛稳操胜券。
You sound like you have all the confidence in the world.
既然如此，就照你说的，签订契约吧——并衷心希望你已做好了满盘皆输的准备。
In that case, let's make a pact with those conditions. I hope you're prepared to lose it all.
我想赢，所以，我拜托两位别再惦记什么斯缇科西亚了。作为谢礼，我会把赢来的那一屋子叮呤咣啷分给各位，你们自己五五分账，或者怎么分，随便。
I want to win. So I hope you two can give up on going to Styxia. I'll give all the treasures in that room to you, and you can split it between yourselves however you want.
What do you think? Tempting, right?
我都快死了，要钱有什么用？
I'm almost dead. What use do I have for money?
容我回绝你的提议。如果我们无法找到死亡泰坦，{NICKNAME}的灵魂就会……
I decline. If we don't find the Death Titan, {NICKNAME}'s soul will...
翁法罗斯货币和我们的不一样。
The currency I use isn't the same as the one in Amphoreus.
哎呀灰子，我要给你的可不是人们几千年前买鱼用的破贝壳……
Oh, please! Dear Gray Mystery, I'm not giving you broken seashells people used in the markets millennia ago...
那可是黄金，足金，千足金！硬通货呀硬通货，你知道这三个字意味着什么吗？
I'm giving you gold! Pure, solid gold! It's a hard currency! You know what that means, right!?
不，这不是价值的问题。如果我们无法找到死亡泰坦，{NICKNAME}的灵魂就会……
It's not about the value of the reward. If we don't find the Death Titan, {NICKNAME}'s soul will...
这…这怎么能行呢！您的灵魂已几近消散了，阁下……
N—No! Your soul is almost gone for good...
再多的不便细说，你只需知道，斯缇科西亚我们非去不可。
I can't go into the details, but we have to go to Styxia.
蜗居公主，虽然你一直都口口声声说，要找到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，解除自己的诅咒，除此之外什么都不关心……
Princess Homebody, you keep talking about needing to find {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, about getting rid of your curse, and you don't care about anything else...
可你真的为自己活过，哪怕一天么？
But did you ever live for your own pleasure? Even for just one day?
What are you trying to say?
我想说，阿格莱雅把你捡回来，可不是真让你为了她「再创世」的口号白白送死的。
I'm saying, contrary to your beliefs, Aglaea didn't take you in just so you can die for her Era Nova.
逐火之旅必定会伴随牺牲。若非如此，你也不必时时躲着阿格莱雅大人。
The Flame-Chase Journey walks hand in hand with sacrifices. Isn't that why you're always running away from Lady Aglaea?
…嗐，算了，大家都有苦衷，我就不多嘴了。反正我也没打算兑现跟她的赌注，嘻。
Pah... Fine. Never mind. We all have our own problems. I ain't gonna say anything anymore. It's not like I was gonna honor that bet anyway, hehe.
不过，听我最后一句劝：斯缇科西亚可不是什么观光圣地。那地里埋着的玩意，就连十个…不，五十个阿格莱雅都拿不出手——
But listen to me: Styxia is no tourist destination. Sure, the treasures buried in there are ten... No, fifty times richer than Aglaea's vault —
可你知道我为什么从来没去过吗？因为就算我高低是个半神，都怕自己回不来。
Yet I've never been there and I never plan to! Because even a demigod can't be sure they can walk out of that place alive.
送你们过去？可以，得加钱。
And now I'm supposed to escort you to Styxia? Sure. Pay up.
I'll give you however much you want!
阿格莱雅已经替我付过了。
Aglaea has already paid for me.
她付的是金银财宝，给生者。你呢，要付的是「死者」的部分。
Her payment was in gold and precious stones, which only covers the living passenger. You need to pay me as a member of the dead.
扎格列斯半神的职责是敲竹杠？
Is ripping people off the authority of Zagreus' demigod?
您猜怎么着？还真是。或者说，这是我业务的一部分。
You know, you're not wrong. At least it's a part of my responsibilities.
我度过了比大部分人更漫长的时光，就算不像阿格莱雅大人那样善于营生，也还算有些积蓄。
I have lived a longer life than most people. Though I'm not as good at doing business as Lady Aglaea, I still have some savings.
我…可以把它们全都交给你。
I... I can give them all to you.
Then how are you going to live the rest of your life?
那…那就百分之九十…不，八十吧……
Th—Then I'll give you ninety... no, eighty percent...
行吧，那我就不客气了：遐蝶八成的积蓄，外加一瓶神血蜜露…嘿，不算亏。
Well, don't mind if I do. Eighty percent of Castorice's savings and a bottle of Dew of Divine Blood... Heh, not a bad trade.
别忘了，把遐蝶的东西还给她。
Don't forget to give Castorice's jewelry back.
哎呀，知道啦，没想到灰子你这么记仇。
Okay, okay! I didn't know you hold grudges, Gray Mystery.
等我满血复活你就知错了。
I'll show you who's boss once I've recovered with full HP!
哎呀，人家好怕怕…嘻，能追上我的尾巴再说吧？
Waaaah, I'm so scared! Tee-hee, can you even catch my tail?
不过，计划有变：明天别去浴场，来奥赫玛城门口找我。
A minor change in plans, though. Don't go to the bath tomorrow. Come look for me at Okhema's city gates instead.
So why are you changing the meeting place...?
没什么，单纯因为我怕了裁缝女那副冷冰冰的面孔。如果可以，我一秒都不想在奥赫玛多待。
Oh, nothing really. Just a bit scared of the seamstress' frosty face. I wouldn't stay a second longer in Okhema if it were up to me.
好了，交易结束，我来捎各位一程吧——
Well, now that we've struck a deal, why don't I give you guys a lift back?
——天高路远，先睡个好觉吧，两位。
It's gonna be a long ride, so have a good rest!
（这是哪儿…我的房间吗？我怎么回来的？）
(Where am I...? Is this my room? How did I get back here?)
（硬币…赛飞儿？她还帮我把被子盖好了？！）
(This is... a coin...? It was Cipher? And she even tucked me in!?)
(Never mind... It's getting late. I'd better get going.)
Don't worry. Mem's here to help!
毕竟人家不止外表可爱，还是实力派呢。
Being cute isn't my only forte. I'm strong, too!
Mem, did you pay your fare?
啊，这个…人家小小一只，身高不够，可以免票吧？
Um... I don't think I even meet the height requirement for the ticket, so I won't need one, right?
