这里就是「斯缇科西亚」，巨龙与海浪的城邦…依照老师的猜想，不知去向的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}就隐藏在这片废墟中。
This is Styxia, the city of dragons and waves... Anaxa hypothesizes that the missing {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is somewhere in these ruins.
这…就是它的诞生之地，或长眠之地。
This is the land of their birth... Or perhaps of their death.
Aha, I know this one! They returned whence they came!
老师曾用炼金秘法，成功将自己的灵魂与{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}短暂熔合，又在弥留之际受到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}招引，窥见了流淌的冥河。

Anaxa had used a secret alchemical art to temporarily fuse his soul with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. And when he was on the verge of death, he was pulled by {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and caught a glimpse of the flowing River of Souls.
被称作「渎神之举」的炼成，也许能使凡人的灵魂与泰坦相互吸引……
This alchemy, considered a sacrilegious act, might actually make the souls of mortals and Titans attract each other...
尽管{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}在过去的千年几乎杳无音讯，也从未被信徒寻获。但那引力…或许能将它召唤至此。

Even though {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} has been missing for a thousand years and even their followers haven't been able to find them... perhaps that special attraction could summon them here.
噢！所以，我们要用那块「贤者之石」，在这里把泰坦给…变出来？
Oh! So are we going to use that Philosopher's Stone to... conjure the Titan?
想必是这样了。只不过，眼下的线索仅有这座城邦的名字，还有巨龙童话……
I guess that's the only way. The only leads we have now are the name of this city and the fairy tale about the dragon...
{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，真是比人家还神秘呢……
{RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is even more mysterious than I am...
是啊，老师的智慧也只能照亮我们脚下这方寸土地。只要踏出第一步，前路就是未知的浓雾…但在我漫长的旅行中，这也不是第一次了。

Indeed. Even one as erudite as Anaxa could only point us to this place, and no further. We will be entering the unknown as soon as we take our first steps... But that won't be the first time in my long journeys.
比起犹豫，还是启程更好。也许就在今天，命运会恻隐一时，抛下些许仁慈。
Rather than standing still, taking action is by far the better option. Perhaps fate might take pity on us today and show some compassion.
好晕…她真的没有违章超速吗…
Ugh... I swear she was speeding...
给我带哪了，还是翁法罗斯吗？
Where am I? Are we still in Amphoreus?
她是「诡计」的半神，当她将「翻飞之币」高高抛起，便会获得无可比拟的神速，来去只在一瞬间。
She's the demigod of Trickery. When she flips the Coin of Whimsy into the air, she gains incredible speed that lets her travel anywhere in an instant.
就像现在，她似乎没有多待一秒的打算…接下来的路，看来只能靠我们自己了。
...Just like how she clearly had no intention of lingering here for even a second longer. We can only depend on ourselves for the rest of the way.
哎呀！艳阳高照，真是正当离别的时刻哪。
Mmm! Bright and sunny, just the weather for farewells.
Really? Just the three of us?
当然，三人一组可是挺进决赛圈的最佳配置。
Totally. The trio team is the best set up to reach the finals.
我得跟阿格莱雅打个招呼…
I'll go give Aglaea a heads-up...
不用惦记了，我跟她交代过——她没意见。
No need. I already told her. She's fine with it.
啧啧，遐蝶…你可真是会给我出难题呀。想带着你一起旅行，还不能真的触碰到你，真麻烦呀。
Tsk tsk, you sure know how to put me in a spot, Castorice... I need to travel with you, but I can't touch you. What a bother.
Aw, I was just teasing. Don't take it to heart.
不过呢，二位知道吗？依照神话故事里说的，想要让死者顺利渡过冥河，去往冥界，就得在他们的嘴里，或者眼睛上放上一枚{RUBY_B#小银币}欧布罗斯{RUBY_E#}……

Did you know that the legends say you have to put an {RUBY_B#little silver coin}obol{RUBY_E#} into the mouth of the dead or over their eyes if you want them to successfully cross the River of Souls and enter the nether realm?
这是通往冥界的摆渡费用。但这次就不真的问你们要了，我垫付，咱们做个样子就行。
That's the ferry fare for entering the nether realm. However, I honestly won't ask you to pay this time. I'll pay. And then we'll just have to go through the motions...
You sure are helpful when it doesn't cost you anything.
哈，只是为了给这趟旅程增加些仪式感，别太放在心上。
Hey, I'm just trying to make this journey feel more special, okay? Don't read too much into it.
We already paid you so much!
一码归一码，这次只是为了给这趟旅程增加些仪式感。
Hey, that was a different purchase. Look, I'm just trying to make this journey feel more special.
你到底敲了遐蝶多少钱？
Just how much have you swindled Castorice of?
Don't worry... it's not a lot...
好咯～直达冥界的捷足之旅，准备启程！硬币给我，我要发力了。
Alright! Pass me the coin — it's time to get the god's powers going! A fleet-footed trip to the nether realm, here we come!
啊，对了！走之前，最后送给两位一句忠告。尤其是给你的，蜗居公主——
Oh, one last thing before we go. I gotta give you this piece of advice, especially to you, Princess Homebody —
风是等不来的。难得来人间走一遭，别白活了呀。
You can't catch the wind by waiting. You only live once, so make the most of every moment you have.
看来对「暂停逐火之旅」的全民表决已经开始了…好多人。
The streets are packed... It seems the vote to pause the Flame-Chase Journey has begun.
It is time. Remember what I taught you, child.
去吧，为她带去光荣的死亡。
愿你…活在永恒的痛苦中…！
I curse you... to live in eternal pain...!
这一切…还要持续到什么时候…？
Uh... Why is there a dromas here?
(Where did my Dew of Divine Blood go...!?)
真是性格顽劣…阁下，跟我来！
妈妈说让我们先走，可她一直没有过来。
Mommy told us to go ahead first, but she's still not here yet.
一，二，三…已经数不过来天数了。
One, two, three... I don't even know how many days have passed since then.
也许数完十根手指，妈妈就回来了。
Perhaps Mommy will be back once you finish counting the days on all ten fingers.
一，二，三…早就超过十根手指的天数了。
One, two, three... It's been much longer than ten days since we left Mommy.
好漂亮的蝴蝶，是在和我们说话吗？
What a beautiful butterfly. Is it talking to us?
这是「亡语蝶」，死难者众多的地方，总有它们翩飞的身影。
This is a Eulogistic Butterfly. They are found in places where many have met their demise.
在哀地里亚，有些人认为它们是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的仁慈。它将死者的最后一道执念，化作这些生灵，就像是为生命制作了标本。

In Aidonia, some think of them as manifestations of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' benevolence. By turning the lingering obsessions of the deceased into these creatures, it is as if the Titan has made life into a specimen.
也有另一些人认为，它们本就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信使，引渡亡魂去往冥界。
Others think of them as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' messengers that guide the departed to the nether realm.
感觉后一种说法更可信呢，毕竟它的发言还是有点太…嗯，直抒胸臆？
The second theory sounds more believable. After all, the things they're saying are rather... um, direct?
或许吧。但能听见它们窃窃私语，至少说明我们确实在向死者的世界靠近。
Perhaps. But the fact that we're able to hear their whispers proves that we're fast approaching the realm of the dead.
可是，师父…那位姐姐，难道骗了我们？
But master... Did that lady really lie to us?
百夫长亲自嘱咐过，要把那个铭刻镶嵌在他的盾牌上。
The centurion personally instructed us to inlay the inscription into his shield.
But now she's taken it away...
孩子啊…盾牌永远不可能铸成，也不需要了……
My child... that shield can never be cast, and there's no need for it anymore...
来，孩子，百夫长叫什么名字？…不，忘了我刚才的话吧。
Come, child, what is the name of that centurion again? Actually... Never mind, forget I said that.
我陪你一起等她回来。那时候，你就可以继续打造盾牌了。
I'll wait with you for her to come back. When that happens, you'll be able to keep making shields.
Do you... want to buy any fish?
活着的人…不卖，你们…太无耻了。买了鱼却不付账…等我再见到她，我非得…我非得……
I'm not selling my fish to... living people. You lot are too... shameless. Buying fish without paying... If I ever see her again, I will... I will...
难道说，你们…是未能安息的灵魂？
Could it be that... You're all dead souls that never achieved rest?
The nether realm... Does not exist...
So... do you want to buy any fish?
Are the fish... gone? The people... are gone, too...
I can only... keep selling fish. So... do you... want to buy any fish?
对不起，我的积蓄所剩无多。但或许有别的办法，能解脱你的痛苦。
Apologies, I don't have much in the way of savings, but perhaps there's another way for me to release you from your suffering.
请放松。愿你在温柔的花乡中…平静睡去。
Please relax. May you fall asleep peacefully... amid a gentle field of flowers.
果然，这些人不是幻影，而是死难者的魂灵。
I knew it. These people aren't illusions. They're the souls of the deceased.
他们本该顺着冥河，去往西风的尽头才对…如今却搁浅在了冥流的浅滩上，徘徊不前。
They're supposed to reach the end of the west wind by floating down the River of Souls... Yet they have floundered upon the shoals of the stream, unable to move forward.
是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}拒绝了他们？还是他们根本没有真正死去？
Did {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} reject them? Or perhaps they didn't really die at all?
Are they in the same situation as me?
也许我们都还能抢救一下。
Perhaps all of us can still use some CPR.
你怎么现在就以死者自居啦，别放弃呀！
Why are you identifying as a dead person now? Don't give up on yourself!
我不知道，这情景…闻所未闻。
I have no idea. This circumstance... is completely unprecedented.
他刚才是不是说了…活着的人？他见过的生者，不仅仅只有我们？
Didn't he say... "more living people"? So that means he's seen other members of the living apart from us?
莫非，亡魂滞留于此，是受到了某个人的诓骗？
Could it be that these souls are stuck here due to someone's deceit?
若是出于好心，还算得上「骗」嘛？
If something is done out of goodwill, are you really gonna call it "deceit"?
Goodwill? I can't see anything good out of—
呃…暂时还和你「阴阳两隔」着呢！
Umm... I still belong to the land of the living as of now, thank you very much!
亡魂们之前遇见的生者，莫非就是……
Could it be that... You are the living being that those souls met...?
实在看不过眼，所以东边偷了点，西边骗了点，希望给他们的生活多添一点盼头。
I couldn't take their behavior anymore, so I stole some things here and made up some lies there... Just trying to give them something to look forward to, you know?
…就是因为有像你这样恶劣的生者，我们才会被大家误会！
...It's because of vile living creatures like you that we're being misunderstood by all of them!
不然呢，这地头什么光景你们也看见了——这些可怜人被冥界拒之门外，困在自己生前的几个弹指里面，进退不得。

What else am I supposed do? You can see the mess this place is in — These poor souls are denied by the nether realm, so now they're stuck in a few brief moments of their life, unable to move forward or back.
路上见过两个铁匠没？不知道他们在那儿呆了多久，一遍又一遍地想锻出面盾牌来…噫，斯缇科西亚，太可怕啦。
Did you see those two blacksmiths on the way? They've been here for as long as the sun's been around, wailing over and over about casting a shield... Styxia is so freaky.
所以，赛飞儿阁下为何又回来了？
Then why have you come back, Lady Cipher?
别误会，我可不是来帮你们探险的…毕竟，我这辈子最讨厌的就是水了，何况还是这臭烘烘的冥河……
Hey, I'm not here to aid your adventure. I hate water more than anything else in this world, especially that stinky River of Souls...
…咳，我只是临走前突然有些发现，觉得高低该给你们递个话。
But... I just discovered some stuff before I left, and I reckon you should know about it.
那个拒绝死亡的孩子——我在这里发现了他的足迹哪？
It's about that boy who defied death... I found traces of him here.
想起来了，是叫这个名！不管怎么说，话我已经带到了…至于有没有用，你们自己定夺吧。
Oh right! That's his name! Well, now you know. As for whether that info is actually useful, that's for you lot to figure out.
...So long, Princess Homebody! So long, Gray Mystery!
Huh? She disappeared just like that?
赛飞儿阁下一向…随心所欲。但无论如何，她给我们带来了有价值的信息。
Lady Cipher has always been a... free spirit. In any case, she has brought us some valuable information.
如果万敌阁下此时也在浅滩上，那他一定能成为我们的道标。因为，他和那些离群的亡魂不同…即便在死者的世界，他也一定能找到方向。

If Lord Mydei is also somewhere along the river shoals right now, then he will certainly become our signpost. After all, he's different from those wandering souls... He will find his way even in the realm of the dead.
...How are we supposed to get over there?
放心，这时就该人家登场了——
Don't worry. It's time for me to shine...
附近有{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的「追忆符文」，使用祷言，让河流回到还没泛滥的时候吧！
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Rune of Recollection is nearby. Use prayers to return the river to before it got flooded!
啊…怎么这也有小黑怪，它们还能在冥河里游泳？
Ah! Why are the black tide monsters here too? Can they swim in the River of Souls?
即便是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，恐怕也无法接纳黑潮造物……
Even {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't be able to accept black tide monsters into their realm...
从这些痕迹来看，冒犯「死亡」…想必要付出沉重的代价。
These traces seem to suggest that anybody who trespasses upon "Death"... will pay a heavy price.
我们也会落得一样的下场吗？
Will we suffer the same fate as well?
We're also here to trespass upon the Titan.
死者的世界需要安宁，必须剔除这些不和谐的噪音。
Since the realm of the dead must remain peaceful, it's imperative that we rid the place of such discordant noise.
请退后…我来应对这些敌人。
Please stay back... Let me deal with these enemies.
这些已经被打倒的家伙，难道是……
Could these dead monsters actually be...
如果赛飞儿阁下所言属实…或许真是万敌阁下所为。
If Lady Cipher is to be believed... this could be the handiwork of Lord Mydei.
即便身在冥界，他也在对抗黑潮啊……
He's still fighting against the black tide, even in the nether realm...
There are wandering souls of the deceased here as well...
我们得先回到「现在」，才能和他们交流。
We must first return to "the present" before we can communicate with them.
啊，你们的模样…莫非是女王提到的异邦勇士？
Ah, by the looks of it... you must be the foreign warriors that the queen had mentioned, right?
实在抱歉，此次出征容不得半分疏忽，未能抽身迎接，还请见谅。
Since the current campaign requires the utmost care, I wasn't able to make time to welcome all of you. Please, forgive me.
一位祭司，一位战士，一位…咳，一只奇兽…和女王的形容完全一样，天赐的救星！
A priestess, a warrior, and a, um... a divine beast... You look identical to the blessed saviors that the queen described!
This is my pet, so I'm actually of the Hunter class.
Oh darn. No healer on this team.
A campaign? Who are you campaigning against?
前去探路的斥候仅有一位得以复返。他说那是不可接近的禁地，是冥府向人界敞开的门扉……

Of the scouts that went ahead, only one has managed to return. He says that the land ahead is a forbidden land that should not be approached, as it's the doorway between the netherworld and the mortal realm...
而其余的…灵识尽失，日渐腐朽。
As for the rest of the scouts... They've completely lost their souls and are decaying by the day.
城邦中仍有争议，学者们认为这一灾厄前所未见，应当被冠上新的称呼。
While there is still dissension within the city, the scholars agree that this calamity was so unprecedented that it needed to be given a new designation.
前所未见的灾厄？莫非是…「死亡」？
An unprecedented calamity? Could it be... "Death"?
几位果然听说了，当然…「死亡」只是其中一种可能性，暂时还没有定论。
It seems that you have indeed heard about this. Well... "Death" is just one of the possibilities. It's too early to come to a definitive conclusion.
从未见过「死亡」的世界…看来，这些人们活在灾厄泰坦降临以前的黄金世。
A world that has never seen "Death"... Looks like these people lived in the Era Chrysea, before the Calamity Titans descended upon the land.
请问…回来的那位斥候，他在哪里？
May I ask... where is the scout who managed to came back?
他回到了斯缇科西亚…但也只支撑了短短半日。而正是他的见闻，使我们决意集结。
Though he returned to Styxia... he only had enough left in him to last no more than half a day. However, it was his intel that convinced us to rally together.
在那凶险之地，他说自己窥到了恶龙的魔影。它张开巨口吞噬眼前的一切，将那名为「死亡」之物，带给斯缇科西亚。

He said that he witnessed the demonic specter of an evil dragon at that treacherous land. The apparition opened its giant maw and devoured everything in sight, and thus brought Styxia that thing called "Death."
斯缇科西亚…带来死亡的恶龙……
Styxia... an evil dragon that brings Death...
好耳熟？这不是寓言童话的情节吗？
It all sounds rather familiar... Wait, wasn't this part of that fable?
先生，请问女王和公主…现状如何？
Sir, could I... ask how the queen and princess are doing?
——啊，你们的模样…莫非是女王提到的异邦勇士？
— Ah, by the looks of it... you must be the foreign warriors that the queen had mentioned, right?
他刚才好像问过一遍了。
I think he asked that already.
Is he set to loop on repeat?
一样的台词…看来他也被困在生前的片刻了呀。
It's the same lines... Looks like he's still trapped in the moments before his death.
阁下，战争早已结束了。斯缇科西亚…已经不存在了。
Sir, the war ended long ago. Styxia... no longer exists.
这、这可不行！新来的勇士，速速去列队吧！
Th—This cannot stand! Newcomers, hurry up and go take your positions!
这位老人家…看来很难接受现实呀。
Looks like it's difficult for this gentleman to accept reality.
阁下，我是女王大人派来的「督战圣女」。若你接受我的赐福，今日战事必能顺遂。
Sir, I am the Maiden of War sent here by the queen herself. If you accept my blessing, then today's battle will be smooth sailing.
圣女？从未听过…时间紧迫，请别耽误太久。
Maiden of War? I've never heard of this... There's little time to waste. Please don't take too long.
请安心吧，我一向…不愿让这一刻太久。
Don't worry. I'm typically... unwilling to prolong such a moment.
一切都…结束了？我们…胜利了吗？
Is it over...? Have we... won?
守城士兵们的亡魂，随着百夫长的「死亡」一同消散了。
The souls of the city's guards dissipate along with the centurion's "death."
我…没事。只是没有想到，我在死者的世界仍要执行「入殓」……
I—I'm fine. I just didn't expect that I would still have to "embalm" others even in the realm of the dead...
Is this... a remnant of his soul?
那么，我该如何对您托以信任呢？
Well, then. Why should I place my trust in you...
我不明白您的言外之意……
I don't quite understand what you're trying to say...
神谕已然昭示你的姓名，「死亡」的黄金裔，奥赫玛理应将你奉为贵宾。
Since the prophecy has already pronounced your name as Chrysos Heir of "Death," Okhema ought to treat you as an esteemed guest.
但你似乎不打算隐瞒自己和元老院有所接触…而我与他们的矛盾，恐怕并非秘密。
However, you seem to have no intentions of concealing your involvement with the Council of Elders... While most likely being aware of my issues against them.
我无法否认。是那些人为我提供了这间小屋，他们的要求只有一个：希望「死亡」的诅咒能完全为您所用……
I cannot deny your claim. It was the Council that offered this room to me, and they had only one request... They want the curse of "Death" to be completely subjugated to your will.
I... was agreeable to that request.
与生俱来的诅咒…我无力让渡。但从今往后，我会听凭您的心意将其运用，绝不会有多余的举动。
I am... unable to rid myself of this innate curse. However, from this day onward, I shall use it according to your will. I will never make any superfluous moves on my own.
当然，因为这是他们企图掌控逐火之旅的方式——
I see. So that is how they plan to control the Flame-Chase Journey...
将赐人以死的重责转嫁到我身上。一旦我陷入对处刑的痴醉，他们便有了理由断绝黄金裔的征途。
They have shifted the heavy responsibility of granting death over to me. If I ever become obsessed with executing people, they will then have ample reason to terminate the Chrysos Heirs' journey.
但您似乎…不以为意？这让我有些意外。
And yet, you seem to... not mind? This is quite surprising to me.
因为…我等生来背负的宿命，远比个人的生命更为沉重。
That's because... the fate that we were born with is a burden far heavier than that of an individual's life.
而那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。
I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate. This is but one instance.
整理好心爱的衣物，随我启程吧。奥赫玛欢迎你，遐蝶。
Tidy up your precious garments and come with me. Okhema welcomes you, Castorice.
你们似乎听到了一声满足的叹息，仿佛出自某种庞然巨物之口。
You seem to hear a sigh of contentment, as if it comes from the mouth of some colossal being.
随后，那往昔的景象倏然散去……
Then, the scenes of the past abruptly dissipated...
没想到在这里也能找到记忆的残像…大概和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的符文有关吧？
I didn't think that we'd find vestiges of memory here... Maybe they've got something to do with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s rune?
…或许吧。但无需它再做提醒，这段记忆我永生难忘。
...Perhaps, but I do not need a reminder from them. This memory is one that I will never forget.
元老院已经利用过你一回了。
So it seems that the Council of Elders has manipulated you once already.
没错…我们之间的关系始终若即若离。但阿格莱雅大人没有因此对我设防…反而对我百般信任。
Indeed. While my relationship with the Council has always been quite ambiguous, Lady Aglaea has never taken any precautions against me. Instead... She's shown me nothing but complete trust.
我…也想回应她的这份信任。
I... really want to repay her for that trust.
不过，到底为何，这段记忆会在此时显现…当真是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的影响吗？
But... why would this memory appear right now? Is this really {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power?
恕我冒昧，我只是个遥远彼邦来的倒霉学者，跌入冥河，作了亡魂……
Please excuse me. I am but a scholar from a distant land who had the misfortune of falling into the River of Souls and turned into a member of the dead...
欸？这个人…好像知道自己已经死了。
Huh? This one... seems to know that she's already dead.
只是推测，但既然您这样说，看来我猜对了。
Oh, I was merely speculating. But it seems I was right.
还有，这边这位…我能认出来，你是哀地里亚的「死亡」圣女吧？
And you... You... I recognize you. You're the Holy Maiden of "Death" from Aidonia, right?
对不起…我无法令你死而复生。但你若有所求，我可以结束你漫长的困顿。
I'm sorry... I cannot bring you back to life. However, should you desire it, I can end your prolonged limbo.
哈哈，我知道。即便你能让我活过来，我也不会这么选。
Hah, I'm well aware of that. Even if you were able to revive me, I would never choose that option.
因为我并非不慎跌入冥河，而是为了求死一跃而下。
That's because I didn't fall into the River of Souls by accident. Instead, I leaped into it to seek my death.
您若能窥得我的一生，想必不会苛责。那实在是…令人苦不堪言。
If you could see the life I've led, then you would not reproach me so. My life... was far too miserable.
但我没想到，死后竟也一样。多么可笑，我逃避尘世，转而踏入了持续千年的苦痛。
But I did not expect that things stay the same even in death! What a joke! In escaping my mortal life, I've entered a millennium of pain instead.
瑟希斯在上，人究竟是有多么怯懦，竟同时畏惧着生和死？
Cerces above! What cowards humans are, for we fear both life and death simultaneously.
抱歉…这个问题我同样无法回答。
I'm sorry... I'm also powerless to answer that question.
无妨，圣女，至少您回应了我的期许…请将「死亡」赐给我吧。
That's alright, Holy Maiden. At least you are able to respond to me. Please... grant me "Death."
瑟希斯在上，这是否算作…思考到了最后一刻呢？
Cerces above... Does this count as thinking till the moment I die?
无法想象在此游荡百年的空虚…
I can't imagine what it'd feel like to roam around this void for centuries...
我见过太多的离别…她的苦恼并不罕见。也有人会为看似微小的烦忧终结自己的生命。
I have seen too many farewells... Her distress is quite commonplace. There are those who will end their lives over what seems to be the smallest of worries.
在有些人看来…被我视作诅咒的力量，反而是一种「赐福」。
For some people... This power that I possess is a "blessing" rather than a curse.
但…我从未说服自己接受这种想法。
...But I never managed to convince myself of that.
小蝶…还是想创造一个没有「死亡」的世界吗？
Cas... Are you still trying to create a world without "Death"?
嗯。因为在无限的时光尺度下，没有什么烦忧是无法被解决的……
Yes. Because... When placed under time's vast scales, there is no worry in this world that cannot be solved.
你该和丹恒聊聊这件事。
You should chat with Dan Heng about this.
I can't agree with you on this.
这是我秉持千年的心愿，阁下。或许曾有人接近令我改变想法……
This is a wish that I've held for almost a millennium. My mind might have changed once upon a time if people managed to strike up a friendship with me...
…但自从听说你已濒临死去的消息，我就更加确信——为这世间抹除「死亡」便是我的使命。
But I've never been more firm in my conviction, now that I've learned about your near-death state — It is my duty to wipe "Death" from the face of this world.
好大——好空旷呀！这是王国的宝库吗？
Wow... This place is so spacious! Is this the kingdom's vault?
该使用欧洛尼斯的奇迹了！
It's time to use Oronyx's miracle!
用归用…人家可要约法三章，我们回到过去不是为了偷东西。
That's fine and all, but we need to lay down some rules. We're not gonna return to the past to steal things.
看见这些立体结构就害怕。
I get scared when I see these vertical structures.
楼梯断掉了，道路也断掉了，这算是危房吧……
Broken stairs, blocked paths... This place is gonna fall down soon...
通往更高处的门，是那里吗？好像有人…有魂守着呢。
Do we need to enter that doorway to climb even higher? There seems to be a person... more like a soul guarding it.
咦，他怎么那么惊慌？是被黑潮造物吓到了吗？
Huh? Why does he look so panicked? Did the black tide monsters frighten him?
还是说…他是被自己惊人的威力给吓坏了？
Or... is he actually scared of his own extraordinary power?
这就是我们强者的烦恼…
Ah, these are the troubles that powerhouses like us face...
不必惊慌，我们只是过路人。您看，没有哪位会显出凶神恶煞之相。
There's no need to be alarmed. We're just passing by the area. See? None of us look threatening.
虽说这里曾是王室宝库，但如今早已被劫掠一空…请各位及早离去吧！
While this might once have been the royal vault, it's since been plundered empty... So, please go away right this instant!
您误会了…我们只是路过时听到了您的喊声，因此前来看看。
You've misunderstood us... We simply heard your shouts as we were passing by, then decided to come over to find out what happened.
天，我叫出来了？实在是失态……
My goodness, did I really yell out loud? How rude of me...
劳各位费心，我只是见到了一位…勇士。那亡魂没有伤害我，但他的重拳…实在惊人。
I'm sorry to have bothered you. I merely saw a... warrior. While that spirit didn't harm me, his blows... really packed a hefty punch.
等等，几位似乎和他不同…你们是生者？你们怎可能活着在此处行走？
Wait a minute. You seem to be quite different from him... Are you actually alive? How can you walk around here while alive?
说来话长…我们是来此觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的。
It's a long story... We're here to seek an audience with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}？那是何物？
莫非…他也活在「死亡」降临前的时代？
Is it possible that... he's also living in the era before "Death" descended?
「死亡」…难道你们是来讨伐恶龙玻吕刻斯的？
"Death"... Could it be that you are here to defeat the evil dragon Pollux?
玻吕刻斯…它就是塞纳…不，「死亡」的化身？
Pollux... Is that the embodiment of Thana — no, "Death"?
据百夫长带领的勇士们说，那恶龙早已死去，致人于死地的恶咒并非由它而起……
According to the warriors under the centurion's command, that evil dragon has been dead for quite a while. The curse that condemns people to death didn't originate from it...
而在龙的怀中，他们见到了一位少女…她才是真正的死神！
But they saw a girl within the dragon's embrace... And she is the true Reaper!
...Pray tell, where is that girl right now?
据说，女王不计代价将她带回城堡，她意欲以这前所未见的伟力，将整个翁法罗斯纳入掌中……
I've heard that the queen spared no effort in bringing her back to the castle. Her Majesty intends to control all of Amphoreus with this unprecedented power...
至于真假…就没人知道了。
As for whether this rumor is true... Well, no one knows.
您的见闻十分宝贵，感激不尽。
You have my thanks for the invaluable insight that you've given us.
请将此触…视作对您的谢礼吧。
Please treat this touch... as a token of my gratitude.
所以，你便将死亡带给了他？
这不像你…即便是我向你下令，你应当也会拒绝才是。
That isn't like you... You would have refused even if I commanded you to do so.
我本是出于同情，以为自己不会因此痛苦不堪。可如今仍然…心乱如麻。
I did it out of sympathy, believing that I wouldn't be racked with agony, but... I am still in a state of turmoil.
同情？同情那个战无不胜的少年人？
Sympathy? Sympathy for that youth who triumphed in every battle?
那位少年，他受到了{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的眷顾，从神手中习得了一式「秘剑」。借此，他在与人的争斗中可以一击制敌，永不落败。
That young man was favored by {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, who taught him a move that will defeat any mortal enemy with a single blow and emerge victorious every time.
在黄金世，他可凭此技常胜。但如今，死亡降临世间，那神赐的秘剑，也使他能随意「致人于死」，换言之……

He could rely on that move to always achieve victory during Era Chrysea. However, now that death has descended upon the mortal realm, that divine swordplay also means he can send others to death at will. In other words...
You feel that he's similar... to you?
嗯，他永不会技差一筹，但凡出手，对方必然死去。
Yes. Since he can never be inferior to others in martial combat, death would be the inevitable outcome every time he strikes.
所以他找到了我，请求我…了结这一切。
That's why he approached me and pleaded... Pleaded for me to put an end to all of this.
或许是与「死亡」的和解来得太过突然，你才会感到无助。
You are perhaps feeling lost from making your peace with "Death" in so abrupt a manner.
I... have not made peace with death.
我亲见哀地里亚的人们，在死亡面前挺起了胸膛。在命中注定的终局来临前…他们满足于生命已然谱写的一切。
I've seen the people of Aidonia stand tall and proud in the face of death. Even before the fated finale arrived, they were already content with the lives that they'd lived...
他们的神情如此骄傲，以至于让我认为…假若「死亡」真的只是某位神明无心降下的权职，那对他们的尊严是种侮辱。
They had such proud expressions... Expressions that made me believe "Death" would be an insult to these mortals if the concept is truly a power that a god had carelessly cast down upon the world.
或许在这世间，死亡的权柄…本就不该存在。一如我…也不该存在。
Perhaps death's authority was never meant to exist in this world... just like how I shouldn't exist.
我不想贸然否认你的理论。不过…不妨听我为你讲述一个故事。
I won't refute your beliefs for now, but would you be interested in listening to a story of mine?
那是一个来自异邦的童话。在那冰原中，那个将你带给我的人，曾为我讲述了这一切——
It's a fairy tale from foreign lands, told by the person who brought you to me in that ice field long ago...
那位…斯缇科西亚的女王。
...A tale told by the Queen of Styxia.
比它的出现更加突然，旧事戛然而止……
More sudden than its appearance, the past comes to an abrupt halt...
你怀疑自己有些幻听——那满足的叹息似乎又响起过一次。
You begin to suspect that you might be hearing things — that satisfying sigh seems to have echoed once more.
所以，小蝶…从巨龙怀中诞生的少女，那些幽灵口中「死亡」的化身…就是你？！
That means... The girl born in the dragon's embrace... The personification of "Death" these souls talked about... That's you? Cas???
从刚才开始…我就隐约有所预感。但斯缇科西亚的一切，我的确全然不知……
I've already had an inkling for a while now... But I honestly have no memories of Styxia...
我的记忆…应该是从阿蒙内特将我带到哀地里亚时开始才对。
My memories only begin... After Amunet brought me to Aidonia.
Don't look back... Keep moving forward, always.
又是亡语蝶…我们离冥界越来越近了吗？
It's yet another Eulogistic Butterfly... Are we getting closer to the nether realm?
喔…莫非是斯缇科西亚的后人？
Oh... Could you be the scions of Styxia?
你们听闻了我在此进行的伟业，特来送上炼成的最后一样材料？
Did you hear about the great work that I'm doing here, and have thus arrived to give me the last material that I need for transmutation?
玻吕刻斯的大名，各位可曾听过？
Have you heard of the great name of Pollux, perchance?
它的驾驶员可能就在这里。
Its pilot is probably right here.
You don't have to describe it like that, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}...
I've definitely heard that name many times today.
在那神话的年代里，或许你们还尚未出世，但在炼金术的领域，已无人能够望我项背。我将在这冥河流经的浅滩，使玻吕刻斯再度腾飞…让「死亡」复归于世！

During the age of myth, a time likely before your birth, I was the unsurpassed zenith of alchemy that none could reach! On the shoals of the River of Souls, I shall make Pollux soar again... and bring "Death" back to the world!
但…「死亡」不就是由它带来世间的吗？
But... didn't that dragon already bring "Death" to the world?
Oh...? Looks like you don't know the whole picture.
的确，那不知所踪的少女能致人于死。而将她送来世间的玻吕刻斯…偏偏又会让人「无法死去」啊。
While it's true that the missing girl can grant death to mortals... Pollux, the one who delivered her onto this world... Makes it so that humankind "cannot die."
So... It's just as I feared...
You and that dragon... Are you the two sides of the same coin?
死难者本应顺着冥河漂流，直至到达西风的尽头。但这条灵魂的河流…却因玻吕刻斯的陨落阻断了。
The deceased are supposed to drift down the River of Souls until they reach the end of the west winds, but this river of souls was blocked... by Pollux's fall.
不错！所以，我才必须让它重回世间，展翅高飞。我早已在高塔布下炼金法阵，只可惜…缺失了最关键的一样材料。

That's right! That's why it's imperative that I bring the dragon back to the mortal realm and make it soar the skies again! I have long since prepared my alchemical matrix in the tower, although... I am still missing the most crucial material of all.
那最后一样祭品——便是与死亡共生的少女！
That final ingredient... The final sacrifice... Is none other than the girl who lives out her days with death!
咦，怎么回事？小蝶你应该还没伸手吧……
Huh? What's going on? You didn't touch him, did you...?
诸位，我晓得自己已无力回天。拿去这个，求你们代我实现那至高的伟业……
I know that I am no longer capable of carrying out that task. Take this, all of you, and please, fulfill that great undertaking on my behalf...
我们在{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的盛宴中酣醉了太久，才开始寻求神赐的「死亡」，好让自己摆脱命运的无常…然而，我们反受其害。

We had been inebriated in {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s feast for too long before we began to seek divine-bestowed "Death," so that we could be freed from the whims of fate... However, that brought doom upon us.
我们没能唤来尊神，却迎来了横绝冥河的魔物。那可憎的巨龙，玻吕刻斯，将所有亡者拒于冥界之外。
Instead of summoning a supreme god, we encountered a monster that cut off the River of Souls. That detestable dragon Pollux denied all the dead from the gates of the nether realm.
求死不得的灵魂如潮水般席卷了斯缇科西亚。我的城邦、我的人民，如今已不复存在……
Unable to rest in peace, these departed spirits engulfed Styxia like a roaring tide. As a result, my city and its people no longer exist...
那女婴是我唯一能救下的幸存者。她诞生在恶龙腹中，生来便怀有「死亡」的天赋。她一定是诸神赐给我们赎罪的机会……

That child is the only person whom I managed to save. Born within the evil dragon's abdomen, she has possessed the talent of "Death" since her birth. She must have been granted to us by the gods as a chance for us to atone for our sins...
请你一定要将她抚养成人…别让她再经历我们所遭遇的苦难。
Please, you must nurture her to adulthood... and prevent her from experiencing all of the suffering that we went through.
…我答应你。我将如母亲一般照料她成长，守护她不为「死亡」所害。
...I promise that I will care for her as a mother, that I will protect her from the evils of "Death."
{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}在上，感谢你的善举……
By {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} above, thank you for your kindness...
身为母亲，请你为这女孩赐下姓名…在我被冥河卷走以前，至少让我知道，在来世应当如何呼唤她吧。
As her mother, please bless this child with a name... Before I am swept away by the River of Souls, please let me know how I should address her in my next life.
就像蝴蝶，落在「死亡」的枝头……
Like how a transient raven butterfly, a fleeting papilio castor, perches on the twig of "Death"...
一如既往，灵魂的幻象于斯消散。
As always, the illusion of spirits dissipates here.
如同潮水褪去，一声轻叹随潮声消散在月夜中。
Like the retreating tide, a soft sigh fades away with the sound of the waves in the moonlit night.
That's... where my name comes from?
又又又来了…这究竟是什么动静？
Th—Th—The sound's back... What is making that ruckus?
生者，别浪费时间较量口舌了。冥界的「怒火」将至……
Living ones, don't waste your time bickering. The nether realm's "wrath" is falling upon you...
Black tide creations... When did they...
…小心落得和那些黑潮造物同样的下场！
...Be careful not to suffer the same fate as those black tide creatures!
There's so many of them... How are we holding up?
For the feast of "Strife"... Upon their triumphant return!
巨大的轰响过后，一个雄壮的身影立于你们面前——
After the rumble, a towering figure stands before you...
那大概便是炼金术士口中的冥界之怒。他该有多么可怕，一定比你见到过的任何事物都更面目可憎，都更……
That is probably the wrath of the nether realm, as spoken of by the alchemists. How terrifying must it be? It must be more hideous than anything you've ever encountered, more...
我可想死你啦…呃，双关了。
I missed you so much that it almost killed me... Uh. Pun unintended.
You're adventuring in the River of Souls, too?
万敌阁下…你又经历了一番死战啊。
Lord Mydei... You've been through some tough battles once again.
那黑潮…无穷无尽。我的死亡…只是临时。
That black tide... is endless. My death... is only temporary.
我会找到归时的路…回到生者的世界…继续我的「守护」。
I will find my path of return... and go back to the world of the living... and continue my "protection."
万敌阁下，我一直都想知道…死亡为何会抗拒你？
Lord Mydei, I have always wanted to... Why does Death reject you?
是我…在抗拒它。顺流而下的诱惑…我会抵抗……
I'm the one... resisting it. I must resist... the temptation to go with the flow...
逆流而行，杀出这该死的冥界……
I'll go against the current... and kill my way out of this cursed nether realm...
他说话有些磕磕巴巴的…
这真是那个霸道的万敌吗？
Is this really the proud Mydei?
他似乎在用全部的精神和亡语的诱惑搏斗…为了拒绝在这一刻迎接死亡。
It seems like he's completely focused on resisting the temptation of the deads' whispers... He's working hard every minute to deny death.
原来…他的战场不止在生者的世界。
It seems... his battlefield is not limited to the world of the living.
万敌阁下，你愿意与我们同行吗？
Lord Mydei, are you willing to travel with us?
我们将前往那高塔上的法阵…去唤出那藏匿已久的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。
We're headed for the matrix inside that tower... to summon {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} from their prolonged concealment.
没错。如果我们能齐心战胜它…那你也再不必为不死的诅咒所扰了。
That's right. If we can work together and defeat them... You won't have to be troubled by the curse of immortality any longer.
就由已与死亡擦肩过千万次之人…为你们引路……
Let the person who has brushed against death countless times... guide your way...
小蝶…确定要这么做吗？那个炼金术士还说，要把你当成祭品……
Cas... Are you sure you want to do this? The alchemist said he wanted you to be a sacrifice...
…我不害怕。我们已经走到了这一步…绝无再回头的理由。
...I'm not afraid. There's no reason for us to turn back anymore.
「比起犹豫，还是启程更好。也许就在今天，命运会恻隐一时，抛下些许仁慈。」
"Rather than standing still, taking action is by far the better option. Perhaps fate might take pity on us today and show some compassion."
「追忆符文」装置并没有任何反应。
The Rune of Recollection device does not respond.
唔，附近好像也没有其他能用的了……
Hmm, there doesn't seem to be anything else nearby that can be used...
在你们面前是早已锈损断掉的锁链，那是原本能够去向高塔的通路。
Before you are rusted and broken chains, remnants of a path that once led to the tower.
…阁下请冷静。若是不慎跌进了冰冷的冥河…您恐怕就真的会溺亡于此。
...Please calm down. If you were to fall into the icy cold River of Souls... I'm afraid that you really would die here.
悬锋城是不是也有这个…
Didn't Castrum Kremnos also have this...?
I'm familiar... with this kind of mechanism.
但我从未维修过…断裂的锁链。
But I've never repaired... broken chains.
呜…人家要是再厉害点，就可以四肢各抓一个，带你们一块飞过去了。
Ugh... If I was more powerful, I would be able to carry one person with each limb and fly the four of us to the other side.
明明这里有着「追忆符文」，却到处找不见「奇迹宝珠」，真奇怪……
The Rune of Recollection is here, but I can't find a Miracle Orb anywhere. So weird...
莫非，是在远处那座崩塌的塔楼里？
Could it be in that collapsed tower in the distance?
Looks like it's your time to shine.
关键时刻，还是得人家出马呀…稍等，我去一探究竟！
It's still up to me to step up in a crisis... Wait here. I'll go check things out!
养迷迷千日，用迷迷一时。
One minute of Mem being useful comes from a thousand days of training Mem.
听着怪怪的…算了，都交给人家吧！
That sounds so weird... Forget it. Just leave it to me!
需要人家帮助的时候，就大声叫我吧！
Just shout for me when you need my help!
Got it. Just leave it to me!
Wow, there are so many of you!
小小蝶，小小灰！还有…小小敌，和粉色小狗！
It's Little Cas, and Little Gray! There's also... Little De and the pink puppy!
缇安，还有万敌…我明白了。
Trianne and Mydei... I get it now.
什、什么？人家怎么越来越混乱了……
G—Get what? I'm getting even more confused...
这还是…第一次在冥河逆流而上时，遇见亡故的亲友啊。
This is... the first time I've encountered a deceased friend while going upstream in the River of Souls.
正如方才途中那些亡灵…我也没能从缇安大人身上感知到生者的气息。
Just like the other departed spirits we've encountered along the way... I'm also unable to sense the aura of the living on Lady Trianne.
嗯！大家，说得对。缇安早就知道，自己回不到大家身边啦。
Yup! You're right. Trianne already knows that she'll not be able to return to everyone's side.
但是，缇安相信小小蝶，总有一天会回到，冥界——
But Trianne believed that Little Cas would eventually return to the nether realm...
所以，缇安一直站在这里，离人间最近的地方，等着小小蝶！
So Trianne has been standing here, at this spot closest to the world of the living, and waiting for Little Cas!
It must have been... very tough for you.
不过…听小缇安的意思，我们确实也快要到冥界的入口了。
But according to what Trianne said... We're almost at the entrance of the nether realm.
缇安答应过，缇宝，缇宁。等小小蝶来到这里，缇安要准备好礼物，第一个跑来迎接你。
Trianne promised Tribbie and Trinnon that when Little Cas got here, Trianne would get the gift ready and be the first person to run over and welcome you.
所以，小小蝶，不要哭！请你，收下这个——
So, Little Cas, don't cry! Please accept this...
This is what Lady Tribbie once mentioned...
您先前没能完成的…为我准备的礼物……
The gift for me... that you didn't manage to finish...
雅努斯的圣女…即便阴阳两隔，依旧心意相通。
The Holy Maiden of Janus... Even when separated by life and death, their thoughts are still connected.
缇安，画了好久！希望小小蝶，喜欢。
Trianne spent a lot of time drawing this! Trianne hopes that Little Cas likes it.
It's seriously... A wonderful drawing, Lady Trianne...
这便是…我们的「逐火之旅」……
小小蝶，虽然我们不知道，你之前的旅途是什么样。缇宝总说，那一定是很重很重，很让人害怕的旅途。
Little Cas, we don't know what your journey was like before. Tribbie has always said that it must have been a very harsh and frightening journey.
但是，小小蝶可以不用再害怕：因为，在逐火的旅途里，我们大家，都陪在你的身边！
But Little Cas no longer has anything to fear now, because everyone is here with you in this Flame-Chase Journey!
看到缇安大人的礼物，我才发现…自从踏上逐火之旅，一路走来，我已经拥有了太多曾经不敢想象的一切。
Only now, when I see Lady Trianne's gift, do I realize that I've already obtained so many things I would never have dared to dream of since I embarked on the Flame-Chase Journey.
我第一次有了很多同伴，第一次有了手工和留影的爱好；第一次和他人共进晚餐，第一次走进市场，买下喜欢了很久的奇美拉娃娃，抱着它进入梦乡……

It's the first time I've gained so many companions, the first time I picked up the hobbies of crafting and photography, the first time I had dinner with someone else, the first time I went to the market to buy the chimera doll I'd liked for a very long time and hugged it to sleep...
第一次穿上阿格莱雅大人亲手编织的礼服，第一次和缇宝、缇安、缇宁大人散步，第一次和风堇小姐吹着晚风看星星，第一次和{NICKNAME}照料大地兽……

The first time I wore a dress personally made by Lady Aglaea... the first time I went for a walk with Lady Tribbie, Lady Trianne, and Lady Trinnon... the first time I enjoyed the night breeze and looked up at the stars with Miss Hyacine... the first time I took care of dromases with {NICKNAME}...
这许许多多我不曾奢望的第一次，回忆起来的时候…我的生命好像从数百年、数十年，变成了每一分，每一秒……

Looking back at all these experiences I never thought were possible... it feels as though the scales of my life had shrunk from centuries and decades down to minutes and seconds, and all of them are so precious...
明明拍过很多照片…却都是些黑白色调的风景，都没留下一张和大家的合照。
I took countless photos in the past, but they're all black-and-white landscapes. I don't have a single one with friends.
早知道…应该多拍一些的啊……
If I had known... I would have taken more pictures...
Then shall we take one now?
缇安，可以！缇安喜欢小小蝶，喜欢和小小蝶一起拍照。
Trianne says yes! Trianne likes Little Cas and would love to take a picture with Little Cas!
你我，皆为亡魂…无法在人间留影。
Being departed souls, our images cannot be captured in the world of the living.
话都说到这份上了，却还要留下遗憾…这种事情不要啊！
What? Are we seriously going to leave any room for regret?
这幅五彩缤纷的画…已胜过人世间任何一张留影了。
This vivid drawing surpasses any photograph from the world of the living.
小小蝶笑了！缇宝、缇宁、缇安的心愿，终于完成了。
Little Cas smiled! Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne's wish has finally come true.
还记得您说过，命运不是生长在道路尽头的花朵，而是人们自己踏出的小径…现在，属于我的那一条行径，即将来到终点的门关。
I remember you once said that fate is not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road, but where people tread beyond the gate... Now, the path that belongs to me is about to reach the end.
感谢您…为我带来了最后的钥匙。
Thank you... for bringing me the final key.
钥匙？小小蝶…你说话怎么变得难懂起来啦？
Key? Little Cas, why are you talking in riddles all of a sudden?
我已有预感：不久后，您这份礼物将成为挽救{NICKNAME}阁下生命的关键。
I have a feeling that soon, this gift of yours will become the key to saving {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}'s life.
喔，那真是太好啦。既然这样，那就带着笑容，勇敢前进吧！
Wow! That's amazing! Then keep smiling and carry on bravely!
小小蝶，小小灰，还有大家——明天见！
Little Cas, Little Gray, everyone — see you tomorrow!
留下一道灿烂的笑容，缇安金色的身影在斯缇科西亚的月夜下，消散于薄雾中。
With a blinding smile, Trianne's golden form disappears in the thin fog of Styxia's moonlit night.
此处的气息…也确实便是冥流的终点。
The aura of this place... We have indeed reached the end of the Stream of Souls.
继续前进…我或许会迷失于此。我必须离去了…因为黑潮还在生者的世界肆虐。
If I go any further... I might lose myself. I must leave now, for the black tide still wreaks havoc in the realm of the living.
Can you find your way out?
千万次…我已挣脱过死亡的枷锁。此次…也不例外。
I have broken free from the chains of death countless times... This time will be no different.
不一起见证塞纳托斯的真相吗？
Don't you want to know the truth behind Thanatos?
步入冥界之门…非我所求。
I seek not to enter the door of the nether realm.
遐蝶…你会为逐火…完成使命么？
Castorice... Will you fulfill your duty for the Flame-Chase?
I have yet to make my decision, Lord Mydei.
无妨…无愧本心地选择吧。就算要再等上千年……
No matter... Make the choice your heart desires. Even if it takes a thousand years of waiting...
我会一直战斗至死…然后死而复生…直到奇迹降临之刻。
I will continue to fight till I die... Then rise from death... til the miracle descends.
万敌阁下…还有一件事，或许你应该知晓。
There is one more thing you should know, Lord Mydei.
那刻夏老师或许推导出了「再创世」的原理。你我…也许将在下一世化为「纷争」与「死亡」，成为降在世间的灾厄。
Professor Anaxa may have deduced the principles behind the Era Nova. You and I... may be reincarnated as "Strife" and "Death" in the next cycle, becoming calamities wreaking havoc upon the world.
…只有这样吗？你愿意坦然接受…这样的命运吗？
...Is that all? Are you going to accept such a fate without complaints?
你…有任何策略，能让我们击碎命运的管束？
Do you have... a strategy to shatter the shackles of our fate?
我…还没找到方法。也许不可能找得到……
I... haven't found it yet. Perhaps I never will...
那就…别再思考无用之事。
Then... cease wasting your thoughts on futile matters.
掌控…你能掌控之事。待那无可逃避的命运降临时……
Control what little you can. And when fate's inescapable grasp comes...
再用你强有力的意志…反抗它的摆弄。
Resist it with the strength of your mighty will.
感谢你，万敌阁下。那个正确的选择…我会找到它的。
Thank you, Lord Mydei. I will find the right decision.
以「纷争」之名…愿你死得其所。
In the name of "Strife"... may you meet a fitting end.
这就是亡魂所说的炼金法阵——看来，需要分别置入「艾格勒的天空」、「吉奥里亚的大地」、「刻法勒的火焰」、「法吉娜的海洋」……
This must be the alchemical matrix the spirit mentioned. Let's see... We need to insert "Aquila's Sky," "Georios's Earth," "Kephale's Fire," "Phagousa's Ocean"...
嘻，看来我们可爱的蜗居公主已经下定决心了……
It seems our sweet Princess Homebody has made up her mind...
既然这样，就不帮你专门带话了，裁缝女——我的时间可是非常宝贵的哪。
In that case, Seamstress, I suppose I no longer need to deliver your message — my time is rather precious, after all.
无论你是否意欲摆脱死亡，请遵从本心。以你曾经的诺言为证，我最后一次，请求你运使自己的使命——
Whether you wish to break free from death or not, please follow your heart. By the promise you once made, I ask that you fulfill your duty one final time —
遐蝶，请如人那般生…如人那般死。
Castorice, please live as a human... And die as one.
依照那位炼金术士的话语，最后的材料应当就是我自己……
According to that alchemist, the final piece is supposed to be me...
不过，他未曾如这般窥见往昔，未知全貌。
However, he is not privy to the past and therefore cannot see the full picture.
于{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的回忆之中，我见过了「死亡」的双子。现在，我已能确信，我曾是其中之一。
I saw the twins of "Death" in {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s memory, and now I am certain that I was one of them.
「{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}」的试炼，便是「夺去至亲的生命」。我在那时已然死去，倒在了新世界的门关前…而我那素未谋面的姊妹，成为了此世的泰坦{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。

The trial of the "{RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}" demanded "taking the life of your family." I died during that trial, falling before the gate to the new world... And my sister, whom I never met, became the Titan {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} of this cycle.
对于「我」的死亡，她追悔莫及。而后，她以泰坦的神权将我的灵魂重塑，却也让自己从未在人前示现，无法被人寻获……
She was consumed with regret over my death, so she used the Titan's authority to reforge my soul. Yet, it also means she has never revealed herself to anyone, hidden away from the entire world...
因为…它一开始就为我而身陨，如今正静静地沉睡于冥河之中。
That's because the Titan she became already fell at the start of everything... They died for me and now lie in slumber in the River of Souls.
没错，冥河并非凡物，绝不会被轻易阻断。那拒绝死者往生者，惟有神性的残躯。
That's right. The River of Souls is no material river. It cannot be blocked by ordinary means. Only a divine corpse can prevent the dead from reaching the next world.
也正因此，要想取出「死亡」的火种，我们唯有使玻吕刻斯从死亡中苏醒……
And that's why we have to awaken Pollux from death before we can retrieve the Coreflame of "Death"...
利用「炼金」之法的力量，令它的残躯回归一身。
We have to reforge its body with the power of "alchemy."
那，按照刚才炼金术士的说法…小蝶你也是巨龙残躯的一部分？
But Cas, if that alchemist speaks the truth... does that mean you're also part of the dragon body?
在亡魂们的口中，我确实与那巨龙相伴而生……
According to those departed spirits, I was indeed born as the dragon's twin...
不过，在此之前，各位曾听到过声声叹息吗？
But before we talk about that... Have you heard the sighs?
回收灵魂的时候听到过…
I did when I was collecting the souls...
你一路上好像叹过很多次气。
You sighed many times on the way here...
不，并非是我，而是在回收灵魂时，于记忆之中传来的声音。
No, not from me. The sounds that come from the memories when we were collecting the souls.
啊，人家也听到了！所以那是？
Ah, I heard them too! So, what are those?
我想…那或许正是巨龙玻吕刻斯的遗愿实现的征兆吧。
I think... it's probably the sign of Pollux's wish being fulfilled.
在行使神权，复活死者时，它也一定意识到了那代价究竟有多沉重。因此，它用尽最后一丝余力，将我送到了无人敌视「死亡」的城邦——呼唤「死亡」的斯缇科西亚。

They must have realized how heavy a price they'd need to pay when they used their divine authority to resurrect a dead woman. That's why they exerted every ounce of their strength to send me to Styxia, a city that called for "Death" — A land where none is hostile to "Death."
为了让我过上新的人生，它却没能顺遂心愿，早早陨落…玻吕刻斯该有多想亲眼见证，它竭尽全力拯救的姐姐，今后生活得怎么样啊。

They never saw their wish fulfilled and fell so prematurely, all because they wanted to give me a new life... Pollux must really want to know how their sister has been after giving their all to save her.
也正是带着这样的心愿，即便身陨，玻吕刻斯的灵魂仍旧盘桓人间，静静地注视并记录着有关至亲的一切……
That wish is the reason Pollux's soul still lingers in the mortal realm even after their fall, quietly watching and documenting every detail of their sister's life...
啊！所以这一路上，我们不是捡拾到了某物……
Ah! So, instead of picking up objects on the way here...
…而是给飘荡在此处的一缕思念，展现了某物。而我们将要把这些思念逐一编织，复原成玻吕刻斯完整的灵魂。
...We were instead showing things to a strand of yearning that lingers here. Now we must weave these yearnings together and restore them into Pollux's complete soul.
可这些…都只是猜想吧？万一我们完成了仪式，结果却又完全不是这么一回事呢？
But all of this is just a hypothesis, right? What if we go through with the ritual, and it turns out totally different?
那也无妨。那刻夏老师总说「炼金」一向如此：我们能得到什么，只有在炼成的那一刻才能知晓。因此，这门学问才能被称为「造物的奇迹」。

That's fine. As Professor Anaxa often reminds us, such is the nature of alchemy. The true outcome can only be known once the process is complete. This is why alchemy is also known as the "Miracle of Creation."
现在，玻吕刻斯思念的拼图已甄于完整，只差最后一块碎片——
Now, the puzzle of Pollux's yearnings is nearly complete, with only one final piece remaining —
我将在炼金法阵中呈现，它无比想要知晓的一切：我离开斯缇科西亚后所经历的全部人生……
I shall reveal what they have been yearning to know in the alchemical matrix — I will show them my whole life since I left Styxia...
…缇安大人已将它完整描绘，并交到我的手中了。
...Lady Trianne has already drawn a picture of my entire life, and it is now in my hands.
"...And now, the objective is complete. That is all."
那刻夏老师总喜欢在完成炼金准备后说上这样一句话。而现在——
Such is what Professor Anaxa always says after preparing for an alchemical ritual. And now —
玻吕刻斯，我会将你从冥河中抽离，然后重塑。或许你将因此受到惊扰，身形残缺可怖……
Pollux, I shall lift you from the River of Souls and reforge your soul. Perhaps you will be disturbed by this, and your body may become horrifying to behold...
但若是当初你引渡我的意识仍有一息尚存——请看向我吧。我想当面和你诉说感谢：你以神性为我换回的一切，我已经品尝过了。

But if even the slightest trace of your soul remains, the soul that once ferried me to this side of the shore, then please look at me. I wish to thank you in person — I have obtained everything you sacrificed your divinity for.
她…认出你了？这应该是我们第一次见到能沟通的…灵魂吧？
Did she recognize you...? She must be the first soul we can communicate with here, right?
恐怕…她也和其他亡魂一样，仅仅是受困于此。只不过，她的片刻，我原本在场。
I'm afraid she is just another spirit trapped here, like the rest of them. The only difference is that I was there when she died.
…请您继续吧，我在听。您要讲的，莫非是斯缇科西亚的故事？
...Please, go on. I'm listening. Are you about to tell the story of Styxia?
正是，你果然如我想象的那样聪慧，但……
Yes. You're just as smart as I imagined, but...
不必担心，长老。您看周围…这里已是亡魂的归处。
There's no need to worry, Elder. Take a look around you... You're already at the resting place of the dead.
The world of the dead? But how...
我明白，您当初是为了保护那位与死亡相伴的女孩，遐蝶，才选择对这故事缄口不言……
I understand that you chose to remain silent about the story to protect Castorice, the girl who coexists with death...
但现在，您不必再藏于心间了。我可以告诉您，那女孩的人生，已被您尽力守护住了。
But you no longer need to hide that story. I can assure you that you have protected that girl's life well.
...Well, in that case, let me begin.
斯缇科西亚，那在童话中遭受无妄之灾，被死亡肆虐的海洋明珠——在哀地里亚之前，它是第一个转向「死亡」信仰的城邦。
Styxia, the pearl of the ocean, plagued by unwarranted calamity and ravaged by death in the fairy tale — It was the first city-state to shift their faith towards "Death," even before Aidonia did.
在现在的你看来…这或许有些不可思议吧？
From where you stand now, I suppose that's a bit hard to believe, right?
没错…我难以想象，身处黄金世，享受着无尽寿数的人们…如何会醉心于死亡？
Indeed... I cannot imagine that those from the Era Chrysea, blessed with eternal life, could ever yearn for death.
呵…我也一直在思考同样的问题，孩子。但恐怕这个问题没有确切的答案。
Heh... I have pondered the same question, child. But I'm afraid there is no clear answer to it.
「征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，是因为万物终有逝去之时」——曾有人如此为我解释，为何死亡是世间必需之物。
"Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust." That's how someone once explained to me why death is necessary to the world.
但我无法将它视作最后的解答…难道一个没有征伐与史诗的世界便不再美好了吗？
But I still can't take that as the final answer... Would a world without journeys and epics be worse off?
呵…对你说出这话的人，我想他或许是一位将军？斗士？
Heh... I take it the one who spoke this line was a general? Or perhaps a warrior?
我倒是从他的话语里得到了些启发。想听听我的见解吗，遐蝶？
I, however, did find some inspiration in these words. Would you like to hear my thoughts, Castorice?
请告诉我吧，阿蒙内特阁下。虽然，我心中对如何处置「死亡」的神权和火种已有决意……
Please enlighten me, Lady Amunet. Though I have already made up my mind on how to handle the authority and Coreflame of "Death"...
但，或许你的话语…能真正为我指明前进的方向。
Your words might truly guide me toward the path forward.
你我并非战士或统帅，「征途」和「史诗」也无法引起我心灵的共鸣。
You and I are neither warriors nor generals. Therefore, journeys and epics cannot truly resonate with us.
但若将这语境稍加修改…如果…<color=#dbc291ff>「爱」</color>并非墨涅塔赐予凡人的天性…反而是死亡降给我们的赐福呢？
But what if I reframe it like this — what if <color=#dbc291ff>"love"</color> is not a trait bestowed upon mortals by Mnestia, but a blessing from death?
在生命无尽的时代，无人发明「珍惜」二字——因为世间一切美好皆能无限次地被收入眼帘；一切被建立起的联系都无需担忧破碎。
No one ever invented the word "cherish" in the era when life was eternal, for all the good things in the world could be revisited endlessly, and every bond formed carried no risk of being severed.
所谓的黄金世，便是一个既无美德也无罪恶的时代。人们并非活着…而仅仅是存在于世上，倦惰地行走、等待。

The so-called Era Chrysea was an age devoid of both virtue and sin. People did not truly live — they simply existed, going through the motions without passion or purpose, then waiting for something to happen.
也许，斯缇科西亚人选择拥抱死亡，并非是迷恋上了它阴森可怖的一面……
Perhaps the people of Styxia chose to embrace death not out of fascination with its cruel and fearsome side...
<color=#dbc291ff>而是伴随有限的生命降临的冲动和欲念，令他们沉醉痴狂，无法自拔。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But instead became fixated and obsessed with the impulses and desires tied to a finite existence.</color>
所以…「死亡」并非冰冷、绝望之物，而是……
Therefore, "Death" is not a thing of fear and desperation, but...
使用秘技击败天谴先锋
Use your Technique to defeat Furiae Praetor
没错，遐蝶。它是我们会在临别时含泪的理由…也是最初点燃凡人热情的薪火。
That's right, Castorice. It is the reason we shed tears when parting ways... and also the original spark that ignited the passion of mortals.
你若打算剥夺世间的「死亡」…那就要做好准备，目睹这世界回归停滞和怠惰。
If you truly intend to deprive the world of "Death," then be prepared to witness it return to a state of stagnation.
我理解了，阿蒙内特阁下。
有限的生命…塑造了我们热爱且熟知的一切。即便是「死亡」的泰坦，也无权再将它从人的身上剥离。
Our limited lifespan shapes all that we know and love... Not even the Death Titan has the right to take that away from humankind again.
「墨涅塔的爱」…黄金之茧最初的赐福，大概并不为人所理解。直到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}降临后，人们才学会了解读这份美好的赠礼。

"Mnestia's Love" was the Chrysalis of Gold's first blessing, but it most likely wasn't understood by mankind. We only learned to interpret this wonderful gift after {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' arrival.
斯缇科西亚女王为我接生…你将我纳入哀地里亚…阿格莱雅邀我加入逐火之旅…假如世间没有死亡，这一切故事皆不会发生。

If the world was bereft of death, then the Queen of Styxia wouldn't have played midwife in delivering me into this world... You wouldn't have welcomed me into Aidonia... And Aglaea would never have invited me to join the Flame-Chase Journey. None of these stories would ever have happened.
而我…自然就从未活过，更谈不上幸福。
And I... Would never have lived, let alone found happiness.
…我将以这漫长人生中全部的<color=#dbc291ff>「爱」</color>，完成最后的奇迹。
I will use all the <color=#dbc291ff>"love"</color> I've experienced in this long life to complete the final miracle.
不必再哀嚎悲泣，我将为你…带去安息。
There's no more need to weep in grief. I... will grant you peace.
曾经拯救我的少女…你真的业已消散了吗？
Is the girl who once saved my life... truly gone?
又或者，在遗恨消去后…将能再度示现？
Or will you show yourself again... once we eradicate this hatred and regret?
小心，尽管只出于本能，但它正积蓄着盛怒——
Be careful. They may be moving by instinct, but there is fury welling up within them —
Please... don't... turn back... to... the nether realm...
对不起，我不得不将你从远古的死亡中唤醒……
I'm sorry I have to wake you up from ancient death...
我明白，你很不安…别害怕……
And I know you're anxious... Shh, don't be afraid...
还记得我吗？我就是你曾经护送过的，那个横渡冥海的女孩。
Do you remember me? I'm the girl you once carried across the Sea of Souls.
对不起，出于一些原因，我的记忆中没能留下你的身影。但在许多人的帮助下，我终于得以拾起那些旧日的碎片……
I'm sorry I wasn't able to remember you, but with the help of many people, I was finally able to pick up these broken fragments of my past...
虽然我知道，这也许不是你期待的。
I know this might not be what you wanted.
But I have to do this.
所以现在，请带领我渡过冥海，回到冥界，就像你曾经做的那样……
So please, carry me across the Sea of Souls again and return me to the nether realm, just like you did in the past...
带我去往那「死亡」火种的长眠之地，好吗？
Please take me to where the Coreflame of "Death" rests.
我们…不会要钻进蛋里吧…
Uh... We won't have to go into an egg, right?
虽然它现在看上去有些可怕，但其实…我们…只要……
They may look scary, but as long... as... we...
看来时间快到了。如果再不动身，恐怕…{M#他}{F#她}的灵魂会先我一步回归{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的怀抱。
{M#His}{F#Her} time is almost up. If I don't go now, I'm afraid {M#his}{F#her} soul will return to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' embrace before me.
这…怎、怎么办？还能抢救一下吗？
What! Oh no... Is there anything we can do?
别担心，我承诺过：我会代阁下向{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}讨回行走大地的权利。
Don't worry. I promised I would ask {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} for the Trailblazer's right to roam the earth again.
迷迷，你在这里尽可能照看好阁下，等我回来。好吗？
Mem, stay here and keep a close watch until I return, alright?
没问题！人家最擅长的就是关心照顾别人了。
Alright! I'm the best at taking care of others.
去吧，小蝶。你也要记得…别给自己留下遗憾哪。
Go on, Cas. Make sure not to leave yourself with any regrets.
Take your time. I can still hold out...
我也出发，看咱们谁先到冥界…
I'll go too. Let's see who gets to the nether realm first...
这种时候就别开玩笑了！
哦，你们坐在你们的小小船上\n渴求聆听我的歌唱而紧随其后\n请你们且回头，回到你们自己熟悉的故土
Oh, you sit in your little dinghy\nEager to hear my song and follow closely behind\nPlease, turn back, return to the homeland you know so well
不要随我冒险驶向茫茫的大海，说不定\n见不到我，你们会在大海中迷途\n我横渡的大洋从来没有人曾航行过
Venture not with me into the vast sea, for perhaps\nWithout seeing me, you will lose your way in the ocean\nThe ocean I cross has never been sailed by anyone
You still ended up back here.
冥界…果真如传说那样，是一片花海。
So the legends were true. The nether realm really is a sea of flowers.
就像…我们从前照料的那片花田。
Just like the flower fields we tended to back then...
…我没有那段记忆，只是在一场实验中目睹过你的身影。
...I don't have the memories from that time, but I've seen you before during an experiment.
那，还是叫我{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧。这样更轻松些。
Call me {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} then. It'll be easier.
不过，既然知道那个名字，就代表你已经知晓有关「{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}」的全部了吧？
However, since you recognize the name, you must already know everything about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, right?
我…为重铸翁法罗斯生死秩序而来。
I'm... here to reforge the order of life and death in Amphoreus.
你知道吗？我的姐姐，是个善解人意、又有些敏感的人。每当她有心事，却又说不出口的时候，就会躲避别人的视线，望向远方……
You know, my sister was a sympathetic but rather sensitive person. Whenever she didn't want to say what was on her mind, she would avoid eye contact and look off into the distance...
Just like what you are doing now.
可以告诉我吗？上一次「再创世」……
Can you tell me... about the last Era Nova?
玻吕茜亚…究竟做了什么？
那，该从哪里说起呢？不妨就从最初开始吧……
Where should I begin...? I suppose we can start from the beginning.
好了，我亲爱的玻吕茜亚……
取出我的心脏，点燃「死亡」的火苗——
It's time to extract my heart and light the flame of Death...
然后，用它在预言许诺的新世界里，{RUBY_B#带去生命}播下第一枚花蕾{RUBY_E#}吧。
After that, use it to {RUBY_B#bring life}plant the first bud{RUBY_E#} in the prophesied new world.
在久远的过去，有一对同心的双子。根据预言，她们被选中成为「死亡」之神的递补。
A long, long time ago, there were a pair of like-minded twins. As foretold in the prophecy, they were chosen to be successors to the god of "Death."
可命运弄人，作为成神的代价<color=#dbc291ff>…我们必须亲手夺去至亲的生命。</color>
But fate was cruel. The price of attaining divinity was to <color=#dbc291ff>take the life of our closest kin with our own hands.</color>
这场试炼…也记录在了那段记忆中。
That trial... was indeed recorded in that memory.
那你应该知道，是姐姐主动献出了自己的生命，将我送上「死亡」半神的宝座。
Then you should already know that my sister voluntarily gave up her own life so that I could ascend as the demigod of "Death."
但…我无法接受这一切。为了一个她无法见证的未来，我们不得不自相残杀…这实在太不公平。
But I couldn't accept that. Why did we have to kill each other for a future she'd never see herself? That's not fair.
所以，在编织新世界的法则时，我…打破了「生」与「死」的底线。
So, while weaving the laws of the new world... I shattered the forbidden bottom line for "life" and "death."
我将她的灵魂捏塑成型，又以巨龙玻吕刻斯的模样，承载着姐姐在冥河里溯流而上，送她重返人间。
I reshaped my sister's soul and took the form of the great dragon Pollux to carry her up the River of Souls and back into the mortal realm.
可惜命运早已注定…在我徒劳的尝试下，它以意想不到的形式兑现了。
But our fates were already decided... and manifested in unexpected ways in response to my futile actions.
生老病死乃是自然颠扑不破的法则，它随「死亡」诞生一同写就。生者离世，其灵魂将觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，并由后者裁决将去往何处……

Aging is an unbreakable law of nature laid upon humankind, created at the same time as "Death." When the living die, their souls will meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, who would determine where every soul goes...
若死神举起左手，则灵魂受赐死亡，步入冥界，等待转生；若举起右手，则灵魂将被冥界拒绝，回归人间，继续在大地上前进。

If the Reaper raises their left hand, the soul is granted death and allowed to enter the nether realm to await reincarnation. If they raise their right hand, the soul is rejected by the nether realm and returned to the mortal realm to continue walking the earth.
所以…{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}只能施行宣判，而不能进行拥抱。
That's why the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}"Hand of Shadow"{RUBY_E#} can only lay down judgment... and not embrace another being.
是啊。正如「死亡」本为一体的双掌，在我们抵达人间时一分为二，再也无法触及对方……
Yes. "Death" was originally a pair of hands, but they were split in twain when we reached the mortal realm, never to touch each other ever again...
{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的生之半身，「赐予死亡」的永生之人…这就是我强加于你的诅咒。
The half of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} that represents life, the undying human who "grants death"... That was the curse I forced upon you.
它的死之半身，我背负「拒绝死亡」的命运，在人间诞生的那一瞬间便宣告死去。
As the half of Thanatos representing death, I shoulder the fate of "defying death." I died the moment I entered the world of the living.
自此，泰坦也在世上不复存在。生死断绝流转，灵魂无缘面见尊神，只能搁浅在亡者有涨无落的河流中……

From then on, my Titan also no longer existed in this world. The cycle of life and death stopped. Souls were denied their audience with death, and were left stranded within an ever-rising river of the dead....
多可笑啊…我的私心本为挽救生命，却为你，还有这个世界写下了比死亡更沉重的命运。
What irony. My selfish desire to save your life gave you and the world a fate far worse than death instead.
我们的人生如同手掌对映…可即便如此，仍旧殊途同归——
Our lives were a mirrored image of one another, like a pair of hands... Even so, we arrived at the same destination.
我们走过不同的路，却品尝着同样的滋味。
We walked different paths, yet experienced the same pain.
我本以为，至少你能在这一世好好活下去……
I had hoped that maybe you would at least have a good life in this cycle...
我的人生并没有虚度。对我而言，你不曾做错过什么。
I lived my life well. It didn't go to waste. As far as I'm concerned, you did nothing wrong.
即便…我将「赐死」的权柄强加给与我素不相识的你？
Even though I forced the authority of "granting death to humanity" upon you, a total stranger?
在这场漫长的旅途中，我的肩头早已被强加过太多使命。我也曾迷茫，乃至愠怒过……
Too many responsibilities were forced upon me in the course of this long journey. I was once lost, even upset...
但直到不久前，我才意识到：若非你的赐福，我也无法理解那些感情从何而来，无法理解自己的使命——
But I realized recently that if it weren't for your blessing, I wouldn't have understood the source of these emotions, nor would I have realized my purpose...
更遑论行至此地，与我宿命的半身重逢；一同分享我们的过去，眼前的风景……
I wouldn't have made it here to reunite with my missing half, and we wouldn't be discussing our past while sharing the same view of this landscape...
还有，你我二人「存在」的意义。
I wouldn't have understood the meaning of our "existence."
这片花海生长在死地，你我用离别为它播种，又以孤独的泪水浇灌而成…是啊，「死亡」所能缔造的，莫过于血泪中绽放的鲜花而已。

This sea of flowers blooms on dead land because we sowed it with the seeds of our separation and watered it with our tears of loneliness... Yes, the only thing "Death" is allowed to create are flowers that bloom from blood and tears.
所以，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}并不能随心所欲地塑造万物，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}也无法裁夺万物生灵的命运——
That's why {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} cannot create living beings at will, nor can the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}"Hand of Shadow"{RUBY_E#} determine a person's remaining days...
<color=#dbc291ff>因为凡人的生与死，本就不该被任何意志主宰。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Because the life and death of mortals should never be dictated by another's will.</color>
这听起来，反而是在否定{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的意义……
Are you saying there's no point in {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' existence...?
不。无人能独力担起生死的天平，哪怕是神明。
No. No single being can bear the scales of life and death on their own, not even a god.
生与死的分量同样沉重…你我都再明白不过了，不是么？
Life and death weigh equally heavy... We both know that now, don't we?
你这一生，想必也很辛苦吧……
You, too, must have had a difficult life...
我们…真是一同走过了无比荒谬的旅途啊。
We've taken quite the ridiculous journey together, haven't we?
已经太久太久了。我一个人守候在这里，日复一日地望着走投无路的亡灵被这片孤独的荒原拒之门外……
It's been far too long. I've waited here for centuries, watching day after day as desperate spirits are denied by this lonely wasteland...
在他们中，我始终期待着看到你的身影，却又害怕和你相认。我不知道要如何面对你……
I always hoped I would see you among them, but I was also afraid of seeing you. I didn't know how I could possibly face you again...
我更害怕看见…曾经的至亲早已忘却了我的存在。
But... more than anything, I was afraid that you might have forgotten all about me.
…我明白。但你看，玻吕茜亚，无论如何…我回到了这里。
...I know. But don't you see, Polyxia? I made it back anyway.
你不必再独自肩负「死亡」的权柄…毕竟，它本就应该由两只手共同举起。
You don't have to shoulder Death's authority on your own anymore... It was always meant to be held in two hands anyway.
所以，就让{NICKNAME}带着我们的火种回到人间，让凡人取回生死流转的权利……
So, let's give our Coreflame to {NICKNAME} and have {M#him}{F#her} take it back to the mortal realm. Give humanity back their cycle of life and death.
我们，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的职责，从来都不是拣选生命，只有看顾它们而已。
Our responsibility as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} was never about picking out favorite souls. We were only meant to watch over life.
让我们一起…为众多灵魂照料这片属于他们的、温暖的花海吧。
Let's tend the field together and create a warm sea of flowers for all the souls to come.
当然。现在…也只差最后一步了。
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生」……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame"...</color>
如神谕所示，塞纳托斯的神权注定只能由一人执掌。身为「死亡」的黄金裔，身为它的半神，身为泰坦……
As foretold by the prophecy, Thanatos' authority is only destined for only one person to wield. As the Chrysos Heir of "Death," as their demigod, as a Titan...
…我们命中注定的时刻，再次到来了。
...Our fated moment has arrived once again.
但，与那次不同的是…这一次，试炼的双方都做好了准备。
But unlike that time, the ones undergoing the trial this time are prepared.
嗯…此乃命运使然。但只要有你在，我就不会害怕。
Yes... as dictated by fate. But I won't be afraid, as long as you're here with me.
请你完成这一世的试炼，赐我以「死亡」的拥抱，点燃「生命」的火苗。
Complete your trial in this life. Grant me the embrace of "Death" and light the spark of "Life" ablaze.
如果是你，在经历过生与死的锤炼之后，一定能为这片荒原带来第一抹生机……
You've been tempered by life and death. I know you'll be able to give this wasteland its first breath of life...
就像奔赴冥界的蝴蝶，落在死亡的枝头。
Like a raven butterfly flying swiftly into the nether realm, perching on the twig of death.
…我会的。在那之后，我会永居冥界，让冥河回到这里，化作天上的细雨，将灵魂播撒向这片冥土……
...I will. After this, I will remain permanently in the nether realm. The River of Souls shall return here and rain down from the sky, scattering souls across the earth...
生死将再度流转。你亲手播下的这片花海，今后将承载无数或悲或喜的灵魂，永远焕发生机。
The cycle of life and death will flow once again. This sea of flowers you sowed shall bear countless joyous or sorrowful souls, and bloom evermore.
最后的最后，能请你…为我实现一个心愿么？
Just one last thing. Can you... grant me one wish?
即便我将再度跨越轮回…当我们在来世再见时，我也一定会像最初诞生时那样……
When we meet in the next world... Even if I have endured another reincarnation...
即便，我们尚不知道对方的名字……
...Even if we do not know each other's names...
…我也一定会紧紧地、紧紧地抱住你。
...I will still hold you tightly in my arms, just like what I did when we were born.
You're as beautiful... as a fleeting butterfly.
Go back whence you came... Go back...
前方是那死者的疆域哪……
Ahead lies the realm of the dead...
这些人影…是冥河倒映出的幻象吗？
These shadowy figures... are they illusions reflected by the River of Souls?
Don't be afraid, {NICKNAME}. Let's open our eyes wide... together!
奇怪，要说是冥河的倒影，似乎又太过…灵动。
Strange... For reflections in the River of Souls, they seem oddly... animated.
Done! Now it'll be safe for us to move on.
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹，显现了……
好神奇！就像待在一个巨大的泡泡里，河水都被分开了。
Amazing! It's like we're inside a giant bubble. Even the river got parted.
岁月将河水分割为了「过去」和「现在」……
Time has split the river into "the past" and "the present"...
要是丹恒在，冥河水肯定能升天吧……
If Dan Heng was around, he'd definitely be able to raise the waters of the River of Souls into the sky...
如果海瑟音大人还在世，她应该也能做到。
If Lady Hysilens was still alive, I think she might be able to do that, too.
啊…以前这条路反而是走不通的吗？
Huh... So this path actually didn't exist back then?
这里…有锁链生锈的味道。
There's... the scent of iron rust over here.
看！世间果真有粉色的小犬！
The path ahead is blocked by the River of Souls again...
那我们再回到「过去」吧！不过，这神迹也太方便了……
In that case, let us go back to "the past"! This miracle sure is handy...
…这也是泰坦神力的一道侧面。
...This is yet another aspect of a Titan's divine power.
这里是过不去的，我们得返回「现在」。
We can't get through here. Let us return to "the present."
呀…这样的话，反而没有路能走了。
Uh... If you do that, we'll actually run into a dead end.
那里的「预言算碑」…也许能派上用途？
Perhaps the Prophecy Tablet over there can help...?
阁下的眼睛，似乎能看清过去和未来……
You seem to be able to discern both the past and the future...
别别别害怕，这些亡魂根本就没发现我们。
D—D—Don't be scared. They haven't noticed us at all.
这里…以前肯定是座很美的庭院。
This place... must have been a beautiful courtyard in the past.
But how should we get up there?
The path is blocked yet again.
这种时候，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的助力总会恰到好处地出现呢……
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s aid always appears in times like this. How convenient...
Look. There's even a platform lift over there.
还真是被恰到好处地藏起来了…这是扎格列斯的恶作剧吗？
Look at how well-concealed this is... Is this one of Zagreus' pranks?
「过去的宝箱」被留了下来，可里面的财宝却没有留下……
A "Chest of the Past" has been left behind, but none of its treasures remain inside...
等等！要是奇迹突然失效怎么办？
W—Wait! What if the miracle suddenly loses its effect?
迷迷…你真的要我说出来吗？
Mem... Do you really want me to answer that?
Stay back... Don't come any closer!
The pink squirrel... is very smart.
奇迹作用的范围不大，还请阁下再靠近一些……
The miracle's range is limited. Please come a little closer...
嘿嘿，人家果然也适合当{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祭司吧？
Heehee. Aren't I a good fit for {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s priest?
当然，你是最称职的祭司。
Of course, you're the most competent priest ever.
这扇大门之后…应该就是炼金法阵所在了。
The alchemical matrix... should be behind this door.
然后，我，玻吕茜亚残存的理智，徒留在冥界……
Then, what was left of my reason was left behind in the nether realm...
日复一日地照料鲜花，看它长成花海……
Where I've been taking care of these flowers day after day, until there is now a sea of them....
…咀嚼着生与死，离别，还有漫长的孤独。
...All while mulling over the subject of life, death, partings, and enduring an endless loneliness.
早在那时，我已有预感：总有一天，我们还会再相见……
I had a feeling even back then that we would meet again one day...
不为久别重逢的拥抱，而为以手还手，实现报应……
Not to embrace one another after a long separation, but to come in search of retribution.
告诉我早已写就的答案…为漫长的命运画上句号。
Tell me the answer that's already been written... and let us draw this seemingly endless fate to a close.
啊…为何没有一位神明在远方高喊……
Ah... Why isn't there a god yelling in the distance...
「是呀，受苦受难的小家伙…你的大悲大恸，是我取乐的小手段。」
"Indeed, my downtrodden fellow... Your sorrow and joy are but means for me to amuse myself."
我所流下的全部眼泪，都由比我更强者判定——我将为此稍感宽慰。
I will at least derive some comfort... If all the tears that I had shed were determined by some mightier being above.
纵使那女孩才是邪恶，你也绝无理由为那魔物开脱。
Even if that girl is evil, there's no reason for you to absolve that monster.
是它们二者一道…一道将我们困在这生死的夹缝当中！
It was the both of them... The both of them who trapped us in this crevice between life and death!
At the same time, in Okhema
时光飞逝哪…转眼间，第十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}已近在眼前了。
Time flies... In the blink of an eye, the fifteenth {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} is already at hand.
待到这场闹剧结束，汝之魂息也将置上生死的天平。准备好了么？
When this farce is over, your soul will be placed on the scales of life and death. Are you ready?
用不着这么反复确认，当然。
No need to ask so many times — of course I am.
那末，为何依旧踯躅不前？是汝那忌惮人群的毛病又犯了？
Then why do you drag your feet? Is your fear of crowds holding you back again?
只是觉得太吵了。那些愚蠢又自负的笨货，多看一眼都是浪费我的时间。
Hmph, I simply find them too noisy. Paying attention to conceited fools like them would be an utter waste of my time.
真是不近人情哪。依吾看，汝妄自尊大的程度也不遑多让呢。
Such harsh words. As I see it, you are no less arrogant than they are.
哦？这反应真叫人意外，汝竟不反驳吾么？
Oh? I did not expect to hear that from you. Are you not going to refute me?
自己是什么样，我难道还不清楚么？至少比你这位「房客」清楚吧。
I know myself better than you think I do... At the very least, better than a stowaway like you.
真是人之将死，其言也不善哪。
And they say men whose ends are nigh have but kind words.
但也正因如此，吾才会选中了你，不是么？
Well that is exactly why I chose you.
Hmph, should I thank you for the compliment?
所以，试炼的时刻已至，汝打算如何证明吾的问题哪？
The hour of the trial has come. Do you have an answer for me? And... how will you prove the veracity of your argument?
既然都到这时候了…还记得我上次讲到哪里了么？
I suppose there is no point in putting this off any longer. Do you recall where we stopped the last time?
汝声称：「翁法罗斯历史乃是『轮回』」——
You were saying that Amphoreus' history is cyclical...
没错。背负「火种」的半神，将在世界尽头成为新的泰坦……
Indeed. The demigods that bear the Coreflames eventually become the new Titans at the world's end...
记得在神山上的见闻吗？卡吕普索、格奈乌斯…那些英雄临到命运的尽头，次第离去，只留下递补「死亡」的双子。
Remember what happened on the holy mountain? Calypso, Gnaeus... As their destined ends approached, one by one, they left this world... leaving only the twins, who were fated to succeed Death.
可惜，就算他们的旅途与我们庶几相似，还有你与卡吕普索，尼卡多利与格奈乌斯从旁佐证，也只能为「轮回」的猜想勾勒蓝图。

Unfortunately, while their journey is consistent with ours — you and Calypso as well as Nikador and Gnaeus act as supporting evidence — I can only come up with a rough sketch for my theory of a cyclical history.
虽然大费周章走到这一步，但我对证明本来已不抱任何期望。毕竟，过去的皆已过去，要想证明我们是往日英雄的传承，无异于痴人说梦……

For all the pains I took to reach this point, I had already lost hope of ever obtaining definitive proof. After all, the past is in the past. Proving that we are the legacies of heroes of the past is a hopeless endeavor.
直到…我们见到了那名叫玻吕茜亚的少女和她的姐姐。
That is, until I met a girl named Polyxia and her sister.
遐蝶——若她果真是泰坦出于私心，从过去送到现在的生灵——那么，以斯缇科西亚为「结点」，亲身走过两个轮回的她定能成为联结一切的「纽带」。

If Castorice was truly sent from the past to the present for the Titan's self-serving reasons, then having lived through two cycles and with Styxia as the pivot, she will no doubt be the link to connect all of this together.
如果「死亡」的双子能够跨越两世，在冥海边重逢——我的猜想便不再是一纸空谈，你的问题也能得到解答了。
If the twins of Death can bridge two cycles to reunite at the shores of the Sea of Souls... then my hypothesis will no longer be just a hypothesis, and you, too, will get the answer to your question.
那敢情好。可是，汝为何能如此断定？倘若这猜想出了差池，那女孩岂不是要败兴而归？
That is all well and good, but how can you be so sure? If there is even the slightest error in your hypothesis, the girl will be shattered.
哼，错了又如何？身为学者，最重要的品质正是不假思索的鲁莽。如果永远谨小慎微，无法大胆迈出第一步，那一切变化也无从谈起——

Hmph, it matters not. The most important quality a scholar must possess is foolhardiness. If you are overly cautious, then you'll never have the gumption to make the first step, and change will never come.
更何况，我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，注定要颠覆这个有悖常理的世界。
Besides, I, Anaxagoras, am destined to overturn this farcical world.
走，我们去给那帮可怜虫们上最后一课。
Come, let us go and teach those pathetic worms one final lesson.
让他们听听吧——那些发动了残暴战争的黄金裔——！
Let those Chrysos Heirs who started this terrible war hear you!
让他们听见人民的呼声——！
Let them hear the voices of the people!
那女人还是一如既往，善于煽动人心。
As always, that woman knows how to stir up a crowd.
那刻夏…老师？我还以为你不打算到场了。
Professor Anaxa...? I thought you'd pass on this.
票总是要投的，否则这场大会不就毫无意义了？
Everyone must cast their vote, or this assembly would serve no purpose.
老师，你当真觉得…将世界的命运托付在一场大会上，是正确的么？
Prof... Do you truly think it's wise to entrust the fate of the world to an assembly like this?
奥赫玛在这一制度下屹立千年不倒，自然能证明其存在的合理性。
Okhema has stood strong under this system for a thousand years. It stands to reason that there is purpose in its existence.
但我认为，你想问的不是这个。真正令你迷茫的是…阿格莱雅将决定世界命运的机会托付给你，是否正确。
But that is not what you're asking, is it? What you really want to know is: Is Aglaea making the right decision in entrusting the fate of the world to you?
毕竟教了你那么久，别人可是最多四年就毕业了。
I didn't spend all those years teaching you for nothing. Most people only take four years to graduate, if I recall.
哈哈…坦率地讲，我感觉不像要上演讲台，反而像上刑场。
Haha... To tell the truth, I feel like I'm on my way to an execution chamber instead of a podium.
So... do you have an answer to that question?
我没法替你回答这个问题——
——因为这问题和你没有半点关系。
Because that question is not yours to ask in the first place.
「阿格莱雅将机会托付给你」是否正确？别引我发笑了，这不是那女人自己的问题么？为什么你要替她考虑这些？还是说，你一直都把自己当成她的工具？

Is "Aglaea entrusting the world to you" the right decision? Don't make me laugh. That is a question that woman must answer herself. Why are you fretting about this on her behalf? Or have you been seeing yourself as her pawn all this time?
听好了，把思路逆转过来——「『我』要如何决定世界命运，才是正确的选择？」——这才是你真正应该思考的。

Listen up, I'll say this only once. Flip your perspective around and ask yourself this instead, "What should I do to ensure that the world doesn't stray from the correct path?" That is what you should be thinking about.
还有时间，好好想想你会如何作答吧，也别说给我听……
You still have time, so give it some thought. Oh, and don't bother telling me the answer.
去说给那群向诸神乞求拯救的人听。
Tell it to those begging for salvation from the gods.
Who... who'll you be voting for?
看你的表现…愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
That'll depend on how well you perform... May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.
本次大会最后一名演讲人即将入场，决议将在之后举行。
The last speaker for the assembly will be taking the stage soon. The resolution will be passed after that.
凯妮斯大人为您留了特等席，请问要现在落座吗？
Lady Caenis has reserved a special seat for you. Shall I show you to it?
凯妮斯大人为您留了特等席，请问要现在落座吗？
Lady Caenis has reserved a special seat for you. Shall I show you to it?
元老们，公民们，请肃静。以神礼观众之名，我见到——
Elders and citizens, silence, if you please. As the Theoros, I present to you:
——奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将为本场大会带来最后的演说！
Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, virtuous citizen of Okhema and the last speaker of the assembly.
感谢您，高贵的来古士阁下。
我记得这家伙，给阿格莱雅提鞋的穷小子！
I remember him — he's the penniless lad working for Aglaea!
「金织」女士呢？为什么派这家伙来压台？逐火之旅真要结束了？
Where's Lady Goldweaver? Why is she sending this guy to give the last speech? Is this really the end of the Flame-Chase Journey?
一介武夫？这小子能镇得住凯妮斯么……
Can this dude really face down Caenis...?
刻法勒在上，各位奥赫玛的公民——
By Kephale above, dear citizens of Okhema...
——我看到了，你们所有人的目光都注视着我。
As you look upon me, so too do I see you.
你们的眼里饱含忧虑，不仅忧虑黄金裔与元老院之间滋生的裂隙，更忧虑这座圣城将要步入的明天。
I see your fear and misgivings, your apprehension about the discord between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders... and your uneasiness about the future of the holy city.
现在，我想敬请各位：在思考「世界的命运」这般宏大的命题以前，请你们先擦亮自己的双眼…越过被{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮的地平线，看清我们身处的危机！

Yet, before you contemplate something as grand as the fate of the world, I ask that you look closer... Look, beyond the horizon illuminated by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, at the crisis threatening to overwhelm us!
我的故乡哀丽秘榭，那是一处被时间遗忘的村落。那里的好风如薄荷般清新，麦浪宽广到能连上海洋…我曾坚信，自己会在那与邻里亲友永享安宁。

Aedes Elysiae, my beloved hometown, is a village forgotten by time. It is a place with the most invigorating breeze and wheat fields that spread all the way to the sea... I once thought that there, I would enjoy a lifetime of peace and quiet with my friends and family.
我多想邀请诸位前去一睹那与世隔绝的好地方啊！可我做不到——
How I wish I could invite all of you to that paradise far away from the noise and chatter of the world! Alas, I can't...
因为，她和她哺育的一切，我所深爱的一切，早已被黑潮吞噬——我无家可归！
...Because she... and all that she nurtured... all that I loved... they have long been devoured by the black tide. My beloved home... is no more.
我永远都记得黑潮来临的那天：我的父亲希洛尼摩斯，为了他的孩子，用断剑力战到最后一刻；我的母亲奥妲塔，她为我能站在这里向诸位乞求，被怪物破开了胸膛！

I will never forget the day the black tide struck. My father, Hieronymus, fought with a broken sword to his last breath to protect his child. My mother, Audata... She was ripped apart by monsters, all so I might live to stand before you here and now.
猎户伽尔巴，他张弓的双臂，最终怀抱着他挚爱的幼子披索，二人双双死去；皮西厄斯，孩子们的老师，她拼命救下了所有学生，燃烧的梁木却压垮了她的脊梁……

Galba... He was a hunter. But in the end, those arms that once drew a bow instead embraced Piso, his beloved son, as they both breathed their last. Pythias, the teacher, risked her life to save her students, but a burning beam fell on her, crushing her...
可她的女儿莉维娅呢？她逃出生天了吗？没有：她、披索，还有其他许多孩子，我童年时最亲密的玩伴们…他们全都被黑潮吞没，变成了扭曲的造物！

And what of Livia, her daughter? Did she make it out alive? ...No, she didn't. Livia, Piso, and so many other children... My childhood friends... They were all swallowed by the black tide and turned into monsters.
直到我下定决心向他们挥剑，为他们带去体面的死亡，他们还在对我喃喃道——
They kept saying the same thing over and over... even up until the final moment I finally steeled my heart and granted them eternal peace with my sword:
「你怎么了，白厄？难道我们不是最好的朋友吗？」
"Why, Phainon? Aren't we the best of friends?"
这就是黑潮，奥赫玛如今迫在眉睫的威胁。凯妮斯或许承诺了，灾厄三泰坦皆已陨落，奥赫玛必将重返「黄金世」——

That is the black tide — a looming threat that can bring Okhema to its knees anytime. Caenis may have promised that, with the Three Titans of Calamity gone, Okhema will return to an Era Chrysea once more, but...
但现在，我要让各位失望了。因为，我会对你们说：即便{RUBY_B#万敌}「纷争」之半神{RUBY_E#}已为我们挡下许多，但「它」就要来了。
Much as it pains me, I must disappoint you: While {RUBY_B#Mydei}the demigod of Strife{RUBY_E#} has done everything in his power to hold them back, "they" are still coming.
那黑袍剑士…「盗火行者」的名字，恐怕早已传遍大街小巷。现在，「纷争」用他的惊雷送来信号，告诉我们：它已自死灰中复活，并渴求着众神的火种。

By now, the name of that black-robed swordmaster... the Flame Reaver, has likely echoed throughout the city already. The roaring thunder is a message from the Strife demigod: The Flame Reaver has risen from death, and they hunger for the Coreflames of the gods.
扯谎！如果这么恐怖的敌人近在眼前，奥赫玛岂能继续享受眼前的和平？
Lies! If such a powerful enemy is indeed approaching, why is Okhema still a picture of peace?
正是！奥赫玛美好的公民生活没有停歇的迹象。仔细想想吧，各位，这场公民大会能够和平召开，难道是因为危机消失了吗？

Exactly! The city of Okhema shows no signs of pandemonium or chaos. And why is that? I beg you, spare a moment to think about this. Are we able to stand here and hold this assembly in peace today because the danger has passed?
不！那是因为黄金裔们挺身而出，将灾厄挡在了奥赫玛的城墙之外——阿格莱雅用她的金线，维系并捍卫了你们所能享用的一切！

No! This peace we enjoy is no gift of fate. We are able to stand here today only because the Chrysos Heirs have stepped up and shielded Okhema from calamity! With her golden threads, Aglaea has preserved — and continues to preserve — these idyllic days that all of you hold dear!
元老院说，她会抛下所有人，只因神性正在蚕食她的身心。但各位可曾想过，那些贵人本能向她伸出援手——他们为何选择了冷眼旁观，并将奥赫玛推离逐火的事业？
