The Council of Elders claims that Aglaea will one day forsake the people because her divinity is eroding her body and soul. But ask yourselves this: Rather than offering her aid and support, why do they choose to watch and push Okhema away from the Flame-Chase Journey?
那无人能说得出口的事实…那血淋淋的，被贪婪、恐惧和虚荣所埋没的真相，就由我来掘地三尺，将它呈现在你们眼前吧。
The answer that no one can bring themselves to speak of... A truth stained in blood and buried in greed, fear, and vanity... Allow me to lay it bare before you.
<color=#dbc291ff>承载着奥赫玛悠久历史和威严的元老院，我们曾引以为豪的公民大会——如今已经遍地虫豸！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It is because the Council of Elders, which bears Okhema's history and honor, along with this citizens' assembly we once took so much pride in, are now infested with vermin!</color>
You insolent whelp! How dare you—
对！阿格莱雅现在独木难支了——因为，在虫豸们于光天化日下望风捕影、酝酿阴谋之时，她正呕心沥血地编织圣城的防御网，以对抗世间无孔不入的恶毒！

It is true that Aglaea has reached her limit. Why? Because she has been working tirelessly to weave the defenses of our holy city against the encroaching evil — all while these vermin are making up baseless accusations about her and scheming in the shadows!
她从未辜负奥赫玛的期待，却只因虫豸的围攻撕咬、就该蒙受莫大的羞辱吗？除却那后至的「神性」…她的本心，难道不是始终与「人」同在吗？

Not once has she ever failed Okhema, yet these vermin attempt to tear her apart, tarnishing her name with unfounded allegations! She may have been blessed by divinity, but hasn't her heart always stayed true to humanity?
他们想欺骗你们，把这场大会粗暴地归结成「人」与「神」的对立。还记得我的请求吗？奥赫玛的公民们，请擦亮双眼，仔细端详一下站在你们身边的人吧！
They attempt to mislead you and reduce this assembly to a crude standoff between gods and humans, but citizens of Okhema! Once more, I implore you to open your eyes and look at those around you!
看得再仔细些！看看被那些华贵的衣袍所遮盖的，是人的热肠？还是害虫的毒腺？
Examine them closely! Beneath all that finery, do you see the good heart of a human... or the poisonous glands of a pest?
待你们在心中下完了判断，再把目光投向她们吧——看看那你们以为冷漠的半神，是否还闪耀着人性的光；而那披着人皮恶语中伤的，又是否着了权欲的魔！

Make your judgment, then turn your gaze to the demigods whom so many of you regard as cold and merciless — do you not see the light of humanity in them? And those who wear the mask of humanity yet utter only hurtful, slanderous words — can you not see that their souls have been corrupted by power?
但无论你们得出了什么样的答案，最终将手中的陶片投给了谁…你们都不必有后顾之忧。
Yet, no matter what your answer is, and no matter who your vote goes to... rest assured that you have nothing to fear.
因为我、阿格莱雅、缇里西庇俄丝，我们仍会是你们忠诚的护墙，誓死捍卫你们所有人的抉择——
For Aglaea, Tribios, and I will remain your faithful guardians and pledge our lives to upholding your decision.
如此承诺，将一直延续至我们生命的终点，并被传递给未来的逐火之人——
And this vow will stay true until the end of our days, where it will be passed on to future Flame-Chasers...
...A steadfast and unwavering promise that shall endure through the ages!
在一片哗然中，奥赫玛不同城邦代表领袖将手中的陶片扔进陶罐中……
In an uproar, representative leaders from different cities in Okhema throw pieces of pottery into the dolium...
截至目前，「继续逐火之旅」者与「暂停逐火之旅」者，双方民意在{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天平上……
At the present time, on the scales of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, those who call for the continuation of the Flame-Chase Journey and those who demand its suspension...
票数相等，形成了绝佳的平衡。
Each faction holds an equal share of the votes, resulting in the perfect balance.
不出所料，这是逐火之旅距离「中止」最近的一刻。
As expected, this is the moment when the Flame-Chase Journey is the closest to its end.
现在，轮到您了，阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
And now, it's your turn to vote, Lord Anaxagoras.
还有其他人没有投票么？
Is there anyone else who hasn't voted?
您是最后一位。慎重思考吧，您的庄严一票将打破这场完美的僵局。
No, you're the last. Cast your vote with care, for your decision will break this impasse.
I have long since made a decision.
甚好。衷心祝愿您为这有悖常理的世界带来真正的变革。
Very well. May you bring much-needed change to this farcical world.
你干得很好，白厄。在那种形势下，用激烈的言论激发起情绪是一步妙招。
You've done well, Phainon. Given the circumstances, delivering a rousing speech to stir up emotions was a prudent move.
感谢诸位耐心等待。我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，谨代表神悟树庭七贤人与全体学者，投下庄严一票。
Thank you all for your patience. On behalf of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the scholars of Amphoreus, I, Anaxagoras, am ready to cast my vote.
不过为了公平起见，「金织」女士，我会在所有人面前向你提问——
But before that, in the interest of fairness, Lady Goldweaver, I pose a question to you before all who are gathered here:
请你告诉我：你确实如白厄所说，无论结果如何，都将捍卫本次大会庄严的决议么？
Will you, as Phainon has promised, stand by the decision made in the assembly, regardless of outcome?
为公平起见…我不会向你做出任何承诺，以免干扰你的判断。
In the interest of fairness... I make no promises, lest it should influence your decision.
呵，那敢情好。感谢您的肺腑之言。
Heh, very well. I thank you for your honesty.
事关重大，给他一点时间吧。
The stakes are high. Let's be patient.
别摆谱了！你以为自己是什么东西，要我们陪你在这儿浪费时间？
Cut the act! Who do you think you are, wasting our time like this?
Lord Anaxa, please do not forget that I—
第一，别叫我那刻夏；第二，别打断我——沉默是金。
Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxa. Rule number two: Never interrupt me. Silence is golden.
Just vote already! What are you waiting for?
周围的声音逐渐被滤去，那刻夏神识中{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的声音逐渐清晰。
The surrounding sounds gradually fade away, and the voice of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} in Anaxa's mind becomes increasingly clear.
吾不禁在想，是否世间一切磨难都会被汝当作物尽其用的手段。
I cannot help but wonder: Is every hardship in the world something you will exploit and use to your advantage?
呵呵，身体和灵魂一分为二，不就该这么用吗？
Heh, how else am I supposed to make use of this situation where my body and soul are separated?
吾师瑟希斯，亦或卡吕普索，最后陪我走一遭吧——
O Cerces — or should I say, Calypso — accompany me on this final journey.
走，到冥界去——去看看她将如何给你的提问、我的抉择，带来完美的证明。
Let us journey to the nether realm and see how she will substantiate the answer to your question and validate my decision.
We need only to follow the sound of the tides...
很好，孩子…我早就说过，你会大有作为的。
Well done, child. Just as I foresaw, you have achieved great things.
真是奇妙的际遇啊…「敬拜学派」教出了一名渎神者，简直就像是小毛驴，吸干了妈妈的奶，反倒踢了妈妈一脚。
What a twist of fate... A blasphemer raised in the doctrines of the Venerationists. It's like a foal kicking its mother in the belly after taking all her milk.
我敬爱你，老师。但你明白……
I respect you immensely, sir, but—
You cherish the truth even more.
所以，孩子，不必为我所承受的非议感到遗憾。别让那些噪音掣住你前进的步伐。
So, child, do not be troubled by the criticisms I have borne. Do not let those voices hinder you as you forge ahead.
作为「敬拜学派」的贤人，世俗要求我不能认同你；但是，作为阿那克萨戈拉斯的友人与导师，我会说……
As the Sage of the Venerationists, I am duty-bound to oppose you. But as your friend and mentor, Anaxagoras, I say:
「去做吧，真理已尽在你手中了。」
Go forth, for the truth is already in your hands.
好了，前进吧，孩子。你孤独的求索路即将迎来新的起点——
Go now, child. Your lonely pursuit is about to welcome a new chapter...
而当你抵达其尽头时，愿我们在真理前相会。
And when you reach the end of this journey, may we meet again with the truth before us.
我向你保证，老师。愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
You have my word, sir. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.
愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
你说得对，吾师。我孤独的求索路即将迎来新的起点，我得出发了——
You are right, Empedocles. My lonely pursuit is about to welcome a new chapter. I must be on my way now...
May we meet again with the truth before us, Empedocles.
What are you waiting for? Just cast your vote—
看吧，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}——此刻，在世界的中心，我将写下最后一步证明……
Behold, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Here at the center of the world, I shall write the final step of my proof...
——此处距离真理，只有一步之遥。
For this place is but one step away from the truth.
平衡已被打破，结果已经明朗。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，以神礼观众之名，我见到——
With the balance shattered, the result is clear. By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, as the Theoros, I have observed...
那刻夏…这是在做什么？你疯了。
Anaxa! What have you done!? Have you lost your mind!?
我会准备好与你相称的酷刑…而你得用那颗聪明脑袋好好记住，什么是背叛的代价…！
I hope you are prepared for the harsh punishment awaiting you! Mark my words, I will make sure that clever head of yours never forgets the price of betrayal!
还记得吗？我说过，这恰恰是我最宝贵的天赋之一。
Have you forgotten? I told you, that happens to be one of my rare talents.
你不惜演到这份上…就为了帮助他们完成愚蠢的逐火之旅…？！
You put on such a grand performance... just to aid their preposterous Flame-Chase Journey!?
「演」？错了，即便生性多疑，我也从来以直诚闻名。
Performance? No, you are quite mistaken. I may be paranoid by nature, but I've always been known for my honesty.
是你误会了，凯妮斯阁下。你不了解我，我从不关心你们那可怜的政治游戏。什么阵营、立场，无一例外，全都是笑话。我的选择从未变过……

If you really understood me, Lady Caenis, you'd realize that I never had any interest in your pathetic little game of politics. Factions, standpoints... they are jokes in my eyes. I have never once switched sides...
只有我自己，才是唯一确凿的真理。
Because I, and I alone, am the truth.
凯妮斯阁下，在公民目光的注视下，我们应坚持民主的精神，尊重议会结果。
Lady Caenis, with all the citizens here as witnesses, we should honor the spirit of democracy and respect the decision of this assembly.
我见到——奥赫玛已选择了她的命运。公民大会决定继续支持逐火之旅！该决议并将张贴于纪名英雄墙前，全体公民应知晓城邦的前路。

...I have observed that Okhema has chosen her destiny! This citizens' assembly has resolved to continue the Flame-Chase Journey. This resolution shall be put up on the Wall of Heroes such that all citizens are aware of the city's way forward.
看来有人还不尽兴啊。那好，不妨让我来为这场大会再添一笔吧。
It seems not everyone is ready for the assembly to end. Very well, let me entertain you for a little longer.
元老们，公民们，请肃静！神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯请求向公民大会宣告。还请各位留步，以便聆听其宣言。
Elders and citizens, your attention, please! Stay for a moment more, if you will. Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany has an announcement for the assembly.
诸君！就在刚才，你们亲手决定了翁法罗斯的命运。作为逐火之旅的支持者，我也十分乐见诸位的抉择——
Just moments ago, all of you made a decision on the fate of Amphoreus. As a supporter of the Flame-Chase Journey, it pleases me to see the choice you have made.
但是，很遗憾：我仍然对此结果深表质疑，并要求挑战此次决议！
But I regret to say that I still harbor doubts about this outcome. Thus, I hereby challenge this resolution!
告诉我！在座各位，有多少人敢对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}起誓，「再创世」的尽头必将如诸位黄金裔所说，是一片没有灾厄与疯狂的美丽新世界？

Tell me, who among you dares swear on {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s name that Era Nova will truly welcome the fairy-tale ending that the Chrysos Heirs have promised? A beautiful new world free of calamity and madness?
为什么没人敢举手回答？非要我点名不成？
No one? Must I pick somebody to answer?
那好。那边故作深沉的家伙，你敢对在场所有人赌咒发誓吗？
Very well. You, the one acting so wise and profound — in front of all present here, do you dare swear that it will happen for sure?
不能？下一位。那个一脸蠢相的，对，就是你，你敢对着泰坦拍胸脯做担保吗？
No? Fine, next. You, the one with ignorance written all over your face... Yes, you. Do you dare swear by it in front of the Titan?
What are you trying to do?
哼，废物！那换你来，看你鼻子早就翘到天上去了。这么有能耐，你敢保证逐火之旅是最好的选择吗？
Hmph, useless! Your turn, then. With that smug look of yours, you must be confident that the Flame-Chase Journey is the best course to take, right?
都答不上来？行吧。白厄，既然是你慷慨陈词，那我倒要问问：你心里又有几成把握？
So, no one? I see. In that case, Phainon, answer me this: Your speech was filled with such passion just now. How confident, then, are you in making this promise?
那刻夏老师！你究竟在干什么……
Let him continue with his performance.
哈，看啊！连你白厄和阿格莱雅都没这个胆量！
Haha! Will you look at that? Even Phainon and Aglaea lack the courage to make such a promise!
更荒谬的是，除了我，根本没人能承诺这道美好的愿景！可大会竟在无知中贸然通过了这一决议？
And what's even more absurd is that no one but I can promise you this new world, and yet the assembly passed the resolution anyway!
不过，诸位不必担心，还好我对你们这帮酒囊饭袋早就心里有数。所以我才会出现在这里，来给你们所有人上最后一课！
But you needn't worry because I knew better than to trust you good-for-nothings. That is precisely why I am here today — to give you one final lecture!
都给我提起耳朵，听清楚了！现在，我，神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，就这样告诉你们——
Now, listen up, and listen well! I, Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, hereby declare:
逐火之旅许诺的一切确凿无疑：因为预言中{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的半神，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将以他完整无缺的记忆，将我们所有人重塑在新世界中！

Everything that the Flame-Chase Journey promises is true! Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, the prophesized demigod who shall succeed {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, will reforge each and every one of us in the new world with his complete, intact memories!
<color=#dbc291ff>没错，身负火种的泰坦即为过去的黄金裔，背负同样火种的黄金裔正是未来的泰坦——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The Coreflame-bearing Titans were the Chrysos Heirs of yesterday, and the Chrysos Heirs who carry the Coreflames today will become the Titans of tomorrow.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>而我们所有人的灵魂，都将在负世的神迹下永存不灭——我承诺，刻法勒庇护下的一切，都必将步入那新生的世界！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>All of our souls shall endure for eternity in the miracle of the Worldbearer, and all under Kephale's protection shall step into that new world!</color>
什么…就算到了来世，我们都要对你们顶礼膜拜…？！
What!? Are you saying that we must bow down to you and worship you even in our next lives!?
住口！你这渎神的狗鼠，休想妖言惑众！你有什么根据……
Enough, you blasphemous imbecile! How dare you try to deceive us with all these lies and falsehoods! How can you prove—
我说过，别打断我！但既然你问了，那就回答你吧：我的根据就来自对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神体的实验——

I told you, don't interrupt me! But since you've asked, I shall be kind and indulge you: My statements are based on my experiments on the divine body of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} themself!
没错，诸君！在凯妮斯与元老院全体的默许授意下，我以炼金之法将自己的灵魂与尊神熔合，由此揭示了有关「再创世」的一切！
You heard me correctly, everyone! With the tacit approval of Caenis and the Council of Elders, I fused my soul with a god through alchemy and learned the truth behind Era Nova!
我，卑劣可耻的渎神者，应受死刑制裁……
I, the vile, wretched blasphemer, deserve nothing less than death for my sins...
而包庇我、纵容我，协助我完成渎神罪行的元老院，应与我同罪！
And the Council of Elders, which granted me consent and aided me in committing this atrocity, should face punishment alongside me!
天啊，连凯妮斯也背叛了奥赫玛……
By the gods, even Caenis has betrayed Okhema...
我对于罪人的所作所为概、概不知情…他的一切罪行皆与元老院无关…！
I—I had no knowledge of his transgressions...! He did that on his own! The Council of Elders bears no responsibility for his actions!
来古士阁下…你身为最高贵的神礼观众，听到元老院遭到如此污蔑，还打算无动于衷吗…？！
Lord Lygus... As the esteemed Theoros, are you going to simply stand by and allow the Council of Elders to be dragged through the mud!?
如果渎职属实，我会大方承认；如果没有，我便不怀担忧。凯妮斯阁下，元老院的信誉并非在朝夕之间建立，也不会在朝夕之间崩溃。

If the accusation is true, I will acknowledge it. If not, my conscience stands unburdened. Lady Caenis, the reputation of the Council of Elders was not built in a day, nor will it be shattered overnight.
愚弄人民者必得报应，弃誓者必得酷刑。我们应当尊重这座美丽的城邦和她的人民。
Repercussions await those who fool the people, and punishment must be meted out to those who abandon their vows. We should respect this beautiful city and her people.
「金织」阿格莱雅女士，我请求您秉承{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}之公平，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之正义，主持判决——

Lady Aglaea, the Goldweaver, I humbly ask that you take on the responsibility of overseeing this judgment, in the name of the fairness of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and the justice of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}...
——基于眼下状况，根据奥赫玛法典，在座诸位中只有身为「半神」的您享有该权利。
...Considering the circumstances, and in accordance with Okhema's Codex, as the only demigod among us, you shall rightfully wield this authority.
Elders and citizens, silence, if you please!
神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，其陈词诸位皆已明了。现在，根据奥赫玛法典，我要求诸位公民与我共同行使审判的权力。
Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany has made his statement clear. As per Okhema's Codex, I request all present citizens to stand with me in exercising the right of judgment.
首先，对于奥赫玛元老凯妮斯，与「神礼观众」来古士，被指控疏忽职守，徇私枉法，致使尊神奥体遭受严重亵渎……
First, Elder Caenis of Okhema and Lygus the Theoros stand accused of neglecting their duties and abusing the law, leading to the egregious blasphemy against a god...
以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名：奥赫玛应在第七个{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}以前责成委员会展开检察，并公开宣示结果，以便进一步审理！

In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema is to form a committee before the seventh {RUBY_B#Noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#} to conduct an investigation and disclose the findings to the public for subsequent judgment!
其次，对于神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，指控其自身对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的严重亵渎——
Now, concerning Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, he has confessed to grave blasphemy against {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}...
以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名：死刑执行前，受刑者应有权利听从「一致欢呼」，以便争取从轻发落及赦免的权利！

In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the accused must be allowed to hear the "people's voice" prior to the execution for a chance at a reduced sentence and possible pardon!
Let him die! Let him die!
Let him die! Let him die!
Let him die! Let him die!
Let him die! Let him die!
您会如何选择呢，「金织」女士？
What decision will you make, Lady Goldweaver?
Let him die! Let him die!
别犹豫了，阿格莱雅。这可不是你的作风。
Enough with the hesitation, Aglaea. This is not like you.
Let him die! Let him die! Let him die! Let him die!
那么，依据「一致欢呼」结果……
Then, in light of the "people's voice"...
{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，愿你为他带来「死亡」的命运。
O {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} on high, may you bring death upon him.
白厄…最后一辩交给他了啊。
Phainon... So, they are leaving the final debate to him.
别忘了你我共同筹划的愿景，阁下。
I trust you haven't forgotten the world we've envisioned together.
阁下，来重新认识一下吧：我在人间的名字叫作遐蝶，如今是「死亡」之半神，塞纳托斯的生之侧面……
Allow me to reintroduce myself: I bore the name of Castorice while walking among the mortals, and now I stand as the demigod of Death, the living side of Thanatos...
欢迎来到西风尽头，我的冥界。
Welcome to my realm, where the west wind ends.
每一位来到这里的亡者，都会发出同样的感叹。
Every departed soul who has arrived here has expressed the same.
Mom, I made it! My character arc is finally done!
You're still as energetic as always.
你知道吗，阁下？这片花海，此地的每一朵鲜花，都由塞纳托斯亲手栽下。它们本来无生无灭，但在冥河带来的第一场雨中，它们获得新生，承载着无数灵魂发荣滋长……

Did you know? Every flower here was planted by Thanatos themself. These flowers were originally both lifeless and immortal, but in the first rain brought by the River of Souls, they were given new life, flourishing as the bearers of countless souls...
身为「死亡」的主人，我理应悉心照料，令它们在这片恬美的天地发芽绽放。
And it is my duty as the master of Death to tend to their well-being and foster their growth in this serene haven.
正如凡间死生有序，这些花也会在成长的尽头枯萎、凋零，化作泥土，乘着雾气和海潮，升入天空……
Similar to the structured cycle of life and death in the mortal world, these flowers too shall wither and fade, returning to the earth and then ascending to the sky with mist and tides...
最后，它们会变成无声的细雨，落向人间大地。同一颗灵魂将以不同的面貌轮回流转，直至世界尽头……
Eventually, they will descend to the mortal land as gentle rain. Every soul undergoes the perpetual cycle of reincarnation, albeit in varied forms, until the world meets its end...
可惜，翁法罗斯已经等不到下一次鲜花绽放了。
Yet, sadly, there's no time left for Amphoreus to wait for when the flowers bloom again.
现在，「死亡」已是我指尖的涟漪，它曾引渡世间的亡魂来到这里，但我——要洞开冥府的大门，令你回到生者的世界……
Now, Death is the power at my fingertips. It once led the souls of the deceased here, but I... I shall open the gate of the netherworld and return you to the realm of the living...
作为交换…请你带回「死亡」的火种，完成逐火之旅，别让我们至今的努力付诸东流。
In exchange... Please, take the Coreflame of Death with you and complete the Flame-Chase Journey. Do not let our work thus far be in vain.
放心，「拒绝死亡」本来就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的神权。幸好，阁下的灵魂还未消散，这并非死而复生，而是引渡一位垂死之人回到现世。

Rest assured, "defying death" is {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' divine authority. Fortunately, your soul hasn't dissipated. This is not a resurrection, but the extradition of a dying person back to the present world.
嗯，就像其他半神一样，我也要留在这里…拥抱自己的命运了。
Mm, just like the other demigods, I will stay here... and embrace my destiny.
只是，指引一位迷途者重返人间绝非易举。死亡的呢喃甘美而宁静，倘若意志不足，必将被冥府的长臂死死牵制。

That being said, it is not easy to guide a lost soul back to the mortal realm. The whispers of Death are sweet and alluring. If your determination wavers, you will succumb and be forever ensnared by the netherworld's grasp.
请把这当作一次特例中的特例，我会尽力而为，为了逐火之旅……
Please consider this a one-time exception. I will do everything in my power for the Flame-Chase Journey...
…也为了此生，我唯一能拯救的生命。
...And for your life, the only life I can save.
I am... glad to hear that.
别了，阁下。愿我们…在新世界再会。
Farewell, then. May we... reunite in the new world.
Life and death are predetermined, but yours life doesn't end here.
迷路了吗？我们都在前面。
Are you lost? We're all waiting for you ahead.
别忘记「开拓」，让它成为你的指引。
Remember the Trailblaze. Let it guide your way.
Listen, your home is not there.
迷茫的时候，就寻找流星落下的方向吧。
Look for the direction of the falling stars when you're lost.
Don't look back. Don't make Castorice regret this.
小小灰，那边才不是明天！
Little Gray, you won't find tomorrow there!
灾厄的长臂只会掣肘懦弱的人，你是弱者吗？
Only the weak will be hindered by the far-reaching grasp of Calamity. Are you one of them?
搭档，别输给死亡的阴霾！
Partner, don't you dare lose to the shadows of death!
（可是，已经到终点了。也许，我还能最后再看一眼这片花海……）
(Since I've already made it to the end, maybe I can have one last glance at that sea of flowers...)
<color=#ff3a3e>不要害怕。在那道路的尽头，始终会有一抹红色。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>Fear not, as a touch of red will be awaiting you at the end of the path.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>它将为你指引出路。如此…你们一定能够在阳光下相聚。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>It'll guide you and illuminate the way out. By doing so... you'll eventually reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.</color>
(What in the world are these shadows and voices...?)
「这一切，就是你曾经活过的证明。」
"All of this is proof that you once lived."
「你的灵魂、记忆、曾走过的岁月，和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦，欧洛尼斯}它{RUBY_E#}为你揭示的，家的方向。」
"Your soul, your memories, the years you've journeyed through, and the path {RUBY_B#Time Titan, Oronyx}they{RUBY_E#} revealed, leading you back home."
「所以，前进吧。不要停下向前的脚步，不要辜负她的牺牲，还有曾经与你同行的一切——」
"So, continue onward. Do not stop moving forward, and do not let her sacrifice and the support of all who have stood by you be in vain..."
抓住人家的手，我们一起回家——！
Take my hand. Let's go home...!
At last... I knew you could do it.
你的灵魂依旧是完满的，似乎有一种引力…在尽力将它维系。
Your soul is still perfectly whole, as if some kind of force is trying its best to keep it together.
是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}最后的祝福吗？还是…只属于你的奇迹呢？
Is it {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s final blessing? Or... is it a miracle of your own?
真是…不可思议。冥冥之中，一种似曾相识的感觉涌上心头，难以言喻。
It's truly... incredible. Such a strange surge of familiarity... so hard to describe.
或许，是命运再度完成了自我实现；又或许，是{NICKNAME}阁下所熟知的、那天外世界的法则，令我们的{RUBY_B#命途}命运{RUBY_E#}早已交错……
Perhaps it is fate, once again fulfilling its own design. Or perhaps it is the laws from beyond the sky, so familiar to you, {NICKNAME}, that intertwined our {RUBY_B#Paths}fates{RUBY_E#} long ago...
…看来，这不是眼下就能解开的谜团。
...It seems that this is a riddle which cannot be solved anytime soon.
成为半神的感觉，很奇妙呢。仿佛冥河就在我灵魂深处流淌，于呼吸间化作温润世界的细雨……

The sensation of becoming a demigod is truly wondrous. It's as if the River of Souls is winding its way through the depths of my spirit, transforming with each breath into a fine rain that nourishes the world...
还记得那句预言吗？「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖。相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
Do you recall that prophecy? "At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace... there shall be eternal separation."
我对阁下承诺过，会倾尽全力为它写下另一种诠释。现在，我既已成为半神，命运迎来结局——
I promised you that I would do everything in my power to give it another meaning. Now, as I stand as a demigod and destiny draws to a close...
——我也终于能够以最美丽的姿态，为它写下句点。
I can finally end it in a way that is as beautiful as it deserves.
那求而不得的心愿，终于能够实现。在崭新的世界里，每一朵绽放的生命，都将高举起双手，诉说这一刻的意义……

The wish I once sought but could never grasp is now within reach. In this brand-new world, every blooming life will lift its arms in celebration, and recount the profound meaning of this very instant...
我们所有人的每一次触碰，每一次拥抱，将再也不会是冰冷的剥夺……
Every touch, every embrace we share, will never again be an ice-cold loss...
而要带着炙热的体温，将「爱」播撒向大地。
They will radiate with an intense warmth, sowing love far and wide throughout the land.
方才那盛大又荒唐的表演，就是你的毕生所求？
That grand and absurd performance was what you've been seeking your whole life?
我为真理舍弃一切，就是为了换来今天这一刻。
I gave up everything in search of truth, and it culminated in this very moment.
倒是你诚如我所料，面对权力的可乘之机毫不犹豫。就像……
You, on the other hand, performed as I expected. You did not hesitate when you saw the chance to attain power. It's as if you...
...Crave power like a fly craves rot.
Those are your words, not mine.
但最后的那番话…你已经知道了？我对白厄的安排。
But what you said at the end... Did you already know what I had planned for Phainon?
我失去了一只眼睛，视野却比任何人都更明朗。你人性将尽…与我这行尸走肉差不了多少了。
I may have lost an eye, but my vision is clearer than anyone else. You've nearly exhausted your humanity. You're no different from my current state as a walking corpse.
是啊，经过千年燃烧，我早已是一簇死灰。面对最后一尊大敌{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…也只有他能绽放与之匹敌的烈火。
That's true. I've long since burned to ash over the past one thousand years. Only he is capable of unleashing a raging fire that rivals our final great enemy — {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.
看来，这是最后的机会了…不妨让我们打破对彼此的芥蒂吧？
So, this is our last chance. How about we let go of the bad blood between us?
介意让我共鸣你的火种么，阿格莱雅？
May I resonate with your Coreflame, Aglaea?
这…怎么可能？仅凭如此稀薄的灵魂…你真是疯了。
That's... impossible. To persist with your soul thinned to such an extent... You're insane.
正如你能为未竟之事拖着死躯拼命前进，我也有不得不这么做的理由。
Just as you fight to lug your corpse onward to complete your unfinished goals, I have my own reasons for doing this.
在白厄成长为预言中的领袖之前，我必须维系逐火之旅，引领众人…哪怕只有一具空壳，只能前进寥寥几步。
Until Phainon grows into his position as the prophesied leader, I must continue to lead everyone on the Flame-Chase Journey. I must keep inching forward, even if only as an empty shell.
我早有预料，但没想到你已失却到这个地步……
I've long predicted this was the case, but I didn't think you'd already lost so much.
呵…何其讽刺。若你我能早些如这般交流，想必能免除不少误会吧。
Heh, how ironic. We would have avoided so many misunderstandings if you and I had just spoken this candidly before.
但抛开我们之间所有的理念差异，在这件事上，我始终与你想法一致——
But casting aside our ideological differences, there is one thing you and I agree on.
正是。他是天生的英雄，洞悉人心的能力甚至远胜于你。我能断言：他比你更胜任领袖，也只有他能完成你们的使命……
Yes. He was born to be a hero. He understands the hearts of the people, and I can confidently say he is a far better leader than you. Only he is capable of fulfilling your mission.
…可惜，他是个被{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}诅咒了的男人。不过根据我的猜想，他那穿红戴绿、花枝招展的可怕美学应该不耽误你们「再创世」。
...Sadly, he is a man cursed by {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. But by my estimates, his horribly elaborate sense of style should not impede Era Nova.
恭喜我们，在各自命运的末端达成了一样共识。
Congratulations are in order. We've found common ground at the very end of our destined paths.
你这般反应，甚至让我想收回前言了。
When you put it that way, it makes me want to take back what I said.
来欢迎我们浴火重生的大英雄，{NICKNAME}吧。
Come welcome {NICKNAME}, our great hero reborn from the ashes.
希望他没听到你刚才的评论。
I hope he didn't hear your earlier assessment.
哼，我这么批评他也不是第一天了——人贵有自知之明。
Hmph, it wouldn't be the first time I criticized him. A man should be aware of his own shortcomings.
不过…与诸位同行的人里，似乎没有遐蝶的身影。
But... I don't see Castorice among your number.
看来，她不仅为我完成了证明，也为你们完成了使命。
It looks like she not only helped me prove my theory, but helped you fulfill your mission as well.
她弄清了身世，也完成了试炼。
She finally understood her origins and completed her trial.
我相信她一直都在我们身边。
I believe she'll always be at our side.
虽无法改写宿命，却还是为自己的叙事诗写下了最后一枚韵脚……
She might not have been able to change her fate, but she still wrote the final verse of her epic herself.
吾师，请为我们吟诵神谕吧。{NICKNAME}，也请你为我们献上那枚滚烫的火种。
Trinnon, please recite the prophecy for us. {NICKNAME}, please surrender that scalding Coreflame for us as well.
你是她在大地上行走千年，亲手留住的唯一一条生命。我想…没有人比你更值得代行这高尚的职责。
You are the only life she ever saved by her own hand in her one thousand years on this earth. I believe no one is more qualified for this noble task.
看呐，已回归的，或仍在远眺的众神！今天，我等将这剖白了的灵魂带来给你。
O! Gods who have returned, and gods who are still watching! Today, we bring you a soul laid bare.
灰黯之手，塞纳托斯，它已记起了昔日的名字。它从白昼中来，并在这里步入你们的行列，回到它芬芳的居室。
The Hand of Shadow, Thanatos, remembered their name from the past! From daylight they came and to their fragrant dwelling they return, to walk now among your ranks.
而那与泰坦携手的，是一位从死者中上升，在人间更生的旅人。{M#他}{F#她}是细数岁月的黑夜，凭{M#他}{F#她}正直的名字宣告——

And there was one who joined hands with the Titan. A traveler risen from the dead and reborn among mortal kind. {M#He}{F#She} is the everlasting night and shall now proclaim in {M#his}{F#her} good name:
「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
"O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"
「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
"We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"
「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
"Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."
上前来，天外的开拓者，与*我们*一起——
Step forward, Trailblazer from beyond the sky. And together with us...
献上火种…为它在天空中刻下星辰吧。
Surrender the Coreflame and carve their star into the sky.
准确地说…是「死亡」和「生命」。
For Life and Death, to be more precise.
不，只是神性的回响…她是为了试炼而来？
No, it's only a Divine Echo. I think she's here for the trial.
That's the language of the Titans...
"...I have illuminated the cold shadow of death."
「走吧。前路将是光明，和永恒不熄的烈火。」
"Onwards. For your path to the future is bright and its flame eternal."
呵，最后还把场面搞成这样…接下来轮到我了。
Heh, she made quite a scene. I suppose it's my turn now.
什么表情，你不是也在场么？
What's with that look? You were present.
好了，尽快完成处决吧——以免奥赫玛的神圣律法蒙羞，还耽误我创造新世界。
So, let's get this execution over with. We wouldn't want to bring shame to Okhema's divine laws or keep me from creating a new world.
You never change, do you, Professor?
我不明白。如果你的理论不假，那成为泰坦的你应当没有前世的任何记忆…那成神又有什么意义？
I don't understand. If your theory is correct, you'll lose all memories of your past life once you become a Titan, so what's the point of becoming a god?
当然有。我就算真忘了自己是谁，也依旧聪明至极。
Of course there's a point. Even if I forget who I am, I'll still have my brilliant mind.
找回前世记忆？自然不在话下。况且，不还有你么？
It goes without saying I'll find a way to retrieve memories of my past life. Besides, I still have you, don't I?
你在大会上说的那番话，我还是没能消化。就算它是真的…按照记忆重塑而成的事物，也不能和原来的画等号了。
I still don't really understand what you said during the assembly. Even if it were true, things reforged from memory could never be the same as the original anyway.
那我现在就告诉你：你错了。
Then allow me to tell you right now that you're wrong.
「我们」究竟为何物？我说，黄金裔就是未来的泰坦，反之亦然，但这个答案显然只对我们有效。
What exactly are we? My answer is that the Chrysos Heirs are the future Titans, and vice versa. Of course, this answer only applies to us.
那一般人呢？对他们来说，「我们」又究竟为何物？——
So, what are "we" when it comes to regular mortals?
<color=#dbc291ff>世界的本质——灵魂——就像一粒粒微不可见的种子，记录着某人对世界本身的部分记忆。而「我们」正是种子绽出的芽，长成的参天大树。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>The very essence of the world — our souls — are tiny invisible seeds that hold records of each person's memories of the world, and "we" are the buds that sprout from these seeds to grow into great trees.</color>
不错。当我们的肉体诞生，便成为世界新的延伸。由此，我们的种子也在某人记忆中播下，并在未来播散到无数人心中。

Correct. Once our physical bodies are born, we become new extensions of the world. From there, we plant our seeds into someone's memories and then scatter them into the hearts of countless people in the future.
正如种子会受环境影响，我们的面貌也将在诸多记忆里有所不同，但我们承载的那一部分将永恒不变，因为世界本身正是如此。
Just as seeds are affected by their environment, so too will our appearances differ across memories. But the partial memories we carry will always be the same, because that is just how the world is.
要想消灭我们的存在，就得毁灭世界本身。然而，总有一人将带着他完美的记忆活下去……
To destroy our very existence, one must destroy the world itself. But we have someone who will still live on with his perfect memory...
那个人就是你，刻法勒之子——这也便是「负世之泰坦」的含义。
That person is you, child of Kephale. This is what it means to be the Worldbearing Titan.
所以，背负这个世界的全部，活下去。别让你珍重之人、别让「金织」女士失望——
So, carry everything of this world and live on. Don't disappoint those most precious to you. Don't disappoint Lady Goldweaver.
And especially don't bring dishonor to my theory.
吾师，我向你发誓：我会引领所有人在新世界重逢。
Anaxa, I swear to you. I'll lead everyone to our reunion in the new world.
言尽于此。别了，各位，来世再会。
That's all I have to say. Farewell, everyone. May we meet again in the next life.
别了，「大表演家」。愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
Farewell, Great Performer. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.
Salute him in the same way.
愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
可还算满意，尊贵的泰坦？
当然。吾在此立誓见证：神悟树庭「智种学派」的阿那克萨戈拉斯，业已战胜理性之试炼。
Very. I hereby swear I have borne witness: Anaxagoras of the Nousporists and the Grove of Epiphany has successfully overcome the trial of Reason.
Thus, I shall confer upon you these words.
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将超越至纯粹之终极，回归腐败苦黑。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall transcend the peaks of purity and return to corruption and hardship."</color>
呵，这就是所谓神谕？听起来只是把我过去、现在和未来成就的一切复述了一遍。
Oh, so that's a god's prophecy? It sounds like you just rephrased my past, present, and future.
瑟希斯啊瑟希斯，你确实不过如此。
Oh, Cerces, Cerces. Is that all you've got?
啊呀…毕竟汝已「超越至纯粹之终极」，可曾为吾留下哪怕一点余地哪？
Well, you've already "transcended the peaks of purity" and you were never the type to give me any leeway.
But I do still have one question.
说，什么问题？我们搞不好在想同一件事。
What is it? Maybe we're thinking of the same thing.
既然汝斗胆声明，吾等连同世界本身，皆凭他人记忆而生……
As you've so boldly stated, we and the world itself live on through the memories of others.
那末…最初的智种，又要在谁人的记忆中生根发芽呢？
If that is the case, whose memories did the very first Nouspore sprout from?
不过，既然你我都对此感到好奇——
But since we are both equally curious...
——那就让我们身后的诸位人子，亲自代你我一探究竟吧。
We should allow the children of humanity who come after us to investigate in our stead.
Please, I beg you, look back for me.
Death is such a sweet joy...
Just forget about all the hardships of the mortal realm.
Keep moving forward and don't look back.
前进吧，列车会和你一起。
Keep going. The Express is right here with you.
总有一天，我们的道路还会相交。
One day, our paths will cross again.
没错，向着黎明升起的方向。
That's right. Keep your eyes on the dawn.
昂首挺胸，和*我们*一起走向明天吧！
Lift your chin up high and step forward with us toward tomorrow!
前进！让我看见你的勇气。
搭档，与我一同——成为英雄吧。
Partner, we shall become heroes together!
我衷心为这场凯旋感到欣喜……
I'm gladdened by your triumphant return...
列车最初打捞起三月七时，她也是这样？
Was March 7th also in this condition when she was first rescued by the Express?
情况很相似。只是那会儿，列车上没有一位忆者能替她诊断。
Her condition was very similar. It's just that at that time, the Express did not have a Memokeeper who could diagnose her condition.
可她还是自然苏醒了。乐观点想，或许这次也有希望。
But she still woke up naturally. Looking on the bright side, that might happen this time as well.
从冰封中醒来时，三月的记忆一片空白。做最坏的打算，我决不能让同样的事发生第二次。
When March awakened from the ice, her memories were completely wiped clean. I want to prepare for the worst and prevent something like that from happening again.
还是来说说你的猜想吧？
Can you share with us your hypothesis?
虽然证据还不充分，但依现状推断……
I do not have conclusive evidence, but judging by her current condition...
三月七，<color=#dbc291ff>她的记忆或许被人劫持了。</color>
姬子小姐，试想一下，如果一个人失去了「记忆的能力」会怎样？
Think about it, Miss Himeko. What will happen when someone loses their ability to remember?
我并非生物学家。听说翁瓦克有一种鱼类，记忆容量不足一秒，过目即忘。也许会发生类似的事？

I'm not a biologist, but I hear that there's of a species of fish on Vonwacq that has the memory span of less than a second. It forgets anything that occurs in the very next instant. Perhaps something similar will happen?
很可惜，「短时记忆」和「无法记忆」是完全不同的概念。或许你难以想象……
Unfortunately, short-term memory is an entirely different concept from the inability to remember. Perhaps it is difficult for you to imagine...
失去记忆机能的个体，会变成一片空无。
But an individual who has lost their ability to remember turns into nothingness.
寰宇间的一切都能以记忆诠释，这是忆庭的信条，也是这条命途存续的动力。
The belief of the Garden is that everything in this universe can be interpreted through memories. This is the driving force behind the continuance of this Path.
「过往」由忆质构成，「未来」也是终将被转化的可能性，而「当下」…它从不真实存在，只是一种抽象的表达。
The past is made up of memoria while the future is a possibility that will eventually be converted to memoria. But the present... it doesn't really exist and is only an abstract expression.
所以，当一个人受命途影响，丧失了记忆的机能…他的实体也会受到牵连。这些冰晶，就是表征之一。
Therefore, when a person is affected by the Path and loses their ability to remember... their physical form will also be affected. These ice crystals are a manifestation of that.
…有件事我始终没有深究，黑天鹅小姐。
...Miss Black Swan, there is one thing that I haven't looked into deeply until now.
你引领我们前来翁法罗斯，却始终不愿谈及真实目的。「收集记忆」…并不是一个能让我信服的回答。
You've guided us to Amphoreus but refused to tell us your true intentions. "Collecting memories"... is simply not a convincing answer.
姬子小姐是在怀疑我么？
Is Miss Himeko suspicious of me?
无意冒犯，我只是提出一种猜想。但如果可以，我希望能得到你的坦诚。
I mean no offense. I am merely speculating. But I'd appreciate your honesty, if possible.
也就是说，到我自证清白的时间了……
In other words, now is the time for me to prove my innocence...
当然，没问题。真正的原因是：翁法罗斯有着特殊的意义，在一些秉持极端理念的忆庭成员眼中，它…是一个「完美的范例」。

That's not a problem, of course. The true reason behind my intentions is that Amphoreus holds special significance. For some Memokeepers of the Garden with extremist views, it... is a "perfect example."
一个只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界，意味着忆者拥有将其「私藏」的权利。如果那些「记忆」行者先一步掌握了翁法罗斯的奥秘……

A world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror means that Memokeepers have the right to keep the world in their private collection. If those pathstriders of Remembrance were to uncover the secrets of Amphoreus first...
他们也许会释放野心，将更多世界改造成相同的模样。
They might unleash their wild ambitions and remodel more worlds into a similar form.
你尽力游说列车来到这片星域，为的是揭开秘密，挫败这些人的阴谋？
So, the reason you did everything you could to convince the Express to come to this star zone is just to uncover the secrets and foil the plans of these people?
此前我闭口不提，是不想将各位卷入忆庭内部的纷争。
I chose to remain quiet before because I did not want to involve you in the Garden's internal conflicts.
然而，改造世界绝非易事。那些极端分子想必不是普通的命途行者，他们拥有令使的力量？
Remodeling a world is no easy feat. These extremists likely aren't just simple pathstriders. Do they wield the powers of Emanators?
不妨再大胆些，我口中的人…并非个例，而是一整个「组织」。他们早已牵上了浮黎的小指。
You can be even bolder with your guesses. The people that I'm talking about... They aren't just individuals. They are an organization that has already attached itself to the pinky finger of Fuli.
挟持三月七的人，会是他们么？
So what you're saying... Could they be the ones who hijacked March 7th's memories?
我不敢肯定。至少，他们能做到。
I cannot be certain, but at the very least, they are capable of doing so.
我对三月七的遭遇深表遗憾，但我提供的交易依旧公平。翁法罗斯仍是一处绝佳的目的地，继续调查，或许也能探明意外的真相。

I am deeply sorry about what has happened to March 7th, but the deal that I proposed still remains a fair one. Amphoreus is still an excellent destination, and investigating further might allow us to uncover the truth behind the accident.
姬子小姐，继续合作才是最明智的选择……
Miss Himeko, the wisest choice right now is for us to continue cooperating...
…我部分收回刚才的话，姬子小姐。
...Let me take back a part of what I said just now, Miss Himeko.
我们确实做了一桩交易，但我也让你们卷入了不可预见的危机中…请接受我的致歉。
Although we indeed struck a deal, it seems like I have involved you in some unforeseen danger... Please accept my deepest apologies.
<color=#dbc291ff>浮黎…祂的目光，刚刚掠过了翁法罗斯。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It's Fuli... THEIR gaze has just swept across Amphoreus.</color>
没想到小小一个窃忆者，脑袋里还藏了不少东西。
I never expected a mere Memosnatcher to be actually hiding so much inside her head.
更有趣的是，她的潜意识里也出现了「翁法罗斯」这四个字。
What's even more interesting is that the word "Amphoreus" has appeared in her subconscious.
这位女士…似乎乐在其中。她经常这样吗？
This lady... seems to be having fun. Is she usually like this?
在说什么悄悄话呢？有没有想过，我听得一清二楚？
What are you two whispering about? Has it not occurred to you that I can hear everything clearly?
失礼了，黑塔女士，介意分享您的发现吗？
Please pardon me, Madam Herta. Would you mind sharing with us what you've discovered?
哼，有求于人的是星穹列车。就算手段不那么常规，你们也得忍着。
Hmph, the ones who need help are the Astral Express. You will have to put up with my methods, even if they are rather unconventional.
言归正传，我借着第四面镜，在那窃忆者的脑子里翻了个底朝天，收获颇丰。
Let's get back to the topic. By using the Fourth Mirror, I rummaged through the brain of this Memosnatcher and learned a good deal.
「翁法罗斯」——不仅这人知道它，还有很多忆者都对那里感兴趣。
Not only does this person know of Amphoreus, but there are also many Memokeepers who are interested in the place.
我试着在她的意识库里检索，然后找到了这些词：「永恒之地」、「拒绝之地」、「忆庭的私藏」……
I searched through her consciousness and found the following terms: "The Eternal Land," "The Rejected Land," and "the Private Collection of the Garden of Recollection"...
看来，黑天鹅小姐的确有所隐瞒。
It seems like Miss Black Swan is indeed hiding some things from us.
这个神秘兮兮的翁法罗斯，既然从外部找不到有用的线索，那我干脆——登门拜访。
Since I'm not able to find any useful clues from the outside, why don't I personally visit this mysterious Amphoreus?
您要亲自前往翁法罗斯？
You're planning to head to Amphoreus yourself?
对——但不是像你们那样傻乎乎地靠肉身闯关。
Yes, but not in the flesh, like you all foolishly did.
看见了吗？黑塔魔镜，靠它们几个，我足不出户就能完成空间折跃，将自己的「数据精神体」投射到银河各个角落。
See these Herta Mirrors? With them, I can project my "data spirit entity" to any corner of the cosmos through spatial warps, without even needing to leave my room.
当然，前提是那些「角落」在星际和平通信的服务范围内。这是一项联名技术。
But of course, these "corners of the cosmos" must be within the coverage zone of Interastral Peace Communications. After all, this is collaborative technology.
原来如此。您的气质确实更加…「室内派」。
I see. You do seem like the more... "indoor" type.
虽然那片星域不在公司网络覆盖下，但列车本身也能充当一个信号基站。来，给我一个星图坐标。
Although that star zone is not within the network of the IPC, the Express itself can serve as a signal station. Come, give me the astral chart coordinates.
Then, sit back and enjoy the show.
瓦尔特将星穹列车的坐标分享给了大黑塔……
Welt shares the Astral Express's coordinates with The Herta...
第一面镜，把坐标输进去，你来负责空间折跃。
First Mirror, input the coordinates. You'll be in charge of the spatial warp.
准备工作已完成，祝您路途平安。
The preparations are complete. I wish you a pleasant journey ahead.
第二面镜，准备「思维折射」。从星穹列车到翁法罗斯天体还有一段距离，你得把我发射过去——
Second Mirror, prepare for the Thought Refraction. There's still some distance from the Astral Express to the Amphoreus celestial body. You're in charge of sending me over...
——这次记得把功率拉满，别抠抠搜搜的！
This time raise the power to the maximum. Don't be stingy!
好、好的，一定不负使命，黑塔女士……
O—Okay, I won't fail the mission, Madam Herta...
第三面镜，你来负责生成「数据精神体」吧。
Third Mirror, you're in charge of generating the "data spirit entity."
欸嘿嘿…乐意效劳，黑塔女士……
Hehehe... I'm happy to help, Madam Herta...
这一次…嘿嘿嘿…您打算用个什么形象呐？
Hehehe... What kind of appearance are you planning to use this time?
算了，就用我本人的样子吧。反正那里也没熟人。
Forget it. Just use my own appearance. There's no one there that'll recognize me anyway.
Fourth Mirror, you'll be in charge of...
好像用不着你了。原地待命吧。
It seems like I have nothing for you. Just stand by and wait for orders.
啊？又让我待命？太无聊啦……
Ah? Standing by again? That's so boring...
要不，下次您从四往下数…？
Next time, can you count down from four instead...?
有劳了，黑塔女士。「伙伴」是星穹列车的命脉。此事过后，我们一定会对您伸出的援手予以报偿。
Thank you, Madam Herta. Companions are the lifeblood of the Astral Express. When things are settled, we will repay you for all your help.
（瓦尔特…这年轻人还真有礼貌啊。）
(Welt... This young man sure is courteous.)
观看您的工作过程令我深受启发，女士。我很难想象，一位像您这样卓越的学者，平日的状态竟如此…松弛。
Madam, watching you work has been an enlightening experience for me. It's hard to imagine that an outstanding scholar like you could maintain such a... relaxed manner most of the time.
您表现出的从容不迫，正是我应当学习的特质。
Your calm and collected nature is truly a trait that I should learn.
（这小子…怎么感觉他每句话都在阴阳怪气？）
(This brat... Why does everything that comes out of his mouth sound so snarky?)
Preparation of the data spirit entity, complete.
思维折射，功率已经拉到最大。
很好——第一面镜，我们出发吧。
Excellent — First Mirror, let's get going.
Have a safe trip, Madam Herta.
May your journey yield good results.
…坐标输入完毕，准备启动空间折跃。目标：未知天体「翁法罗斯」。
...Coordinates input complete. Preparing to activate spatial warp. Destination: Unknown celestial body, Amphoreus.
空间折跃倒计时：五，四，三，二，一……
Spatial warp countdown: Five, four, three, two, one...
嚯…那就是翁法罗斯？外形还真是别具一格。
Oh... So that's Amphoreus? Its appearance is — well — sure is unique.
第二面镜，准备「思维折射」——送我进去吧！
Second Mirror, prepare for Thought Refraction — it's time to send me in!
好——请、请您仔细阅读安全协议……
Alright, p—please read the safety protocols carefully...
哎哟…没想到这么颠簸。早知道就让第二面镜把功率调低点了。
Agh... I didn't expect it to be so turbulent. I should have asked the Second Mirror to use slightly less power.
嚯…好一番壮观的景象，这就是翁法罗斯的入口吗？
Oh... What a magnificent sight. Is this the entrance to Amphoreus?
让我看看，指不定能找到什么门路呢？
Let's see. Perhaps I'll be able to find a way in?
这是什么，雕像？难看，不喜欢。
What's this? A statue? It's ugly. I don't like it.
Oh, I've finally found your... traces.
什么人能让黑塔亲自出山？准备好，你俩这辈子都要当模拟宇宙的免费劳动力了。
How esteemed must you be for the great Herta to come out personally! When we return, get ready to become free labor for the Simulated Universe for the rest of your lives.
这是什么？看着怪阴森的。
...Oh, it moves? Who are you trying to scare?
不是投影就是假人，似乎也没什么可留意的。
It's either a projection or a fake. There doesn't seem to be much to take note of.
接下来…该怎么进入翁法罗斯内部呢？
Now then... How am I going to get into Amphoreus?
向您致歉，尊贵的女士。您恐怕不能继续前进了。
My deepest apologies, esteemed lady. I'm afraid that you cannot proceed further.
您的莅临在我计算之外，却也带来了惊喜。可惜未能做足准备，以符合您身份的礼节周到款待。

Your visit, although not part of my calculations, is a pleasant surprise. It's a pity that the preparations are not yet in place to receive you with the hospitality that someone of your status deserves.
不打算回答我的问题吗？你是谁？
Are you not going to answer my question? Who are you?
身份，我有过许多，未来还会拥有更多。但若您只是需要一个称呼，不妨用我惯常的化名吧——
I have many identities, and I'm going to have even more in the future. But if you just need a form of address, you can use my common alias...
好啊，来古士——你不会觉得，我想问的是一个名字吧？
Alright, Lygus. But you can't possibly think that I'm just asking for a name, can you?
很遗憾，我并无权限为您说明更多。
Regrettably, I do not have the authority to share more information.
但标准总是灵活的。在不违反终极协议的前提下，我可以透露一条信息：如您所想，此地是「翁法罗斯」的入口。
However, standards are always flexible. While not violating the ultimate protocol, I'm able to disclose this piece of information: As you thought, this is the entrance to Amphoreus.
而现在——请回吧，女士。很遗憾，翁法罗斯不是您应当染指的世界。无论您建立过多少丰功伟绩，此地都不会轻易敞开大门。

Now, please kindly turn back. Amphoreus is not a world that you should be involved with. Regardless of what kind of magnificent achievements you have accomplished, this place will not open its doors so easily.
你似乎很了解我啊。那你应当知道，我凭什么要听你的？
You seem to understand me very well. Then you should know that I have no reason to listen to you.
您的反应正如我的计算。看来，即便经历了漫长的守望，我对人性的测算仍旧准确。在您身上，存在着美丽的求知欲。

Your reaction is completely within my calculations. Despite my long years as a watcher, it seems like my assessment of human nature still remains accurate. From you, I am able to sense a beautiful desire for knowledge.
但我的回答不会改变。女士，我以最大的善意建议您原路返回。
But my answer remains unchanged. Madam, it is with the utmost goodwill that I suggest you return to where you came from.
假设一下，来古士先生——如果我没有这么好的脾气，如果我非要瞧瞧你背后的秘密——
Let's assume for a second that I'm not so well-mannered and that I insist on uncovering the secrets hidden behind you, Mr. Lygus...
——你打算怎么消解我这任性的念头？
...How do you plan to dispel this notion of mine?
在终极协议划定的范围内，我有<unbreak>178244</unbreak>条可被用于说服您的逻辑链。
Within the scope of the ultimate protocol, there are <unbreak>178,244</unbreak> logic chains at my disposal to convince you.
而经过筛选后，我认为只需其中3条便能达成我想要的结果。
After filtering through them, I have determined that I only require three to attain the results that I desire.
其一：由于不可言说的原因，翁法罗斯是「绝对封闭」的天体。除我以外，没有任何能协助您进入其中的方法。
First: For reasons that cannot be disclosed, Amphoreus is a completely isolated celestial body. Apart from me, no one else will be able to help you enter.
其二：若您计划——正如您刚才暗示的那般——以宣战为由胁迫我与您合作，还请知晓……
Second: If your plan is — as you've alluded to previously — to force me into cooperating by showing hostility, do know that...
<color=#dbc291ff>我和您一样，也曾沐浴「智识」的瞥视，</color>并以尊严向您保证，在极端情境下，我们的毁灭互有保证。
<color=#dbc291ff>Just like you, I have basked in the gaze of the Erudition.</color> I stake my honor and assure you that in the worst-case scenario, our mutual destruction will be inevitable.
怪不得我扫描了一圈都没找着后门。你身上的安全协议…倒是和螺丝不相上下，有意思。
No wonder I couldn't find a backdoor when I did a scan of our surroundings. The safety protocols on you... are comparable to Screwy's. How interesting.
想必，您还想听听第三条逻辑链？
I assume that you still wish to hear the third logic chain?
其三：即便您能用尽各种手段，试图找到突破我的办法……
Third: Even if you exhaust all your means and find a way to break through...
但在得知此举必将导致的后果后，您也会放弃尝试。毕竟，在您漫长的人生中——即便您可能不会承认——「良知」扮演了极为重要的角色。
You will surely give up once you understand the consequences of your actions. After all, throughout your long life — as much as you'd hate to admit — your conscience has played a crucial role.
哈哈！好个大言不惭的机器人。你觉得只凭自己那点计算，就谈得上了解我了？
Haha! What a brazen robot. You think that you can actually understand me through your paltry calculations?
但话都说到这个份上了，不妨讲讲看吧：那后果是什么？
But since you've put it that way, why don't you tell me what these consequences will be?
它关乎缠绕翁法罗斯的第三条命途，也是您和您的朋友至今未能解明的那一条……
It concerns the third Path that is entangled with Amphoreus — a Path that you and your friends still very much lack understanding of...
<color=#dbc291ff>「毁灭」。</color>若您无视我的警告，一意孤行——
<color=#dbc291ff>The Destruction.</color> So, if you ignore my warnings and persist in your ways...
<color=#dbc291ff>您将打碎一位「绝灭大君」的枷锁，而它的愤怒将吞没银河。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You will break the shackles of a Lord Ravager, and when that happens, their fury will engulf the cosmos.</color>
正在众人静候「纷争」的半神从试炼中诞生时，意外也发生了。开拓小队立即随万敌深入试炼，并救出了困于其中的白厄。正当众人松了一口气时，新的问题却随之而来。

While everyone is awaiting the demigod of Strife to emerge from the trial, something unexpected happens. The Trailblaze squad immediately follows Mydei into the trial and rescues Phainon, who is trapped inside. Just as everyone breathes a sigh of relief, a new problem arises.
万敌不得不肩负起「纷争」的重任，但悬锋人也绝不会将火种拱手让给宿敌奥赫玛。为了寻求理解，他决定首先向恩师，悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯请教，二人不欢而散。

Mydei had to shoulder the burden of Strife, but the Kremnoans would never willingly give up the Coreflame to their old foe Okhema. In an attempt to gain a better understanding, he decides to first seek advice from his teacher Krateros, a veteran of Kremnos. The two part on bad terms.
与此同时，奥赫玛向神悟树庭派出以缇安、遐蝶为代表的外交使节。众人抵达时意外发现黑潮来袭，并与神秘剑士交战，但最终还是成功救出那刻夏和他身负的火种。

Meanwhile, Trianne and Castorice are dispatched to the Grove of Epiphany as diplomatic envoys of Okhema. When they arrive, they discover to their surprise that the black tide has struck, and they fight a mysterious swordmaster. In the end, they manage to rescue Anaxa and the Coreflame that he carries.
就在众人返程途中，奥赫玛城内，悬锋老将因挟持缇宁，擅闯禁地被捕。在万敌斡旋下，缇宝等人同意袒露记忆，以便实现悬锋人与奥赫玛人的和解。

While everyone is on their way back, within the city of Okhema, Krateros is arrested for abducting Trinnon and trespassing on forbidden grounds. Under Mydei's mediation, Tribbie and her sisters agree to reveal their memories in order to facilitate reconciliation between the Kremnoans and Okhemans.
不料，就在缇宝等人打算谒见「岁月」泰坦欧洛尼斯，修补记忆时，意外再次遭遇神秘剑士，缇安为保护同伴与泰坦一道陨落。为了夺回火种，众人制定了「封印」计划。

Unexpectedly, just as Tribbie and her sisters are about to meet the Time Titan Oronyx and repair their memories, they encounter the mysterious swordmaster yet again. Trianne sacrifices herself and falls with the Titan to protect her companions. In order to take back the Coreflame, everyone set up a plan to "seal" the swordmaster.
计划一波三折，但万敌以「纷争」半神之姿归来，协助众人成功夺回火种。不久后，他成功说服子民放下对宿仇的成见，便与众人告别，返回家乡，踏上对抗黑潮的前线。

The plan suffers multiple setbacks, but Mydei returns as the demigod of Strife and helps everyone reclaim the Coreflame. Not long after, he successfully persuades his people to let go of their prejudices against Okhema. He says goodbye to everyone and returns home to join the frontline against the black tide.
另一边，众人为神力耗尽、化作娃娃的缇安举行了简单的葬礼。接过缇安的遗愿，众人将在逐火之旅的道路上继续向前……

On the other side, everyone holds a simple funeral for Trianne, who exhausted her divine powers and turned into a doll. Having accepted Trianne's last wish, the group continues on the path of the Flame-Chase Journey...
于十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}到来前…去夺回你的「未来」吧……
Before the passing of fifteen {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hours{RUBY_E#}... Go forth and reclaim your future...
这便是「岁月」真正的试炼……
This is the true trial of "time"...
Alright, now that everything is ready...
镜子们，轮到你们出场了。
既已至此，还是稍安勿躁罢。
Since we've come this far, let's just wait.
格奈乌斯阁下，以及吾师，你们也是来这里问候卡厄斯的吗？
Lord Gnaeus and Miss Calypso? Are you both here to visit Khaos too?
正是，吾等已在此地等待有些时间了……
Yes, and we've been waiting for quite some time now...
最坏的情况：「负世」的重量…或许已将他压垮。
The worst-case scenario is that he's... already been overwhelmed and crushed by the Worldbearing burden.
格奈乌斯阁下，你多虑了。我能感觉到，他的魂息仍在此地盘桓。
You're overthinking, Lord Gnaeus. I can still sense Khaos' soul in the area.
况且，你我都明白卡厄斯的为人：身为救世主，他绝不会如此轻易倒下，更不会抛下他记念的一切，不是么？
And besides, we both know Khaos' nature. A Deliverer like him wouldn't fall so readily, much less give up on all that he holds dear, isn't that so?
Yes, I have faith in him.
话说回来，小玻吕茜亚，此行怎只有汝独自前来？
That reminds me. Why are you making this trip alone, Polyxia?
啊，姐姐说，她还需要些时间照看花朵……
Oh, my sister needs more time to make sure the flowers are fine...
可怜见…汝二人生来便为接过{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的权柄，却比任何人都心怀恻隐哪。
Such a pity... Both of you have hearts kinder than anyone else, yet you are born only to take over {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}'s divinity.
这一次，我所听到的一切，我所见到的一切，全都令我深感震撼——
Everything that I see and hear this time has left me shaken to the core.
这场看似平常，实则空前绝后的交谈，已经足以为我揭晓{RUBY_B#「我们」究竟为何物}瑟希斯之问{RUBY_E#}的终极答案。
What may seem like a mundane conversation is, in truth, a once-in-a-lifetime exchange that has revealed the ultimate answer to {RUBY_B#What exactly are we?}Cerces' question{RUBY_E#}.
猜想已经形成，亟需落成定理，接下来只要向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}求证即可。如此一来，我便能够解答{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的疑惑，夺回身体……

The conjecture has taken shape and must now be solidified into a theorem. Next, I only need to seek verification from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. By doing so, I can answer {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' question and reclaim my body...
...But no, I will not do that. That isn't important.
因为，我梦寐以求的另一道猜想，也在此时此刻证明完毕——
Because another one of my conjectures — one that I have always dreamed of proving — has been proven right this very instant.
<color=#dbc291ff>由凡人熔合泰坦的灵魂，取而代之…并非天方夜谭。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Fusing a mortal's soul with that of a Titan to replace said Titan... is not a ludicrous idea after all.</color>
You truly are a strict teacher.
Of course. This is how I've always been.
阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，久等了。
Sorry to keep you waiting, Lord Anaxagoras.
她已恭候多时，随我来吧。
She's been waiting. Follow me, please.
哼，渎神的学者也能来到这里？
Hmph, even blasphemous scholars can come here, it seems?
看来我在这里不受欢迎呀。
Looks like my presence here is quite unwelcome.
啊呀！那壁画上的大树…莫非是吾？
Oh my! Could it be that the Great Tree painted in this mural... is actually depicting me?
没想到您还是应了凯妮斯大人的邀请…真是太好了。
I didn't expect you to agree to Lady Caenis' invitation... What a wonderful turn of events.
说实话，对那位「金织」大人心怀怨言的人可不少……
To tell you the truth, there are many people who hold grudges against that Lady Goldweaver...
汝与那位「金织」互不对付，何不当面谈谈呢？
You seem to be avoiding that "Goldweaver" person. Why don't you address her face to face?
我跟她没什么好谈的…你在我脑子里，大可自己检索。
I have nothing to talk about with her... Since you're in my brain, you can look for the reason yourself.
哦，逐火之旅的领袖，墨涅塔的半神……
Oh... The leader of the Flame-Chase Journey and a demigod of Mnestia...
你还真检索啊，把我的脑子当成什么了？
You're really searching through my brain? What are you treating it as, some sort of toy?
尽管如此，汝对她的评价并不低，对吧？
Regardless, you think quite highly of her, no?
毕竟我是个打分公允的老师。
That's because I'm a teacher who grades everyone fairly.
来古士阁下，凯妮斯阁下，就在前面。
Lord Lygus and Lady Caenis are just ahead.
I'll take my leave for now.
诸位，欢迎来到「半神议院」。
Welcome to the Demigod Council, esteemed guests.
我曾有幸和你的老师恩贝多克利斯一同探讨「敬拜学派」的文章。
I was fortunate enough to have the opportunity to discuss a treatise about the Venerationists with your teacher, Empedocles.
但那刻夏阁下属于「智种学派」？我听闻那是反对者众多的一派。
Yet, it seems you subscribe to the Nousporists instead, Lord Anaxa? I've heard that this school of thought is one with many detractors.
有支持和反对很正常，就像世间也分贤才和笨货。
It's normal for ideas to have supporters and dissenters, just like how there are two types of people in this world — geniuses and dimwits.
在久远的神话里，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}曾在神山上回答信众们的发问。
A bygone myth tells of an occasion where {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} once answered their followers' questions on the peak of the holy mountain.
所以，信众将登上泰坦断崖视为一种与神同行的方式。
Their followers have since believed that scaling this Titan cliff is one way of being with the god.
听见了吗？走吧，与{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}登山同行，机会难得，汝当吟唱赞歌。
Hear that? It's not every day that you get to climb a mountain with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. You should sing me a hymn of praise.
如果真如我所想…那可就太有意思了。
If this is indeed as I thought... then this will be very amusing.
又见面了…你们应该不介意多个听众吧？
So, we meet again... I'm sure you wouldn't mind a snooping ear?
(Hmph. Doesn't matter... I can do this myself.)
（看来已经非常近了…死者的疆域。）
(Looks like I'm nearly there now... The land of the dead.)
"O beautiful old world, where are you now?"
"O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!"
「光辉灿烂的众神曾行于我们所行之道，」
"Splendid gods once walked the paths we walk."
「哎，那温暖的一切只留下了幻影缥缈。」
"Alas, all that's left of that warmth is a hazy mirage."
那不是「穿着华服的大地兽」吗？
Isn't that the "dromas draped in finery"?
…别对上眼了，我可不认识渎神者。
...Avoid his gaze. I don't acquaint myself with blasphemers.
你放心，人家心高气傲，瞧不上咱们。
Don't worry, he's too full of pride to pay us any attention.
连外号也是大地兽？汝是真的喜欢大地兽。
Your nickname is "dromas" as well? You must really like those creatures.
恩贝多克利斯的学生？我听说他的观点和「敬拜学派」截然相反。
A student of Empedocles? I hear that his views run counter to the Venerationists.
学者是这样的，有不同才会有碰撞，有碰撞才会有进步。
This is what being a scholar is about: A collision of ideas only occurs when there are differences in beliefs, and it is such collisions that lead to progress.
但在我看来，只有正确的观点和错误的观点，二者不可共存。
Yet in my view, there are only right and wrong perspectives, neither of which can coexist with the other.
非黑即白，看来这就是人子们争来争去的原因。
What radical thinking... I guess this is why the children of humanity always squabble with each other.
只是在感叹，这株参天巨树就是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神躯？真是壮观。
Just amazed at how this towering tree is {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s divine body. It's a majestic sight.
这样吗？我反倒觉得，你一点也不惊讶。感觉丹宝对「环绕大树的城池」很熟悉？
Is that so? You don't look the slightest bit amazed, though. Plus, you seem to be strangely familiar with the city around the Great Tree...?
...Merely something from the past that I won't go in to.
旧事啊…第一次仰望{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}时，我也是个孩子。它的枝叶反射着星星的光，躯干仿佛是天地的支柱。

Events of the past, huh... I was also a child when I looked up at {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Their leaves and branches reflected the sparkling stars, and their trunk was like a pillar that supported the sky and ground.
当年，我就站在这里，幻想自己有朝一日能到树顶上去，那里是离「天空」最近的地方。
I stood at this very spot back then, imagining the day when I could climb to the top of this tree... Because I would be the closest I can be to the sky at that spot.
你身为「天空」祭司，却在「理性」泰坦的栖息地求学，似乎有些违背直觉。
You're a Sky Priest, yet you study at a place that is home to the Reason Titan... That's rather counterintuitive.
原因没那么复杂，凡人哪够得到{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的国度呢？它和瑟希斯不同，是严厉而不近人情的神明，「理性」愿与他人分享，但「天空」…只需要人们的敬畏。

Don't read too much into it. I mean, can mortals even hope to reach {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} realm? They're a strict and draconian god, nothing like {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Reason is willing to share what is theirs with others, but Sky... only expects people to revere them.
丹宝也能理解吧，毕竟，把你和{NICKNAME}囚禁在翁法罗斯的泰坦…就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。
You get what I'm saying, right Dannie? After all, the Titan that imprisoned you and {NICKNAME} here in Amphoreus is none other than {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} themself...
我也没想到，竟会在无意中成为一位本地神的眼中钉。
Yes, I didn't count on provoking the ire of a local god.
但总有地上的人怀抱着飞向天空的梦想。树庭不乏对{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的研究，这也是我们此行的目的。
But there will always be people who dream of soaring toward the sky. The Grove has a wealth of research on {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, and that is exactly what we are here for.
只是…临行前，灰宝却遇上了那种麻烦…我身为医师，本该陪在{M#他}{F#她}身旁的。
It's just... I never thought Grayie would meet with something like that before we set off... As a physician, I should have been there by {M#his}{F#her} side.
祸不单行也无可奈何。你还要为阿格莱雅查清树庭之灾的始末，总得走这一趟。路上多替{NICKNAME}留意下「死亡」泰坦的文献吧，也算不虚此行。

Bad luck tends to come in streaks, so don't beat yourself up over it. Besides, Aglaea needs you here to uncover the truth behind what happened to the Grove. Let's just make the most out of this trip and keep a lookout for any documents related to the Death Titan. They could be useful to {NICKNAME}.
嗯，落在肩头的重担又多了一桩呢。
Yeah... There's no rest for the weary, huh.
偌大的树庭，不知要找的东西都分散在哪儿。我们分头行动吧，相信以丹宝的身手，黑潮造物也伤不到你。

In any case, what we're looking for could be anywhere in this enormous Grove. Let's split up to cover more ground. Dannie, with your skills, I'm sure those monsters born of the black tide will pose no threat to you anyway.
What about you? Will you be alright on your own?
我可是「昏光庭院」的首席，你说这话，会不会太小瞧人家了？
Hehe, have you forgotten that you're talking to the chief physician of the Twilight Courtyard? Have more faith in me. I'll be just fine!
...The silence in here is near deafening.
这学府存放的知识堪比一座森林，最聪明的学者也会在其中迷路。出发前，要再整理下思路么？

With the vast amount of knowledge it holds, this academy is akin to a labyrinth of information... Even the cleverest of scholars would easily lose their way in here. I should gather my thoughts before heading in.
（艾格勒，统治天空的泰坦。神话中，它被描述为一只长有百眼、俯瞰世界的巨鸟。只要它依旧飞翔于云端，翁法罗斯人就无法离开地面……）

(In the myths, Aquila, the Titan who reigns over the domain of the skies, is a colossal bird that overlooks the world beneath them with a hundred eyes. As long as they continue to soar above the clouds, the people of Amphoreus will remain trapped on the ground...)
（风堇的先祖是信仰{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的祭司，她对「天空」的禁忌了解最深。另外，阿格莱雅派她做向导，也有为将来的试炼做准备的意思吧。）

(Hyacine's forebears were priests who worshiped {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Nobody is more familiar with the taboos of the Sky Titan than her. Seeing how Aglaea has sent her here as a guide, it's possible that she plans to have Hyacine take on a trial in the future.)
（在翁法罗斯，「泰坦」是绕不开的话题。人们创造了神话，神话又塑造了他们…身在其中，总是很难保证客观。）
(In Amphoreus, Titans are a common topic of discussion. People create myths that, in turn, conceive Titans... It's a tricky task to keep an objective view when among the people of Amphoreus.)
（有办法换个视角，跳出来思考么？）
(Is there a way to step out of the situation and look at it from a different perspective?)
（泰坦与星神，二者截然不同。前者能与人对话，能被人战胜，甚至能在陨落后，由人类接替神职。）

(Titans and Aeons are two distinct classes of beings. Titans can communicate with us humans, and it is not impossible for us to overpower them. Upon their demise, we can even take over their divinity.)
（这么一看，和遥远的星神相比，泰坦与人类的距离…要近得多。）
(In this regard, Titans can be said to be a lot more similar to humans than Aeons are...)
（黄金裔是具备英雄资质的人，大多身手不凡，拥有超人的力量。而通过火种试炼的黄金裔，更会荣升「半神」，接管泰坦的权能……）

(Chrysos Heirs are humans who possess heroic qualities, with most of them demonstrating extraordinary combat prowess and strength. Upon clearing a Coreflame trial, a Chrysos Heir can even ascend to a demigod and inherit a Titan's divinity...)
（奇怪，总有一种违和感。这是什么…筛选机制么？）
(Wait, something about that feels off. Is this a... selection process of some sort?)
The Flame-Chase Journey and the prophecy...
（在神谕的指引下，英雄们走在猎取火种的道路上，以「再创世」为目标，迄今为止，已经取得了不少成果。）
(Guided by the prophecy, the heroes are on a quest to reclaim Coreflames and usher in the Era Nova. Their efforts have seen gratifying results to date.)
（果然，最难以解释的还是这道「神谕」。但眼下线索太少，思考也得不出结果，先搁置一旁吧。）

(As I expected, the prophecy is the hardest to make any sense of. But with barely any information to go on, no matter how much I ruminate on it, it won't yield any results... I should leave this for another time.)
(I should probably turn my attention to something else.)
（{NICKNAME}…谁能想到，早在降落翁法罗斯时，{F#她}{M#他}就已经遭遇不测。）
(Nobody could've ever imagined that {NICKNAME}'s life would be forfeited the moment we landed on Amphoreus...)
（没能保护好{F#她}{M#他}，是我的失职…但还有一线希望。翁法罗斯独特的死生规则，如今反倒成了救命稻草。）

(I should have done more to keep {M#him}{F#her} safe... but it's not too late. We still have a fighting chance. The unique rules that govern life and death on Amphoreus might just work in our favor and save {M#him}{F#her}.)
（以树庭藏书之广博，会有类似记载吗？希望有吧……）
(The Grove is a veritable library of knowledge... Maybe they'll have records on a similar case? Please let there be one...)
Enough musing for now. It's time to move.
时间紧迫，还是尽快动起来吧。且行且看。
The clock is ticking... I should search for clues as I move.
黑色的怪物姿态扭曲，生命已随着灵魂一同化作死灰，无法辨认其生前的模样。
Black monsters are twisted in form, and their life has turned to ash together with their souls. It's impossible to figure out their form when they were still alive.
黑潮造物的遗骸。近距离看，的确和泰坦眷属有所不同。
These are... the remains of a black tide monster. It does look different from the Titankin from up close.
它的身下…压着什么东西？卷轴么。
What's that underneath it...? A scroll?
果然，谈论「天空」在树庭算不上禁忌。这两位学者在争论的「天舟」，记得阿格莱雅审讯时也提到过，不是什么愉快的回忆。

As I expected, the Grove doesn't forbid discussions about the Sky. It's a debate between two scholars about the skyships... Aglaea also made mention of the ships when she interrogated us... a memory I'd rather forget.
先收着这份记录吧。希望此行不会空手而归。
I'll hold onto this for now. With any luck, this journey won't leave us empty-handed.
风堇…？怎会有那么多敌人？…虽然没有小看她的意思，但还是去搭把手吧。
That's... Hyacine? Why is she surrounded by so many monsters? ...As much faith as I have in her, it's probably a good idea to help her out there.
哎呀，这可真是…麻烦远比想象得多呢。
Really now? This is way more trouble than I could've asked for.
嗯…或者，就这么看着也可以？
Hm... Or you could sit back and watch?
…一时分不清你是开玩笑还是认真的，这也是深不可测的一种体现吧。
I can't tell if you're serious or not... But being hard to read isn't without its perks, I suppose.
当然是开玩笑的。拜托啦丹宝，我们上吧——
Hehe, I'm kidding, Dannie! Lend me a hand, pretty please? Alright, now let's get them!
发生什么了？这里已是一片废墟，不该有这么多敌人才对。
This place is practically in ruins. What happened? There shouldn't be this many monsters here.
可能…是因为我吧。黑潮对翁法罗斯的「光明」格外敏锐，也许是天空祭司的赐福吸引了它们。
The black tide is remarkably quick to detect the light of Amphoreus, so I... or rather, the blessings of the Sky Priest in me, might have unknowingly called them to me.
先不说这个，给——我在附近发现的，你可能会感兴趣。
Anyway, never mind that for now. Here, you might want to have a look at this. I found it around here and thought it might be of interest to you.
阿那克…萨戈拉斯，是那位与「理性」火种合为一体的学者。
Anaxa... goras. He's the scholar who fused himself with the Coreflame of Reason.
连我也不知道，原来那刻夏老师进行过「天空」的研究。他从未提起此事。
This is new. I didn't know Professor Anaxa was researching the Sky. He's never mentioned anything about it.
听白厄说，他可能会站在逐火之旅的对立面。
Phainon said Anaxa might be opposed to the Flame-Chase Journey.
说「可能」有些委婉了。老师一向不敬神明，对神谕也持否定态度，即便在自由的树庭，他也被视作异端。

"Might" is an understatement. Anaxa has never been one to venerate the gods, nor has he ever found it within himself to put any faith in the prophecy. People have come to think of him as a heretic, even in a place as liberal as the Grove.
但偏偏是这样一位「渎神者」，却成了{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神选。命运真是捉摸不透啊。
Yet, it is also this very "blasphemer" that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} favors. Fate sure works in mysterious ways.
我在路上也找到一份卷轴，似乎和你手中的有些关联。
I picked up a scroll on my way here, too. It looks like it may be related to the one you're holding.
Oh? Let me have a look.
风堇将两份记录拼凑到一起……
看来这两份记录，是同一场景下的前后两段对话。
By the looks of them, these scrolls are records of two conversations that took place in the same setting, one after the other.
我对树庭还不够了解，方便问几个问题么？
There's still much I don't know about the Grove. Do you mind if I ask you a few questions?
神悟树庭有七大学派，虽然都是围绕「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯的理念建立的，但彼此间各有不同，其中「敬拜学派」是最为敬奉泰坦的一支。

The Grove of Epiphany is home to seven schools of thought. While all seven schools are founded on the ideologies of Thalesus the First Scholar, each is unique in its own way. Among them, the Venerationists revere and worship the Titans the most.
尤绪弗罗老师是「敬拜学派」的贤人，总是和那刻夏老师针锋相对。
As the sage of the Venerationists, Euthyphro has always been at loggerheads with Anaxa.
如果把七贤人都放到{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天平上，一端是那刻夏，另一端一定得放上尤绪弗罗才能保持平衡吧。
If we were to place the Seven Sages on the scales of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, Anaxa and Euthyphro would be placed on opposite sides to achieve balance.
很形象的描述，我完全理解了。
A very illustrative explanation. Thank you.
Was it a mistake to build the skyships?
如今，几乎每一个翁法罗斯人都知道「天舟」的故事。{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的身躯比天空更伟岸，它的神罚是如此无情。
Nearly everyone in Amphoreus has heard the story of the skyships by now. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s stature is loftier than the heavens, and their divine retribution is merciless.
所以，建造大型航天器是行不通的。嗯…不知道威力乘以一百倍的缇宝小火筒能不能骗过它的眼睛。
That's why it's no use building giant sky-faring ships... Oh, but I do wonder if a supercharged mini Tribbie cannon could slip past their watch?
What is Anaxa's field of study?
「智种学派」，核心课题是藉由炼金术达成对「灵魂」的修补。
Nousporists primarily study the application of alchemy in soul repair.
虽然被视作渎神者，但那刻夏本人从不避讳宣扬理念。要说有什么秘密…也只有他眼罩下的样子了。

Everyone considers Anaxa a blasphemer, but that has never stopped him from sharing his ideas, no matter how taboo. If you must say that he's hiding something... then it's likely what lies beneath his eye patch.
I don't have any more questions.
所有「错误」的尝试，都是更接近「正确」的一步…老师常把这句话挂在嘴边。
Anaxa often says that... "Every failure brings us one step closer to the truth."
也许在他看来，天舟的坠毁具有另一重意义：天幕并非不可突破，正因它迈出了关键的一步，才会招致神罚。

Perhaps, to him, the crash of the skyship carries a different interpretation. The firmament is not impenetrable. On the contrary, it was precisely because the skyship represented the first step toward breaking free from the shackles of the earth that it provoked the wrath of the Sky Titan and brought divine punishment upon itself.
可惜，树庭对{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的研究仍以「敬拜学派」为主，大多是些祭祀的仪式。对更外侧的探讨，在天舟一事后越发式微，连这份卷轴我也是第一次看见。

It's a shame that the majority of the Grove's research on {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} was headed by the Venerationists, with sacrificial rituals making up a predominant part of their findings. Discourse about more esoteric subject matters in relation to {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} dwindled even further after the skyship incident, so much so that even this scroll is completely new to me.
没关系，眼下先回收针对泰坦的研究就好。
Don't worry about it. We'll just collect everything we can find on the Titans for now.
我更好奇另一件事：这里提到，那刻夏在进行某种秘密实验？
There's something else that's caught my attention, though... This says that Anaxa is conducting secret experiments of some sort?
我也很在意…有什么研究，是连我这个讲师助理都不知情的？
That's what I'd like to know. What are these experiments he's involved in? Even I, the assistant lecturer, know next to nothing about them...
这里是树庭的藏书处，友爱之馆。
This is the Library of Philia, a place where the Grove stores its collection of tomes.
七大学派的著述此处均有收藏，还囊括了外邦的哲学、诗歌、信仰书籍…据说向树庭求取智慧的城邦，都要献上等价的知识。

Other than books written by the seven schools, you can also find philosophical texts, ballads, and religious writings from the outlands here. Cities that desired to learn from the Grove were apparently expected to contribute knowledge of equal value to what they sought.
历史上还发生过不少令人哭笑不得的事。据说「赤陶学派」曾向某位作家借取原稿，最后归还的却是副本，而真迹则被悄悄藏在这里。

We've had more than our fair share of hilarious episodes over the years. For instance, it's said that the Erythrokeramists once borrowed a manuscript from a certain author but ended up returning a copy instead of the original! What's more, the original manuscript was supposedly then hidden here.
That... doesn't seem like a nice thing to do.
嗯？不用这么委婉的…简直是强盗一般的行径呢！
Nice? No need to hold yourself back, Dannie. You can just tell it like it is: Their behavior was no different from bandits!
那，树庭「打劫」过悬锋城么？
Well, if you don't mind: Did the Grove ever rob Castrum Kremnos?
这我就不知道了。有人说悬锋城连字典都没有，也许有幸逃过一劫吧。
You've got me there. Some said you couldn't even find a dictionary in Castrum Kremnos, so I guess they were spared.
友爱之馆的书目过于庞杂，一卷卷翻阅不现实。我们用藏书石版检索出需要的资料，统一带回奥赫玛研究吧。

There are too many books in the Library of Philia. Flipping through them all will take too long. Why don't we use the biblioslate to search for the texts we need? We can bring them back to Okhema for reading after that.
此地危险，也不适宜久留。
Agreed, this place isn't safe. We should leave as soon as we're done.
地上还有些散落的卷轴。在你操作时，我四下检查一遍。这样应该不会有遗漏了。
There are still several more scrolls strewn all over the place. I'll gather them while you pull up those texts, this way, nothing will be overlooked.
一本被众多学者密密麻麻批注过的书，书名为《诡辩术：提升辩论技巧的四十种方法》。
A book covered in annotations from many scholars. Its title is The Art of Sophistry: 40 Ways to Improve Your Debating Skills.
大致翻阅了一遍，被重点圈出的方法包括虚拟原因、虚假前提、矛盾转换、名实混一、讹误断句、移花接木、以全概偏等等。

You skim through it, and the highlighted methods include virtual causation, false premises, contradiction conversion, conflating prevarication and reality, misinterpreted punctuation, misattribution, and generalizing specificity, among others.
其中夹杂着学者们的感叹：「醍醐灌顶了，语言的艺术学无止境」，「学不会诡辩，至少可以学点诚实之人的的防身术」，等等。

Amidst it are scholars' exclamations: "A true eye-opener, the art of language knows no bounds," "If I can't master sophistry, I can at least learn to defend myself against them as an honest man," and so on.
最后一条方法是…「实在不行，付诸武力」。
The last resort is... "When all else fails, employ brute force."
...This isn't going to be of any help, that's for sure.
一名「山羊学派」学者申请的多个研究课题，及学派贤人对其研究课题的回复结果……
A record of the many research topics a Caprist scholar had applied for, and the replies from their school's Sage about these topics...
课题一：发现许多以寿命长著称的奇兽实际上生活在奇兽出生和死亡记录管理不善的地方，申请研究。回复：缺乏研究意义，暂不批准。

Topic 1: A discovery that many mythical beasts renowned for their longevity actually reside in areas with poorly managed birth and death records for such creatures. Permission to research. Reply: Lacks research significance, not approved.
课题二：树庭内有真正的植物在模仿相邻近的仙女木的生长趋势，申请研究。回复：这是「莲食学派」的研究方向，暂不批准。

Topic 2: An observation of real plants within the Grove imitating the growth patterns of nearby White Dryads. Permission to research. Reply: Falls under the domain of the Lotophagist school, not approved.
课题三：将会飞的鸟儿置入火筒以指导火筒飞行方向的可行性，申请研究。回复：过于异想，暂不批准。
Topic 3: Investigating the feasibility of placing flying birds into rocket tubes to guide the direction of the rocket's flight. Permission to research. Reply: Too fanciful, not approved.
…接下来的课题越来越五花八门，唯有回复的结果不变。
...The subsequent topics grew increasingly eclectic, yet the outcome of the replies remained unchanged.
这种锲而不舍的精神…但愿能帮助他从黑潮中幸存。
Impressive tenacity... Hopefully it helped him survive the black tide.
这是众学者们针对「渎神者」阿那克萨戈拉斯的投诉信，积累了厚厚一沓。
These are complaint letters from the scholars about Anaxagoras "The Blasphemer." There's a thick stack of letters.
根据积攒的灰尘和完好的封装来看，被投诉者根本没有把它们打开过，随手丢弃在了角落里。
Based on the dust accumulated and the perfectly intact seals, the complainee did not even bother opening them and just chucked them aside into a corner.
似乎是那刻夏的资料？值得注意，风堇也应该来看看。
This is... about Anaxa? I should read this. Hyacine, you should come have a look, too.
咳咳，好多灰尘…这些都是他收到的投诉信吗？
Ack, it's so dusty in here... Whoa, are these all complaints about him?
不用打开也知道，里头一定是「那刻夏不敬神明，其人的存在就是对社会秩序的威胁」…诸如此类。
I can already see what they must have written: "Anaxa has no respect for the gods! His very existence undermines order in our society!" ...They're probably all things like that.
Does Anaxa hold that much influence?
不然怎么会被称作「大表演家」呢？据说老师创立学派后的第一件事，就是当着所有人的面宣读自己的著作——
Why else would they call him "the Great Performer"? When Anaxa established his school of thought, the first thing he apparently did was read his own work to everyone.
「至于泰坦，它们真的符合凡人对神的认知？神造的世界必定是完美的，可翁法罗斯却遍布愚钝和丑陋！」

"Are the Titans truly an accurate reflection of what humans think gods should be? Worlds created by gods are indubitably perfect, but what of Amphoreus? Only foolishness and insensitivity everywhere you turn!"
他没能讲完，就被押上了审判台。
They marched him straight to the seat of judgment before he could finish.
说是审判，其实是辩论。他需要一一回应学者们的控诉，否则就要被逐出树庭。
Though what he took on in the end was more a debate than an actual trial. He had to address every one of the scholars' allegations, or face expulsion from the Grove.
第一项控诉是：咳咳——「你是否同意泰坦们塑造了天地，山川海洋便是它们的杰作？」
The first allegation was... ahem. "Do you agree that since the Titans created the heavens and earth, so the mountains, rivers, and seas must likewise be their creations?"
…是要我站在那刻夏的立场作出回答吗？
...Am I supposed to put myself in Anaxa's shoes and answer that?
依照神话所述，海洋、天空、大地都是泰坦的造物，确凿无疑。
As told in the myths, the seas, the skies, and the earth are all, beyond the shadow of a doubt, creations of the Titans.
如果老师也能这样回答，恐怕就不用受难了。但他却以逐火的历史为例，宣扬人类也有接过神权的可能性。

Anaxa would've probably been spared a lot of trouble if he had answered this way... Instead, he quoted past instances of the Flame-Chase Journey and posited that humans have the potential to take over the divinity of Titans.
从逐火的历史来看，人类也有接过神权的可能性。
Based on the history of the Flame-Chase Journey, humans have the potential to take over the divinity of Titans.
这也是老师当时的观点。
Anaxa said the same thing then.
反对者自然对这个回答很不满意，于是便有了第二项控诉。
Needless to say, his critics didn't take kindly to his answer, so they followed up with a second allegation.
「你以研究灵魂之名玷污灵魂，进行神所憎恶的交易，你是否承认？」
"You claim to be studying souls, yet you are, in fact, defiling them and committing acts condemned by the gods. Do you admit it?"
相当严肃的指控，他还做过这种事？
That's a serious allegation. Did he really do that?
老师永远戴着眼罩，连独处时都不摘下，有人说他是把一只眼睛用作了炼金材料。
Anaxa always wears an eye patch, never removing it, even when alone. Some say he used one of his eyes as an alchemical ingredient.
世间的人都由{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}庇护，尤其是沐浴神血的黄金裔。倘若真有此事，无疑是亵渎神明。

Every being in the world owes their safekeeping to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, and this is even more so for the Chrysos Heirs who have divine blood coursing through them. If he has really done something of that nature, then it'd indeed be sacrilegious.
幸好，因为没有证据，这项控诉最终不了了之。
Thankfully, they had no way to prove it, so it amounted to nothing more than an allegation in the end.
老师就这么舌战群儒，与挑战者一一辩论。直到最后，一位学者问他：「阿那克萨戈拉斯，你是否不敬神灵？」
One by one, Anaxa engaged in wars of words against those who would challenge him. Toward the end, a scholar asked him, "Anaxagoras, have you any respect for the gods?"
他沉默了几秒，回答道：「我从不否认泰坦应是伟大之物。」
It was only after a brief silence that he answered, "I have never denied that Titans are meant to be noble constructs."
显然话里有话。他的潜台词是，泰坦并不伟大。
What he didn't say — that the Titans are not noble — rings louder in this case.
嗯…我不知道那场骚动是如何平息的，但老师最终还是留在了树庭。即便被视作异端，他也在继续自己的研究。

Yes... I'm not sure how that controversy was eventually resolved, but what's for certain at least is that Anaxa was allowed to stay in the Grove where he continued his research, despite being regarded as a heretic.
对了，这沓投诉信提醒了我，树庭里还有个地方，或许存在石版中都查不到的线索……
By the way, this stack of complaint letters has reminded me of a place in the Grove... We may find clues there that aren't on the teleslate.
根石之间，那刻夏老师的炼金实验室。
I'm talking about Anaxa's alchemy lab, hidden between the cornerstones.
以树庭的藏书风格，竟会有这种眼皮底下的遗漏？
Given the Grove's meticulous approach to archiving, could there really be such an oversight right under their noses?
这是个秘密：七贤人除去首席虚设，其余列位各自享有一处禁地，供他们在遐思之余，进行不会被干扰的研究。
It's a well-kept secret. Among the Seven Sages, excluding the nominal Chief Sage — each has a private sanctuary where they can conduct research undisturbed in their free time.
就连友爱之馆的管理员也不能越过禁令，收录贤人的课题。不过现在……
Even the administrators of the Library of Philia are restricted from accessing those places and documenting the sages' research. But...
树庭都成这样了，小小打破一下禁令也没事吧…对不住啦那刻夏老师。
With the Grove in this state, I'm sure Anaxa won't be mad even if we sneak into the lab for a short while... Right?
我们到了，不过…这里居然什么都没有了？
This is the place, but... where is everything?
炼金材料，法阵图样，甚至禁令的封印也不在了…难道都被黑潮摧毁了？
Materials for alchemical experiments, matrix diagrams, and even the seal to the lab... They're all gone. Did the black tide destroy it all?
难怪，这一路连点像样的防备都没有。
No wonder we didn't see any defense mechanisms along the way.
Have you ever been here before?
没有，甚至从未接近过。炼金是高危活动，那刻夏老师又钟情古怪的材料。学生们经常见他好好地进去，却灰头土脸甚至满脸炸毛地出来，自然不敢靠近这里。

No, not even close. Not only are alchemy experiments high-risk activities, but Professor Anaxa also has a penchant for using bizarre materials. Students often saw him walk in looking right as rain but come out covered in soot with his hair singed. Naturally, no one dared to come near this place.
…咦？唯独那边的书柜，保存得很完整呢。
Huh? That bookshelf over there seems to be the only thing still intact.
这是阿那克萨戈拉斯申请调取的资料。数份不同领域的资料被收纳于一处，其中包括「泰坦造物」、「灵魂的普遍性」、「炼金学说」…不一而足。

These are the materials requested by Anaxagoras. Documents from various fields have been compiled in one place, including "Titan Creations," "The Universality of the Soul," "Alchemy Doctrine," and so on.
大部分资料看起来仍然属于「智种学派」的研究范围，不过，一份名为「黄金裔背景考察」的手记，夹杂在其中。
