Most of the materials look to be within the research domain of the Nousporist school of thought. However, a document titled A Study on the Chrysos Heirs' Background is mixed within.
这是怎么回事…奥赫玛的大家，还有我？连我也在老师的研究范围内？
What's going on...? Anaxa is conducting research on our friends in Okhema and... me?
这份手记，有不少值得细究的地方——
This journal contains several intriguing points...
从命运重渊到悬锋城，我已见过许多泰坦造物，树庭里也有不少{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}创造的生灵。
From the Abyss of Fate to Castrum Kremnos, I've seen many a Titan creation during my time in Amphoreus. Lifeforms created by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} can also be found in the Grove.
可是通过炼金术将它们与人的灵魂融合？我很难想象……
But fusing them with human souls through alchemical means? I can't even begin to imagine...
那刻夏格外关注黄金裔流淌的「神性」，还对英雄们的背景做了细致考察。
Anaxa seems to hold special interest in the divinity coursing through the Chrysos Heirs' veins, and has even conducted a thorough investigation into the heroes' backgrounds.
如果只有蝶宝还不奇怪，她也对自己的出身感到好奇。智种学派炼制的药剂中也有疗愈疾病的万能药，研究长生的黄金裔合情合理。

It wouldn't have been so strange if he had focused only on Cassie, given her own curiosity about her origins. Plus, considering that the Nousporists have crafted omnipotent medicines capable of curing diseases, it also makes sense that he would conduct research on immortal Chrysos Heirs.
可现在看来，老师的目标绝不是制药，是在究明「金血」的由来与原理？
But now, it seems Anaxa's objective was never to create medicine but to identify the origin of the golden blood and figure out its inner workings.
那刻夏想通过炼金，让黄金裔体内的「金血」更加纯粹，以至抵达神性。
Through alchemy, Anaxa aims to refine the golden blood in the Chrysos Heirs to a degree of purity equal to "divinity."
这就是「趋近于至纯」的含义吧。可是…将泰坦造物和人体都视为炼金的材料，未免有些太过疯狂了。
This must be what he means by "close to true purity." But... treating both Titan creations and the human body as materials to be used in alchemy experiments? That's rather extreme.
丹宝，我有一种不太好的预感。你看这里……
Dannie, look at this. I have a bad feeling about this...
最担心的事情…果然还是发生了。一路看下来，我的猜想也在慢慢成型。
My biggest fear... It's come true... After going through his notes, I think I can piece it all together now:
那刻夏老师，在进行「灵魂炼成」的研究。
Anaxa was carrying out experiments on soul transmutation.
如果我没理解错，是通过炼金术将人的灵魂重新炼成？
Do you mean he's trying to reconstruct human souls alchemically?
这就是老师的秘密研究，不能为其他人所知的亵渎实验。比起他在公众面前的发言，这才是真正的「渎神」……
Yes, this is what he was secretly conducting research on — something he had to keep hidden from others. Compared to his public speeches, this is the real "blasphemy"...
Ah! I just thought of something...
你还记得吗？黑潮抵近时，树庭本打算转移{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，可中途遭遇意外，那刻夏老师也以身殉道……

Do you remember? When the black tide was approaching, the Grove had planned to send {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame to a safe place, but an accident happened along the way, and Anaxa lost his life in the process...
但{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}征用了他的身躯，令那刻夏「死而复生」，才造成了如今的局面。
But {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} took over his body and "resurrected" him, which led to the situation we're in now.
没错。可如果…那刻夏老师与「理性」火种的结合，并不是一场「意外」呢？
That's right... but what if Professor Anaxa's fusion with the Coreflame of Reason wasn't an accident?
如果你是他，在黑潮逼近，眼看自己生命无多的情况下…一定会采取的行动是什么？
Put yourself in his shoes. Knowing that the black tide was closing in and your time was running out, what would you have done?
…亲手实践这些猜想，不计代价。
...I'd put my theories to the test, no matter the cost.
对。<color=#dbc291ff>在黑潮入侵时，老师前往启蒙王座的真正目的…是打算施行炼成，将自身与泰坦的火种熔合。</color>
Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>When the black tide came, the true reason Anaxa headed to the Luminary Throne was... to transmute and fuse himself with the Titan's Coreflame.</color>
不，从事后的反应来看，现状应该在老师预料之外。可能他也没想到{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}会做出相似的决定。
No. Judging from how he reacted after the event, the results came as a surprise. Maybe he failed to consider the possibility that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would make a similar decision.
炼金术式的手稿被带走了，说明他的研究仍在继续……
The manuscripts detailing all the alchemical formulae have been taken away. His research... is still ongoing.
Could he have taken them for other purposes?
可是，用来做什么呢？留在世间的泰坦，也只剩下……
Like what? There's only one Titan left in the world now—
「应掌握造物的原理，令万物诞生时即为完美的状态」…如今那刻夏身在奥赫玛，他的目标……
"To conceive an entity of perfection, one must first understand the principles of creation"... If Anaxa is in Okhema now, then that means...
老师，我们看到的这片天空是假的，对吧？
Sir, this sky above us... It's not real, is it?
当然，是假的。这只是教学装置，不起眼的魔术。
Of course not. This is just an image from a projection device used for educational purposes. A simple trick.
如今昼夜失序，为了方便你们理解星空，天文学者借助泰坦神迹，变换光线，将「过去的夜晚」投影在这里……

The day-night cycle has been lost to this world. So that students like you may still learn about the night sky, astronomers have harnessed the Titans' miraculous power to manipulate the light, projecting the "nights of the past" here for you.
正如圣城的天空，也是由{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的黎明机器点亮的。
Much like how the sky above the holy city is also illuminated by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Dawn Device.
所以，奥赫玛的天空也是虚假的。
So, the skies of Okhema are fake, too.
不能这么定性，那刻夏。你要知道：只有孩子才会揭开魔术的幕布，并以此为傲。
You mustn't conclude that, Anaxa. You should know that only a child would expose a trick and be proud of it.
很多时候，人们并非真正无知，而是必须装作无知。
Often, people know more than they let on. They simply choose to feign ignorance because they have no other choice.
这是自欺欺人。民众信奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的创世神话，祭司们说什么，他们就信什么。可是，你和我，我们已从蒙昧的洞穴里醒转。

Then they're just deluding themselves. People believe in {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s tale of genesis, accepting wholesale whatever the priests preach, but we're different. We've already walked out of the fire-lit cave of ignorance.
我们已经意识到，自己身处在一个由泰坦编织规则的世界，满眼尽是它们投下的「星空」。与其守望这片虚假的永夜，我为何不能成为操作投影仪器的那个人？

We have already realized that we live in a world where Titans make the rules. Even when we look at the sky, we're only seeing what they allow us to see. Rather than gazing at this mockery of a night sky fabricated by them for the rest of my life, why shouldn't I be the one to take control of the projection device instead?
孩子啊，自你为我播下怀疑的种子，又已过去了许久。我在无数个日夜记录下自己的推论和狂想，却又在醒来时把它们尽数焚毁。

So much time has passed since you sowed the seeds of doubt in my heart, child. Many a night, I find myself penning down all my theories and wild ideas, only to burn them to ashes when I open my eyes in the day.
为什么？仅仅是因为它会将你我送上火刑的尸床？
Why? Because we'll face death by burning if word gets out?
我身为「敬拜学派」的贤人，根系早已与巨树相连，一举一动必将牵掣它的每一根枝、每一片叶，甚至撼动大树本身。

As a sage of the Venerationists, my soul has already become inextricably linked to the Great Tree. Every word I say and every move I make is certain to influence every leaf, every branch... even the Tree itself.
然而，最重要的是：我身为将死之人，对金血和灵魂的思考只能通过直觉怀疑，而无法付诸实践。黄金的血脉在我体内如此稀薄，我不愿再去思考本就无力证明的猜想。

But above all else, my days are numbered. Instinctively, I have my doubts about the golden blood and the human soul, yet I have no means of verifying them. The golden blood in my veins is woefully thin, and I am loath to waste what little time I have left obsessing over a hypothesis that cannot even be proven in the first place.
但是我可以，老师！时机已经成熟，给我需要的一切，我将代您完成这至高至伟的大功业。
But I can, sir! I can do it for us! The time is right. Give me all that I need, and I shall accomplish this grand feat on your behalf.
当然，我正有此意。下一次贤人会议，我会全力为你争取应得的权利。
You're right. I shall do just that. In the next meeting of the sages, I will spare no efforts fighting for the rights you deserve.
去吧，准备好创立你自己的学派——
Go. Establish your own school of thought...
<color=#dbc291ff>去探明「我们」究竟为何物，成为征服世间至理的人吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Find out what we are... become the one who conquers the ultimate truths of the world.</color>
汝大费周章，只为博得{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}一面光照…恐怕不只是为了质问神明吧？
You didn't go to such lengths for an audience with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} just to ask him a few questions, did you?
Hmph. So you figured it out.
倘若我是一头愚昧无知的大地兽，面对此等伟力，也许会将四肢匍匐在大地上，盼望诸神为我降下神谕。只可惜，我是靠双足直立行走，拥有智慧和尊严的人类。

If I were as foolish as a dromas, perhaps I'd throw myself down and prostrate before their greatness, begging for the gods' prophetic wisdom. Well, sorry to disappoint, but I'm no dromas. Alas, I am a human, standing tall on two feet, possessing both intellect and pride.
呵呵…不过，恕吾直言：在如此悬殊的力量面前，是人，或是大地兽，有何殊异呢？
Heh... Before such power, does it make any difference whether you're a human or a dromas?
你应当听说过斯缇科西亚人的故事：他们面对汹涌进犯的大海，并没有坐以待毙，而是修建了匹敌怒涛的堤坝，为癫狂的{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}套上了枷锁。

I'm sure you're familiar with the story of the Styxians. When the raging waves threatened to swallow them, they didn't just give up and become sitting ducks. No, they constructed a dam that kept the roaring tide at bay, chaining down the mad {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.
瑟希斯，人们都说我是渎神者。但这不代表我否认神性的存在，只是在我看来——
They call me a blasphemer, Cerces, but that doesn't mean I deny the existence of gods. It's just...
——泰坦，不过是人类尚未征服的力量罢了。
...As I see it, Titans are simply a force that mankind has yet to find a way to tame.
哦？既然汝意图拥有匹敌泰坦的力量，那末依神谕所示，挑战试炼便是。
Oh? If power that rivals the Titans' is what you crave, why not conform to the prophecy and brave the trial?
呵，仅仅掌握泰坦的神力，未免太过肤浅。
Hah, why stop at harnessing the power of the Titans when I can do so much more?
我要掌握的是生命根源之法，「灵魂」的本质——<color=#dbc291ff>「『我们』究竟是为何物」</color>。
The source of life is what I wish to grasp... To understand what makes up the soul, and to learn <color=#dbc291ff>what we really are</color>.
拜你所赐，「死亡」是灵魂的终结这一事实，我已通过种种迹象亲自验讫。可有死必有生，有终结必有开端——

Thanks to you, I've had the chance to personally verify — in more ways than one — that the soul indeed ceases to exist in "Death." But where there is death, there is life, and where there is an end, there must also be a beginning.
灵魂如何诞生？——在我的算式中，只剩下这一个未知数。
How, then, is a soul born? That was the only unknown variable left in my calculations.
听汝这口气，想必是有所猜度了罢？
And by the sound of it, you have already formed a conjecture.
…不，是已有结论了。就在刚才的死亡之旅中，我亲眼看见了答案。
No, I have already drawn a conclusion. In my journey unto death just now, I finally saw the answer with my own eyes.
我来了。{NICKNAME}阁下的性命危在旦夕，还请您不要做多余的事。
I'm here. {NICKNAME}'s life hangs by a thread, I must ask you to refrain from taking any unnecessary steps.
当然，我会一锤定音，给你想要的解答。
Of course, I'll bring this to a conclusive end and give you the answer you so desire.
但依「等价交换」的原则，我也必须向你索取我需要之物。
However, in accordance with the principle of "equivalent exchange," I must also demand from you what I need.
连代价是什么都不过问么？
Don't you care to know what the price might be?
事关死亡泰坦的真相，还有{NICKNAME}的性命……
It's a matter of uncovering the truth about the Death Titan — and {NICKNAME}'s survival...
<color=#dbc291ff>这或许是我此生唯一一次能挽救一条生命的机会，我没有犹豫的理由。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This may be the only time I can ever save someone's life. There is no need for me to think twice.</color>
好啊，那…就让表演开始吧。
I see. In that case... let the show begin.
且慢。容吾打断一下，汝是准备同时证明{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}之所在，以及「我们」究竟为何物？
Indulge me: Am I correct to say that you intend to prove {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' whereabouts and prove the nature of our existence now?
第一，我必须承认，我一直以来都落入了认知陷阱。
Before I begin, I must confess I had been stuck in a cognitive trap all this time.
表面上看，这两个命题毫不相干；然而，它们恰恰逻辑等价，不过是对「灵魂本质」的两种叙述。
As unrelated as these two propositions may seem at first glance, they are, in fact, logical equivalents. They are merely two different ways of telling us about what the soul is at its core.
第二，为什么我会这么说？刚才已经解释过，答案就藏在那场死亡之旅中。
The reason I say this is as I've mentioned earlier: The answer was hidden in my journey unto death.
Professor... you were in the nether realm?
不错，因为我现在是个活死人。但这不重要，重要的是——我听到了一众英雄人物的谈话。
Yes — I am but a living dead man now — but that's not important. What truly matters is — I overheard a conversation between heroes.
而且，不仅如此…记得吗，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}？我还见到你也参与了那场对谈。
That's not all... Remember how I said you were a part of that conversation too, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?
可吾也说了，吾从未有过如此记忆。那怕是汝死前眼中臆造的幻象。
And I've told you that I have no recollection of such an event. That was likely just an illusion conjured up by the mind of a dying man.
因为那根本不是你，而是「卡吕普索」，来自树庭的七贤人之一。
Because that wasn't you. That was Calypso, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove.
那不是吾在这姑娘面前随口杜撰的假名么，汝怎会知道？
That's the name I made up on a whim when speaking to this girl. How do you know of it?
七贤人就更是笑谈了，若真是在吾之树荫下蒙受庇护的贤人，吾必能发觉。汝不也对树庭的过去如指诸掌么？

And surely you jest. Don't you think I, of all people, would know if that were the name of one of the Seven Sages under the shade of my tree? Don't you claim to know the Grove's past like the back of your hand?
看来你连烙印在灵魂中的记忆都忘却了啊。
It seems you've lost even the memories seared into your soul.
动动脑子吧，想一想：既然这一切全部发生在死者的领域，那么，他们一定都是过去某人灵魂的样貌。
Use your head, Cerces. Since all of this took place in the realm of the dead, it stands to reason their likenesses are of souls from the past.
生者绝无可能步入这片天地，那他们究竟是谁？尤其是方才提到的卡吕普索，缘何长着一副和你瑟希斯相同的面孔，可后者却对所有人毫无印象？
The living cannot step foot into that world, so who could they be? Think about Calypso. Why does she share your likeness, yet you have no idea who she is?
我想，答案已经显而易见了——
The answer is evident, is it not?
<color=#dbc291ff>那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样。众神并非凭空诞生的造物巨匠，而是与人类无异，并由之演化而来的存在。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood. The gods aren't master creators born out of thin air, and they are no different from humans — because they all evolved from one.</color>
怎么，这个答案让你失望了吗？
当然，汝这不是说了等于没说么？如果说吾果真本为人子，那汝等人子又是从何而来呢？
Yes, because you've answered nothing. If I truly was once human as you claim, then where do the children of humanity come from?
而且，就算事实果真如此…那也与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的所在相距甚远，我们要如何找到它？
Even on the off chance that you speak the truth, this brings us no closer to grasping {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' whereabouts. How are we to find them?
呵，我早知道各位会这么说……
Heh, I knew you would say that.
我自有把握。不妨就请眼前这位至高之神，为我们一一道来吧。
But it matters not. I know what I'm doing. Actually, why don't we have this supreme being standing before us tell us everything?
汝…有把握复活一位泰坦？
人本不能死而复生，更何况是神明。
Humans cannot return from the dead. Neither can gods.
但只要把思路逆转过来，一切便能迎刃而解。答案很简单，就和你对我做的事一样……
But all we need to do is look at this from a different perspective, and the problem will resolve itself. The solution is simple: Just like what you did to me...
我来作为{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}重新诞生，并按它的方法再造世间万物，不就是了吗？
If I'm reborn as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, I can rebuild the world and all within it as they once did. Simple, is it not?
适应了奥赫玛的日光，都不习惯夜色了。
The night sky feels unusual... now that I've gotten used to the eternal light of Okhema.
总有种不妙的预感，难道树庭之灾背后还有别的秘密？
I have a bad feeling about this. Could there be more to what happened at the Grove?
真是一片曲折的树海啊。
These trees... They're like a maze.
风堇和丹恒传来消息：那刻夏可能会对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神躯有所动作。
I have news from Hyacine and Dan Heng. Anaxa might be trying to do something with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s divine body.
{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}？这是要做什么…元老院会放任如此大不敬之举吗？
{RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}? But what could Anaxa want...? Is the Council of Elders going to sit around and let such a sacrilegious act unfold?
真是名副其实的「大表演家」，任何人都可能被他的演技欺骗。
He is indeed "the Great Performer," capable of fooling anyone and everyone with his tricks.
不必感到愧疚，这反而是个好消息。元老院的盟友并不忠诚，那刻夏的野心定能为我们所用。
No need for guilt, for this is good news to us. The Council of Elders has found themselves a traitorous ally. Anaxa's ambitious desires will be something we can exploit.
至于现在，端看凯妮斯将设下何种圈套，见招拆招便是。
What we should be doing now is to keep our eyes peeled for whichever trickery Caenis is up to and react accordingly to thwart her plans.
半神议院是奥赫玛的政治腹地，重要性不亚于创世涡心。在我的使命结束后，总有一天，这里会取代猎神的疆场，成为你们的下一道难关——

Being Okhema's political center, the Demigod Council holds just as much significance as the Vortex of Genesis. Someday, after my duty is over, this site will take the place of the battlefield where you hunt gods, become the next challenge you ought to overcome...
趁时间还多，尽早适应这片舞台吧。
Till then, it's best to get used to this place as soon as possible.
我们在这里等你的消息。
We will be waiting here for your good news.
如果需要，随时叫上我们。
Come find us anytime you need something.
你好，翁法罗斯的奥列格。
…你在说什么胡话，少主赞不绝口的猛士就这副德行？
...What is that supposed to mean? Is this really the sort of person that the young lord praised as a ferocious warrior?
无妨，我认得你。少主对你的勇猛赞不绝口。
That's fine. I recognize you. The young lord has nothing but good words about your courage.
好久不见，克拉特鲁斯阁下。怎么来得如此匆忙……
It has indeed been some time, Lord Krateros. What brings you here in such haste...?
招子放亮些，看到那群假笑的鬣狗了么？凯妮斯手下干脏活的。
Be more vigilant. See those duplicitous dogs over there? They do the dirty work for Caenis.
我吩咐族人绊住他们了，但还是别太张扬。除非你们想动动筋骨，来一场厮杀。
I've already ordered my people to hold them back, but we should still lay low... Unless you're itching for a bloody fight to get a workout in.
My bad. So, did something happen?
昨晚，你们听见雷声了么？
Did you hear thunderclaps last night?
光天化日打雷，想不听到都难。
It would be hard not to notice thunderclaps in broad daylight.
没听到，我睡眠质量很好。
太好了，是黄泉，我们有救了！
Hurray, it's Acheron! Someone's coming to save us!
{M#他}{F#她}最近太劳累了，体谅一下。展开说说雷声吧？
{M#He's}{F#She's} been through a lot lately. Please pardon {M#him.}{F#her.} Can you tell us more about these thunderclaps?
雷声是「纷争」的烽火，是少主捎来消息了。他向奥赫玛掷来了传信的投枪，上面只有几个字。
Thunderclaps are beacon signals of Strife. They are a message from the young lord. He threw a spear bearing several words at Okhema.
<color=#dbc291ff>"Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back."</color>
…果然。先前在悬锋竞技场，我们没有真正杀死它。
...I guessed as much. We didn't actually kill them back at the Kremnos arena.
你们应当知晓这一信息。悬锋人绝不退缩。倘若需要应战，随时找我。
I figured this is something you would want to know. We Kremnoans never back down from a fight, so if you plan to take that thing down in a battle, reach out to me anytime.
感激不尽，我会立刻转告阿格莱雅。
You have my gratitude. I will let Aglaea know about this right away.
还有，叫那女人小心：那如毒蛇般的凯妮斯，近期异动频频。
Remind her to be on her toes while you're at it. That vicious Caenis has been unusually active lately.
她手底下见不得光的走狗，在城中出没得愈发频繁了，甚至还有策反悬锋人的倾向……
Those lackeys she keeps undercover have been going in and out of the city a lot more frequently these days. Some even seem to be getting Kremnoans to defect to the Council...
Hmph. Looks like you can see it for yourself.
我们回去看看，克拉特鲁斯阁下，多谢你的情报。
We should get back. Thank you for the intel, Lord Krateros.
这条王蛇的毒牙，透过金丝，我已心中有数。过去的我有信心压制住她，但现在…是有些力不从心了。
I know about the poisonous fangs of that kingsnake through the golden threads. In the past, I would be confident about keeping her in check, but... I admit I am now unable to do so.
问题不在辩术。我已成为半神太久，人性将尽，不知不觉间竟也和这些伪君子踏上了相似的道路，离民众越来越远。

It is no longer about eloquence or arguments. I have been a demigod for far too long that I hardly have any humanity left. Before I realized it, I have become no different from these hypocrites, no longer capable of relating to the people.
这比我预想中来得更早，或许是时候了：白厄，我需要你站出来，而我退居其后——
This has come a lot sooner than I expected, but perhaps it is time. I need you to step up, Phainon, in order for me to retreat behind the scenes.
Yes, this is my duty, but...
对于元老院，愚弄多数人远比愚弄一个人容易得多。所谓的「更多支持」也只是代替长矛，成了权力分配的手段。
It is far easier for the Council of Elders to fool many than just fool one person. Their so-called "more support" is no more than a ruse to distribute power using words instead of lances.
这场辩论本就没有荣誉可言。但也正因此，对「人」的尊重才显得更为珍贵。白厄，你是没有缺陷的黄金裔，对人性体悟至深——
There is no glory in winning this debate, but that makes having respect for "humans" so much more priceless. Phainon, you are a Chrysos Heir without flaw, capable of relating deeply with humans...
感谢你的教诲，阿格莱雅。愿我们能不辱使命。
I appreciate what you've taught me, Aglaea. I hope we'll live up to your expectations and win this debate.
{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，以神礼观众之名，我见到——
By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, as the Theoros, I have observed...
奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，与异乡人{NICKNAME}，正在向我们走来！
Virtuous citizens of Okhema, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae and {NICKNAME} the outlander are heading toward us!
辛苦了，卡勒克提斯阁下。接下来，让我亲自给今日的辩论收尾吧——
You've done well, Lord Callictis. Let me take over and personally close this debate for today.
尊敬的各位议员，我无比怀念那些诗歌里的美好时代。彼时，翁法罗斯存在过近千座不同信仰的城邦，神明行于世间，与凡人相亲。

Dearest councilors, let it be known that I sorely miss the blissful times portrayed in lyrical poems. Back then, Amphoreus was home to nearly a thousand cities — each with their own local faith — while gods walked the earth and shared close bonds with humans.
但时至如今，天南地北的避难者离开故乡，奔赴圣城，希望能在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇护下寻得栖息之地。我们所有人早已同舟渡水，退无可退。

Yet in the present, people from all over are forced to leave their homeland, to seek refuge in the holy city, where they hope to rest under {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection. All of us have long been in the same boat, with no way out of this plight.
曾经，我们别无选择，但现在，元老院带来了另一种可能。我只剩下最后一个问题——
We didn't have a choice in the past, but now... the Council of Elders brings to the table a new possibility. All I have left is one question for you:
诸位，选择吧！是选择谁也不知道的「再创世」，还是选择回到繁荣的「黄金世」？
Would you rather strive toward the unheard-of "Era Nova," or return to the prosperous "Era Chrysea" of our past? Make your choice!
究竟哪一条路，才能为凡人带来理想的明天？
Now, which of the two would lead mortals to an ideal future?
当然是要坚定「再创世」了！
No hesitation! I stand by "Era Nova"!
「再创世」是众神约定的救赎之道，应当坚定选择逐火之旅。
"Era Nova" is a path of salvation the gods promised. We should not have doubts in the Flame-Chase Journey.
如果「黄金世」能实现的话…
If it's possible to bring "Era Chrysea" back...
可是，要怎么才能让翁法罗斯回到「黄金世」？
But how are we supposed to send Amphoreus back to "Era Chrysea"?
凯妮斯阁下，所有人都知道「黄金世」早已结束。试问，元老院要如何让时光倒流？
We all know that "Era Chrysea" is a thing of the past, Lady Caenis. Please enlighten me — how does the Council of Elders plan to turn back time?
灾厄三泰坦诞生，则黄金世不复。灾厄三泰坦消殒，则黄金世再临。
Let the Three Titans of Calamity be born and Era Chrysea is nevermore, but bring demise to those Titans and Era Chrysea will descend upon us again.
元老院不会给出空口承诺。诸位请看，站在我身边的人——
Know that the Council of Elders is never one to make empty promises. Look at who we have on our side...
树庭七贤人之一，阿那克萨戈拉斯，以及哀地里亚的「死亡女神」遐蝶——
Anaxagoras, one of the Grove's Seven Sages, and Castorice, Aidonia's "Goddess of Death"!
有这二位英雄在，我便可向诸位许诺「黄金世」的存在！
With the help of these two heroes, I can promise all of you that "Era Chrysea" will exist once more!
A Member of the Council of Elders
那不是黄金裔吗？他们也支持元老院？
Aren't they Chrysos Heirs? They're supporting the Council of Elders instead?
Another Member of the Council of Elders
哼，早就知道这群人内部不和，阿格莱雅更没法代表所有黄金裔。我支持「黄金世」！

Hmph, it's clear from the start that these heroes do not get along well in their group. All the more proof that Aglaea isn't fit to speak on behalf of every Chrysos Heir. I am in favor of "Era Chrysea"!
A Member of the Council of Elders
Members of the Council of Elders
遐蝶？为什么你会站在那里……
Castorice? Why are you standing over there...
终于出现了啊，那刻夏。还有…蝶。
You've finally arrived, Anaxa. So have you... Cas.
别心急，阿格莱雅。我知道你有很多疑问，但继续用「公民的方式」交流，可以么？
Don't worry, Aglaea. While I know that you have many queries, could you continue to converse like how "the citizens normally do"?
如果我们成功取回并归还{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，而无人通过那死亡之泰坦的试炼，会发生什么？
If we successfully retrieve and return {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame without anyone passing the Death Titan's trial, what would happen next?
很简单：我们将有机会消除世间「死亡」，令翁法罗斯回到万物永生的时代…一个与「逐火之旅」完全不同的崭新未来！

The answer is simple: We will have a chance to rid the world of "death" and bring Amphoreus back to an era when all beings live forever... We'll usher in a new future that will be entirely different from "the Flame-Chase Journey"!
这未免太过于理想。只要黑潮还存在一天，我们怎么可能回到过去？
Your proposal is much too idealistic. As long as the black tide still exists, how can we go back to the old days?
不，还记得我说过什么吗？{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕也足以隔断外界的感应——

Remember what I previously said? {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the secret power of the Council of Elders. Plus, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain will be able to block out any external perceptions.
诸位，告诉我——此人口中的威胁，你们可曾在庄严的圣城中见过哪怕一面？
Tell me, dear citizens: Have any of you ever seen even a glimpse of the threat that this person is talking about anywhere within the walls of this majestic holy city?
盗火行者迟早会盯上这里！
But this place will become the Flame Reaver's target sooner or later!
哦？莫非，盗火行者亲口告诉你了？
Oh? Could it be that you heard that from the Flame Reaver themself?
这不就是幸存者偏差吗…
若我们消除了死亡，便不必畏惧那盗火者，不是么？
If we eliminate death, then there's no need for us to fear that Flame Reaver, right?
人民啊，高唱赞歌吧：「美丽的旧世界，如今在何处？传说的黄金世，快回到人间！」
Citizens, let's loudly sing the blessed hymn: "O beautiful old world, where are you now? O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!"
灾厄三泰坦消殒后，逐火之旅必须到此结束！
After the destruction of the Three Titans of Calamity, the Flame-Chase Journey will have to end!
不好，人群彻底被煽动了……
This is bad. The masses are now totally riled up...
那刻夏，告诉我：你所说的一切前提，是我们*能够*找到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的存在，没错吧？
Anaxa, pray tell: Everything that you've mentioned hinges on the premise that we can find {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}'s existence, right?
感谢阿格莱雅阁下还有余力为这座城市担忧。但是，公民们啊，请听万幸中的万幸——
Thank you, Lady Aglaea, for still caring about this city. However, dear citizens, we are truly fortunate and blessed...
——哀地里亚的「死亡女神」遐蝶，必将在我的指引下找到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}！
...For Castorice, Aidonia's "Goddess of Death," will surely find {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} under my guidance!
由此，我承诺，遐蝶阁下带回的火种，将由元老院亲自管理。
With that, I solemnly promise that the Coreflame Lady Castorice brings back will be personally managed by the Council of Elders.
而后，若能在公民大会上得到诸位的支持，我们会不竭余力确保黄金世回到人间！
Thereafter, if we are able to garner the support of all of you at the citizens' assembly, we shall spare no effort in ensuring that the Era Chrysea will return to our world once again!
平衡已被打破，结果已经明朗。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，以神礼观众之名，我见到——
With the balance shattered, the result is clear. By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, as the Theoros, I have observed...
奥赫玛选择了她的命运。本次公民大会议题将变更为「暂停逐火之旅」，该决议并将张贴于纪名英雄墙前，全体公民应知晓城邦的前路。

Okhema has chosen her destiny. The issue up for discussion at this citizens' assembly shall be modified to the "Suspension of the Flame-Chase Journey." This resolution shall be put up on the Wall of Heroes such that all citizens are aware of the city's way forward.
阿格莱雅啊，阿格莱雅…是什么让你心肠变软，口舌不似当年锋快了？
Aglaea, dear Aglaea... What has caused your heart to soften? You also don't seem to be as quick-witted as before?
尽情摇唇鼓舌吧。逐火之旅已是神谕写定的事实，我们不会失败。
Wag your tongue as much as you like. Since the Flame-Chase Journey has been preordained by the prophecy, our failure has never been on the cards.
那就在公民大会上见分晓吧。
Well then, I guess we'll find out if that's true at the citizens' assembly.
来古士宣告论辩结束，与会者们相继散去……
Lygus announces the conclusion of the debate, and the attendees part ways...
元老院议员们发出*议论纷纷的讨论声*。
The members of the Council of Elders are discussing fervently.
元老院议员们发出*群情激昂的欢呼声*。
The members of the Council of Elders are cheering in excitement.
元老院议员们发出*群情激昂的欢呼声*。
The members of the Council of Elders are cheering in excitement.
元老院议员们发出*群情激昂的欢呼声*。
The members of the Council of Elders are cheering in excitement.
看来，我派你去找那刻夏，反倒促成了你和他的合作？
Well, it seems that when I sent you to look for Anaxa, I unintentionally facilitated your partnership with him instead?
抱歉，各位。我知道你们有很多话想问，我绝不隐瞒。
My apologies, everyone. I know that you have many questions to ask me. I will answer them to the best of my knowledge.
请你为我们一一道来吧。
In that case, please tell us as much as you can.
你去找那刻夏到底发生了什么？
What happened when you went to look for Anaxa?
...A past that was both long and heavy.
稍等一下，我还没准备好。
我会等你的。事关重大…{NICKNAME}阁下应该知道整个过程。
I will wait for you. This matter is of great consequence... and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} should hear the entire story from beginning to end.
你去找那刻夏到底发生了什么？
What happened when you went to look for Anaxa?
其实，他为我展示了一段……
...A past that was both long and heavy.
稍等一下，我还没准备好。
我会等你的。事关重大…{NICKNAME}阁下应该知道整个过程。
I will wait for you. This matter is of great consequence... and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} should hear the entire story from beginning to end.
（这些人的目光，跟刀子一样啊……）
(Wow, these people are shooting daggers with their eyes...)
荒唐啊！黄金裔的地位是元老院给的，他们竟然不珍惜。
Preposterous! The Chrysos Heirs only have their standing because of the Council of Elders. How dare they trample over it!
邻人踩了主人的花圃，主人敢怒不敢言，哈哈，元老院早就脸面扫地。
Haha, someone trampled right over the master's flower bed, yet the master only fumes in silence. Oopsie, there goes the reputation of the Council of Elders.
我要支持谁？当然——要支持元老院重振权威！
Whose side am I on? Why, I'm all for the Council of Elders to reclaim their authority, of course!
They're here. The Chrysos Heirs are here.
我该回家拿祭祀的坛子来，拿花冠来，拿焚烧的乳香来——
I should've gone back home to fetch a sacrificial vessel, some floral crowns, and frankincense to burn and offer...
我祈祷泰坦宽恕这些趾高气扬、自命不凡的英雄。
O Titans, please forgive these arrogant and self-conceited heroes.
元老院早就脸面扫地了。
The Council of Elders has long fallen into disgrace.
I want to support the Council of Elders.
Hush, the Chrysos Heir is here.
On behalf of the Chrysos Heir, I plead for forgiveness.
Have you heard of this tale before?
有关海洋之神的掌上明珠，我们故乡的故事——
A tale about the Ocean God's treasured pearl – our hometown...
那是一座海滨小城，在一位智慧的女王治下享受着海风和明媚的和平时光。
It was a seaside town which enjoyed the ocean breeze and glorious, peaceful times thanks to the wisdom of its ruling queen.
有一天，一条恶龙降临了。它的翅膀能够遮蔽太阳，它的利爪足以劈开海浪……
Until one day, an evil dragon descended upon the town. Its wings were large enough to blot out the sun, while its claws were sharp enough to rip the waves apart...
它闯入高塔，吞噬了女王最心爱的女儿，还盘踞在寝宫中，俨然一副暴君的模样。
It barged into the tall tower and devoured the queen's beloved daughter. It even settled itself in her bedroom, like a tyrant king.
女王集结了三百勇士，用锁链制服了恶龙。可她剖开恶龙肚子，却发现公主早已化为腹中枯骨。她悲痛欲绝，恸哭数日……

The queen assembled three hundred warriors, who managed to subdue the evil dragon by chaining it up. However, when the queen slit open the dragon's belly, she realized that the princess had long since been digested and all that was left of her was a pile of bones. Devastated, the queen wept for several days...
就在此时，一位巧言令色的学者来到了宫廷。他提议用龙骨和龙血复活公主——故事里，骗子称之为「炼金」的秘法。

It was then that a devious, smooth-talking scholar arrived at the palace and suggested that the princess could be revived through the use of dragon bone and dragon blood. That liar called this process the secret art of "alchemy."
公主重生了。女王大喜过望，殊不知她体内混有恶龙的灵魂。恶龙为了复仇，一口吞下可怜的女王、巧言的骗子、勇猛的战士，还有全城无辜的百姓。

The princess was reborn. The queen was overjoyed, blissfully unaware that the evil dragon's soul still lurked within the princess's body. As revenge, the evil dragon swallowed the poor queen, the glib liar, the courageous warriors, and all of the town's innocent civilians in a single gulp.
更可怕的是，死者的灵魂死而有憾，被冥界拒之门外。徘徊在人间的怨灵汇成冥河，久久不能退去。

Worse still, the souls of the deceased were refused entry to the nether realm because they were filled with regret. Forced to roam the mortal realm, these resentful souls ultimately converged into a River of Souls, that would not retreat for a long time.
可怕的死亡吞噬了一切，我们的故乡也随之覆灭。直到……
The terrifying Death had consumed all. Thereafter, our hometown fell into ruin as well, until...
直到什么呢？其实我也不知道。
Until...? Actually, I don't know what happened next either.
啊呀…小玻吕茜亚，汝还是一如既往地爱吊人胃口哪。
Oh my... It seems that you still like to whet people's appetites even after all this time, Polyxia.
依你所言，这就是吾曾经的样貌么？确实如出一辙。
So, according to your story, this is how I used to look? It's practically a mirror image.
And yet, what exactly is this?
我用炼金创造的奇迹。至于具体是什么，又是怎么做到的，就先卖个关子吧。
A miracle that I created with alchemy. As for what it is and how I was able to accomplish it, I'll keep the answers to myself for now.
啊呀，汝卖过的关子还差这一个么？
My goodness, is this cliffhanger really necessary?
安静些，泰坦。继续欣赏这场美妙的戏剧，真相自然会水落石出。
Quiet, Titan. Continue to enjoy this splendid play, and the truth will naturally reveal itself.
巨龙…吾倒是听过这逸闻。
Dragon, huh... I've heard this legend before.
那你怎么看待这个故事？
In that case, what do you think of it?
依吾看，这所谓「炼金」乃是后人牵强附会。毕竟，想来你们从未听过故乡有炼金的传承罢？
I think that this so-called "alchemy" was a tenuous analogy added to the story by future generations. After all, you've never heard of a tradition of alchemy in your hometown before, have you?
的确。出门求学以前，我甚至都没听过有人研究这门学问。
Indeed. Before I left home to pursue my education, I never even knew that anybody was looking into this area of study.
所以，只当它是作给小孩子听的寓言便是。
Therefore, we can just treat this tale as a fable told to young children.
寓言呀…那你觉得，这故事想教给孩子什么道理？
A fable, you say...? If so, what moral is it trying to impart to the kids?
我想，大抵是<color=#dbc291ff>「等价交换」</color>罢？
I guess it might be the concept of <color=#dbc291ff>"equivalent exchange"</color>?
哦？我还以为是「死者为大」之类的呢。
Oh? I thought the moral might be closer to something like "honor the dead."
What? At a loss for words?
不。吾只是发觉，吾之所想与汝是同个道理：生命乃无价之宝，世间难能有相抵者，对吧？
No, I merely realized that we're both thinking of the same principle: If life is priceless, then there is hardly anything else in this world that is of equal weight to it, right?
还真是。不愧是大地上最聪慧的学者。
Indeed. As expected of the wisest scholar in the land.
呵呵，承蒙谬赞了。那依等价交换，让吾也回敬一个问题，如何？
Heheh, you flatter me. Why don't I ask you a question as well, as a form of equivalent exchange?
Of course. What is your question?
如果，吾将「炼金」之法传习与汝……
If I imparted my knowledge of the art of alchemy to you...
汝…会为珍重之人加以运用，令之起死回生么？
Would you use it to resurrect someone you loved?
这是什么怪问题…啊，我知道了！你想套话，问我有没有喜欢的人？
What kind of strange question is this...? Ah, I got it! You're just trying to get me to tell you whether I like anyone, right?
呵呵，就当是这样吧，是吾唐突了……
Heheh, let's just leave it at that. That was rude of me...
凡人终有一死。日后，一定会有我无比珍视的人离我而去……
Death is inevitable. In the days to come, I am certain that someone whom I cherish deeply will leave me for good...
如果真有如此伟大的力量，我应该…会毫不犹豫地使用它吧。
If such a mighty power really existed, I think... I would use it without hesitation.
毕竟…你、我，还有大家，我们终将要面对那个命中注定的「时刻」。
After all... You, me, and the rest, will all have to face that fateful moment eventually.
属于我的时刻已经到来。但，或许正是因为坚信生命无价……
My time is finally here. However, perhaps because of my firm belief in the immeasurable value of life...
I... am unable to complete the trial.
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生」……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame"...</color>
可怜见，命运当真是如此残忍哪。
It is a pity that fate is such a cruel mistress.
没有另一种解读的方式么？
Is there no other way of interpreting those words?
恐怕，它的意思十分明确：我和姐姐，必须有一人付出牺牲——以生命为代价，才能完成「我们」的试炼。
I'm afraid that the meaning is clear: Between my sister and me, one must pay the price... "Our" trial can only be completed when the one chosen sacrifices her life.
恐怕，也正因此…预言才会选择一对双子吧。
I'm afraid that the prophecy might even have selected a pair of twins... for this exact purpose.
Fortune makes fools of us all.
姐姐已经做好了牺牲的准备…可是，我做不到……
My sister is prepared to sacrifice herself... and yet, I can't do the same...
真是可笑…明明我本就时日无多了，却也惧怕迎接死亡……
How absurd... My time is almost up, but I'm still afraid to welcome death...
我们…该怎么办…？如果…如果我到最后都无法下定决心……
What should we do...? I—If I'm ultimately not able to make up my mind...
既然卡厄斯为吾等留以指引，要将这场试炼留待最后…那末，还有很多时间供汝沉思。
Since Khaos is willing to guide all of us and leave this trial to the end... There is still plenty of time for you to ponder.
不错，别让未来的迷雾蒙蔽你的心灵。
That's right. Don't allow the fog of an uncertain future to cloud your mind.
「试炼」、「预言」…他们在讨论的话题，似乎有点耳熟呢。
Trial, prophecy... the topics that they're discussing seem familiar.
可此三人从未在史诗中留下自己的名字。否则，吾断然不会毫无印象……
But these three people must not have left their names in the epics. Otherwise, I would have some recollection of this...
翁法罗斯的历史在泰坦诞生前是一片「混沌」，这还不奇怪吗？
Amphoreus' history before the Titans were born was complete chaos. Is that not strange by itself?
对此，我早有三种猜想。不过现在，先接着往下看吧。
I have long held three hypotheses about this. However, let's continue watching for now.
还有，这位战士…我曾在哪里见过……
And this warrior... I seem to have met him somewhere before...
格奈乌斯，汝之试炼，可有把握？
Gnaeus, are you confident that you'll complete your trial?
当然。令我忧心的，反在战胜它之后啊……
Of course. Though I am worried about what will happen once I've emerged victorious...
看来，汝已下定决心了哪。
Looks like you have made up your mind.
Yes, this is the safest course of action.
将「勇气」、「荣耀」、「坚韧」、「牺牲」和「理智」尽数分离……
Completely separating Courage, Honor, Tenacity, Sacrifice, and Reason...
Ugh, you really know how to make things difficult.
拜托你了，小姑娘，为我的陨落作见证。卡吕普索阁下，「裂魂仪式」就由你主持了。
Please, young lady, witness my fall and demise. Lady Calypso, you shall host the soul-rending ceremony.
我不明白…为什么，你敢于为自己无法见证的未来牺牲？
I do not understand... Why would you dare to sacrifice yourself for a future that you won't get to witness?
因为那是我们的宿命，属于我的力量如此暴烈，总有一天，我也会被它席卷。
Because this is our destiny. The power that resides within me is so intense that I will one day be engulfed by it.
况且——「宁战死，毋荣归」——我早已走在这条路上了。我相信，换作是你的姐姐，或是卡厄斯，也一定会选择这么做。

Furthermore, a "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return" has always been the path I chose to walk, a journey I began long ago. If your sister or Khaos were in my position, I believe they would make the same choice as well.
我…没这么勇敢。我不知道该如何面对这么沉重的事情……
I... I'm not that brave. I don't know how I'm supposed to face such a serious affair...
身为「死亡」的神选，却依旧不知该如何面对它啊……
Despite being Death's chosen one, it seems you still don't know how to face it...
来聊聊吧，小姑娘。或许我的旅途，不该结束得这么草率。
Let's chat, young lady. Perhaps I shouldn't end my journey so hastily.
还有时间，我不惮让命运多等候片刻。
Since there's still time, I'm not worried about letting fate wait a little longer.
果然，这位战士…是格奈乌斯阁下。
Of course, this warrior is... Lord Gnaeus.
身为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神性化身，他将性命托付给我们…让人类亲手终结他的疯狂。
As the embodiment of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, he entrusted his life to us... and allowed humankind to end his madness.
That means that what I'm currently seeing before my eyes is in fact...
看来，我的部分猜想已经证毕：<color=#dbc291ff>「这些英雄正是泰坦们成神前的模样。」</color>
Looks like one hypothesis of mine has already been proven true: <color=#dbc291ff>"These heroes are the true forms of the Titans, before they attained their divinity."</color>
既然如此，这位他口中的「死亡」神选……
If so, the chosen one of Death that he speaks of is actually...
玻吕茜亚…就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}曾经的样子？可她的样貌……
Polyxia... is the previous form of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}? But her appearance...
若果真如此，知晓她的去向，自然就能得知死亡泰坦的所在。
If this is true, as long as we can find out where she went, we'll naturally be able to figure out the location of the Death Titan.
但在那之前，我们得先见证格奈乌斯阁下的结果……
But before that, we first need to witness what ultimately happened to Lord Gnaeus...
这里封印着格奈乌斯阁下的「荣耀」……
Lord Gnaeus' Honor is sealed here...
不可思议…此子魂息中的「荣耀」，竟如此轻盈。
Incredible... the Honor in this child's soul is so light.
「以{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}之『勇气』为证：此子从未在战场上退缩过一步——」
"{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Courage is a testament that they have never once retreated from a battle."
听说现世的悬锋城也刻着同样的话，居然是炼金的术式啊。
I've heard that these words are still engraved in Castrum Kremnos even today. It didn't occur to me that they were actually part of an alchemical formula.
依吾所见，这尊雕像里封存的，或许是此子之「坚韧」。
I believe that his Tenacity is sealed within this statue.
在迎战{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}前，我们也将它从石像里解放了出来……
Before we fought {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, we also released it from the stone statue...
这里封印着「牺牲」，不会错。
Sealed within this statue is undoubtedly his Sacrifice.
「它将以自身为城墙，阻挡无尽蔓延的疯狂。它深谙：若末世降临，世间将无物可供征伐……」

"They use their own body as our city walls, keeping out and protecting us from the pervasive spread of madness. They are acutely aware that if the end times were to arrive, there would be nothing left in this world to conquer..."
And finally... the only thing that remains is Reason.
打起精神，小姑娘。不必为光荣的死亡落泪。
Cheer up, young lady. There is no need to shed tears over a glorious death.
这世上的离别皆是哀伤，阁下。
All farewells in this world are sorrowful, Lord Gnaeus.
不，小姑娘：身为战士，我见过太多猛烈的死亡。可现如今，我只能感受到宁静…原来人间还有这样的活法。
No, young lady: As a warrior, I have witnessed too many bitter deaths. But now, all I feel is peace... I did not know until this moment that mortals could live their lives in such a way.
明明灵魂已所剩无几，阁下却还是如此达观…还是说，阁下已经无法感到悲伤了呢？
Although only a sliver of your soul remains, you remain so optimistic... Or maybe the truth is that you aren't able to feel sorrow anymore?
坦率地说，我不知道。但我可以确认：这不是对命运的接纳、淡漠，或是绝望……
To be honest, I don't know either. But I am certain of one thing: This is not an acceptance of death nor apathy toward it. It's not even a feeling of despair...
I am just enjoying what remains of my life to the fullest.
正是。和你们踏上旅途，一路走来，我改变了世界，也改变了自己。
Indeed. Along this journey that we've taken together, not only have I changed the world, I myself have also changed in the process.
现在，我已抵达终点。回头望去，看见我等亲手谱写的宏伟诗篇，怎能不感到尽兴呢？
And now, I have reached the journey's end. When I look back and see the grand epic that I've personally written, how could I not revel in that fact?
可是，一旦离开人世…这一切不就化为乌有了么？
But when you depart the mortal realm... won't all of your accomplishments be reduced to nothing?
离别和死亡，本就并蒂双生…凡人怎能轻易和解呢？
Separation and death are two sides of the same coin... Reconciling this doesn't come easily for a mortal.
最后，让我讲个自己的故事吧，小姑娘。
Finally, let me recount to you a story of mine, young lady.
第一次从战场上归来时，我感到无比空虚。
The first time I returned from the battlefield, I felt extremely hollow.
在战场上，灾厄吞噬了所有人。只有我回到城邦，人们为我举行了不甚愉快的酒会。我也觉得自己仿佛留在了战场，回来的只剩一副躯壳。

The calamity had devoured everybody on the battlefield but me. When I returned to the city alone, the citizens held a banquet for me that was far from pleasant. I felt as though I was still on the battlefield, and the person who had returned was nothing but an empty shell.
酒会结束已至深夜。我头晕目眩，独自回到营房。也是在回去的路上，我遇到了一个人。
It was late into the night by the time the banquet ended. My head still reeling, I returned alone to the barracks. On the way back, I encountered someone.
那是个疯癫的学者，在路边对着夜空喃喃自语。我被他绊倒，却没发火。也许是觉得自己和他太像了，便鬼使神差地向他提问——

It was a crazed scholar looking at the night sky and muttering to himself by the side of the road. Although I tripped over him and fell, I wasn't angry in the slightest. And maybe because I saw myself in him, I inexplicably asked him a question...
「你觉得，我们就这样死在路边，像两条野狗，会更好吗？」
"Do you think that it'd be better if we just died on the roadside like a couple of stray dogs?"
令我意外的是，他只耸了耸肩，叹道：
To my surprise, he shrugged his shoulders and sighed:
「对一个正在经历死的人来说，死亡和活着同样幸福。」
"To someone who is currently experiencing death, dying and living afford the same amount of bliss."
「现在，请你让开，别遮住了我的星光。」
"Now, please go away and don't block my starlight."
你是想说…「死」和「生」无异，都是迈向「死亡」的旅途？
Are you trying to say that... there is no difference between living and dying, for they are both journeys that lead toward Death?
没错，那就是人生，而死亡是衡量旅途价值的刻度。征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，皆因万物终有逝去之时。
That's exactly what life is, and death is but a scale to measure how valuable the journey was. Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust.
所以，小姑娘，别憎恨命运，满怀敬意地拥抱它吧。
Therefore, young lady, don't detest your fate. Instead, willingly and respectfully embrace it.
…身为「纷争」的化身，却在向我讲述世界的壮美吗？
...The embodiment of Strife telling me about the majesty of the world...?
正是。我相信，当命定的时刻来临时，你一定能明白这番话。
Indeed. I believe that when the fated moment eventually arrives, you will be able to understand my words.
该叩响冥府的门关了。我会在那路的尽头摆上长桌，恭候各位前来……
It's time for me to knock on death's door. I will set up a long table at the end of the road and humbly await your arrival...
到那时，再让我们把酒言欢吧。
When that moment finally comes, let us drink and be merry then.
I knew this day would eventually come.
Are the both of you ready?
呵，这可真是…耐人寻味呀。
Heh, this is... quite interesting indeed.
现在…该轮到我们履行诺言啦。
Now... it's time for us to fulfill our promises.
That I... won't be able to do it.
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生」……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame"...</color>
诚如预言所述，我们也已许诺，待到一切结束，就要面对自己命中注定的时刻。
As foretold in the prophecy, and according to our vows, once it all ends, we must face our fated moment head on.
即便是预言…就一定要听之任之吗？太不公平了，为什么只有我们必须自相残杀……
Even if it was prophesied, do we have no say in the matter? It's so unfair... Why are we the only ones who are forced into mutual destruction...
换我来吧，姐姐！让我来做「死亡」的牺牲品，我本就命不久矣…但你不一样……
Let me do it, sister! Let me be Death's sacrifice. I was never long for this world anyway... but you're different...
是我…是我浪费了你的人生……
I was the one who wasted your life after all...
我并没觉得自己虚度了人生。恰恰相反，当我终于来到终点，回首望去时，发现来时路上早已鲜花遍野……

I don't think that my life was wasted — just the opposite. When I finally arrived at this destination and looked back at the journey I took, I discovered that flowers had long since bloomed along the path I walked...
正是你为我播下了这片花海，它比天地尽头的应许之地更绚丽。
It was you who sowed the seeds for this sea of flowers, one that is more beautiful than the promised land at the end of the world.
况且，我的人生已经圆满，哪怕预言注定了牺牲，我经历的一切也不会消散，而将在你的回忆中永存，不是么？

Besides, I have lived a fulfilling life. Even though I was fated for sacrifice, none of the things that I've experienced will dissipate. Instead, they'll forever live on as memories inside your head, will they not?
回忆中的你…怎么能是真正的你…？
How could my memories of you... ever compare to the actual you?
我也无法断言。但…无论答案是什么，无论我们如何被他人、被世界塑造——
I don't know either. But, regardless of what the answer is, regardless of how we're shaped by others, or even by this world...
自诞生起，我们存在的事实就已注定，任何事物都无法将其抹消。也正因此，我会一直、一直与你同在……
Ever since we were born, the fact that we existed was predestined, and nothing could erase it. This is why I will always, always be by your side...
毕竟，我们是天生的双子嘛。
好了，我亲爱的玻吕茜亚……
取出我的心脏，点燃「死亡」的火苗——
It's time to extract my heart and light the flame of Death...
然后，用它在预言许诺的新世界里，{RUBY_B#带去生命}播下第一枚花蕾{RUBY_E#}吧。
After that, use it to {RUBY_B#bring life}plant the first bud{RUBY_E#} in the prophesied new world.
如果，吾将「炼金」之法传习与汝……
If I imparted my knowledge of the art of alchemy to you...
汝…会为珍重之人加以运用，令之起死回生么？
Would you use it to resurrect someone you loved?
凡人终有一死。日后，一定会有我无比珍视的人离我而去……
Death is inevitable. In the days to come, I am certain that someone whom I cherish deeply will leave me for good...
如果真有如此伟大的力量，我应该…会毫不犹豫地使用它吧。
If such a mighty power really existed, I think... I would use it without hesitation.
时至今日，我的回答也未曾改变。
Even now, my answer remains the same.
This is why, sister, I promise you...
在预言许诺的新世界里，我将为你播下第一枚花蕾——
In the prophesized new world, I shall plant the first bud on your behalf...
回去吧，回到海洋之神的掌上明珠，我们的故乡。
Go now, return to the Ocean God's treasured pearl – our hometown.
我将为你洞开冥界的大门，赐你以第二次生命。地上的生灵必将响应我的呼声，将你接入神圣的白昼。
I shall open wide the entrance to the nether realm and grant you a second life. The living beings on this earth shall respond to my call and lead you to the sacred daylight.
记住，不要向死者的疆域回首，不要停下你的脚步。在预言允诺的新世界里，行向属于你的人生……
Remember, do not look back on the land of the dead and do not stop moving. In the new world promised by the prophecy, march toward your new life...
至于「等价交换」的代价…就由我来偿还吧。
As for the price of our "equivalent exchange," let me be the one to pay it.
诸君，到此为止了。可惜，我与至高之神适性不佳，没能彻底把这家伙的灵魂熔于己身。不过，能从中窥探到这些，也足够令人振奋——

Everybody, we've come to the end. Unfortunately, I am not compatible with the supreme being, so I was unable to completely fuse their soul into my own body. However, being able to glean all this from them is exciting enough...
不会错：在世人熟知的泰坦诞生前，也有一群英雄行走大地。他们听凭预言，逐一接过神权，最终成为了新世界的众神……

I'm certain of this now: Before the Titans that we are well acquainted with were born, a group of heroes roamed the land. These heroes followed a prophecy and took possession of divine authorities one by one, until they eventually became the pantheon of the new world...
正如今日的逐火之旅——翁法罗斯的历史是一种「轮回」。
...Just like the Flame-Chase Journey of today. Amphoreus' history is cyclical in nature.
呵，真是十足令人震撼哪…所以背负「火种」的半神，亦将在世界尽头成为新的泰坦，再造天地？
Heh, what a startling revelation... This means that the demigods who bear the Coreflames will also become the new Titans at the World's End, thereby shaping a new world?
我相信，这就是神谕中「再创世」的真相。
I believe that this is the truth behind the "Era Nova" as mentioned in the prophecy.
而且，过去那对双子…即便她们真是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}本尊，如今也依旧不知去向……
Besides, those twins in the past... Even if they really are {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, their whereabouts are still unknown even today...
当真不知去向么？那位玻吕茜亚说过了吧，诞生了炼金与巨龙童话的海滨小城……
Are their whereabouts truly unknown? Didn't Polyxia mention that seaside town — the birthplace of alchemy and the tale of the dragon...
<color=#dbc291ff>斯缇科西亚</color>——在我们的世界里，也有一座城邦完美符合这描述。
In our world, there exists a city which perfectly matches that description: <color=#dbc291ff>Styxia</color>.
可那里信仰{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}，和{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}并无关联。我也从未去过那里，在哀地里亚的时光…它早已是一片被淹没的废墟了。

But the people there worship {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} and bear no relation to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. I have also never been to that place, as in the time of Aidonia... it had long turned into underwater ruins.
贤者之石，「智种学派」的杰作，以贤人的血肉为根基，将其全数智慧炼就而成的实体。
The Nousporists' masterpiece: the Philosopher's Stone. It was made by transmuting all of the Sages' wisdom into a single entity, with their flesh and blood as its foundation.
记得吗？我说过炼金是转化、淬炼和扬升的艺术，这也同样适用于追求真理。无论多么难以置信，世界的真相已从杂质中精炼而成。

Remember? I've mentioned before that the art of alchemy is all about conversion, tempering, and ascension. This process also applies to the pursuit of truth. Regardless of how unbelievable this sounds, the truths of the world have been refined from the impurities.
<color=#dbc291ff>想想巨龙童话——这枚石子定将指引你回到真正的故乡，重铸冥界大门，找到</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>死亡之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>塞纳托斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的下落。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Think about the story of the dragon. This stone will lead you to your real hometown, allowing you to reform the door to the nether realm and discover</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Death Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Thanatos</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>'s fate.</color>
汝还是一副胜券在握的样子哪。可要是汝猜错了呢？
You still look as confident in your victory as ever, but what if your conjecture is wrong?
那也很简单，向全世界承认实验失败了就是。
Simple. I shall merely admit to the entire world that my experiment was a failure.
但我的思想绝不会失败，因为我已将「怀疑」的种子播在每个人心中。
However, my line of thinking will not fail because I have already planted the seeds of doubt into the hearts of the masses.
用行动证明吧，遐蝶。决议马上要开始了，别忘了你的承诺。
Actions speak louder than words, Castorice. With the assembly about to begin, don't forget the promise you've made.
我已走过漫长的寻索，不介意再做一次尝试。在我们交谈的当下，{NICKNAME}的生命也在一分一秒地流逝……
I've already searched for so long, I'm willing to try one more time. While we converse, {NICKNAME}'s life is also slowly slipping away...
但临行前，我还有一个问题：我们方才所见的一切究竟是…？
But before I leave, I have another question: What exactly did we witness just now...?
<color=#dbc291ff>那是烙印在{RUBY_B#卡厄斯}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}灵魂中的{RUBY_B#记忆}世界{RUBY_E#}。</color>
若想证明它，也必须由你写下最后一步。去吧，别让我失望。
If we are to prove its existence, you must take the final step. Go, do not disappoint me.
别心急，我一直都记得你的问题。
Don't get antsy, I still remember the question you posed to me.
我是个学者，不想也不能给出模棱两可的结论。等她找到证据，我们再聊这事。
As a scholar, I do not wish to offer up ambiguous conclusions. Let's discuss this topic again when she manages to find the evidence.
吾只是想说：那石子乃是汝用心脏炼成而来的罢？
I merely wanted to ask: Was that stone transmuted from your heart?
If so, rebirth... is no longer an option for you.
有何不可？我年幼时失去了至亲，年少时放弃信仰，不久前虽被你捡回条命，却还是丢了灵魂……
Why not? When I was a child, I lost someone dear to me. When I was a teenager, I lost my faith. A while back, although you saved my life, I also lost my soul in the process...
现在不过是又抛弃了肉身而已，何必大惊小怪？
Now, I'm merely forsaking my body. What's the big deal?
为何偏要急着赴死，活着不好么？
Why are you always finding ways to die? Isn't it good to be alive?
不过是向至纯粹者转化时，必要的牺牲罢了。
This is but a necessary sacrifice on my path to transform into the purest of them all.
呵，死者能称作至纯粹者么？而且，倘若汝那猜想得以证明，岂不反坐实了神话的真实性，令汝的理论前功尽弃？

Heh, can someone who's dead even claim to be the purest of them all? Furthermore, if your hypothesis is proven correct, does it not just confirm that the myths are true and thereby invalidate all your theories?
不，恰恰相反。如果我的猜想真能应验……
No, it's just the opposite. If my hypothesis is correct...
那也就代表——我完全可以登上神座，重塑你们创造的荒谬世界了。
It means that I can actually ascend to godhood and reshape this absurd world that you all have created.
历史发生的时序已为既定……
The sequence of historical events is already set...
按序揭露它的真相吧，英雄们。
Reveal its truth in order, heroes.
..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."
呵…瞧瞧我们逮住了谁，一个陈旧迂腐的旧神信徒！
Ha... look who we've caught — an old-fashioned disciple of the ancient god!
你那弱小的泰坦早已被强大的女武神征服，它现在的模样跟锻炉里经年累月沉积的废料无异。
The frail Titan was conquered long ago by the mighty warrior goddess. Now they're nothing more than rusted scrap, left in the forge to decay over countless years.
皈依我们吧，活在往日传统里的可怜人！我们会帮你修复愚钝的认知，让你能和同胞们共享塞涅俄丝的荣光……
Surrender to us, relic of a bygone era! We'll reshape your clouded mind and grant you a place alongside your kin in Seliose's glory...
你们所谓的「修复」，难道不是对心灵和肉体的双重折磨吗？
Your so-called "reshaping" is nothing more than torment, both in body and mind.
不…我宁愿就此死去，也不会屈服于你们这群假称信仰、恣意妄为的卑鄙狗鼠……
No... I'd rather die than give in to hypocrites like you, hiding behind empty faith and wielding power as you please!
哈…哈哈哈哈！看啊，你们都看到了吗——这迂腐的家伙，她是个多会引人发笑的虚伪之徒哪！
Hahaha! Take a good look at this pathetic fool! Do you see it? What a laughable hypocrite!
You're one of the Sunfolk, aren't you?
告诉我，在你们以信仰为由压迫手足同胞，令众生陷于无尽暴晒之苦时——可曾料想过，那轮烈日也有坠落的时刻？
When you oppressed your own under the guise of faith, leaving countless souls to suffer endlessly under the scorching sun — did you ever consider that even the fiercest sun could one day fall?
省去无用的狡辩吧，活在旧世界的废人。「我宁愿就此死去，也不会屈服于你们这群假称信仰、恣意妄为的卑鄙狗鼠」——
Spare us your empty excuses, relic of the old world. "I'd rather die than give in to hypocrites like you, hiding behind empty faith and wielding power as you please!" —
——你刚刚已经给自己判了死刑，我们要做的事不过是顺水推舟而已。
— You've already sentenced yourself. All we're doing is following through.
动手吧，利落些。赏她的脖颈一个平整漂亮的切口。
Do it. Make it clean. A single, sharp cut across the neck.
…刻法勒以自身为模捏塑出的造物，却唯独没能继承它的博爱和包容。
...The creations shaped by Kephale in their image failed to inherit their compassion and acceptance.
我没事，白厄阁下。我…大概也料想到了这个结果。
I'm fine, Lord Phainon. I... expected this.
只是联想到塞涅俄丝向泰坦宣战前怀揣的单纯愿景，这副画面会令我格外痛心……
It's just... thinking about the vision Seliose held before declaring war on the Titan... this sight is deeply heartbreaking.
见证天空之子的真实历史。
Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.
塞涅俄丝的胜利没能改变她的族人。一部分天空之民将她奉为新的神明，转而开始压迫不愿抛弃旧日信仰的人们……
Seliose's victory couldn't change her people. Some Skyfolk revered her as a new goddess, and began to oppress those unwilling to abandon their old beliefs...
她向泰坦宣战前怀揣的单纯愿景，全都化作了泡影。
The simple vision she carried with her before declaring war on the Titans... became an illusion.
..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."
请帮帮我们，请拯救我们这些被遗弃的天空之子……
Please... help us, the forsaken Skyfolk...
…凯妮斯阁下，遵行阴影之道的强者。
...Lady Caenis, you are the strong one who follows the path of shadows.
是「清洗者」…！难道天空之子和他们勾结在了一起？
The "Cleaners"...! Did the Skyfolk conspire with them?
我们已经听闻，你们以流着黄金血的异人作为猎物，志在清洗那些诅咒之子给世间带来的污秽。
Word has it you hunt those with golden blood, all in your quest to cleanse the world of the filth of those cursed offspring.
请为我们主持正义吧，那流着金血的魔女偷袭了骄傲的晨昏之眼，践踏了它尊贵的神格。而神明陨落的代价，竟要由我等虔信的天空子民来偿付！

Deliver justice for us. The witch with golden blood struck down the proud Eye of Twilight, desecrating their divine grace. Yet, it is we, the devout denizens of the sky, who are forced to pay the price!
我能嗅到你们的绝望，天空之子…清洗者与凡人站在统一战线，我们会协助各位铲除那渎神的混血儿。
I can smell your despair, Skyfolk... The Cleaners are on the side of mortals. Together, we'll erase that blasphemous bloodline from this world.
但「阳雷骑士」和她的异兽太过强大，没人能从正面战胜他们。因此，我们会教给各位一切能够活用的「计谋」……
The Daythunder Knight and her fantastic creatures are far too strong. No one can hope to defeat them in a direct fight. But we'll show you every trick, every strategy you can use to turn the tide...
为了反抗，那些旧日的信众不择手段，甚至不惜与清洗者合作……
In their desperation, those ancient disciples were willing to do anything — even ally themselves with the Cleaners.
但我猜他们没能成功，对么？
But I'm guessing their plan failed, didn't it?
那些刺客刻毒，但不愚蠢。他们从未敢打过塞涅俄丝的主意。
Those assassins were vicious, but not foolish. They never actually dared to attack Seliose.
他们并非出自真心实意帮助受压迫者。他们真正想要「清洗」的，是混藏于天空之子中的无辜黄金裔。
They weren't driven by any genuine desire to help the oppressed. Their true targets were the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden among the Skyfolk.
但这背后的一切阴谋，我们都是后来才得以知晓。
These schemes only came to light long after the damage was done.
逐火之旅开启前，黄金裔曾为争夺神谕的「正统」掀起战争，缇宝老师的众多分身也曾受到牵连。
Before the Flame-Chase Journey began, the Chrysos Heirs waged war against each other over who was a "legitimate" heir of the prophecy. Even Tribbie's many selves were pulled into the chaos.
彼时的人们会将黄金血视为诅咒…情有可原。
At the time, golden blood was seen as a curse. Honestly? It's easy to see why.
可塞涅俄丝，她在哪里…那时的她，究竟是以怎样的复杂心情看待这一切发生呢？
But Seliose... where was she in all of this? What thoughts weighed on her mind as she watched everything unfold?
你马上就会知晓了，风堇姑娘。
You'll know very soon, Miss Hyacine.
见证天空之子的真实历史。
Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.
受到残害的旧信徒不惜与清洗者合作，但那些刺客从未想过正面招惹强大的塞涅俄丝，只将匕首对准了混藏于天空之子中的无辜黄金裔……

The oppressed old believers didn't hesitate to team up with the Cleaners, but those assassins had never thought of directly provoking the mighty Seliose. Instead, they trained their daggers on the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden in the Skyfolk's midst...
塞涅俄丝…那时的她，究竟是以怎样的复杂心情看待这一切发生呢？
Seliose... how exactly would she have felt to witness all this transpire?
你马上就会知晓了，风堇姑娘。
You'll know very soon, Miss Hyacine.
见证天空之子的真实历史。
Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.
对人子感到绝望的塞涅俄丝给天空之子降下了死刑，将他们抛入了我们脚下滚烫的黄金池中……
Seliose gave up on the children of humanity, and handed the Skyfolk a death sentence... throwing them into the boiling pool of gold beneath our feet...
而后，她选择了与艾格勒融为一体，彻底摒弃了折磨她一生的人性。
...And then she chose to merge with Aquila, casting aside once and for all the humanity that tormented her all her life.
如果这是她选择的道路，那我和先祖们…我们究竟在守望谁的夙愿？！
If this was the path she chose, then whose wish have my ancestors and I been guarding all this time!?
最后一枚历史的碎片就在前方。去拾起它吧，风堇姑娘。
The final fragment of history lies just ahead. Go and claim it, Miss Hyacine.
和彼时的塞涅俄丝一样，你也必须踏出这一步。
Just as Seliose once did, you must take this step too.
..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."
这么一来，你就无处可藏了…泰坦。
Now, you have nowhere to hide... Titan.
那是…露奈比斯和索拉比斯阁下？
Are those... Lady Lunabis and Lord Solabis?
嗯，应该是他们千年前留下的残忆。
Yes, those are remnants of their memories from a thousand years ago.
翼兽大人，你们…你们想做什么？！
Your Highness, what are you planning to do!?
我们是塞涅俄丝大人的虔诚信众…我们绝不会背弃她！反倒是这群鼠辈…他们才是背刺英雄的愚氓！
We are devout disciples of Lady Seliose... We would never betray her! It's those rats... they are the fools who backstabbed our hero!
请饶过我们吧！我们为仇恨冲昏了头脑，才会被那群黑衣人带入歧途……
Please spare us! We were blinded by hatred and misled by those people clothed in black.
请惩罚他们吧，翼兽大人！没有这群冥顽不灵的前代渣滓，天空之子才能真正团结在女武神的身边！
Punish them, Your Highness! Without these stubborn remnants of the past, the Skyfolk may finally stand united under the warrior goddess's banner!
强者欺压弱者；信仰成为迫害的借口。
The strong crush the weak, twisting faith into a tool for oppression.
弱者成为强者；仇恨的轮回亘古不变。
The weak rise to power, yet the cycle of hatred endures, unbroken through time.
塞涅俄丝已经做出宣判——
——人子的卑污是无可挽回的死疾。
— The corruption within humanity is a sickness beyond cure.
但她曾那样炽烈地爱着世人……
Yet she once loved us with such fierce devotion...
Has she... given up on us?
塞涅俄丝触碰了火种，她获得了泰坦的视野。
Seliose touched the Coreflame and gained the vision of the Titan.
她看到了神明畏惧之物——那扎根于黑暗之中，自世界的边缘滋生并吞噬一切的黑潮。
She saw what the god fears — rooted in the darkness, spawning from the edge of the world, the black tide that devours all.
<color=#dbc291ff>它逃避阴云的追逐，并非出于对烈日的偏袒，而仅是畏惧那无边的黑暗。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>They flee from the clouds not out of favoritism toward the scorching sun, but merely out of fear of that boundless shadow.</color>
而人子却私自误读神明的意图，将之铸成自相残杀的锐器……
Yet humanity misinterpreted the god's intentions, forging them into weapons for fratricide...
…这段由悲痛和惨剧酿成的历史，将以此作结。
...This history, brewed from sorrow and tragedy, shall end here.
In the name of the warrior goddess...
她究竟…为我们编织了怎样的命运…？
What kind of fate has she woven for us...?
塞涅俄丝带给凡人的寄语，由我们代为传达——
We are here to deliver the message Seliose left for mortals —
「我曾深爱的，却无力拯救的同胞们啊——」
"To my once beloved, yet now unsavable kin —"
「如今，金色的神血在我体内汹涌沸腾，天空的暴君也对我俯首称臣。我的光芒比烈日更凶猛，笼罩思绪的阴霾终于散开——」
"With golden divine blood coursing through me, even the Tyrant of the Sky bends to my unyielding light. My light burns far brighter than before, and the fog clouding my mind has finally lifted —"
「当我透过神的百眼俯瞰这渺小的大地，我终于得以下定决心。英雄的本能在驱使着我，为你们宣读命运的审判——」
"I gaze upon this fragile earth through the god's hundred eyes, and resolution fills me. A hero's instinct drives me forward, compelling me to deliver your final judgment —"
<color=#dbc291ff>「你们的未来，就流淌于脚底那炽热滚烫的金池之间——」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Your future flows between the boiling streams of the golden pool at your feet —"</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「欢欣雀跃吧，因为当众人的骨血与液态的黄金溶于一体——」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Rejoice, for as everyone's flesh and blood merge with liquid gold —"</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「你们终将理解何为真正的团结。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You will finally understand what true unity means."</color>
呵…我早已预料到这一天的到来。
Ha... I've long seen this day coming.
但这并非你的过失，塞涅俄丝。你唯一的错谬……
This isn't your fault, Seliose. Your only mistake...
…便是对「人」倾注了太多奢侈的期望啊。
...was placing far too much hope in humanity.
露奈比斯、索拉比斯，你们……
对，我们充当了塞涅俄丝的处刑官。
Yes, we acted as Seliose's executioners.
那一日，无数天空之子自晨昏之眼的穹顶坠落，被金色的熔岩吞噬。
That day, countless Skyfolk fell from the dome of the Eye of Twilight, swallowed by golden lava.
他们终其一生都在向天空祈祷，但虔诚却未能换来挣命的羽翼。
They spent their entire lives praying to the sky, yet their devotion never earned them wings to escape their fate.
Seliose... was like a completely different person.
了解到她所经历的一切以后……
After learning about everything she went through...
我只感到惋惜…但无法谴责她的选择。
I can only feel regret... but I can't condemn her choice.
了解到她所经历的一切以后……
After learning about everything she went through...
I feel the same way as you, {NICKNAME}.
如果这就是历史的真面目，那塞涅俄丝和艾格勒的融合…难道也并非是为了让世人免受天灾？
If this is the true history — was Seliose's fusion with Aquila truly meant to save humanity from ruin?
触碰火种以后，塞涅俄丝不止理解了泰坦的恐惧，还看到了它的漠然。
By touching the Coreflame, Seliose gained insight into the Titan's fear... and glimpsed their cold indifference.
艾格勒从未渴求过凡人的虔信，天空文明的建立不过是人子自行其是的结果。神话中由泰坦赠予天空之子的浑象仪，实则也是凡人的发明。

Aquila never yearned for mortal devotion. The establishment of the sky civilization was merely the result of humanity's own doing. The celestial globe, said to be gifted by the Titan to the Skyfolk in the myths, was in truth a creation of mortals.
对人性彻底失望的塞涅俄丝，开始憧憬神性的淡漠。她遣使我和露奈比斯飞向大地，去寻找传闻中能将人类与泰坦的灵魂融为一体的禁术。
Disillusioned with humanity, Seliose began to long for the detachment of divinity. She sent Lunabis and me to the earth in search of a forbidden art said to fuse human and Titan souls.
那刻夏老师的炼金术…竟在千年前就曾发挥过如此作用么？
Professor Anaxa's alchemy already achieved such power a thousand years ago?
给天空之子降下死刑的塞涅俄丝，抛弃了人性的塞涅俄丝——
Seliose, who passed fatal judgment on the Skyfolk, had turned her back on humanity —
如果这是她选择的道路，那我和先祖们…我们究竟在守望谁的夙愿？！
If this was the path she chose, then whose wish have my ancestors and I been guarding all this time!?
最后一枚历史的碎片就在前方。去拾起它吧，风堇姑娘。
The final fragment of history lies just ahead. Go and claim it, Miss Hyacine.
和彼时的塞涅俄丝一样，你也必须踏出这一步。
Just as Seliose once did, you must take this step too.
抛弃了人性的塞涅俄丝…我和昏光庭院的先祖，真的是她留下的血脉吗？
Seliose had abandoned her humanity... Then, my Twilight Courtyard ancestors... and me... Are we truly her descendants?
真相很快就能被揭开了。无论如何…我都不会逃避使命。
The truth will soon be revealed. No matter what... I will not run away from my mission.
灰宝，你会站在我身边吗？
Grayie, will you stand by my side?
直面历史，然后挑战神明吧！
Confront history and rise to challenge the gods!
再整理一下心情吧，风堇。
Take a moment to gather your thoughts, Hyacine.
嗯，你说得对…我们都需要一些时间做好准备。
You're right... we all need some time to prepare.
伟大的塞涅俄丝，我恳求你放过一条卑微的性命！
Great Seliose, I beg you — spare this humble life!
我从未伤害过任何人…你出于愤怒降下的惩罚，与我这无辜之人太过严苛！
I've never harmed anyone... The punishment you deliver out of rage is far too harsh for someone innocent like me!
— it's time to face your destiny.
等等！女武神大人…请允许我同她对话！
Wait! Please, let me speak with Her Highness, the warrior goddess!
看啊，你们看到了吗？从我的伤口里渗出的是金色的血液！没错，我也是一名黄金裔…我和塞涅俄丝大人同为被神谕选中之人！
Look! Can you see it? Golden blood is spilling from my wounds! I am a Chrysos Heir too... chosen by the prophecy, just like Lady Seliose!
塞涅俄丝，你想如何处置自己的同胞？
Seliose, what will you do with one of your own?
You are no different from the rest.
你曾是一名烈阳之子…当你的族人以泰坦的偏袒为由，用尽手段欺压他族时…你可曾为弱者挺身而出？
You were once one of the Sunborn... Did you ever rise to defend the weak when your kin oppressed others under the guise of the Titan's favor?
艾格勒陨落以后，你改变了信仰，奉我为新的神明。
You abandoned your old faith and made me your new god after Aquila's fall.
当你的同僚将刀刃对准不愿皈依的旧信徒…你可曾向他们伸出援手？
Did you offer your help when your comrades turned their blades on the faithful who refused to convert?
当创世神谕传入众生的耳中，引导黄金裔成为这破碎世界的英雄……
When the Prophecy of Genesis reached all beings, calling the Chrysos Heirs to become heroes of this fractured world...
…你可曾战胜内心的软弱，响应它迫切的召唤？
...did you overcome your inner weakness and heed its urgent call?
看吧，黄金裔…你与那些卑劣之人并无不同。
Look, Chrysos Heir... you are no different from the rest...
我的审判是公正的，只有滚烫的黄金方能净化你们的原罪……
My judgment is just — only burning gold can purify your sins...
…等等，塞涅俄丝大人——请允许我再为自己的懦弱辩护几句吧！
...Wait, Lady Seliose — please, grant me a moment to explain my cowardice!
您的神性确实将凡庸们映衬得无比丑陋…但人子于这世间踽踽而行千万载之久，尝尽了生命的困顿、看遍了可耻的缺陋……
Your divinity indeed casts our mediocrity in a harsh and unflattering light. Humanity has walked this earth for many ages, enduring life's struggles and witnessing its shameful imperfections...
即便如此，我们还是建立起了宏伟的城邦，繁盛的文明！即使常常深陷恶意的泥沼，我们依旧挣扎着爬行……
Yet, despite everything, we built great city-states and thriving civilizations! Even when trapped in the mud of malice, we continued to struggle and push forward...
<color=#dbc291ff>因为除去那些肮脏的劣根，作为凡人…坚韧亦是我们集体的品德！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Because beyond our flaws, the virtue that we all share is tenacity!</color>
哪怕要在此赌上我拥有的、以及尚未拥有的一切…我都必须在您面前跪坐乞怜，为自己争取一线生机…也为向您证明，凡人有能力救赎自己！
Even if it means risking everything I have and everything I have yet to gain... I must kneel before you, begging for a chance at life. I need to prove that mortals are capable of redemption!
这般义正词严地承认自身的懦弱…看来你已彻底抛弃了尊严。
To admit your weakness in such a righteous manner... it seems you have completely abandoned your dignity.
你说，你愿意抵押自己「尚未拥有的一切」……
You say you're willing to risk everything you've yet to gain...
说说看吧…让我听听那究竟是什么神奇的赌注。
Tell me... what kind of miraculous bet is that?
这很简单，塞涅俄丝大人……
若您愿放我一条生路，<color=#dbc291ff>我会让子子孙孙世代传颂您的史诗，直到末世掩埋所有文明和传说。</color>

Should you grant me a chance at life, <color=#dbc291ff>I will ensure that your epic is passed down through generations, sung by my descendants until the end times buries all civilizations and legends.</color>
如果传入你我耳中的救世神谕有万分之一的可能成为现实……
Should the Prophecy of Deliverance we've heard hold even the slightest chance of becoming reality...
那我的后人终有一日会回到此处，向您证明：哪怕在您眼中低劣残缺的凡人，也能拥有扛起世界的力量！
Then my descendants will return here one day to prove to you that even the flawed and imperfect mortals you disdain can bear the weight of the world!
让她走吧，索拉比斯，露奈比斯。
从现在起，她和她的后裔将同时背负天空的赐福与身世的诅咒。无论要花上多久，我都会等待那命运之人的到来……
From now on, she and her descendants will carry both the sky's blessing and the curse of their history. No matter how long it takes, I will wait for the one who is destined to arrive...
届时，再让我好生嘲谑人子那被先祖叛卖的宿命吧。
When that time comes, I'll take pleasure in mocking these mortal children on how their progenitress sold their unborn lives.
传说的真实样貌…终于完整了。
The truth of the legend... is finally clear.
我是…那位无名黄金裔的后裔？
Am I... the descendant of that nameless Chrysos Heir?
我们一族的血脉，并非继承自英雄……
Our lineage wasn't from the hero...
…而是一位在她面前乞哀告怜的无名黄金裔。
...but from a nameless Chrysos Heir who begged for mercy before her.
我和先祖们卑弱的性命…都只悬于塞涅俄丝的一念之间……
My whole clan's fragile mortal life... was simply spared on Seliose's whim...
We must not yield to her scorn.
她的判断也许没错，凡人确实身负诸多缺陷。但即便如此，人的尊严也不容践踏。
Her judgment may be true — mortals do have their flaws. But even so, human dignity must not be trampled.
人类没有她眼中那么不堪。
Humans aren't as contemptible as she thinks.
她目之所及皆是人犯下的罪恶——但我们会让她明白，那不是人的全部。
She sees only the sins we've committed, but we will make her understand that it's not all we are.
或许她心中还剩下一丝慈悲。
Perhaps there's a trace of compassion left in her.
她抛弃了凡人，拥抱了神性…她认为人子不值得拯救。
She turned her back on humanity and embraced divinity... She believes we're not worth saving.
索拉比斯、露奈比斯阁下——
请告诉我，你们在晨昏之眼守候了千年，只是为了见证那位黄金裔的后裔回到这里接受惩罚吗？
Tell me... did you wait for a thousand years at the Eye of Twilight... Just to witness that Chrysos Heir's child coming back to receive punishment?
曾经，我们尚未学会阅读复杂的人性，塞涅俄丝的视线是我们了解人子的唯一窗口。
Once upon a time, we had not yet learned to read the complexities of human nature, and Seliose's perspective was our only window into understanding humanity.
她的话语就是一切：我们的指引、宽慰、命令、训诫。
Her words were everything to us: Our guide, comfort, command, and admonition.
直到她陷入沉默，我们才学会了用自己的感官去认识人类。
It wasn't until she fell silent that we learned to perceive humanity through our senses.
与黑潮抗争的岁月里…我们一直俯瞰着大地，观察着逐火之旅的进程。我们看到了英雄们为救世踏上没有归路的征程。

During our resistance against the black tide... we watched over the earth, observing the progress of the Flame-Chase Journey. We saw heroes embarking on a mission of deliverance from which they could not return.
塞涅俄丝未能见证的团结与希望，我们代她收入了眼中。
The unity and hope Seliose couldn't see... we've witnessed in her place.
我们改变了，年轻的雅辛忒丝。我们的守望不再是为了印证人的软弱……
We've changed, young Hyacinthia. Our watch isn't about proving humanity's weaknesses anymore...
...It's about waiting for the return of the light.
塞涅俄丝大人！无论现在你是否能听到，我都想把心中所想对你述说。
Lady Seliose! I want to tell you this! Doesn't matter if you can hear me or not!
我想让你知道：我很庆幸！庆幸自己是一位默默无闻的人子之后。
I want you to know that I am glad to be born as the child of a nameless and ordinary mortal!
正因如此，我才能够向你证明：人性根底那簇坚韧的希望，并不会被时光磨灭…它只是在等待着被疗愈、呵护，直到重新焕发出色彩。
Only then can I prove to you that tenacious hope, buried in the deepest part of the human soul, has not been lost to time! It's just waiting to heal and grow, and then it will shine once more.
哪怕是最怯懦的小人物，她的心底也留有一颗种子。或许在你所处的时代，天边的光线过于昏暗，以至于种子未能发芽……
Even the most cowardly individual harbors a seed within. Perhaps in your era, the light on the horizon was too dim for it to sprout...
但是，你看到了吗？现在，千年以后——由你开辟出的道路上，走出了许多闪闪发光的英雄——
But do you see it now? A thousand years later, the path you forged is now walked by many brilliant heroes.
他们毫无保留地爱着世人，甘愿舍弃自身为人子洒下光芒。
They love the people of this world unreservedly, willing to sacrifice themselves to shine a light upon the children of humanity.
他们留下的一道道光束，会促使人们心底的种子萌发嫩芽、长出新叶，并一路滋养着他们，茁壮生长——
The light they leave behind will inspire the seeds within people to sprout, grow, and thrive, nurturing them every step of the way.
直到枯萎的大地上，重新长出一片蓊郁的森林，它将生生不息，也终有一日…能再度触及天空。
Until the barren land is reborn as a thriving forest, growing endlessly, and one day... reaching for the sky once again.
那在末世之下亦能被治愈、守护的「昏光」…就是我们选择背负不完美的人性的理由！
That "twilight," still capable of being healed and protected in the end times... is the reason we choose to bear the weight of humanity's flaws.
历史再次证明了一事：逐火之旅本身就是一场奇迹——
History has proven once again: The Flame-Chase Journey itself is a miracle —
它以一则被粉饰的谎言为始，却铺下了凡人跨越千年的救世之路。
It began with a whitewashed lie, but it laid down a path of deliverance for humanity over thousands of years.
塞涅俄丝，我们遵守了那位无名黄金裔对你许下的约定，回到了这里。不仅如此…我们还为你带来了答案——
Seliose, we have honored the promise made by that nameless Chrysos Heir and returned here. We also bring you the answer to your question —
<color=#dbc291ff>凡人能够接受改变…人性值得被拯救！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Mortals are capable of change... and humanity is worth saving!</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>这个在末世中砥砺奋进的族类，值得拥有第二次机会——我们配得上一个崭新的黎明！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Our people, forging through the trials of the end times, deserve a second chance — we are worthy of a new dawn!</color>
请助我一臂之力吧。因为我已经下定决心，<color=#dbc291ff>我们</color>已经下定决心——
Give me your strength. I've made my decision, and <color=#dbc291ff>we</color> stand resolved.
为了凡人在万丈足下建立起的一切，我会听从神谕的指引，索取{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}的火种——
For all that mortals have built, I will follow the guidance of the prophecy and claim the Coreflame of the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} —
<color=#dbc291ff>地上的人子已经归来，我们…会再度挑战天空！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The children of humanity have returned from the earth, and we... will challenge the skies once again!</color>
你还好吗？*我们*已经很久没有收到你的回信啦……
Are you okay? We haven't heard from you in so long...
虽然大概知道你为什么没有回复…但*我们*还是想留下这些话语，万一你能看到它们呢，对吧？
We think we understand why you haven't replied, but we still wanted to leave these words here, just in case you see them, you know?
恐怕这就是*我们*最后一次给你写信啦。奥莱诺斯陷入了漫长的黑夜，可怕的生物不断从黑潮里涌现，让整座城邦陷入了混乱。

We are afraid this might be the last letter we ever write to you. Oleinus has sunk into an endless night, with dreadful creatures continuing to surge from the black tide, plunging the entire city in chaos.
此时此刻，我正在努力帮助这里的人们逃离。*我们*打开了许许多多的百界门，把大家传送到了奥赫玛，*我们*的姐妹缇宝的身边……
Right now, I'm doing everything I can to help people escape. We have been guiding them through the Century Gate, sending them to Okhema, where our sister Tribbie is waiting.
维持百界门，真的是件很累的事情呀…这几天，*我们*感觉自己的身形都变小了好几圈。更别说，奥莱诺斯的领主还在四处搜捕*我们*……
Maintaining the Century Gate takes everything I have. Lately, it feels like we are getting smaller and smaller. And to make matters worse, the lord of Oleinus is still closing in on us...
但是*我们*还不能停下，因为还有许许多多的人需要救助…
Yet we can't stop now. There are still so many people who need saving.
要把他们送往安全的地方，让他们远离黑潮的魔爪…这是*我们*必须做的事。无论换做哪位姐妹，她们都一定会做出一样的决定的……
We have to get them to safety, far from the grasp of the black tide. It's something we can't turn away from. Any of our sisters would make the same choice without a second thought...
亲爱的塞涅俄丝——你成为英雄了吗？*我们*多希望你成功了呀。那样一来，就会有更多的人们相信神谕…并愿意团结在它身边了吧？
Dear Seliose — have you become a hero? We truly hope you've succeeded. If you have, perhaps more people will believe in the prophecy... and find the strength to stand together because of it.
*我们*有些累了，想要小睡一会儿…希望在梦里，*我们*能和妈妈，还有姐妹们团聚呀……
We are so tired now. Maybe it's time for a little rest... and in our dreams, we will see Mama again, along with all our sisters...
塞涅俄丝拥有弑神的力量……
Seliose possessed the strength to slay gods...
但她却无法斩除深埋于人子心中的因果。
Yet, she failed to sever the cycle of karma rooted deeply in humanity's hearts.
她无条件的宽容遭到了无情的背叛。
Her unconditional tolerance was met with ruthless betrayal.
她对人子深远的爱，烧灼殆尽…徒留无边怒火。
Her deep love for humanity was reduced to ashes... leaving behind only endless fury.
塞涅俄丝将凡人定罪，令他们坠入黄金池。最后，她的结局也……
Seliose condemned humanity, casting them into the pool of gold. In the end, she too was...
…带上那枚火种，风堇。我们的使命还没结束。
...Take that Coreflame with you, Hyacine. Our mission isn't over.
嗯…天空的火种，跟我走吧……
Hmm... Coreflame of the sky, come with me...
风堇将火种收入了掌心……
Hyacine contains the Coreflame in her palm...
真是…奇妙的感觉。很温热，很…强大。
It's a strange feeling. It's so warm and... powerful.
将它握在掌中，就感觉这世间的风儿都会为我转向…召唤雷云或雨雪，也只在一念之间。
Holding it in my hand, it feels like the winds of this world might turn for me... Summoning thunder or snow is just a thought away.
我理解你的感受，但现在……
I understand how you feel, but right now...
…这座平台摇摇欲坠，不知道还能支撑多久。得想办法离开。
...this platform is on the brink of collapse. Who knows how much longer it can hold. We need to find a way to leave.
是岁月祭司的仪器，还残留着神力么？
A Time Priest's instrument. Does it still have any divine power left?
不知道，只能赌赌看了。如果能用祷言回溯破碎的平台，就能乘着它返回入口。
No idea, but we have to take a gamble. If the prayer can rewind the shattered platform, then we might ride it back to the entrance...
…也能一并取回阿格莱雅的护符。
不能再耽搁了。各位，快走！
We can't delay any longer. Everyone, move quickly!
不妙，这台仪器太古旧了，未必能发挥作用……
This device is too old. It might not work...
没时间了，至少要把它拿回来…{NICKNAME}，快！
We're out of time. We have to retrieve it... {NICKNAME}, quickly!
"—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"
自此，白厄，你将踏上永不复还的征途。
From here on, Phainon, you shall embark on a journey with no return.
光明之所以会离席，是因为它在静候一颗太阳的升起。
Light fades only to await the sun's rise.
终有一日，你将不再因为恐惧迈出步伐……
One day, you will step forward — not out of fear...
...but to return the dawn to this world.
平台回溯到了头顶…必须想办法上去！
The platform has reset above us... We need to find a way up!
这边，身后！那道门通向外面——
This way, behind! That door leads outside —
There's got to be a path!
天象画壁…映照出了世界的末路……
The Celestial Mural is showing the end of the world.
天象画壁对世间气象的掌控早已被切断了，这里发生的一切不会影响到地上…希望如此。
The mural's control over the weather was severed long ago. Whatever happens here shouldn't affect the world below... or so I hope.
相反，逐火之旅就要成功了。
On the contrary, the Flame-Chase Journey is on the verge of success.
艾格勒是逐火之旅的第十一枚火种。而最后一枚刻法勒的火种，就被供奉在黎明云崖的议会中心。
Aquila is the eleventh Coreflame of the Flame-Chase Journey. The final Coreflame of Kephale is enshrined in the council hall at Dawncloud.
我们离完成奇迹只有一步之遥。凡人会掌控自身的命运……
We're so close to achieving the miracle. Humanity will finally take control of its fate...
...as long as we can make it out of here!
Hyacine, where are those winged beasts?
我在试着寻找他们，但画壁上的风云阻隔了感官……
I'm trying to locate them, but the storm clouds on the mural are blocking my senses!
如果那两位阁下还在…就能借用他们的翅膀逃离这里了！
We could use their wings to escape if they were still here!
但眼下只能靠自己的双腿。继续前进吧……
We'll have to rely on our feet for now. Keep moving...
偏偏在这种时候出此难题……
Why does this have to happen now...?
没时间了…既然天空堡垒是由艾格勒的神力驱动的，如果我能运用火种……
We're out of time. The fortress runs on Aquila's divine energy — if I can channel the Coreflame...
成功了！火种响应了呼唤——各位，一起离开这里吧！
It worked! The Coreflame responded. Everyone, let's get out of here!
Isn't that sound... How's that possible...
人子…你们倾覆了我在幻灭中做出的判决啊。
Children of humanity... you have overturned the judgment I once cast in disillusionment.
以一则<color=#dbc291ff>被粉饰成英雄传说，流传千年的谎言</color>为开篇，写下了壮烈的创世史诗……
Beginning with <color=#dbc291ff>a lie disguised as a heroic legend, passed down for millennia</color>, a grand epic of creation has been written...
…你们，配得上一个崭新的黎明。
...You are worthy of a new dawn.
天空之城在坍塌，是艾格勒的陨落导致的？
Is the Sky Castrum collapsing because of Aquila's fall?
用岁月祭司的仪器回溯平台吧，我们得用它逃离这里！
Use the Time Priest's instrument to rewind the platform. We have to get out of here!
奇迹宝珠——用它打开逃生的大门吧！
A Miracle Orb! Let's use it to open our escape route!
那枚宝珠在闪烁…得通过它才能打开大门！
That orb is blinking... We need to use it to open the gate!
当心！到处都在崩塌，一不小心就会坠落！
Watch out! Everything is collapsing, and a misstep could lead to a fall!
这条路恐怕没有看上去那么平坦…当心眼前和脚下！
This path isn't as safe as it looks... Stay sharp and watch your step!
The door's frame is coming down!
{NICKNAME}... you do have a knack for saving the world!
Unbelievable — you've got some impressive moves!
Stay close to {NICKNAME}... Don't fall behind!
就快到了。终点就在前方，只需要一道彩虹桥……
We're almost there. The end is just ahead. All we need is a rainbow bridge...
A West Wind Compass... leave it to me!
我们都有必须活下去的理由——
We all have something worth living for —
也都想见证奥赫玛的第二次黎明——
And we all want to see Okhema's second dawn —
终于…能稍微松一口气了吗？
Finally... can we catch our breath now?
这座平台就像一座牢笼…但愿不会出什么故障。
This platform feels like a cage... Let's hope nothing goes wrong.
各位——平台一旦停靠下来，我们就立刻冲向出口……
Everyone — once the platform stops, we make a break for the exit...
Don't hesitate, not even for a second!
奇迹宝珠——用它打开逃生的大门吧！
