A Miracle Orb! Let's use it to open our escape route!
要抓住它亮起的时机，穿过大门！
We need to get through the doors when it lights up!
Make sure you get the timing right!
这天气合你心意吗，泰坦的化身？
Does this weather please you, Titan incarnate?
那就投你所好，让你尝尝「侵晨」的烈焰吧！
Indulge in this, and taste the fiery blaze of Dawnmaker!
如果你还能听到我的声音，塞涅俄丝大人——
If you can still hear my voice, Lady Seliose —
誓言救世之人的力量…请你一定要好好见证！
Behold the strength of those who've pledged to save the world!
要想办法浇灭这股热流！
We need to find a way to quench this heatwave!
I shall strike down the false sun!
它…想要将这里烧作焦土！
They... they want to turn this place to scorched earth!
…至少，我们能抚慰世界的痛苦！
...At least, we can soothe the world's pain!
一鼓作气…斩断它的翅膀！
Let's finish this! Slice off their wings!
你，也将接受黄金的洗濯！
You, too, will be cleansed with gold!
稳住脚下！电梯井很长…赶在坠入黄金池前干掉它！
Stand firm! It's a long way down... Let's end them before we crash into the pool of gold!
Are you ready to sever the lightning?
雷雨，风暴——同样与我为伍！
Thunderstorms and tempests walk by my side!
Thunder and lightning are the cries of their fury...
还有一个世界等着被拯救……
There is another world waiting to be saved...
我们…不打算在这里和你同归于尽！
We... have no intention of dying here with you!
是黑潮裹挟着它起死回生了吗？
Did the black tide bring them back to life?
火种已经被取走了，它却还在行动……
The Coreflame has been taken, yet they still move...
I hear it, the echo of the apocalypse...
黑暗的末世…必须被照亮……
We must bring light to these dark times!
Bestow upon us the healing rainbow!
Almost there... keep the momentum going!
天空的英雄，苏醒过来吧！
The first and only god that Dawnmaker will slay —
千年前，刻法勒祭司的寝宫……
Thousands of years ago, in the sleeping quarters of Kephale's priests...
值钱的玩意，到底藏在哪儿呢……
Seriously, where did they hide that thing...
破烂、还是破烂…这是啥？不管了，总之先收着……
Trash, just trash... What is this? Never mind. I'll take it anyway...
肯定就是这个！大司铎私藏的「全世宝石」，传说是黎明机器剥落的一部分……
It must be this! The Gem of All Worlds that the Chaplain secretly stashed away, said to be a fragment peeled from the Dawn Device...
嘿嘿…隔着这小盒子我都能闻到上等宝贝的香甜味儿了。什么为信仰奉献一切的大司铎，不还是充实了私人小金库嘛……
Heh, I can already catch the sweet scent of treasure seeping from this little box. So much for the Chaplain's devotion to faith — it turns out he's just been padding his secret stash...
为了这小玩意，我可是在祭司院蛰伏了大半年啊！每天听那群死板的祭司学徒念经，猫脑都快烧坏了……

I've been lurking in the Priestly Court for over half a year just for this little trinket! Day after day, listening to those stiff priest apprentices drone on with their prayers. I thought I was going to lose my mind...
Good thing persistence pays off, heh...
（阿提卡斯？这名字耳熟…哦，是他最偏爱的那个祭司学徒吧？人们眼中钦定的下任大司铎……）
(Atticus? That name rings a bell... Oh, he's the apprentice the Chaplain favors most, the one everyone expects to be the next Chaplain...?)
（不接话也不好…先用{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的力量顶着吧？）
(Not saying anything would feel awkward... maybe I can hold it together with {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s ability for now?)
阿提…卡斯？你为何…不回应……
*老…咳，大司铎，是我。我是来帮您换药的。*
Old... ahem, Chaplain, it's me. I'm here to assist you with your medicine.
啊…感谢你。若无你照顾，我早就咽下最后一口气，被{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}收归冥河了……
Ah... thank you. Without your care, I would've long been claimed by {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and carried to the River of Souls...
*哦…您不用如此客气，恩师。照顾病榻上的您，是我应尽的本分。*
Oh... no need to thank me, master. It's my duty to care for you while you recover.
（这老头，病得比想象中还严重…看来是祭司们在有意隐瞒他的病情哪。）
(This old man is way sicker than I thought... Looks like the priests are deliberately hiding how bad it really is.)
阿提卡斯…我能感觉到，自己的生命在飞速流逝，不知何时便会坠入永眠……
Atticus... I can feel my life slipping away, fading faster with every moment. I don't know when eternal sleep will claim me...
所以…最后还有一件事…我必须要告诉你……
There's one last thing I must tell you...
（还有一件事？等会儿，莫非…老家伙还在别处藏了什么宝贝？！我嘞个翻飞之币呀，本姑娘的幸运日来了！）
(One last thing? Wait... is he hiding more treasures? Holy "Coin of Whimsy"!? Today might just be my lucky day!)
（咳，冷静，赛法利娅…你得保持冷静。）
*您会好起来的，大司铎，请保持乐观，不要沮丧。*
Stay strong, Chaplain. Keep your spirits up and don't lose hope.
*但是，但是！如果您有重要的事相托…我会全心全意地认真聆听的。*
If there's anything important you need to say... I'm all ears.
啊…这件事…极不光彩，令我羞愧。但我必须启齿…因为它关乎到你我脚下…这座圣城的存亡啊。
Ah... it's so disgraceful that it fills me with shame. Yet, I must speak... for it concerns the fate of our holy city below my feet.
（关乎这一城人的死活？至于这么夸张吗，我倒要听听是怎么个事……）
(What? The fate of the city's people? Is it that serious? I must find out more...)
我们全知的天父{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，它陷入沉默前的一刻…我于黎明云崖听见了它最后的话语……
The omniscient sky father, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, before they fell silent... I heard their last words at Dawncloud...
它说：<color=#dbc291ff>神谕已然降世，吾之使命将终，从此归于沉寂——</color>
They announced: <color=#dbc291ff>The prophecy has arrived, my mission has concluded, and I shall return to silence...</color>
（啊对对对——创世神谕，变成一块死石头的泰坦…老生常谈了，还有什么新鲜的？）
(Oh, the Prophecy of Genesis. The Titan turned to stone... Heard it a thousand times. Old news. What else you got?)
<color=#dbc291ff>永夜将至，但今后三百年…黎明机器将照拂圣城，只待金血人子塑造奇迹……</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>The eternal night is looming, but over the next three hundred years, the Dawn Device will safeguard the holy city, poised for the children of humanity with golden blood to create miracles...</color>
（嗯嗯，黎明机器，创世奇迹，陈词滥——）
(Mmhmm, the Dawn Device, the miracle of Genesis, the usual clichés...)
（等、等会儿，那老头刚才是不是说了…<color=#dbc291ff>今后三百年？</color>？）
(Wait, did he just say... <color=#dbc291ff>"the next three hundred years"</color>?)
我…向所有人隐瞒了天父给出的时限……
I... have concealed the deadline the sky father set for everyone...
我实在没有勇气…将圣城黎明的倒计时，残忍地刻在公民的心中啊……
I lacked the courage to carve the countdown to the city's new dawn into the hearts of its people...
阿提卡斯，你…比我勇敢百倍。你能完成…我未曾做到之事吗？
Atticus, you... are a hundred times more courageous than I am. Can you accomplish... what I could not?
你会把那苦涩的真相…传达给奥赫玛的全城公民吗？
Will you share this harsh truth... with all the citizens of Okhema?
*请放心吧，恩师。我会替您完成这个艰巨的任务…我会补救您的怯懦带来的后果。*
Rest easy, master. I will shoulder this heavy burden for you... I'll address the fallout of your indecision.
是这样吗，裁缝女？「每个人都是世上独一无二的存在」……
Is that right, Seamstress? "Everyone in this world is unique in their own way..."
<color=#dbc291ff>我当英雄的机会…终于要来了哪。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>My moment to be a hero... has finally arrived.</color>
…以上，就是我在黎明云崖假扮祭司的经历。虽然有不少艺术加工，但句句属实。
...And that was my stint as a priest at Dawncloud. Sure, the story's been slightly embellished, but every word of it is true.
这些可都是不能泄露的天机啊。我从没跟任何人提起过，包括巴特鲁斯那家伙。
These are secrets that must remain undisclosed. I've never shared them with anyone, not even Bartholos.
能成为第一位幸运听众，你应该感到万分荣幸才对。
You should feel incredibly honored to be the first to hear this.
…唉，可惜你们现在既不能鼓掌，也发表不了评论了。
...Unfortunately, you can't clap or comment right now.
不过这都是小事！能把在心里憋了一千年的秘密一股脑都说出来，我现在可是痛快得很哪。
But that's beside the point! Getting to spill the secret I've been holding in for a thousand years feels amazing right now.
可话说回来，我是真没想到你们这些家伙会这么执着……
Honestly, I'm surprised at your persistence...
我不过故意卖了个破绽，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们看到了我把火种偷梁换柱的一幕…</color>怎料想各位真敢一路尾随我跑到冥滩来啊？
I merely staged a slip-up <color=#dbc291ff>for you to witness the switch of the Coreflame...</color> Who'd have thought you'd follow me all the way to the Nethershore?
还真被那救世小子说中了。你们这些被奥赫玛人排挤的杂碎，已经不得不一条路走到黑了……
That Deliverer kid was spot-on. You rejects, shunned by the Okhemans, have no choice but to keep moving down this dark path...
怎么回事，你们的头儿…那个叫凯妮斯的女人，好像不在这儿呢？莫非她还有什么别的计划……
What's going on? Your leader Caenis isn't here? Could she be plotting something else?
唉，真麻烦…算了，为了大家好，我还是检查下各位身上有没有什么可疑物件吧。
Ah, such a hassle... Well, for everyone's safety, I might as well check if you're carrying anything suspicious.
这制服谁设计的？口袋真多…现在早就不流行这种款式了吧？
Who came up with this uniform? It's got more pockets than it needs. Nobody wears this style anymore, do they?
当年在「金织」打正经工的时候，我倒是见过不少这种……
Back in the days when I was doing honest work for the Goldweaver, I saw my fair share of these...
Oh, what do we have here?
…接头传纸条？这通讯方式未免太原始了吧……
...A paper note? Talk about old school...
啊，对哦…裁缝女的神职消散以后，「万帷网」的速度直接从5线退化到2线年代了……
Oh, right... once the seamstress's powers diminished, the World Wound Web slowed drastically, from five threads to just two...
看来是我错怪你们了——2线网速确实还赶不上肉身传书呢。
Looks like I was too quick to judge — physical note-passing still outpaces the reduced threads.
匕首看着不错，让我瞅瞅……
This dagger's got a nice look to it. Let's see it...
唷，居然是悬锋钢的——这帮家伙的装备还挺精良。
Wow, it's crafted from Kremnoan steel — these people are well-equipped.
以普通人的标准衡量，几位的身手也算不错了。你们要是没误入歧途，怎么也能在奥赫玛当个守城卫士，领个铁饭碗吧？
By any standard, you all are quite capable. Had you not strayed, you could have been guarding Okhema, securing a stable income.
可惜呀可惜…来世记得好好做人，别再干这种危险行当了。
Such a pity... In your next life, remember to choose a safer path, and stay away from dangerous jobs like this.
面具之下到底藏着何种面孔，就让我来瞅瞅——
Let me take a look at what's hidden under that mask —
嗯…脸上倒是挺干净的。要是不戴面具，谁能想到这幅皮囊下面居然藏着那么险恶的杀心……
Hmm... your face looks innocent enough. Who would've guessed that such a pretty face would hide a heart full of darkness?
所以说嘛，怎么可能单凭面相就判断出一个人的品性优劣？不靠谱，根本不靠谱。
Appearances can be deceiving. It's a fool's game to judge someone's character just by their looks.
还真羡慕裁缝女的神权哪，没法从面相上看出来的品性，交给金线判断就行了。
It's amazing what the seamstress can do with her divine authority. She sees right through people with that golden thread of hers, beyond whatever facade they put up.
不过，要论神力的运用…我也不差，哈！
As for using divine powers... I'm no slouch myself!
唔…没有那凯妮斯的线索啊。不知道她是藏得太深，还是已经放弃治疗了？
Hmm... no trace of Caenis. Is she hiding too well, or has she given up?
嗐，反正我该做的都已经做了。接下来，就只等救世小子他们……
Well, I've done everything I could. Now it's in the hands of the Deliverer and his crew...
动静是从天边传来的，莫非……
The noise came from above, could it be...
Ha... it looks like they pulled it off.
有点实力嘛，救世小子——不过，这功劳也得记在那天外来的灰子身上吧？
The Deliverer's impressive, no doubt, but some of the credit should go to that Gray Mystery from beyond the sky.
我见识过，那家伙虽然性格有点…幽默，但实力也是强得惊人哪。
I've crossed paths with them before. They're a little quirky, but their power? Absolutely terrifying.
既然艾格勒的火种也被带走了，那么……
With the Coreflame of Aquila taken...
…逐火之旅的威胁，也就只剩下一个了。
...the Flame-Chase Journey is down to its final threat.
哎…来得还真快哪，那家伙…都不给我点时间做心理准备。
Ah... they're already here. Barely gave me a moment to catch my breath.
那么…就由本姑娘来会会你吧？
Alright then... Guess it's my turn to see what you've got!
Oh! You made it? I've been waiting for you!
黑衣剑士，盗火行者，管你叫什么名字——
Black-clad swordmaster, the Flame Reaver, whatever your name is —
你果真就像一条饿坏了的鬣狗…循着火种的气味追来了哪！
Look at you, sniffing around like a starving hyena... chasing the scent of the Coreflames!
不说话？还是懒得说话？又或者…你真的跟条蠢狗一样，连人话都听不明白？
What's wrong? Cat got your tongue? Or maybe you're just too dense to understand plain speech?
嘻嘻…悲哀的家伙，我已经摸透你了哪！
You sad little thing, I've got you all figured out!
让我猜猜——你其实一直在打最后这两颗火种的主意吧？
Let me guess — you've been eyeing these last two Coreflames all along, huh?
只可怜你一没得翅膀，二没得同伴…所以，哪怕艾格勒的火种就被放在天上，哪儿也没去——
No wings, no allies... what a pity. Even with Aquila's Coreflame sitting idly in the sky, you're helpless to reach it.
<color=#dbc291ff>你也只能苦苦等着黄金裔们把火种带回地上，然后再靠蛮力强取豪夺…对吧？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>All you can do is sit and wait for the Chrysos Heirs to bring it down, then swoop in like a brute to snatch it for yourself, isn't that so?</color>
哈哈哈哈，被我戳中痛处了吧！好几次了，我远远望着你站在悬崖边，无助地四十五度仰头望天…那景象，真是好凄惨呀！
Hah! Struck a nerve, have I? I've seen you lingering on a cliff more than once, staring hopelessly at the sky. Pathetic.
为了给你这条孤寡老狗一点关怀，今天我给你准备了一件特别大礼哦……
But hey, I'm feeling generous today — I've got a surprise just for you.
…<color=#dbc291ff>没错！刻法勒的火种就在我身上。</color>
但想把它从猫儿手里抢走……
But if you think you can snatch it from my claws...
哎唷！你怎、你是怎么跑到我前面去的？！
Ow! How... how did you get ahead of me!?
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Don't swing that thing — easy there!
你不就是想要刻法勒的火种嘛？拿去，给你！都是那救世小子让我偷来的，这玩意对我根本没用！
You're after Kephale's Coreflame, aren't you? Fine, take it! The Deliverer made me steal it! It's no use to me anyway!
看在，呃…看在咱们都喜欢黑色穿搭的份上…你就留可怜的猫咪一条小命吧？
Look, uh... since we've got the same taste in fashion — all black and sleek — how about you spare this poor cat's life?
对对对，就是这样！火种、你拿去；小命，我留下……
That's the spirit! You get the Coreflame, and I get to keep breathing — everyone wins!
…哈哈哈！果然是条蠢到不行的流浪狗！
Haha! You really are a brainless mutt, aren't you?
汪，汪汪！来呀，扔到嘴边的骨头飞了，你不会这么轻易就放弃了吧？
Woof, woof! Come on. Come on, you're not gonna let a little setback like a lost bone stop you, are you?
（…话是这么说，可我居然被追上了？这还是头一回……）
(...Well, look at that. They actually caught up with me. No one's ever managed that before...)
好久没跑得这么过瘾了，你高低得多坚持一会儿，至少让我把筋骨活动开嘛！
It's been a while since I've had a chase this good. Don't quit on me now — I'm just getting into the groove!
好猫不走回头路——别跑错方向了喂！
A wise cat doesn't look back. Don't run in the wrong direction!
什么啊，居然还没到，扫兴。
What? Still not here? Well, that's disappointing.
Oh well, I guess I'll just...
...wait around a little longer for you!
*太美丽了，斯缇科西亚…哎唷，这不盗火行者吗？*
Styxia, you're stunning... Oh? Look who it is — the Flame Reaver!
*初次…哦不对，多次见面，我是奥赫玛的大英雄，翁法罗斯的救世主！*
First time — wait, no, not the first time meeting you. I'm the great hero of Okhema, the Deliverer of Amphoreus!
*他们都说，我是注定要归还刻法勒的火种，然后在新世界背负天地的大英雄……*
They say I'm destined to return Kephale's Coreflame and carry the weight of a new world on my shoulders...
*不过，我这个人的特点，就是公平、公平、还是*多洛斯粗话*的公平！你想要火种？那就来拿吧！前提是，你得先堂堂正正地战胜我！*
But hey, fairness is my thing — fairness, fairness, and *Dolos profanity* fairness! You want the Coreflame? Come and get it! But only if you beat me fair and square!
*唉，无聊…演瘾上来了，我还想着你能稍微陪我玩一会儿呢。*
Ugh, boring... I was hoping you'd at least humor me for a little while.
蠢狗就是蠢狗，居然能被同一个套路骗上两回……
Stupid mutt. Fooled by the same trick twice...
唉，没想象中那么好玩…毕竟对面是个没理智的疯子，不擅长勾心斗角的游戏哪。
Sigh... Not as fun as I'd hoped. I guess a brainless brute isn't much fun when it comes to mind games.
（不过…真的甩不掉它吗？太不可理喻了。）
(I... seriously can't shake them off, huh... This is borderline impossible)
（那家伙肯定没那么容易善罢甘休，既然如此……）
(They're not going to back off anytime soon... Well then...)
(...Guess I'll just have to lead it somewhere higher.)
计划不能乱…把那疯狗引到高处去吧！
The plan can't fall apart... lead that mutt up high!
你还是打算前往黎明云崖吗…赛法利娅？
Cifera... Do you still plan to go to Dawncloud?
嗯，我决定好了。可别想着阻止我啊，裁缝女。
Hmm, I've made up my mind. Don't think about stopping me, Seamstress.
Is it for the Gem of All Worlds?
是不是，重要吗？反正你永远猜不出我的话是真是假。
Does it even matter? You'll never guess whether I'm lying or telling the truth.
你…还穿着我送给你的那双金靴啊。
You're still wearing those golden boots I gave you.
希望下次，你踏着它奔跑时…不再是为了逃脱他人的追捕。
I hope you're not running from someone the next time you wear them...
没人能追得上我，我早就不再为「逃亡」而奔跑了。
No one can catch up to me. I'm no longer running to escape anymore.
阴魂不散，形容的就是你这家伙吧？
You just don't know when to quit, do you?
「宿命」？哼，我还以为只有养尊处优的城里人爱把这词挂在嘴边，好像没了这两个字当借口，日子就过不下去了一样。
Fate? Hmph, I always thought only privileged city dwellers liked to toss that word around, as if they couldn't get by without using it as an excuse.
…什么轮回、宿命，别逗我了！哪个人的路不是靠自己走出来的？天天指望着神明和预言保佑的家伙，才会活成这幅人不人鬼不鬼的模样吧？
...Cycles, fate? Give me a break! Everyone has to walk their path! Those who cling to gods and prophecies end up as hollow shells of themselves.
当年的我可要更加不堪哪…坑蒙拐骗、胡作非为，就为了在这狗屁世道上活下来！要是我早早就认了命……
Back then, I was nothing but a scoundrel, a cheat, clawing and scrambling just to survive in this messed-up world. If I'd given up and played along...
<color=#dbc291ff>那这个可悲的世界，怕不是早就变成一片黑黢黢的废料场了吧！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This place would've been nothing more than a lifeless wasteland by now.</color>
唉…怪我怪我，怎能指望一个彻头彻尾的疯子听进去苦口良言？
Ugh, my bad. Why bother offering wisdom to a mad dog who wouldn't understand it anyway?
知道为什么要带你来这儿吗，疯狗——我听说，你之前跟那个金毛小狮子大战过一场啊？
Do you know why I dragged you here, mutt? Word is, you've tangled with that golden-haired lion before.
估计逃也逃不出你的掌心，今天的有氧热身也算做足了。接下来……
Looks like there's no getting away from you, and hey, that was a pretty good warm-up. Now...
How about we spice things up with a bit of competition?
同为{RUBY_B#死亡，纷争，诡计}「灾厄」{RUBY_E#}神权的继承者，我当半神的经验——可比那小狮子多出整整一千年哪。
As a fellow heir to the divine authority of {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, Trickery}Calamity{RUBY_E#}, I've been a demigod for a thousand years longer than the little lion.
现在——由我来验验你这盗火者的成色吧！
Now, let me see if you're worth your title, Flame Reaver!
A thousand years ago, at Dawncloud...
*奥赫玛的全体公民哪——今天，我要给你们带来两个消息：一则悲报，一则佳音。*
To all citizens of Okhema — today, I bring you two pieces of news: one sorrowful, one joyous.
*我首倡，由在座的诸位为逝者送上祝福：我们敬爱的大司铎福罗斯，于早些时候魂归了天父刻法勒的怀抱。愿他安息……*
First, let us offer our blessings to the departed. Our beloved Chaplain Phoros has returned to the embrace of Sky Father Kephale. May he rest in peace...
*但是，各位公民哪，请不必为他的离去哀叹！因为大司铎人生最后的时刻是幸福的，因为他在耳目明晰时听见了天父最后的嘱托……*
But citizens, do not grieve his passing! In his final moments, Chaplain Phoros found peace. While he still had his wits, he heard the final words of the sky father...
*那就是我要为诸位带来的喜报！伟大的负世泰坦陷入缄默以前，它在我的恩师耳边留下的话语…现在，我要将它传予翁法罗斯的全部世人！*

And that brings me to the joyous news I share with you today! Before the great Worldbearing Titan fell silent, they spoke one final message to my revered mentor. And now, I shall share those words with every soul in Amphoreus!
*它说：「神谕已然降世，吾之使命将终，从此归于沉寂——」*
They said: "The prophecy has arrived. My mission is complete, and now I shall fall into eternal silence..."
*「永夜将至…但黎明机器将照拂圣城，只待金血人子塑造奇迹…<color=#dbc291ff>『直到永远』！</color>」*
"The eternal night is looming, the Dawn Device will safeguard the holy city, poised for the children of humanity to create miracles... forever!"
天父的博爱，已经超越了时间…延续亿万斯年！
Sky father's love transcends time itself, stretching across endless eons!
*公民们，朋友们！作为新任司铎，我在此提议…要在黎明云崖举办为期百日的宴会，以此感恩天父的馈赠！*
Citizens, friends! As the newly appointed Chaplain, I propose we host a grand hundred-day celebration at Dawncloud, a feast in gratitude for the sky father's gift!
*我们的使命，就是把天父的话语转变成坚定的信念哪！这连续百个黎明的载歌载舞，将让翁法罗斯的每位人子相信——*
Our mission is to transform the sky father's words into unshakable faith. For a hundred dawns, through song and dance, every child of humanity within Amphoreus will come to believe —
<color=#dbc291ff>——黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭…刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>— The light of the Dawn Device never fades... Kephale's protection has no end!</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文……」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change..."</color>
阿提卡斯…咳…是个好孩子……
偷走了你的身份…我…想对你说声抱歉呢……
I stole your identity... I... owe you an apology...
可我欠了不止一句道歉的…还有你啊，阿雅……
But I owe more than just an apology... There's also you, Agy...
那时，我…咳、咳咳…我必须离开奥赫玛……
Back then, I... I had to leave Okhema...
<color=#dbc291ff>因为，你是那么地懂得洞察人心…要是留在你的身边……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You see, you were so good at reading hearts... if I had stayed by your side...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>我脆弱不堪的谎言…迟早会被揭穿哪。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>My fragile lies... would have been exposed sooner or later.</color>
你的织坊…我多想…再偶然路过一次……
Your weave shop... I wish... I could chance upon it again, just once...
被你和缇宝阿姐…呵斥一番……
To be scolded by you and Tribbie...
「但是…至少有一件事…我做到了……」
"But... at least there's one thing... I did accomplish..."
「刻法勒的火种不在这里…它现在…很安全啊。」
"Kephale's Coreflame is not here... It's safe... It's safe now..."
「哪怕到头来也只是个小偷…我……」
"Even if I'm nothing more than a thief... I..."
"...At least I did something for the Flame Chase..."
你是翁法罗斯湮没无闻的英雄，赛法利娅。你拯救了我们所有人。
You are the unsung hero of Amphoreus, Cifera. You saved us all.
…用它换来了凡人千年的余生。
...and in exchange, you earned humanity a thousand more years of life.
冷知识！多洛斯的猫儿，不仅跑得很快……
Fun fact! Dolos cats aren't just quick on their feet...
They've got the stamina to match!
说话吞吞吐吐的，跑得倒是挺快嘛？
You sure stumble over your words, but you've got some speed on you!
我要加速了，可别跟丢咯！
I'm going to speed up. Don't get left behind!
Ha, just in time to take a break.
那家伙，该不会已经在楼上等我了吧？
Don't tell me that they might already be waiting for me upstairs...
…这次怎么耍他呢？容我构思一波。
...How should I mess with them this time? Let me come up with a plan.
救世小子！你可得好好感谢我哪——
你们优哉游哉的每一秒…可都是本姑娘争取来的！
Every leisurely second you enjoy... was fought for by yours truly!
本姑娘活了一千多年，还从来没见过能跟上我速度的对手…你算头一个！
I've been around for over a thousand years, and I've never met anyone who could match my speed... until now!
但我的本事可不止「跑得快」这一项——今天，就让你开开眼！
But speed isn't my only trick. Today, you're getting the full performance!
打错人了——看来你眼神不太好啊？
Wrong target — looks like you need to work on your aim.
分身这玩意…要多少就有多少！
I can summon as many clones as I need!
哈哈哈！乖狗狗，你就这点本事？
Hahaha! Good dog, is that all you've got?
看来是我高估了你的剑术哪！
I guess your sword skills aren't as impressive as I thought!
…哎唷喂，好险没砍了我的尾巴！
...Whoo, close one, almost lost my tail!
速度又快，力气还大…你这家伙，强度有点超模了吧？
You've got speed and strength... You're a little too perfect, aren't you?
Hey hey? Don't lose focus, stray dog!
再陪我多玩一会儿呗！反正你也没别的事干，对吧？
Stick around and play with me a bit longer! It's not like you've got anything better to do, is it?
I've played with you long enough...
Meanwhile, in the Eye of Twilight...
掌心里的火种…在颤动。它在向我发出警告……
The Coreflame in my hand... it's trembling. It's sending me a warning...
白厄阁下，在翁法罗斯的神话中——<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器是艾格勒赠予刻法勒的礼物</color>，对么？
Lord Phainon, in Amphoreus's mythology, <color=#dbc291ff>isn't the Dawn Device said to be a gift from Aquila to Kephale?</color>
怎么突然问起这个？还是先回到地上……
Why bring this up now? Let's focus on getting back down there...
对。「艾格勒将黎明机器赠予了刻法勒」，是几乎所有神话作者都能达成的共识。
Yes. Nearly every mythologist agrees "Aquila gifted the Dawn Device to Kephale."
各位，请冷静下来…听我说。
Everyone, calm down... listen to me.
刚刚，天空的火种在我掌心剧烈地颤动。然后…它的一部分热量从我手中流失了。
The Coreflame in my hand trembles violently, its warmth slipping away like sand through my fingers.
它消耗了巨大的能量，只为给我留下一道箴言：<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器…熄灭了。</color>
It burns through immense energy just to leave me with one message: <color=#dbc291ff>The Dawn Device... is extinguished.</color>
What do you mean by that?
This isn't something to joke about...
如果火种给你留下的消息属实，奥赫玛失去了黎明机器的加护……
If the Coreflame's message is true, Okhema has lost the Dawn Device's protection...
来自四面八方的黑暗恐怕会瞬间吞噬圣城…那场面注定会很凄惨。
Darkness will consume the holy city in an instant... and the aftermath will be devastating.
白厄…人家，好像也感觉到了什么……
就在刚才，风堇说话的时候…有成百上千股的忆流从我们脚下散逸了出来，升上了天空……
While Hyacine was speaking... countless streams of memories rose beneath our feet, spiraling into the sky...
记忆的数量太多、份量太大，哪怕隔着堡垒厚厚的墙壁…人家还是能听得一清二楚……
There are so many, so heavy... Even through the fortress walls, I can still hear them clearly...
飞鸟、若虫、人们…他们的记忆全都混杂在了一起，全都在…哭嚎。
Birds, nymphs, people... their memories tangled together, their cries echoing as one.
难道是泰坦的殒落导致的？但这根本不合逻辑……
Could this be because of the Titan's fall? But that doesn't make any sense...
没时间追究原因了！失去了黎明机器的光芒，圣城很快会被黑暗压倒，人们会流离失所……
There's no time to dwell on the cause! Without the light of the Dawn Device, the holy city will be consumed by darkness, and countless lives will be cast adrift...
大家，你们一定要顺利回到地上，完成黄金裔的使命。而我……
Everyone, you must return and fulfill the mission of Chrysos Heirs. As for me...
丹宝，你身上还带着法吉娜的灵水，对吧？
Dannie, you're still carrying Phagousa's spirit water, aren't you?
那只是为了以防万一，现在还没到……
That was just a precaution... It's not the time...
不，是时候了。请为我开启通向涡心的道路吧，我还能为地上的人们做最后一件事……
No, the time has come. Open the path to the Vortex for me. There's still one last thing I can do for the people down there...
<color=#dbc291ff>归还艾格勒的火种，接过它的神权……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Return the Coreflame of Aquila and inherit their divine authority...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>然后，我会留在天空，为人们降下庇护。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I'll remain in the sky and cast my protection over the people.</color>
嗯。恐怕我们得先说声再见啦，灰宝……
Yes. I'm afraid this is a goodbye, Grayie...
不用思考其他办法啦，这样…已经能解决问题了。
Don't waste time thinking about alternatives. This... this will resolve everything.
我们和你一起去，正好走近路。
We'll go with you. It's the fastest way.
恐怕不行呢。「入口亦为出口」…这是一道单向门。你们还要返回圣城，归还刻法勒的火种。
That might not be possible. "The entrance serves as the exit"... It's a one-way passage. You need to return to the holy city and deliver Kephale's Coreflame.
而且，以这种方式创造的入口…只能容下一人通过，对吧？
And an entrance created this way... only has space for one person, doesn't it?
「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
"...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."
<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>
缇里西庇俄丝女士的预言…果真不会落空啊。
Lady Tribios's prophecy... It seems it didn't fail after all.
哪怕是第二次看，依旧让人觉得不可思议……
It still feels unreal, even after seeing it a second time...
你和这世上的河流、海洋，一定能形成很棒的默契呀。
You'd move in perfect harmony with the rivers and seas of this world.
可惜。我和{NICKNAME}不能久留…我们还有挂念的同伴和归宿。
But we can't stay. {NICKNAME} and I... we have people waiting for us, a home calling us back.
你们常提起的那位三月七小姐，七宝…我真的很想和她见上一面呢。
March 7th, the one you always mention... I'd like to meet her someday.
I'm sure the two of you would get along wonderfully.
我能想象你们三人结伴旅行的快活模样。
I can almost see the three of you traveling together, laughing and sharing moments.
那你呢，风堇。你不会感到悲伤吗？
And you, Hyacine? Do you not feel sadness?
当然会哦。钻心般的悲伤与不舍…我能原原本本地感受到它们带来的痛楚。
Of course, I do. A sharp, aching sadness... I feel every bit of it.
何必勉强自己？这里没人会嘲弄真实的脆弱。
Why hide it? No one here would mock you for showing true vulnerability.
但我是昏光庭院的医者呀，丹恒。面对被病痛侵扰的患者，不露出让人压抑的悲伤表情可是最基本的素养哦。
As a healer from the Twilight Courtyard, Dan Heng, it's my duty to stay composed in front of those suffering from illness. A sorrowful expression would only add to their burden.
恰好，现在生病的是我深爱的这个世界，那我又怎能在它面前露出愁容呢？
The world I love is the one suffering now. How could I face it with a frown?
请你们…一定要成为救世的英雄呀。至于史诗最后的「空白页」，那些平凡人的生命和故事……
Please, become the heroes this world needs. And as for the final "blank page" of this epic, the lives and stories of ordinary mortals...
我会将其呵护，直到最后一刻。
I'll guard them, until the very end.
数日之前，奥赫玛的「昏光庭院」……
A few days ago, in Okhema's "Twilight Courtyard"...
风堇小姐…你真的要离开了吗？
Miss Hyacine... are you really leaving?
嗯！白厄阁下已经定好了出征的日子。身为天空英雄的后裔，我必须要做好准备，担起责任。
Yes! Lord Phainon has already set the date for our departure. As a descendant of the Sky hero, I must prepare myself and carry this responsibility.
可是，这座新开张的「昏光庭院」……
What about this new Twilight Courtyard?
要相信自己，克莱门汀！你是位优秀的医者，已经可以独当一面了。
Believe in yourself, Clementine! You're an exceptional healer, more than capable of handling things on your own.
患者们都很信任你，你也配得上他们的信任…这样就足够了，对吧？
The patients trust you, and you've earned that trust... That's what matters, isn't it?
克莱门汀小姐的医术，很厉害哦——*我们*也觉得，你一定能担得起昏光庭院的牌面！
Miss Clementine's medical skills are amazing! We believe you'll make the Twilight Courtyard proud!
谢谢您，缇宝大人！我…一定会努力做到的。
Thank you, Lady Tribbie! I... I'll do my best.
我只是…还缺少风堇小姐的那份自信跟笃定。无论面对多么严重的病患或伤痛，她总是能以微笑面对……
I just... don't have the same confidence and certainty as Miss Hyacine. No matter how severe the illness or injury, she always faces it with a smile...
其实…我并不是对事事都有自信哦，克莱门汀。
Honestly... I'm not confident about everything, Clementine.
我只是比较擅长掩饰自己的不安而已——因为在我眼里，那是很重要的素养。
I've just learned how to hide my unease well — it's a skill I consider essential.
会让风堇小姐感到不自信的事…还真难想象啊。
It's hard to imagine anything making Miss Hyacine feel uncertain.
那就…举个例子吧？正好，缇宝老师也在……
Well... shall I give you an example? Since Lady Tribbie happens to be here too...
就以逐火之旅为例吧？自从阿格莱雅大人开始领导奥赫玛，每一位承担火种的黄金裔——啊，除了那刻夏老师——都是由她亲自选定的。
Look at the Flame-Chase Journey. Since Lady Aglaea took over the leadership of Okhema, every Chrysos Heir entrusted with a Coreflame — aside from Professor Anaxa — was personally chosen by her.
唯有我是例外…因为英雄塞涅俄丝指定了自己的血脉作为「天空」的继任者。阿格莱雅大人是否认可我的潜质…直到她离去的那天，我都不得而知。
I was the outlier... The hero Seliose entrusted her bloodline with the legacy of the "Sky." Lady Aglaea's thoughts on my potential remained a mystery, even up till the day she left.
所以，对于自己能否胜任这项使命…我的内心一直很忐忑呀。
So I've always carried a lingering doubt about my ability to fulfill this role.
Lady Tribbie... Why are you laughing?
因为小风堇想要的答案，其实很简单哦！只要稍微换位思考一下就能明白啦——
The answer Cinny wants is simple! Just try looking at it from another perspective.
想想看吧！以阿雅的性格，假如她认定你没有那份资质……
Imagine this: Knowing Agy's personality, if she believed you weren't worthy...
你觉得，她会完全不考虑做另外的打算嘛？
Don't you think she would have considered other plans?
嘿…这么一想，心情还真是舒畅多了呀。
Heh... now that I think about it, I feel much better.
我没有阿格莱雅大人那样的慧眼，但…我也绝对不会质疑你的信念，风堇小姐。
I may not have Lady Aglaea's keen judgment, but I would never question your resolve, Miss Hyacine.
突发奇想——在我出发之前，缇宝大人——你能手把手教我归还火种时的念词吗？
I had a sudden thought, Lady Tribbie. Before I depart, can you teach me the words for returning the Coreflame?
我之前一直留在树庭助讲，没什么机会来奥赫玛…大家都已熟记于心的语句，对我来说还十分陌生。
I've always been at the Grove helping with lectures and never had the chance to come to Okhema... The phrases everyone has memorized still feel unfamiliar to me.
等轮到我归还火种的时候…我可不想在大家面前出丑呀。
I don't want to embarrass myself in front of everyone when it's my turn to return the Coreflame.
这有什么难的？*我们*现在就可以教你！来吧，*我们*念一句，你跟着念一句——
It's easy! We can teach you right now. Let's go — we will say a line, and you repeat after us.
"...To mend the rifts of the world—"
"Fill our bodies with blood of gold..."
"Till we wither in willing service to the prophecy."
索拉比斯阁下，露奈比斯阁下……
天空后裔的使命已经完成…你们的守望终于可以告一段落了。
The mission of the Skyfolk has been completed... Your watch can finally come to an end.
即便我们是那虚假传说的源头，你还是给我们带来了解脱。
Even though we were the source of that false legend, you still brought us freedom.
请别这么说。没有两位的羽翼，我们在晨昏之眼恐怕会举步维艰。
Please don't say that. Without your wings, we would have struggled to progress in the Eye of Twilight.
奥赫玛危在旦夕，我必须尽快扛起半神的职责，以天空的力量庇佑大家。
Okhema is on the brink, and I must quickly embrace the role of demigod to protect everyone with the power of the Sky.
两位阁下，请告诉我…前方还有什么试炼等待我去完成？
Honored ones, please tell me... what trials lie ahead for me to complete?
我想，你已经完成了自己应尽的一切…风堇姑娘。
I think you've already done everything you were meant to, Miss Hyacine.
原来如此…经历了漫长的岁月，你的意志与泰坦的神性已经融合，难分彼此了呀。
I see... after all these long years, your will has merged with the Titan's divinity.
人心中的黑暗…遮蔽了我的耳目……
The darkness in the human heart... clouded my judgment...
集体深处的坚韧…我没能发觉……
I failed to recognize... the resilience buried deep within...
…那天在场的人里，我不知道他们当中有多少是无辜的，又有多少人罪有应得。
...Of those present that day, I don't know how many were innocent, how many truly deserved their fate.
所以，我无法替他们原谅你，塞涅俄丝大人……
That's why I cannot forgive you on their behalf, Lady Seliose...
先祖们的精神同我产生了共鸣。你将我们一族的流放，或许他们也无法轻易原谅。但……
The spirits of my ancestors resonated with me. You exiled our people, and they may never forgive you for that, but...
…但至少有一件事，我们可以达成共识。那是任谁也不能曲解的，关于你的真相——
...At least there is one thing we can agree on. The truth that no one can distort —
你敢于举枪反抗神明的胆气是真实的，纯粹的。那份勇气也被后继踏上逐火之路的人们继承了下来，扬厉、壮大。
The courage it took to defy the gods was undeniable, unwavering. That same spirit now lives on in those who walk the Flame-Chase Journey, growing stronger with every step.
你亲手开启了这个时代，塞涅俄丝……
You were the spark that set this era in motion, Seliose...
一个英雄辈出，史诗充栋的时代……
An age where heroes rise and epic stories are told far and wide...
一个为世人保留了希望火种的时代。
An age where a flame of hope was preserved for the world.
Perhaps... this is what I longed for...
如此…我终于能安心合目了……
Now, I can finally rest in peace...
即便在那至暗的时刻，塞涅俄丝大人，你的心底也还保留着对凡人的怜悯吧？
Even in that darkest moment, Lady Seliose, you still held compassion for mortals, didn't you?
因为，哪怕拥有泰坦的神力…你还是没有用天空的殒坠惩罚世人。我想，你或许也在等待救赎之人的出现。
Even with the Titan's power... you didn't punish the world by letting the Sky fall. I imagine you were waiting for someone to bring redemption.
请放心将天空的权柄交给我吧。我只是一名医师，即便拥有了力量，也无法变得和你一样强大……
Trust me with the power of the Sky. I am merely a healer. I could never match your strength even with that power...
但所幸…如今的世界也不再需要一位能够呼雷唤雨的半神。我需要做的，就是与天空融为一体，然后……
Thankfully... the world no longer needs a demigod who can summon thunder and storms. What I must do is merge with the Sky, and...
…降下温柔的虹光，守护尽可能多的生灵。
...Cast down a gentle rainbow, protecting as many lives as I can.
那刻夏老师…你还记得那一课吗？
Professor Anaxa... do you remember that lesson?
最后，我还是走上了先祖们的道路，回归了天空…我没能回到地上，和人们一同行走。
In the end, I followed the path of my ancestors, returning to the Sky... I didn't return to the earth, to walk with the people.
我还是实现了自己的理想呀。
燃烧的天空、破碎的巨像，还有尸横遍野…糟透了。如果这就是「翁法罗斯」内部的样貌，那确实叫人意外。
Burning skies, shattered statues, corpses strewn everywhere... What a mess. If this is what the inside of "Amphoreus" looks like, it's truly shocking.
老实说，先前我还半信半疑。但这会儿，我开始认同你的观点了……
To be honest, I was initially skeptical. But right now, I'm starting to see your point...
既然如此，黑塔。我对「翁法罗斯」世界本质的猜想，你是否也有足够的理由相信了？
If that's the case, Herta, do you now have enough reason to believe my conjecture about the true nature of "Amphoreus"?
先不展开这个话题。那智械哥——叫「来古士」是吧——还没死透呢。那大概率只是一具假身，藏在它背后的东西…还在违抗我们。
Let's not expand on that topic just yet. That Intellitron — Lygus, was it? He's not completely dead. That was probably a fake body. Something behind it... is still defying us.
必须承认：即便你我二人联手，穿透它的防护仍不是一件简单的事。
I must admit, even if both of us worked together, it wouldn't be a simple task piercing through its defenses.
眼下，我们也只能以「旁观者」的视角，窥探这个世界。
For now, we can only observe this world as bystanders.
早知道就捎上斯蒂芬了。
I knew we should've brought Stephen along.
难怪流光忆庭要找星穹列车合作，不借助「开拓」的力量，还真没法挖出这地方的秘密。可到头来忆庭平安无事，遭殃的却是无名客，真是好奇心害死阿维啊。

No wonder the Garden of Recollection wants to work with the Astral Express — without the power of the Trailblaze, it'd be impossible to unearth this place's secrets. But in the end, the Garden emerged unscathed, and it was the Nameless who got burnt. Curiosity definitely killed Aki.
那边的大家伙——就是那个正在往外喷陨石的黑球——你觉得它和那「绝灭大君」有关吗？
That big guy over there — the black ball spewing meteors — you think it's got anything to do with the Lord Ravager?
很遗憾，串流投影算力不足，我无法对命途能量展开分析。
Alas, without sufficient computational power in the stream projection, I am unable to analyze the Path Energy.
提议：当务之急是找到两位无名客的下落。对「毁灭」的研究，优先级顺延。我们需要争分夺秒，在那位智械启动反制手段前有所收获。

Suggestion: The immediate priority now is to find the whereabouts of the two Nameless. Research priority on the Destruction can be lowered. Every second counts, before that Intellitron's preventative measures kick in.
行啦，弄得紧张兮兮的。你我都合作过多少回了，哪次不是完美收官？
All right, all right, stop making a fuss. How many times have we collaborated, and when did it ever not end in a perfect outcome?
不如再附加一个任务目标：<color=#dbc291ff>玩牌的忆者告诉我，那结了冰的开拓小姑娘，很可能也被困在了翁法罗斯内部。</color>
Why not add another mission objective while we're at it: <color=#dbc291ff>The card-playing Memokeeper told me that the frozen Trailblazer girl might just also be trapped inside Amphoreus.</color>
若时间允许，我也会一同追查三月七小姐的下落。
If time allows, I will also investigate March 7th's whereabouts.
黑塔，你听到了么？从山城中心传来了迭迭哭喊，此地的生命正在经受激烈的创伤。
Herta, do you hear that? A wave of desperate cries from the heart of the mountain city. The lives there are undergoing intense suffering.
结论：蝴蝶已经扇动翅膀，一场风暴正在逼近。无名客是重要的盟友，你我有要事在身，黑塔。我恳请你……
Conclusion: The butterfly has already flapped its wings, and an impending storm closes in. The Nameless are important allies, and you and I have matters to attend to, Herta. I beseech you...
在需要作出抉择的时候，切不可因为个人兴趣，分散了心神。
In moments when a choice needs to be made, one must not be distracted due to personal interests.
啧，命运真是一场骰子游戏啊，螺丝。谁能想到呢？那玩意儿曾让寰宇生灵涂炭，令博识学会分崩离析，直到我破解了孤波算法，才为它残留的余波划上了休止符。

Tsk, fate really is a game of dice, Screwy. Who'd have thought? That thing once sowed chaos across the cosmos, causing the Intelligentsia Guild to splinter and disintegrate. It wasn't until I cracked the solitary waves theory that its lingering effects were put to an end.
可偏偏在一个无人在意的银河角落，竟然还有一台漏网之鱼仍在运转；又偏偏是它，最后成了孕育一名「绝灭大君」的摇篮……
Yet, in a forgotten corner of the cosmos, one slipped through the net and remained operational. And it was this machine that eventually became the cradle for the birth of a certain Lord Ravager...
是一台残存至今的「帝皇权杖」啊。
...is an Emperor's Scepter that survived to this day.
这就是，世界原本的样子？
This is... what the world looked like originally?
那你又为何会出现在这里？
And what are you doing here?
啊…涡心再次迎来了一位英雄。我已记不清这是第几次了。
Ah... Another hero has arrived at the Vortex. I can no longer remember how many times this has happened.
每一篇史诗的作者，均如那既定的预言所书，在此处封笔。
The author of each epic, as the prophecy has foretold, stays their pen at this point.
正如每一世演算，均如<color=#dbc291ff>祂</color>原初的设计那般，在此处终结。
Just like each cycle of the extrapolation, in accordance to <color=#dbc291ff>THEIR</color> primordial design, ends here.
不必紧张，白厄阁下。我踏入此间，只是为了一个纯粹的目的：亲眼见证神谕中「创世的奇迹」。
No need to panic, Lord Phainon. I stepped into this space purely for one purpose: To witness the prophecy's Miracle of Genesis.
…你从未展现过对逐火之旅的兴趣。在我和同伴们为火种奔走、流血、牺牲之时，你也从未伸出过援手。
...You've never expressed interest in the Flame-Chase Journey. When my companions and I ran, bled, and sacrificed for the Coreflames, you never so much as lifted a finger.
一介冰冷的旁观者，将「中立」贯彻到底的安提基色拉人…怎就突然关心起了黄金裔的使命？
An indifferent observer, an Antikytheran who is neutral till the end... Why would you suddenly express concern for the Chrysos Heirs' mission?
那孤独的剑士告别一切，只身浸入疯狂之海时，我就在岸边聆听；那伟岸的霸主卸下战甲，以铁骨填平大地的裂隙时，我就在山巅俯瞰。

When that lone swordmaster left everything behind, plunging into a sea of madness, I was on the shore, listening. When that mighty lord shed his armor, filling the crevices of the earth with his iron bones, I was on the mountain top, gazing down.
跨越千年的逐火征程，我将汝等黄金裔的苦难、决意、分裂、团结尽收眼中……
Across a thousand years of the Flame-Chase Journey, I have witnessed the ardor, resolve, division, and unity of the Chrysos Heirs with mine own eyes...
正如你们生来背负神谕的指引，在沐浴来自遥远星辰的视线之后，我同样看见了至深至暗的命运……
Just as you were all born to shoulder the guidance of the prophecy, I too, having bathed in the gaze of distant stars, have seen the deepest, darkest of destinies...
<color=#dbc291ff>我将成为史诗最忠诚的读者，将汝等英雄伟业尽收眼底的观众。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I will become the most loyal reader of the epics, a spectator voraciously consuming the valorous deeds of you heroes.</color>
终有一日，你会理解的。但不是现在。
One day, you will understand. But not now.
此刻，请忽略我这位旁观者，去完成你必须完成的事业吧，白厄阁下。
At this moment, please disregard this observer, and finish what you must, Lord Phainon.
我曾坚信，只要不断追逐火光，前路的迷雾就会散去，命运会展现它最真诚的样子。
I once believed that as long as I chased the flames relentlessly, the fog before me would clear, and fate would reveal its truest form.
但这一路走来，我们…他们，所有逝去的人，从未获得神谕应允的公正。
But along the way, we... they, all who passed, never once received the justice promised by the prophecy.
我听到了：涡心之外，世界在崩塌，人子在哭嚎。
I have perceived: Outside the Vortex, the world is collapsing, and the children of humanity are crying.
而你，白厄阁下，将用那枚火种埋葬旧世，将万物带入一片灰色的未知——
But you, Lord Phainon, will bury the old world with that Coreflame, bringing all things into a gray unknown...
——无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
It doesn't matter. This cruel Flame-Chase Journey has made me abandon my fantasies. The future is not a paradise with a gentle west wind, waiting for us to step in...
如果等在前方的是一团混沌，那就由我将它撕裂……
If what lies ahead is a mass of chaos, I will tear it apart...
...Then usher in the first ray of blazing sunlight.
众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然。
All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate.
然而这一次，无限轮回的史诗……
Yet this time, will an epic with endless cycles...
这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事……
This will be a romantic story like none that has come before...
塞纳托斯与瑟希斯的火种已经归位。
Thanatos's and Cerces's Coreflames have been returned.
那之后，又过了一段时间……
十二座星辰悬浮在虚空中，俯瞰着创世涡心。
The twelve constellations hover above, overlooking the Vortex of Genesis.
它们象征着翁法罗斯的十二位神灵：这个世界的命运、支柱、生灵和灾祸。
They embody the twelve Amphorean deities: Fate, Foundation, Creations, and Calamity of this world.
如今，其中十尊已然殒落，火种被还归于创世的起点。星座在你头顶闪烁，璀璨的光芒对应着泰坦长眠的息声。
Now, ten among them have fallen, their Coreflames returned to the origin of genesis. Above you, constellations shimmer, their brilliance echoing the faint slumber of each Titan.
而你…亲身经历了四次擢升，四场离别。
And you... have experienced four ascensions and four partings.
What a long journey it's been...
一次次分别并未令你麻木，你忍不住思考，「开拓」的旅程还会经历多少告别？你好奇，自己能否以饱满的情绪道出每一句「再见」？

Time and again, farewells haven't numbed you. You can't help but wonder — how many more goodbyes will the journey of "Trailblazing" entail? You question whether you'll be able to express each "goodbye" with heartfelt emotion.
思绪沉入海洋…你想起翁法罗斯人热衷史诗，通过故事缓和内心的哀愁。或许你也该以这种方式消解低落，重新振作起来——

Your thoughts sink into the ocean... You recall how the Amphoreans cherish epics, using stories to soothe their sorrows. Perhaps you should embrace this way to dispel your melancholy and regain your strength...
——那就开始吧。无数与冒险有关的词汇涌入你的心窍，你只需抓住其中一个作为创作的锚点……
Then let it begin. Countless words of adventure surge through your mind — you need only to grasp just one to anchor your creation...
不要被外界的喧杂影响，集中于你脑海中的关键词……
Don't be influenced by the noise outside, just focus on the keyword in your mind...
嗯，这的确很难。但你还是应该牢牢抓住灵感，编织发自肺腑的清词丽句……
Mm-hmm, it is indeed difficult. But you should still cling tightly to your inspiration, weaving heartfelt and elegant verses...
…好吧，这根本就是个不可能的任务。只看一眼手机，这绝对不会影响你的思考——你如此告诉自己。
...Alright, this is an impossible task. Just one glance at your phone. It won't disrupt your thoughts, or so you tell yourself.
天谴之矛曾一度化作狂王，为全世带去无尽的纷争，而后，于你们的奋勇下终结。
The Lance of Fury once became the Mad King, plunging the world into ceaseless strife, until your valor brought it to an end.
而继承其位的半神——不死的迈德漠斯，选择独自背负悬锋之名，还乡代冠，将其身化作圣城的最后一道防线。
And its demigod successor, the undying Mydeimos, chose to bear the title of Kremnos alone, returning home to be crowned as the last line of defense for the holy city.
Mydei, may your battles know no defeat.
其时，命运三相殿中，岁月的化身将迷迷托付于你；其时，活泼的红发少女完成了使命，与众人先一步道别。
Back then, the Incarnation of Time entrusted Mem to you at the Temple of the Three Fates. Back then, the lively girl with red hair fulfilled her mission, and bid the first farewell.
岁月不语公平，但岁月从未停驻，而如今，这份权能已然交付于你。
Time speaks not of fairness, yet it never stops. And now this power resides in your hands.
不久前，树庭贤人之首与你们相伴，将黑潮中步出的残虐威胁斥回。
Not long ago, the head of the Grove Sages helped you repel the menace that is the black tide.
仍是不久前，那位不羁的学者献上了一幕盛大演出，以生命为代价，令你们窥见了这世界真相的一隅。
And still not long past, that unruly scholar staged one grand performance, granting you a glimpse of this world's truth at the cost of his life.
理性的化身啊，在存在的尽头，你是否寻见了答案？
Oh, the Incarnation of Reason, have you found your answer at the end of existence?
神谕曾令灰黯之手选择二人，赐予其一死之命运，但她们对彼此的心意，却为各自续下了漫长的凄美诗篇。
The prophecy once made the Hand of Shadow choose two people, granting one the fate of death. Yet their bond wove a hauntingly beautiful tale that stretched across time.
最终，从冥界旅至现世的死亡半身，决意驻身那片花海，为你寻回「未来」。
At the end, the Incarnation of Death who journeyed from the nether realm to the living world chose to remain in that sea of flowers, retrieving your future.
在西风尽头再会吧，遐蝶。
At the end of the west wind, we shall meet again, Castorice.
你必须承认，在这难熬且挣扎的低谷期，依然有人过得快活。赛飞儿，她对财富的渴望滔滔不绝、倒海翻江，仿佛比鳞渊境的海水更加澎湃。
You must admit that some people still manage to live joyfully at this arduous low point in life. Cipher's endless desires for wealth seem more turbulent than the waters of Scalegorge Waterscape.
暂且忘记过去吧，它让人感到悲伤——但现在不应该哀伤，你需要前进的动力。
Forget the past for now — it only brings sorrow. But sadness has no place in this moment. What you need is the drive to move forward.
你决定前往冥河不再被阻断的斯缇科西亚，去和那位猫女汇合。希望那些闪闪发光且当啷作响的玩意，能一如既往…令人振奋起来。
You decide to head to Styxia, where the River of Souls is no longer blocked, to meet up with that catgirl. Hopefully, those glittering, clinking trinkets will, as always... lift your spirits.
冥河静悄悄的，好像发生的一切只是场梦。小蝶…她在那边还好吗？如果人家写一封信，用漂流瓶送去，她会收到吗？

And the River of Souls is so quiet... It's like everything that happened was just a dream. I wonder if Cas is doing okay on the other side? If I write a letter and put it in a drift bottle, will she be able to read it?
…不行不行，不能把气氛弄得这么沉重！
No. No! This shouldn't be so depressing!
现在不是感伤的时候，来，和人家一起——睁大眼睛，打起精神！
Now's not the time to feel down. We gotta pull ourselves together!
Now's not the time to feel down.
…说得对，约好了要继续逐火之旅，可不能让小蝶担心呀。
... You're right. We promised Cas that we'd continue the Flame-Chase Journey, so we can't let her worry.
现在不是感伤的时候，来，和人家一起——睁大眼睛，打起精神！
Now's not the time to feel down. We gotta pull ourselves together!
不过话说回来，赛飞儿小姐把我们叫到这儿，她自己怎么不见啦……
By the way, it was Miss Cipher who asked us to come here, but where has she gone...?
不知道，可是这气息…有点熟悉……
I don't know, but this aura... feels so familiar.
对，而且这气息…有点熟悉……
Yes, and this aura... feels so familiar.
…{NICKNAME}，我们一起过去看看吧。但千万要小心……
... {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out together. Be very careful...
I... I have a bad feeling about this.
看，地上那块东西是什么？…要把它捡起来看看吗？
Hey, what's that on the ground? Should we pick it up...?
It's... a piece of black cloth?
好眼熟呀，是不是在哪儿见过……
Now, where have I seen this before...
这…怎么会？它怎么会在这里……
Wh—What? How could they be here?
Did someone rip off a piece of my clothes?
Wha— No. Your clothes are perfectly fine!
这是…是那「盗火行者」的斗篷？！它怎么会在这里……
Could this be from... the Flame Reaver's cloak!? Why is it here?
冷静！它的力量，咱们都见识过……
Wait! We both know what this thing can do...
粉色小狗才是你的目标！
You want the pink puppy, don't you?
好伤心！这会儿就别开玩笑了——
I — What? Now I'm sad! This isn't the time for jokes —
Is it finally time... for me to bow out?
D—Don't give up just like that!
总之，我们先尽力和它周旋吧！一旦抓住破绽，就发动「岁月」的权柄，躲到往世中去！
Let's try our best to deal with them for now, and we'll slip into the past with Time's power as soon as we can!
Is full of fish... Big and delicious.
Is this meant to be a riddle?
好、好陌生的语言，人家是不是出现幻听了……
I—I don't understand this language at all. Am I hallucinating...?
The Flame Reaver's gone mad. The end.
这、这早就是共识了吧？可现在是性命攸关的紧急情况——
W—We already knew about the mad part! But are we still in danger...?
哈哈哈哈…对不住了，看见你俩毫无防备地站在那儿，我就忍不住想吓唬吓唬哪！
Ahahahahaha... Sorry. I couldn't pass on the chance to give you two a good scare!
What a terrible person. Let's leave.
This Cipher must be fake too. Run!
哎唷，别跑别跑——我是真的赛飞儿，如假包换！
Ah! Don't run! I'm the real Cipher! The real one!
别生气呀，整这一出只是为了给你们提个醒，翁法罗斯可一点都不安全，全是流窜的威胁，包括那个黑衣剑客…不管在哪里都要提高警惕！

C'mon, don't be upset. I'm just giving you a kind reminder that Amphoreus isn't safe at all. The whole place is full of dangers, including that swordmaster... Make sure you stay on your toes, no matter where you are!
So you're playing both good cop and bad cop.
就是找补一下，人之常情嘛~
Hey, I'm just making it up to you. You'd do the same in my shoes.
Well, ain't I grateful for the reminder.
哎，我就是给自己找补一下，你可别记仇啊！
Hey, I'm just making it up to you. You're not gonna hold that over me, are you?
我强得可怕，根本用不着。
I'm so strong that I don't need your reminder.
嗯？可我看你刚才，明明吓得灰毛都竖起来了哪？
Really? But just a minute ago that gray hair of yours was all standing up, you were so scared.
所以，那「盗火行者」是赛飞儿小姐的伪装？骗术？像真的一样…这就是「诡计」半神的力量？
So... was that a Flame Reaver disguise? Or a magic trick? It looked so real... Is that the power of the Trickery demigod?
伪装？不不不，可不是这种骗小孩子的把戏，让我想想该怎么解释……
Disguise? No no no, it's not as simple as that. Lemme think about how to explain this...
打个比方，刚才，你们认出那块碎布是盗火行者的东西以后，心里想的是什么?
For example, what did you think when you realized that piece of cloth came from the Flame Reaver's cloak?
嗯…「难道盗火行者在这附近」？
Hmm... We thought that maybe the Flame Reaver was around here somewhere?
没错。然后，你们听到了脚步声——是我故意发出来的——那时，你们心里又在想什么？
That's right. And then you heard some footsteps. What did you think when that happened?
Well, we thought it must be the Flame Reaver coming this way...?
对咯，就是这样——我所做的，只是通过各种诱导和暗示，让你们对一件并不存在的事信以为真……
Yep, exactly. I just used some hints and mental suggestions to help you believe in a lie...
<color=#dbc291ff>「谎言」——这才是扎格列斯的招牌，只要人人信以为真，假象也能化作现实！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Lies" are what Zagreus is best at. If everyone believes in a lie, then it becomes reality!</color>
化谎言为真实的力量…真叫人家粉毛倒竖呀！
A power to make lies into reality... That's got all my hairs standing up!
哈哈，这下套出你的秘密了！
Nice! Now I know your secret!
你桀骜不驯的样子真可爱哪，小灰子~
I sure love your arrogance, Gray Mystery~
你就这么全部抖出来了？
And... you're just telling us everything like that?
怕我话里有诈？哈，大可不必！
You think I might be lying? Pfft. No need.
裁缝女那么信任你，自有她的道理。像你这样的老实人，想坑也坑不到本姑娘，所以——告诉你也无妨。
The seamstress trusts you for a reason. Someone as honest as you couldn't trick me even if you wanted to, so there's no harm in telling you.
况且咱们还得搭伙寻宝呢，对吧？闲话就说到这儿，该出发咯……
Besides, we still need to team up to go treasure hunting, right? Let's wrap up here. It's time to get going~
嚯…你可真受欢迎啊。但凡事讲究先来后到，先陪我搞定宝贝的事，我再送你俩去树庭呗？
Heh, aren't you a popular one? But I got to you first, so help me with the treasures, and then I'll send you two to the Grove.
话说回来，你要那么多钱干嘛？
Why do you need so much money anyway?
好奇心还真重哪…你以为我会到处挥霍？哈，我打捞宝藏可不是为了这个。
Curiosity killed the cat, you know? Do you think I'll spend it all? Pfft. That's so not why I hunt for treasures.
捞完这笔，打算去哪潇洒？
Gonna go live handsomely somewhere after this?
潇洒？你是指，消费？哈，我打捞宝藏可不是为了这个。
Live handsomely? You mean, spend all this money? Pfft. That's so not why I hunt for treasures.
别忘了，我也是半神，那愚蠢的预言也有我一份：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文」……</color>
Don't forget. I'm a demigod too, and there's a line reserved for me in that stupid prophecy as well... <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change."</color>
但本姑娘不信这个，只要不断敛取宝藏，就不至于落得身无分文的下场；只要不因为自己的欲望害得其他人遭殃，就算不上「贪婪」——对吧？简简单单。

But I don't believe in that. As long as I keep collecting treasures, then I won't need to care about petty change. And as long as I don't hurt other people when I get what I want, I won't be "walking with greed" — right? Isn't that simple?
只要我顺着这条路奔跑下去，什么注定实现的预言、宿命…都追不上我。
So, as long as I keep going down this path... all those predestined prophecies and fates will never catch up to me!
哎，这一连串话说得，我嘴皮子都快磨破了！斯缇科西亚的财宝还在水底下等着咱们哪，赶紧让我见识见识「岁月」的神力吧，灰子？
Phew. That was a long speech. I'm getting thirsty at this rate! The treasures of Styxia aren't gonna float up on their own. Come on, Gray Mystery, show me what the authority of "Time" can do!
多亏了灰子和粉松鼠，这古城的宝贝全都浮出水面咯！
The treasures in this ancient city are all floating back up thanks to Gray Mystery and that pink squirrel!
我在黄金裔建议下接受了「岁月」的试炼，却发现自己早在进入翁法罗斯时就已经「死去」。为了寻回我被夺走的未来，众人加快步伐寻找「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯的踪迹。

Following the advice of the Chrysos Heirs, I embarked on the trial of Time, only to learn that I had been "dead" since the moment I stepped onto Amphoreus. To reclaim the future that had been stolen from me, we pushed onward in pursuit of the Death Titan, Thanatos.
另一边，神悟树庭七贤人那刻夏脱离金线监视，主动寻求元老院的庇护。在获得元老院信任之后，他与寄宿体内的「理性」泰坦瑟希斯一同登上云崖，觐见「负世」泰坦刻法勒。

Meanwhile, Anaxa, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, broke free from the surveillance of the golden threads and actively sought refuge from the Council of Elders. After winning the Council's trust, he ascended Dawncloud with Cerces the Reason Titan who resided within him, and sought an audience with Kephale the Worldbearing Titan.
为了换取冥界入口的信息，遐蝶只好促成元老院提出「暂停逐火之旅」的议题，并在半神赛飞儿的帮助下，赶往龙骸古城•斯缇科西亚。

To obtain information about the entrance to the nether realm, Castorice had no choice but to support the Council of Elders in proposing a pause in the Flame-Chase Journey. With the aid of the demigod Cipher, she set out for the Dragonbone City — Styxia.
遐蝶成功炼成死龙•玻吕刻斯，并利用它回到冥界见到「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯，并将泰坦火种与夺走的未来悉数归还，翁法罗斯的生死流转重归有序。

Castorice successfully recreated the Netherwing, Pollux, via alchemy and used its power to return to the nether realm, where she faced Thanatos the Death Titan. She returned both the Titan's Coreflame and the stolen future, restoring the cycle of life and death in Amphoreus.
那刻夏的灵魂在冥界见到遐蝶，完成了创世猜想的证明。他在公民大会上投出关键一票，并利用渎神罪行重挫元老院夺权野心，使「逐火之旅」得以继续。

Anaxa's soul met Castorice in the nether realm, where he proved his hypothesis regarding creation. At the citizens' assembly, he cast a pivotal vote and used the charge of blasphemy to thwart the Council of Elders's schemes for power, allowing the Flame-Chase Journey to continue.
那刻夏归还{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种后，肉身彻底归殁。至此，「逐火之旅」即将到达尾声，众人将目光移向天空……

After returning {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame, Anaxa's physical body completely disappeared. With this, the Flame-Chase Journey neared its conclusion, and all eyes turned skyward...
数日后，在命运重渊的车厢坠毁点……
A few days later, at the crash site in the Abyss of Fate...
…原来这便是您口中「星穹列车」的一节。我的忆库又增添了一则有趣的见闻。感谢您的引领，丹恒阁下。
...So, this is the car of the Astral Express you've spoken of. My repository of memories has been enriched with another fascinating piece of information. Thank you for leading me here, Lord Dan Heng.
没想到您贵为元老会的议员，竟愿意远道来此查勘列车。
I'm surprised a Council Elder like yourself would be willing to journey so far to inspect the Express.
奥赫玛人尊重智慧，渴望知识。若满城公民都知晓了二位的来历，想必会有更多人对「开拓」产生兴致——可惜对「天外之界」的探讨至今仍是禁忌。

Okhemans hold wisdom and knowledge in high esteem. If the citizens knew of your origins, I'm sure more would be intrigued by "the Trailblaze." Sadly, discussions about the "world beyond the sky" remain taboo.
距两位阁下初临奥赫玛已经过去许久，想必你们一直在寻找离开的方法？
It's been quite some time since you first arrived in Okhema. Presumably you've been looking for a way to leave ever since?
我确实在持续搜集线索，做各种尝试。可惜了解得越多，无力感也就越强。
I've been actively gathering clues and testing different things. Sadly, the more I find out, the more powerless I feel.
阁下不必自咎。令翁法罗斯众多学者费神千年的难题，即便您天资过人，也不可能于一朝一夕间得到解答。
Don't be too hard on yourself, my lord. This puzzle has stumped Amphoreus's scholars for centuries. It isn't something you can solve overnight... even someone as gifted as yourself.
在树庭，我找到许多有关天空泰坦的研究，也了解到翁法罗斯的学者大多把「天外之界」的禁忌归结于艾格勒降下的诅咒。
In the Grove, I discovered extensive research on the Sky Titan. It appears that many scholars from Amphoreus believe the taboo against the "world beyond the sky" stems from a curse cast by Aquila.
正是。在翁法罗斯的十二位泰坦神明中，艾格勒是最为阴晴不定的一位。
Exactly. Of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus, Aquila is known for being the most capricious.
它的喜怒会显化为世间的天象：晴时平静，雨时哀愁。它的吐息是料峭的微风，尖啸则是惊鸿的雷电。
The weather itself reflects their mood: Tranquil sunshine, mournful rain. Aquila's breath is a brisk wind, and their cries resound as thunder in a storm.
它也是火种尚未被归还的两位泰坦之一。
Additionally, Aquila is one of the two Titans whose Coreflames have yet to be returned.
我们头顶的天空与每一位公民息息相关，将讨伐艾格勒留到逐火之旅的最后，想必是阿格莱雅女士经过深思熟虑制定的战略。
The sky above affects every citizen. It's clear that Lady Aglaea's decision to confront Aquila at the end of the Flame-Chase Journey was a carefully considered strategy.
如果归还艾格勒的火种能令天空诅咒失效，那我们也不必费尽心思寻找归路了…只要专心帮助黄金裔们便是。
If returning Aquila's Coreflame can break the sky's curse, we won't have to exhaust ourselves searching for a way back. We can simply focus on aiding the Chrysos Heirs.
安提基色拉人已经没有可以归还的家乡，因而我能体会您对故友与家园的关切。
Antikytherans have no home to return to, so I understand your concern for your old friends and homeland.
刚刚，我以安提基色拉的技术鉴识——或者，以您更熟悉的词语——「扫描」了这节车厢。假定我的判断无误，或许我能对其「动力设备」进行更彻底的检修。
I used Antikytheran technology — or "scanning," as you might call it — to assess this car. Assuming my judgment is correct, I might be able to conduct a thorough overhaul of its "power systems."
当然，前提是丹恒阁下允许我同它接触。
Of course, that's only if you, my lord, permit me to interact with it.
…无妨，请您试试吧。还请一定小心，列车的推进器是十分精密的装置。
...By all means, please proceed. But be careful, the Express's thrusters are extremely delicate.
承蒙您的信任，我定会谨慎再三。
You honor me with your trust. I will be very careful.
来古士仔细地扫描了损坏的车厢推进装置，随后开始有条不紊地检查其中的部件……
Lygus carefully scans the damaged propulsion system, then methodically began inspecting its components...
这…不可思议，您好像对它的结构一清二楚。您修理过类似的东西吗？
This... is unbelievable. You seem to understand its structure perfectly. Have you repaired something like this before?
并不。但安提基色拉人对于机械一向敏感——刻法勒在捏造我族时赋予了得天独厚的优势，令我们极擅解构和学习。
Not exactly. But we Antikytherans are inherently sensitive to machinery. Kephale endowed our kind with a unique advantage for analyzing and learning.
若您给我一些时间，或许我能完全修复这节破损的车厢，令其完好如初。如此一来，您与{NICKNAME}阁下便能提早踏上归途了。
If you give me some time, I might be able to fully restore this damaged car to its former glory. Then you and your esteemed companion could set off on your return journey sooner.
可…问题的关键不是在艾格勒身上吗？
But... isn't the real issue with Aquila?
假设，丹恒阁下，我能为两位开辟一条脱离翁法罗斯的通路，且能绕过艾格勒的神罚……
Hypothetically, Lord Dan Heng, if I could open up a path out of Amphoreus that circumvents Aquila's divine punishment...
你们会愿意中止对逐火之旅的助力吗？
Would you consider ceasing your support for the Flame-Chase Journey?
我不明白…难道元老院握有什么能抵消神罚的秘密手段？
I don't understand... Does the Council of Elders possess some secret means of counteracting divine punishment?
个中奥秘，还请阁下勿要深究。您只需知晓：我可以办到这件事。
It's best if you don't delve too deeply into that question, my lord. All you need to know is, I can make it happen.
（不是元老院的决意，而是他个人的意愿么……）
(Maybe this is not a decision by the Council of Elders but rather his personal wish...)
重点在于，若您和同伴不愿就此中止对黄金裔的支持…那或许会触犯到部分人的利益。
The crucial point is, if you and your companion are unwilling to halt your support for the Chrysos Heirs... it could offend certain interests.
请原谅，来古士阁下，我接下来的话可能会有些冒犯。拜访黎明云崖时，我翻看了许多元老院议员的档案……
Forgive me, Lord Lygus, but I must be frank. When visiting Dawncloud, I reviewed the records of many Council Elders...
其中，唯有您的背景近乎一片空白。我很想接受您的善意，但面对如此神秘的背景和动因，稍有戒心之人都难免会起疑。
Among them, only your background was nearly blank. I'd like to accept your goodwill, but given such a mysterious background and motives, anyone cautious would have doubts.
不愧是丹恒阁下。您的谨慎令我钦佩……
Your prudence impresses me, just as expected...
圈套么…难道这才是你跟随我前来的目的？
Is this a trap? Is that why you accompanied me here?
请别误会，丹恒阁下。作为「神礼观众」，我没有立场支持他们的计划。相应地，我也没有阻拦他们的义务。我即是中立。
Please don't misunderstand, Lord Dan Heng. As the Theoros, I have no allegiance to their plans nor am I obliged to obstruct them. I am neutral.
只是出于我个人对阁下的尊敬，我希望能提供一种和平的解决方案，以保障您和同伴的人身安全。
Out of respect for you, I hope to offer a peaceful solution to ensure the safety of you and your companion.
姑且确认一下：假如等会儿的场面变得难看…你会出手相助吗？
Just to confirm: if things turn ugly later... will you help?
不会。如我所说，我始终保持中立。
I will not. As I said, I remain neutral.
您会如此发问，是打算拒绝我的提议，继续站在黄金裔一边吗？
Are you asking this because you plan to refuse my offer and continue supporting the Chrysos Heirs?
有一点你没有说错，来古士阁下。的确，我们必须设法返回列车伙伴身边……
You weren't wrong about one thing, Lord Lygus. Indeed, we must try to return to our companions...
但「伙伴」这两个字…如今也包含了逐火的黄金裔们。无名客不能，也不会对伙伴的命运不管不顾。
But our "companions" now also include the Flame-Chasing Chrysos Heirs. The Nameless cannot and will not ignore the fate of our companions.
原来如此。这便是您口中的「开拓」。
So I see. This is what you call "Trailblazing."
另外，当我询问你是否会出手的时候，我的意思是……
When I asked if you'd help, I meant...
...the ones who need help are them.
Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...
明明拥有如此强大的力量，你究竟为何要……
You have such overwhelming power, so... why...
回答我！你为何要阻挠我们…为什么要抢夺火种？！
Answer me! Why do you stand in our way... Why do you want to take the Coreflames!?
Oh no! He can't hold on anymore!
我…没事。那一击…我现在能承受住了。若换作几个月前，恐怕早已不省人事。
I'm okay. I can handle that kind of hit now. But a few months ago, that would've knocked me out.
每次都这么提心吊胆的…
万一我睡过去了就完了。
If I had passed out, that would've been it.
哈…所以我才让你在路上吃饱睡足嘛。
Ha... That's why I made sure you were well-fed and rested on the road.
感谢你们愿意帮忙。为了迎战艾格勒，还有潜在的威胁…我必须磨砺自己，用最激进的手段。
Thanks for the help. To face Aquila and other potential threats, I must sharpen myself with the most aggressive methods.
话虽如此，真亏你能想到这种训练方式。在岁月的长河中与过去的幻影交战，就像是吟游诗人口中的「时间与精神之圣所」……
Even so, it's impressive you thought of this training method. Battling the phantoms of the past in the river of time... It's just like the "Hyperbolic Time Sanctum" that the bards describe.
哈哈，该说不说，效果还挺明显的？
Ha, it's working pretty well, wouldn't you say?
但战斗不只靠力量和技巧，还得有趁手的兵刃才行。和那家伙的武器相比，我手里的…哎，就像在挥舞铁块，自训练开始至今，已不知练废多少柄长剑了。

But combat isn't just about strength and skill. You also need the right weapon. Compared to that guy's weapon, mine feels like I'm swinging a lump of iron. I can't tell you how many swords I've gone through since the training began.
怎么不让哈托努斯帮忙？
Why not get Chartonus to help?
当然需要他。放心吧，我早安排上了。
Don't worry. I've already arranged that. Of course I need him.
还好有哈托努斯这个翁法罗斯最一流的铁匠。
It's a good thing Chartonus is the finest blacksmith in Amphoreus.
我委托他为我打造一柄趁手的神兵。说来有些难为情，为了帮我这个忙，他特地推掉了所有生意。
I asked him to make a suitable divine weapon for me. It's a little embarrassing to say this, but in order to help me, he deliberately turned down all other business.
毕竟哈托努斯也是逐火之旅的一员，干劲满满呢！
Chartonus is part of this Flame-Chase Journey after all, full of energy!
哈，回想他最近的状态，也许你猜得没错。
Ha, thinking about how he's been recently... maybe you're right.
不过，白厄，倒是你这边，人家一直有些在意……
But, Phainon, I've been somewhat concerned about you...
这段时间，你是不是对那黑衣剑士…越来越执着了？
Lately, you seem more and more fixated on that swordmaster in black.
这话锋转得，还真令人猝不及防。
That's quite the sudden shift in topic.
这个问题，人家憋在肚子里好久了！你是在变得越来越强，但不安的种子，也在人家的小身体里发芽长大哦！
I've been holding this question in for a long time! You're getting stronger, but seeds of unrest are also growing in me!
放心吧，我并非为了复仇而挥剑。尼卡多利的试炼，{NICKNAME}也亲历过。{F#她}{M#他}一定能明白，无法走出过去阴影的人，终究是软弱的。
Don't worry. I'm not wielding my sword for revenge. {NICKNAME}'s been through Nikador's trial and understands. Those who can't walk out of the shadows of their past are ultimately weak.
今时不同往日，我肩负之物…无比珍贵，也无比脆弱。我为翁法罗斯的明日而挥剑，因此决不允许自己再被仇恨蒙蔽，有失职责。
Times have changed. The responsibility I bear is both precious and fragile. I wield my sword for the future of Amphoreus. I will not let hatred cloud my judgment again and neglect my duties.
但还差得远。我必须继续磨练…直到自己能和它势均力敌。
I'm far from finished. I must continue sharpening my skills... until I can match their strength.
But you can't beat them yet.
对，所以我必须继续磨练自己…我和它迟早要在战场上作出决断。
Right, I must continue sharpening my skills... Eventually, I'll need to face them on the battlefield.
We'll be here by your side.
说得对，伙计。只凭现在的我还应付不了那家伙，我还需要伙伴们的助力。
You're right, partner. As of now, I'm not able to handle that swordmaster on my own. I still need the help of my friends.
奇怪，我一发言，话题总会变得沉重…我可不想被你们当成阴郁的家伙。
Huh... Every time I say something, things get so serious... I don't want to be the person who keeps bringing the mood down.
今天也没力气再练了。不如…我们去友爱之馆找点好看的，换换心情？
I'm out of energy for training today. How about we go to the Library of Philia to lighten the mood?
好呀，是人家最期待的环节！努力过后就要好好享受，对不对？
Sure, that's what I've been looking forward to! We deserve to enjoy ourselves after all the hard work.
Today I'm definitely going to... hehe...
是女孩子的小秘密，就别追问啦。
A girl's little secret. Don't pry.
为什么不把好看的拿回去？
Why not take the interesting ones home?
好主意！…不过，那以后再来树庭就没盼头了。
Great idea! However, that would mean no more reasons to visit the Grove.
这地方就有一点好，想看什么题材的都能找到。
That's the charm of this place. You can find whatever you're into here.
像咱们三个，恐怕都对所谓学术著作不感兴趣，但还是能在友爱之馆泡上一整天。
The three of us might not be into scholarly books, but we could still spend an entire day at the Library of Philia.
过去的几个月，你不止一次来到这里，在知识的海洋中打捞最符合你口味的那一小块精华。
Over the past few months, you've come here more than once, fishing out that small piece of essence from the ocean of knowledge that best suits your taste.
你很庆幸丹恒不在场，这样就不会有人对你的阅读品味评头论足。
You're quite relieved that Dan Heng isn't around — no one will be there to judge your reading tastes.
眼前的卷轴显示屏上映出一串小字：「非常规读物，借阅后请放回原处，切勿被任何一位树庭教授发现，叹号乘十。」

The scroll at hand shows a line of small text: "Non-standard reading material. Please return to its original place after borrowing. Do not let any Grove professor discover it — ten exclamation marks!"
看来树庭的学者们在深奥的学术探讨之余，也没忘了自己的小爱好。那么，你要翻阅哪篇读物呢？
It seems that the scholars of the Grove, amidst their profound academic discussions, haven't forgotten their little hobbies. So, which reading material will you peruse?
Forbidden Love: The Tree and the Butterfly
这篇爱情故事在最糟糕的部分戛然而止。不知是作者失去了写下去的动力，还是发生了别的紧急情况……
This love story abruptly ends at its worst moment. Whether the author lost the motivation to continue or some urgent situation occurred remains unknown...
…如果是后者，那盗火行者得负全责。
...If it were the latter, the Flame Reaver is fully responsible.
My Professor Can't Possibly Be This Shy
读完这篇令你三观震颤的小文，你的脑海中只剩下一个画面……
After finishing this mind-shaking piece, only one image remains in your mind...
对于一位年轻的星核精而言，这样的文学还是太超前了。
For a young Stellaron host, this type of literature remains far too ahead of its time.
读完此文，你感到全身力量充盈，仿佛作者笔下的一拳神王就是你的化身。
This article leaves you feeling empowered, as if you are the author's One Punch God incarnate.
天空泰坦艾格勒？呵呵，不过如此。
Sky Titan Aquila? Heh, that's nothing.
（嗯…不知道白厄和迷迷在看什么呢？）
(Hmm... I wonder what Phainon and Mem are reading?)
哈，我就感觉身后有一阵阴风吹过。偷看可不礼貌啊，朋友。
I thought I felt a draft just now. Peeking isn't polite, my friend.
我就是好奇你在看什么。
那就直接问嘛，又不是什么见不得人的读物。
You could have just asked. There's nothing embarrassing about it.
在看什么见不得人的东西呢？
Are you reading something you shouldn't be?
当着你们的面？那我也太不小心了~
In front of you all? That would be pretty careless.
给你看吧，我在读这个——《古玩鉴定：如何发家致富》。
Here, look, I'm reading this — Antiques Appraisal: How to Make a Fortune.
Didn't know you were into this.
你不知道？咱们都认识多久了，真让人寒心呐……
You didn't know? After all this time we've known each other, that pains me...
I know how. In your dreams.
…你的评论总是这么犀利，让我有点不好接话啊。
...Your comments cut deep. It's tough to find a good comeback.
Maybe it's time to find a different side gig.
…不行，为了这个爱好，我本就不多的家底差不多都填进去了！
...No way, I've invested almost all my savings into this hobby!
我认真思考过，阿格莱雅为什么能成为一位优秀的领导者——抛开人格、品行这些看不见摸不着的要素，还有一个重要的原因：她的家底相当殷实！
I've spent a lot of time pondering how Aglaea became such an effective leader — beyond the intangible qualities like personality and ethics, a major reason is her family wealth!
这就是从小生长在大城邦的优势吧？像我这种偏远乡镇出身的穷孩子就没那么好运了。三分靠打拼，七分天注定……
That's the perk of growing up in a big city, isn't it? For those of us in the sticks? Luck doesn't come as easily. It's thirty percent grind, seventy percent fate...
…咳，一不小心说多了。作为带路的人，最关键的是要德财…德才兼备。
...Oops, talked too much. As a leader, you need both integrity and weal — I mean integrity and skill.
耕耘月，幕匿时，宜食稻麦作物，忌垂钓……
Month of Cultivation, Curtain-Fall Hour, a time to feast on grains, but a poor time for fishing...
不过现在的翁法罗斯，好像也没有可以钓鱼的地方？
But then again, are there even any spots left to fish in Amphoreus these days?
Superstitions, superstitions, don't buy into them.
…{NICKNAME}，这么突然地闯入一个人的世界，可是会让人家手足无措的哦！
...{NICKNAME}, bursting into someone's world like that can really catch them off guard!
好啦好啦，不开玩笑了。这里…这里什么都没有！人家去别处看看。
Well, no more jokes. There's... there's nothing here! I'll go look elsewhere.
这些卡牌的牌面，好精致呀……
These cards are so detailed and fine...
唔，但是每一张牌的解读都这么长？要全都背下来吗……
Hmm, but the interpretation for each card is so long. Do I have to memorize them all?
灵活运用，不要死记硬背。
Use them flexibly. Don't just memorize.
啊！{NICKNAME}？嗯…真是巧呢！竟然又见面了，原来我们这么有缘分吗？
Ah! {NICKNAME}? Hmm... What a coincidence! We meet again. Guess we're fated to be together, huh?
但你一定很忙，对吧？所以人家先不打扰你啦，祝你今天…每一天都过得开心！
But you must be busy, so I won't bother you for now. Hope your day — every day — is joyful!
你呀…是真的很执着呢。算了算了，人家就是对你这种性格毫无抵抗力……
You sure are persistent. Alright, alright — I'm totally helpless against your charm...
在聊什么好东西呢？这是…《翁法罗斯占卜全书》？
What're you guys chatting about? Is this... the Amphoreus Divination Compendium?
哈哈哈，抱歉，我看你们在边上互相追逐，手里的书瞬间就不香了。
Haha, sorry, seeing you two chasing each other around, I suddenly found my book not that appealing anymore.
没想到迷迷会对占卜感兴趣…可是，这也不算什么小众爱好，为什么要遮遮掩掩？
Never thought Mem would be into divination... But it's not exactly a niche hobby, so why all the secrecy?
人家是想准备个惊喜，悄悄学成，吓你们一跳！
I wanted to set up a surprise — master it in secret and give you all a shock!
可中途被发现了，难免会害羞的嘛。少女柔弱的心弦，可比艾格勒阴晴不定多啦……
But getting caught halfway through, it's only natural I'd feel shy. A girl's heart is more delicate than Aquila's ever-changing moods...
哈，「惊喜」么…有人也对我说过类似的话，她特别擅长观星和占卜，尤其是用卡牌——喏，就是你在看的这套。
Ha, a "surprise," huh? Someone else used to tell me the same. She was really good at stargazing and divination, especially with cards — yeah, just like the ones you're looking at.
白厄还有这样的朋友，那你应该对各类占卜术都挺熟悉的？
Then you must be pretty familiar with all sorts of divination techniques, with a friend like that.
不，一无所知。用卡牌、髀石预测命运，我从小就不怎么相信。
No, I know nothing about it. I've never really believed in using cards or bones to predict the future.
要是占卜结果里提到的吉兆都是真实的…那我的家乡，哀丽秘榭，也就不会消失了。
If the good omens foretold by divination were true... my hometown, Aedes Elysiae, wouldn't have disappeared.
别忘了，我们还有缇宁老师。和她从未失准的预言相比，所有占卜术都不过是障眼法，或是预先排练好的诡辩。
Don't forget, we've got Lady Trinnon. Every other form of divination is just smoke and mirrors or cleverly rehearsed tricks compared to her flawless prophecies.
偶尔信一下也没什么不好。
A little faith in these things isn't bad sometimes.
应该带着批判的眼光看待…
It should be approached with a critical eye...
占卜…在人家看来，也许是一种指引心灵的力量。
To me, divination could be a power that guides our spirits.
命运总在人的前路投下阴影，让他们无法清晰地看见自己的未来。
Fate always casts a shadow in front of us, clouding our view of the future.
所以人们才需要占卜，只是想给自己一些小小的理由，鼓起跨越那片未知的勇气……
That's why people turn to divination. It's just to find a small reason to give them courage to face the unknown...
You've really thought about this, haven't you?
毕竟《占卜全书》第一章讲的就是「占卜的意义」，我只是稍微进行了一点延展思考！
After all, the first chapter of the "Divination Compendium" discusses "the significance of divination." I'm just expanding on that a bit!
万一占卜出来的是坏结果呢？
What if divination predicts something bad?
就是因为结果有好有坏，占卜才有意义呀。
Divination is only meaningful when there are both good and bad outcomes.
坏的征兆也是一种指引，至少能勾起人们的警觉，对吧？
Even bad omens serve as guidance. They can help keep us alert, right?
奇怪…我认识的那个人，她也说过类似的话。回想起来，每次她为我解读卡面，我的心情都会莫名地忐忑…哪怕我并不相信占卜的结果。
Strange... That person I knew used to say similar things. Looking back, whenever she interpreted a card for me, I couldn't help but feel uneasy. Even though I never believed in the outcomes.
大概是因为她的语气吧？昔涟…她能把一场彻头彻尾的幻梦描绘得栩栩如生，让儿时的我沉浸其中。
Maybe it was her tone? Cyrene... she could paint a complete fantasy so vividly, it utterly captivated me as a child.
对了。我随身带着她以前用过的一张牌，想看看吗？
Right. I still carry a card she once used. Do you want to see it?
哇…好精致！人家也好想拥有这样的牌呀。
Wow... it's so exquisite! I'd love to have a card like that.
喔，经你这么一提醒，还真是！要是能换成其他材质，比如水晶…就更好啦！
Oh, now that you mention it, yes! It would be even better if it were made of, say... crystal!
说起来，{NICKNAME}，有件事我一直没和你们通气。还记得我们第一次去命运三相殿时的情形吗？当时，欧洛尼斯给我们出的那道谜……
Speaking of which, {NICKNAME}, there's something I haven't shared with you all. Remember our first trip to the Temple of the Three Fates? The riddle that Oronyx posed to us...
Those mitts up to the task?
得设计一套迷迷专用牌。
Then, gotta craft a Mem-specific deck.
These folks are up to no good...
黑色衣装…带着金血装饰的面罩……
Black clothing... Masks decorated with golden blood...
呵…竟然能直接叫出我们的名字，看来你对翁法罗斯遗落的历史也颇有研究啊，白厄阁下。
Ha... To directly call us by our name, it seems you, Lord Phainon, have studied the forgotten history of Amphoreus quite thoroughly.
What's being cleaned? Clothes or cars?
你的朋友似乎对我们很感兴趣。和{F#她}{M#他}解释一下吧，白厄阁下？出于礼节……
Your friend seems quite interested in us. Perhaps you could explain, Lord Phainon? It would be the polite thing...
…可不能让贵客不明不白地离去。
...We can't let our esteemed guests pass away without understanding.
…黄金战争时期，为了对抗黄金裔，多个城邦在地下集结了一支刺客部队，取名「清洗者」。
During the Chrysos War, to combat the Chrysos Heirs, several cities formed an underground assassin squad called "the Cleaners."
他们的职责便是将流着金血的人从世上抹去。暗杀、投毒、政治迫害…为了这个目标，他们无所不用其极。
Their task was to erase anyone with golden blood from existence. Assassination, poisoning, political persecution... They would do anything to achieve their objective.
这些史料的立场似乎有些偏颇，为了丑化先辈们的事业，把黄金裔滥用神力、悍然掀起战乱的滔天罪行一笔带过……
This historical perspective seems biased, glossing over the Chrysos Heirs' abuse of divine powers and their blatant initiation of war, in order to defame our predecessors...
能劳烦你把这段野史作者的姓名透露给我么，白厄阁下？我可不希望奥赫玛纯真的孩子们，被这家伙的春秋笔法荼毒啊。
Could you disclose the name of the author behind this popular legend, Lord Phainon? I'd hate for the innocent children of Okhema to be tainted by such slanted narratives.
你们本该老老实实呆在历史的积尘里。公民大会已再度为黄金裔的使命赋予了正当性，至于你们……
You should have stayed buried in the dust of history. The citizens' assembly has once again legitimized the mission of the Chrysos Heirs, but as for you...
不会有一位公民把票投给你们这群阴影里的刽子手。
Not one citizen would cast their vote for you executioners lurking in the shadows.
那又如何？我们早已不再奢求能得到理解……
What does it matter? We've long since stopped expecting to be understood...
他们和平日子过惯了…早就忘了让黄金裔世代掌权，曾经酿出何等祸根！
People have become too accustomed to peace... and they've forgotten the disasters that arose from allowing generations of the Chrysos Heirs to rule!
胡搅蛮缠。你们远赴树庭，就是为了逞口舌之快么？
Complete nonsense. Did you really travel all the way to the Grove just to have an argument?
你很爽快，白厄阁下，我喜欢跟你这样的人打交道。
I enjoy dealing with people as straightforward as you, Lord Phainon.
那想必你也能猜到吧？我们出现在诸位面前的理由……
You've probably figured out why we've come before you...
就这么几个人，打发谁呢？
Just a handful of you here. Who do you think you're fighting?
If it's a fight you want, let's get on with it — enough chit-chat!
冷静，{NICKNAME}。他们敢走出阴影，就表示手中掌握了足以威慑我们的筹码。
Keep your cool, {NICKNAME}. They've come out of the shadows, which suggests they have something up their sleeves.
说说看吧，你们手里究竟藏着什么牌。但是，千万要小心组织语言，别说错话。
Alright, let's hear it — what are you hiding? But watch your language, and don't say anything you might regret.
我的肩膀很酸痛，剑也有些钝了…但要削掉你们的舌头？那还绰绰有余。
My shoulders might be sore and my sword a tad dull... but it's still enough to slice off your tongues.
怎么样，小风堇？这里很适合吧？
How's it going, Cinny? This place fits, doesn't it?
地方虽然小了些，但采光堪称完美！
It's a bit small, but the lighting is perfect!
谢谢你，缇宝老师！如此一来，昏光庭院就能在奥赫玛获得新生啦。
Thank you, Lady Tribbie! With this, the Twilight Courtyard can be reborn in Okhema.
你也喜欢这里吗，小伊卡？
Do you like it here too, Little Ica?
嘿嘿…这里这么亮堂，你怕不是该给它换个名字啦？比如…「明光庭院」，如何？
Hehe... It's so bright here, maybe you should rename it? How about "Luminous Courtyard"?
缇宝老师说得有道理。不过…「昏光庭院」这个名字承载了天空后裔的悠久历史，我还是想让它延续下去。
Lady Tribbie makes a good point. But... "Twilight Courtyard" carries the long history of the descendants of the sky, and I'd like it to continue.
对哦…传说里是怎么记载的来着？唔……
Right... How does the legend go again? Hmm...
嘿…缇宝老师也会忘记事情吗？
Heh... Even Lady Tribbie forgets things...
…我、*我们*只是太久没备课了，稍微有点生疏了而已！给*我们*点时间，一定能想起来！
...We... We just haven't prepared lessons in a while now, so we're a bit rusty! Just give us some time, and we'll remember!
…啊，这不就想起来啦！《悬锋与苍穹》，第三卷第五节——
...Ah, now we remember! Kremnos and the Firmament, Volume 3, Section 5 —
「<color=#dbc291ff>阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝击落晨昏之眼</color>，标志着尼卡多利与艾格勒之间以百年为单位的漫长神战落下帷幕……」
"<color=#dbc291ff>With Seliose, the Daythunder Knight, striking down the Eye of Twilight</color>, the divine war between Nikador and Aquila, which spanned centuries, came to an end..."
「此后…天空之民逐渐式微，诸多天空堡垒遭到废弃，他们的后裔开始于大地之上扎根求生……」
"Thereafter... the Skyfolk gradually declined, numerous sky fortresses were abandoned, and their descendants began to establish themselves on the land..."
「最后，继承了阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝血脉的一族被瑟希斯的学者们接纳，并在树庭建立起了昏光庭院……」
"Finally, those descended from Seliose the Daythunder Knight were welcomed by the scholars under Cerces and established the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove..."
唔，总感觉史书里的记载，和*我们*记忆中的来龙去脉稍有出入呢…但当时的细节，*我们*也有些记不清了。
Hmm, the historical records seem slightly at odds with our memories... but the details from that time have become somewhat hazy to us.
差点忘了…对于缇宝老师来说，历史不止是书卷上的文字，也是你亲身经历过的时代呀。
Oh, I forgot... For Lady Tribbie, history is more than just words on a page — it's something you've personally lived through.
嘻，小伊卡还是很喜欢听这些传说故事呢。你肯定也想象着，自己有朝一日能和英雄塞涅俄丝身边的翼兽一样威风吧？
Heh, Little Ica loves listening to the stories from the legends. I'm sure you're also imagining, one day, you'll be as awe-inspiring as the winged beasts by Seliose's side?
会有那么一天的，我相信！只要你好好长大……
That day will come! I believe it! Just keep growing...
…还有缇宝大人，你们没事便好。我听公民说你们在附近，就顺便前来看看。
...And Lady Tribbie, good to see you're doing alright. I heard from the citizens you were nearby and came to check.
没…事？发生什么了嘛，克拉特鲁斯？
Doing... alright? What's going on, Krateros?
市集又发生了恶性治安事件，有店铺遭到了砸抢。已经是这周内的第三次了。
There's been another violent incident at the market. A shop was smashed and looted. It's the third time this week.
这…怎么会这样？我一直以为，有阿格莱雅大人在，奥赫玛一直都很安定祥和……
How can this be? I always thought that with Lady Aglaea here, Okhema would remain peaceful...
过去的确如此。但近些日子…恕我直言，她的感官恐怕没有从前那么敏锐了。
That was true in the past. But these days... forgive my bluntness, her senses may not be as sharp as they once were.
依我之见，恐怕是有用心险恶之人觉察到了金线的松动，于是开始策划阴谋，乘隙启衅。
In my opinion, malevolent forces have noticed the slack in the golden threads and are now plotting to exploit the opportunity.
明明公民大会刚刚结束不久…为什么还会有人想要搞破坏？
The citizens' assembly just wrapped up... Why is there still unrest?
黄金裔只以一票胜出，缇宝大人。根据我征战多年的经验，惨胜和动荡往往形影不离。
The Chrysos Heirs won by only one vote, Lady Tribbie. From my years of experience, a narrow victory often walks hand-in-hand with unrest.
…出大事了！风堇小姐…出大事了！
…克莱门汀？你…别着急，快先喘口气！
...Clementine? Take a breath... What's going on?
三、三位大人！云石天宫，出…出大事了！
Please! Something terrible has happened at Marmoreal Palace!
什么大事，医师？冷静下来，复述一下情况！
What is it, doctor? Calm yourself and talk us through!
出事的…是阿格莱雅大人！
It's... it's Lady Aglaea who's in trouble!
我还记得，这座能俯瞰整座天宫的浴场，是元老院于九百年前主张兴建的。
I still remember, this bath that overlooks the entire Palace was built by the Council of Elders nine hundred years ago.
建立它的目的，原本是为了纪念那第一次逐火之旅，为了追忆于千年前为翁法罗斯做出重大牺牲的英雄们。
Its purpose was to commemorate the first Flame-Chase Journey, and to remember the heroes who made great sacrifices for Amphoreus a millennium ago.
规矩也自那时定下。除了受到「金织」邀请的宾客，他人不得擅闯此处。
Rules were set then. No one was allowed to enter, apart from guests invited by the Goldweaver.
但，我猜…你们现在已经无意假装规行矩步了，对么？凯妮斯阁下。
But, I guess... you're no longer pretending to follow the rules, are you, Lady Caenis?
你这千年不死的妖女，披着神明的皮在人间惑众…一直以来，我们都对你太仁慈了。
You ageless witch, hiding behind a divine facade to deceive mortals... We've been far too kind with you.
仁慈？何必用这个惺惺作态的词，来掩饰你们的……
Kind? There's no need to use such a word to cover up your...
阿那克萨戈拉斯令各位在公民面前颜面尽失。若你们还心存廉耻，就该在幕匿时纵身跃下黎明云崖，以保全自己最后一丝尊严。

Anaxagoras humiliated all of you before the citizens. If you still had any shred of shame, you'd throw yourselves from Dawncloud at the Curtain-Fall Hour to salvage the last fragments of your dignity.
半神，何不以池水作镜，好好看看你如今的恶毒相？
Demigod, why not gaze into the water's reflection and see the wretched face you wear now?
如今你不但痴盲，而且昏聩…「清洗者」就是为了这个时刻诞生的。当一切秩序、规矩和法理都无法制约你们，那就该轮到匕首来审判了。
These days you're not only blind but also deaf... The "Cleaners" were born for this moment. When all orders, rules, and laws fail to restrain you, it's time for the dagger to pass judgment.
若真如此急不择途，你们倒不妨试试看。
If you're in such a hurry, give it a try.
哼…哼哼…与半神正面较量？我们没蠢到那个地步。
Hmph... going toe-to-toe with a demigod? We're not that foolish.
匕首并非抵在你的脖颈上，而是……
The dagger isn't at your throat, but...
你对我最严峻的指控便是人性将尽，你还指责我对人间悲欢的关切皆是假意。
Your gravest accusation is that my humanity is fading, and you claim my concern for mortal joys and sorrows is nothing but a facade.
如果指控成立…你凭什么觉得这些平民的性命能令我妥协？
If that accusation holds... what makes you think the lives of these civilians will sway me in the slightest?
无妨，那我就再费些口舌，戳穿你这半神的面具吧。
Fine. I'll gladly use a few more words to shatter that demigod facade of yours.
我早说了，如今你不但痴盲，而且昏聩。近些日子，你对奥赫玛的掌控变弱了。
Like I said, you're not only blind but deaf too. Lately, your control over Okhema has weakened.
你看不到我们刻意在市集安排的行窃，也没能监听到在大地兽工坊发生的接头。对于在你眼皮底下酝酿着的阳谋，你无动于衷。

You failed to notice the thefts we arranged in the market, nor did you catch wind of the meetings happening in the Dromas Workshop. Plots are unfolding right under your nose, yet you remain indifferent.
人性将尽？呵，阿格莱雅，你不妨用你那引以为傲的金线读读我的想法，看看我们精心给你准备的礼物，能不能让一尊冰冷的半神动容？
Humanity fading? Ha, Aglaea, why not use your precious golden thread to peer into my thoughts? See if the gift we've so meticulously prepared for you can move that cold demigod heart of yours.
此情此景，我只怨自己还不够冷漠。因为你的邪恶…无药可医。
In this moment, I only regret not being more ruthless. Because your evil... is beyond cure.
终于读出我的想法了？哈…你果真变得迟钝了。为了让你清晰地看见，我可是一直尽力在脑子里维持那个画面啊。
You finally figured it out? Ha... you have grown dull. I've been holding that image in my mind this whole time to make sure you could see it clearly.
（这块髀石护身符，就送给姐姐吧。希望你每天都能有好运气，将来也不要被任何人欺负！）
(I want you to have this knucklebone talisman, big sis. I hope it brings you luck every day and keeps you safe from bullies!)
那个无法发声或聆听的女孩…假如她又*不小心*失去了双眼，会发生什么？
That girl who can't speak or hear... What if she accidentally lost her eyes too?
