失去光明的滋味，你比谁都清楚。想象一下，千年以前，倘若年少失明的你又被剥夺了声带和听觉——你还能成为现在这个阿格莱雅吗？

You know better than anyone what it feels like to lose your sight. Imagine if a thousand years ago, you, already blind, had also lost your voice and hearing in your youth — would you still have become the Aglaea you are today?
瞧你那残缺又乞怜的眼神…真是让人扫兴，我们高估了你的手腕。
Look at those broken, pleading eyes... how disappointing. We overestimated your cunning.
若此计不成，我们本还准备了数十样精彩的临别赠礼…半神，你要听听么？
If this plan fails, we still have dozens of splendid parting gifts prepared... Demigod, would you like to hear about them?
…我曾以为，我还能争取到更多时间。
...I thought I could buy some more time.
一千年的时光…我见证了十位泰坦的殒落。从最初的娇蛮无知，再到摸索着为众人引路……
In these one thousand years... I've witnessed the fall of ten Titans. From my naive arrogance at the beginning to slowly learning how to guide others...
现在…该放手了。我该庆幸…庆幸自己还是等来了这一刻——<color=#dbc291ff>能将我的离去筑成众人的长阶。</color>
Now... it's time to let go. I should be grateful... grateful that I've reached this moment — <color=#dbc291ff>to let my departure become a path for others to follow.</color>
…我做得够吗？<color=#dbc291ff>若我就此拥抱那预言，在温热的池水中睡去……</color>
...Have I done enough? <color=#dbc291ff>If I embrace that prophecy now and sink into the warmth of these waters...</color>
…远行的风儿会为我驻足吗，赛法利娅？
...will the wandering wind stop to mourn me, Cifera?
到了！上次那块石板在哪？是这里，还是这里……
Here we are! Where was that slate last time? Was it here, or maybe over here...
人家先去玩啦！现在是自由活动时间，你也要放松放松哦。
I'm off to have some fun! It's free time now, so you should relax too.
（迷迷的样子好奇怪，它到底在翻什么书？）
(Something's odd about Mem. What are they flipping through?)
(So suspicious, not like their usual self...)
A millennium ago at Marmoreal Market...
裁缝女，我如约来了！瞧这满满一箱金银财宝，我敢打赌，准有你没见过的稀罕玩意！
Seamstress, I've come as promised! Look at this box full of gold and silver treasures. I bet there's stuff here you've never seen!
来吧，按照之前说好的，我要买下你这里最值钱的衣服！
Come on, as we agreed, I want to buy the most valuable clothes you have!
你这毛贼，礼数不多胆量不小，竟敢穿着这般凋敝的衣衫闯进我的织坊？
Little thief, you've got some nerve, barging into my shop dressed in those tattered rags!
你都带来了些什么，让我看看吧。
What have you brought? Let me see.
喏，尽管看！都是一等一的好货——你看这颗蓝宝石，简直比法吉娜的眼珠子还要蓝哪！
Here, take a look! Only the finest goods — see this sapphire? It's even more blue than Phagousa's eyes!
何等华贵的光泽…这般成色的海洋之泪，我只在母亲的宝库中见过……
Such exquisite luster... I've only seen an Ocean's Tear of this quality in my mother's treasury...
…什么啊，原来你以前见过？我还以为能让你大吃一惊呢。嘁，扫兴。
...Wait, you've seen one before? And here I thought I'd leave you speechless. Ugh, what a letdown.
久远的记忆罢了。我的家产早就被大火焚尽，这间织坊就是我白手起家的成果。
It's just an old memory. My family estate all burned to ashes long ago. This workshop is what I built from scratch.
嚯，重振家业的大小姐，多么令人钦佩…呵，少开玩笑了，至少你确实享受过那些荣华富贵。
Wow, a daughter rebuilding her family business — how admirable... Heh, enough with the jokes. At least you did get to enjoy those luxuries.
我问你，赛法利娅——你是自何处，又是以何种手段得到这些财宝的？
Tell me, Cifera, where did you come from, and how did you acquire these treasures?
哈，我光明正大和人打赌赢来的。怎么，你怀疑我不成？
Ha, I won them fair and square in a bet. What, do you doubt me?
说话呀，裁缝女！给个准信，这些宝贝你收还是不收？
Speak up, seamstress! Give me a straight answer. Do you want these or not?
真是怪异，你明明就在我的面前扯谎……
Strange, you're clearly lying to my face...
但我的金线…却没有丝毫震颤。
But my golden thread... doesn't tremble at all.
那是因为我字字实话，压根就没骗人。
That's because I'm not lying. I've been telling the truth from the start.
果真如此么？但你脸上的伤痕和泥印，却在给我讲述另外一个故事。
Is that so? But the scars and mud stains on your face tell another story.
你…哎呀，做个生意，哪来那么多废话！你放心，我没留下任何把柄，不会有人来找你麻烦的。
...Oh come on, can't we just do business without all this chatter? Don't worry, I didn't leave any evidence, so no one will bother you.
你如此擅长说谎，我又如何能确定这话是否属实？
How can I trust a word you say when you're so skilled at lying?
…跟你们这些有钱人打交道可真麻烦，浪费我的时间！算了，你不收，别处还有的是人……
...Dealing with you rich people is such a pain, always wasting my time! Fine, if you don't want it, there are plenty of others who do...
你的财宝，我收下了。但仅凭这些财宝，尚不足以买下「金织」最昂贵的衣装。
Your treasure — I'll accept it. But these alone aren't enough to purchase the Goldweaver's finest clothes.
话虽如此，我倒有一件和你足够般配的服饰。
That said, I do have something that would suit you perfectly.
Oh? What do you have in mind?
喔！这是…金光闪闪的，真漂亮啊！
Oh! It's... shimmering gold, absolutely stunning!
这双金靴，算得上「金织」的至宝之一。尽管价值比不上最名贵的华服，却蕴含着神奇的力量。
These golden boots are the Goldweaver's greatest treasures. Though not as valuable as the most precious gowns, they hold a magical power.
传说{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}曾祝福过这双靴子，令所有者能以神速疾行，且不会激起任何响动……
Legend has it that {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} blessed these boots, allowing anyone who wears them to move swiftly and silently...
穿上它吧，赛法利娅，下次别再被抓住了。你姣好的容颜值得更为悉心的保护。
Put them on, Cifera, and don't get caught again. A face as lovely as yours deserves better protection.
哼，你们这些有钱人就是喜欢多管闲事！那我可拿走了，你再想反悔就晚了！
Hmph, you rich folks just love sticking your noses in everything, don't you? Well, I'm taking these now, so don't get any second thoughts!
那个…有没有小一码的？这双对我来说也太大了……
Uh... do you have a smaller size? These are way too big for me...
呵…那就等你再长大些后穿吧。
...Well, I suppose you'll have to grow into them.
…你就非得在我讲故事的中途打岔吗？假的，什么假的？
...Do you have to interrupt me in the middle of my story? Fake? What's fake?
你那双靴子，根本就没有扎格列斯的神力！
Those boots definitely don't hold Zagreus's divine power!
翁法罗斯最会撒谎的女人，也被那个阿格莱雅给骗了，桀桀桀！
You're Amphoreus's most cunning liar, and even you were fooled by Aglaea — hehehe!
嘴欠的家伙，小心我把你丢进冥河里喂鱼！
Watch your mouth, or I'll feed you to the fish in the River of Souls!
你不是好奇我是怎么跟那个裁缝女扯上关系的吗？现在你知道了。满意了？
Weren't you curious how I got tangled up with that seamstress? Well, now you know. Satisfied?
桀桀…没想到是这么简朴的故事，真是让人大失所望啊。
Hehe... I didn't expect such a simple story. How disappointing.
不过，呃…大姐头，也有一种可能，阿格莱雅不是故意想要骗你的……
But, uh... Boss Lady, there's a chance Aglaea wasn't trying to trick you...
呃…没有没有！我只是觉得，这个故事那么感人，可不能被一句假话给毁了呀——假如我有人的泪腺，现在肯定已经泪流满面了吧！
Uh... no, no! I just think the story's so moving... it'd be a shame to ruin it with a lie. If I could cry, I'd be in tears right now!
呵！多亏你还有油嘴滑舌这项技能，不然早被抓去给人当看门的宅灵了。
Ha! Good thing you've still got a sharp tongue, or you'd have been stuck guarding someone's front door ages ago.
闲扯就到这儿为止，还是抬头看看眼前这座斯缇科西亚城吧——瞧瞧，它多漂亮呀！
Enough chit-chat. Let's take a look at this place. The city of Styxia — look how beautiful she is!
让我来好好闻一闻，这空气里的味道……
Let me take a good sniff of this air...
这空气里…到处都弥漫着宝藏的气息！美妙，真是太美妙了！
This air... it's filled with the scent of treasure everywhere! Wonderful, just wonderful!
多亏了遐蝶跟小灰子，这古城的结界才能被驱散呀——回头想想，我这个忙帮得可太值了~
Thanks to Castorice and Gray Mystery, the ancient city's barrier was finally dispelled. Now that I think about it, helping them was well worth it.
寻宝时间到了，小巴子！带路吧，找到的好东西咱们八二分成。
Time for treasure hunting, Bartho! Lead the way, and whatever we find, we'll split <unbreak>80</unbreak>-<unbreak>20</unbreak>.
呃，那个，我有一个，小提议？不如，我们，七三……
Uh, well, I have a suggestion... How about <unbreak>70</unbreak>-<unbreak>30</unbreak> instead?
…嚯，仔细听，你听见了嘛？冥河里的噬骨鱼，肚子正饿得咕噜咕噜叫哪？
...Listen closely. Do you hear that? The gnawfish in the River of Souls are growling with hunger...
…八二，就八二！你可真是太公平啦，赛飞儿大姐头！
...<unbreak>80</unbreak>-<unbreak>20</unbreak> it is! How generous you are, Boss Lady Cipher!
…话说回来，这破地方…怎么到处都是水啊？湿漉漉、冰冰凉，讨厌，难受，不喜欢……
Anyway... What's with all this water? It's damp, cold, and miserable here. I hate it...
桀桀桀，堂堂「诡计」的半神，没想到竟然会对水过敏哇？
Hehe, the mighty demigod of Trickery... uneasy around water?
你懂什么！多洛斯人个个多才多艺，唯独不太擅长游泳而已。
You wouldn't understand! The people of Dolos are talented in many ways, just... not in swimming.
有本事就和我比跑步啊？长跑、短跑、转着圈跑，随便挑！
Why don't we have a race? Long-distance, sprint, or laps — take your pick!
桀桀桀，你怎么急了呀？消消气，消消气…没想到天不怕地不怕的赛飞儿大姐头，居然会怕水呀！
Hehe, what's got you so worked up? Relax, relax... Who would've thought the fearless Lady Cipher was afraid of water!
猫儿最讨厌沾水——这有什么不好理解的？
Cats hate getting wet. What's so hard to understand about that?
赶紧想办法让我们过去，否则我就要重新考虑下分成的问题了！
Now hurry up and figure out a way across, or I might have to reconsider our split!
呃…别着急呀，让我观望观望……
Uh... don't rush me. Let me take a look around...
有了——就用那玩意吧！跟我来，大姐头！
Got it — let's use that thing! Come on! Follow me, Boss Lady!
（将计就计…就先陪你玩一会儿吧，<color=#dbc291ff>「巴特鲁斯」</color>。）
(I'll play along... Let's see where this goes, <color=#dbc291ff>"Bartholos."</color>)
这装置…是欧洛尼斯的祭司设计的玩具吧？你能玩明白吗？
Was this device designed by priests of Oronyx? Do you think you can handle it?
可别小看我啊，大姐头！你就找个干燥的角落好好等着吧，桀桀桀……
Don't underestimate me, Boss! Just find a cozy, dry corner and wait for me, hehe...
大功告成！这下你就不用担心沾湿尾巴咯。
Mission accomplished! Now you don't have to worry about your tail getting wet.
不赖嘛。不过我警告你，要是这玩意在我们蹚水到一半的时候失效……
Not bad. But just a warning — if this thing fails while we're halfway through the water...
没有的事，放心吧！为了那两成的赃…宝贝，我也绝对把您伺候好！
Don't worry. Trust me! For that sweet <unbreak>20%</unbreak> cut of the loot, I'll make sure you're taken care of!
What are you waiting for? Start digging!
巴特鲁斯开启了挖掘模式，找出了藏于地底的宝藏……
Bartholos activated excavation mode, unearthing the treasure buried deep underground...
哇…好大一个宝箱！让开让开，我要亲手把它撬开！
Wow... that's a huge chest! Move over. I want to open it myself!
嚯…嚯嚯，大丰收啊~了不得，真难想象这斯缇科西亚人以前过的是什么神仙日子！
Wow, wow, a massive haul! Unbelievable, it's hard to imagine the kind of luxurious life the people of Styxia once led!
不愧是法吉娜信徒的地盘，这满满一箱都是拿海洋之泪制成的饰品…喏——拿去！这个赏你，看看合不合适。
As expected for a realm of Phagousa's disciples. This entire chest is filled with ornaments made from Ocean's Tears... Here — take this, and see if it suits you.
桀桀桀，谢大姐头赏赐，谢谢！
Hehe, thanks for the gift, Boss! Much appreciated!
哎呀，瞧瞧这紫色水晶的透亮程度…正好跟我的肤色绝配！赛飞儿大姐头，你果真是全翁法罗斯审美最顶级的侠盗！
Look at the clarity of this purple crystal... It matches my skin tone perfectly! Cipher, Cipher, you truly have the most refined taste of all the thieves in Amphoreus!
桀桀桀，快让我戴上试试…嘢？
Hehe, let me try this on... Huh?
Huh!? Where... where is... my treasure!?
咱俩都认识多久了？没想到你居然还会上这种当！
How long have we known each other? I can't believe you still fall for this!
...Oh, how could I have forgotten about this?
<color=#dbc291ff>「人人信以为实，谎言即可成真」</color>——多方便的能力啊！
<color=#dbc291ff>"All believe it as true, and a lie becomes reality."</color> What a convenient ability!
这就是「诡计」半神的神赐，比什么金线、魔法传送门之类的实用多了，是吧？
The demigod of Trickery's divine gift, far more practical than any golden thread or teleporter!
好了好了，不耍你了。真品给你——接着带路吧。
Alright, enough fooling around. Here's the real thing. Lead the way.
大姐头威武！我已经定位到下一处宝藏了，即刻开始导航…桀桀桀……
Cipher rules! I've already pinpointed the next trove of treasure. Starting navigation... hehehe...
这玩意一启动，发出的动静几里外都能听得清清楚楚——真是蠢得没边啦！也不知道当时……
Once activated, this thing makes a racket that can be heard for miles — just too stupid! What was—...
咳…也不知道泰坦发明它的时候是怎么想的，是吧？
Ahem... Seriously, what was the Titan thinking when they came up with this thing?
想要「诡计」不败露，至少得先管好嘴巴…你说呢？
Hey! If you don't want the "Trickery" to be exposed, you'd better start by keeping your mouth shut... What do you say?
呃…桀桀桀，大姐头，您说得太对啦！我一定谨言慎行！
Uh... hehe, Boss Lady, you're absolutely right! I'll be careful with my words!
这玩意，启动起来动静太大…还是别节外生枝了吧？
This thing's way too loud when it's on... Let's not stir up more trouble, okay?
你看它的脸——哎呀呀，怎么会有长得这么丑的东西？啧啧……
Look at its face — oh my, how could something be so ugly? Tsk tsk...
对啊对啊，真丑啊…丑到连我这个没有消化系统的小鬼都觉得反胃！
Yeah, yeah, so ugly... ugly enough to make even me, a little imp without a digestive system, feel nauseous!
要是让这么丑的家伙弄伤了我的脸蛋，恐怕铁面无私的塔兰顿看了都会忍不住流泪吧？
If that ugly brute messes up my face, even the stoic Talanton might end up shedding a tear.
可不是嘛，那就太让人伤心了！果然逃跑才是理智的做法，桀桀桀……
Indeed, that would be heartbreaking! Clearly, running away is the sensible choice, hehe...
所以，干脆就由你在前面扛着吧？我负责在边上补补刀就行了~
So, how about you take the front? I'll attack from the side.
没错没错，撒腿就跑才符合咱们盗贼的身……
Right, right. Fleeing fits our rogue nature...
哈！既不中看也不中用的家伙，才两三下就被撂倒了，真没劲。
Ha! Such an ugly and useless creature, taken down with just a couple of hits. How boring!
喂，巴特鲁斯——还活着吗？活着就吱个声。
Hey, Bartholos, are you still alive? Give us a squeak if you are.
呵，瞧你那怂样，这才多大点场面就遭不住了？
Look at you, all shaken up. Can't handle even this bit of action?
这里现在应该安全了，快干活吧。
It should be safe here now. Get to work.
巴特鲁斯开启了挖掘模式，找出了藏于地底的宝藏……
Bartholos activated excavation mode, unearthing the treasure buried deep underground...
嗯…这次没有什么特别的味道了，感觉里面没什么值钱的玩意。挖都挖出来了，还是打开看一眼吧。
Hmm... It doesn't smell like anything valuable this time. Since we've already dug it up, let's open it and see.
哎呀…这看上去可真够惨的。你觉得他们成功逃到奥赫玛了吗？
Oh... this looks tragic. Do you think they made it to Okhema?
八成没有。我在奥赫玛从没见过斯缇科西亚出身的家伙，连听都没听说过。
Probably not. I've never seen or heard of anyone from Styxia in Okhema.
多洛斯起码还剩下我这个独苗…这座城想必就没那么幸运了吧？
At least Dolos still has me left... Guess this city wasn't so lucky, huh?
呵，想想还真是不公平呀。仅仅是因为生错了地方，就得承受这样的灭顶之灾…反倒是那些奥赫玛人，只因为背靠负世泰坦，所以能一直维系到现在……

Heh, it does seem unfair, doesn't it? Just because they were born in the wrong place, they had to face such... devastation. Meanwhile, those in Okhema, simply because they're supported by the Worldbearing Titan, continue to survive...
可、可不是嘛，这世界真是不公平呀……
Yeah, the world just isn't fair, is it?
说到负世泰坦，赛飞儿大姐头，你以前是不是和我说起来过…<color=#dbc291ff>你曾经在刻法勒的祭司院当过学徒？</color>
Speaking of the Worldbearing Titan, Cipher, didn't you tell me once... <color=#dbc291ff>you used to be an apprentice at Kephale's Priestly Court?</color>
对、对呀！你、你肯定跟我说过，我记得可清楚了！可能时间过了太久，你的记忆也变模糊了吧？桀、桀桀……
Yes! You definitely told me, and I remember it clearly! Maybe it's been so long, your memory's gotten a little fuzzy, hehe...
…啊对，想起来了，我是跟你说过。也没什么大不了的嘛，就是混进了一群神神叨叨的祭司里，天天看着他们在那块发光的大石头前边装神弄鬼。
...Ah, right, I did tell you. It wasn't a big deal. I just snuck in with a bunch of mumbling priests and watched them do their spooky rituals around some glowing rock.
老实说，当时我只是惦记着元老院大老爷们的钱包，其它的事印象都不深了——这都过去多久了，得有快一千年了吧？
Honestly, I was only interested in the wallets of the old grandpas on the Council back then. Don't remember much else — it's been, what, nearly a thousand years?
喔…原来如此。穿着一身祭司袍子的赛飞儿大姐头，还真难想象那画面啊？
Oh... I see. But you in a priest's robe? Now that's hard to picture.
…谁让你想了？再说了，千年前的祭祀长袍，款式和现在根本也是两样。
...Who asked you to picture that? Besides, priest robes from a thousand years ago were nothing like the ones today.
说、说的也是，是我想当然了…我就是有点好奇，你当时有没有从那些祭司身上打听到什么，桀桀桀……
Right, right... I didn't think about that. I was just curious if you ever overheard anything interesting from those priests, hehe...
Hmph. How ridiculous. Come on, let's head to the next spot!
Tsk, where did this roadblock come from?
真麻烦哪，明明宝贝就在眼前了……
This is so annoying. The treasure is right in front of us...
哎呀呀，这下卡关咯。不过，我有一计——
Oh dear, we're stuck here. But I have a plan —
这个时候…要不要求助于又大、又吵、又笨重的「扎格列斯之手」？
Should we call on that big, noisy, cumbersome Hand of Zagreus?
哈…没想到那玩意还真能派上用场。行吧，你来操作？
Ha... never thought that thing would actually come in handy. Alright, do you want to handle it?
桀桀桀…交给我吧，大姐头！
Hehe... leave it to me, Boss!
我可不需要什么控制装置！毕竟…咳，你懂的！
I don't need a controller! After all... you know!
咳…出了一丢丢小问题。没关系，再来一次！
*cough* ...Just a tiny hiccup. No worries. Let's try again.
扎格列斯之手，我的宝贝儿——启动！
Hand of Zagreus, my darling — activate!
哈，挺能干的嘛！虽然我还是没看出这玩意和「诡计」有什么关系就是了。
Ha, not bad! However, I still don't see how this ties into "Trickery."
Let's go, to the next trove!
欸，先别急嘛。刚才你问我的那个问题，我好像突然想起来了——
Hey, slow down. That question you asked me earlier... I think I just remembered something.
就是…那个问题啊。刚刚挖出第二个宝箱以后，你特意问我的。
You know... that question. The one you specifically asked me, right after we dug up the second chest.
呃…恕我直言，大姐头，你最近是不是精神压力有点大？我刚才哪问过什么问题，你肯定是幻听了！
Uh... forgive me, Boss Lady, but have you been under a lot of stress lately? I didn't ask anything. You must've imagined it!
可能还真被你说中了，我最近精神是有点紧绷，可得好好放松下哪…走吧，去下一处宝藏。
Maybe you're right. I have been a little on edge lately. I need to relax... Alright, let's move on to the next treasure trove.
哎呀呀，这气味…感觉这地底下藏着什么不得了的东西哪？
Ooh, this scent... feels like something incredible is buried here.
不得了，不得了！桀桀桀，大姐头都这么说了，搞得我也跃跃欲试了呀。
Incredible indeed! Hehe, if even Boss Lady says so, how can I not be excited?
Do I need to give instructions here? Get digging!
巴特鲁斯开启了挖掘模式，找出了藏于地底的……
Bartholos activated excavation mode, uncovering something hidden beneath the earth...
哎呀，这不是「黄金替罪羊」吗？有点意思！看来把宝物埋在这里的家伙，是想跟我们玩个游戏？
Oh, isn't this a Golden Scapegoat? Interesting! Looks like whoever buried this treasure wanted to play a little game with us.
喔，关于这山羊头是不是还有什么神话来着？「怕火的成为了羊，不怕火的成为了人」……
Oh, isn't there a myth about this thing? "Those who feared fire became sheep, those who did not became human"...
什么羊不羊人不人的，我只知道把这玩意解开能拿到宝贝。喏，这殊荣就交给你了。
Sheep, humans — whatever. All I know is unlocking this gets us treasure. Here, this honor's all yours.
小谜题跟小把戏，都在我的舒适区！交给小的我，您尽管放心~
Puzzles and tricks are right up my alley! Just leave it to little ol' me.
就说难不倒我吧，桀桀桀！
Told you nothing can stump me, hehe!
赛飞儿大姐头，现在轮到你……
...Stop, stay there, and don't turn around.
疼、好疼！我这看不见的千年老腰啊，你干嘛——
Ow, my poor old back — what are you doing?
那裁缝女——她全都在听着呢。
什、什么？！大姐头，你的意思是……
你在一边待着，别出声…我来会会她。
Stay put and keep quiet... I'll handle her.
唷，裁缝女！你的手段越来越卑鄙了，真以为我发现不了你挂在我身边的小耳朵？
Well, well, seamstress! Getting sneaky, aren't we? Did you think I wouldn't notice your little spies lurking around me?
「伴随着时光的推移…我也开始越发依赖自己的侥幸心理。」
"As time passes... I find myself leaning more and more on blind luck."
「仅以这小小若虫的力量，果然还是瞒不过你的锐眼啊…赛法利娅。」
"With only the power of this little nymph, naturally I couldn't slip past your sharp eyes... Cifera."
哼…就算你能完全掌控巴特鲁斯的意识，我照样能戳穿你的伪装——阿格莱雅。
Hmph... Even if you could fully control Bartholos's mind, I would still be able to see through your disguise — Aglaea.
你费尽心思监听我的一举一动，是什么居心？我早都说了，没有我你们也能成事，何必这么死缠烂打？
You've gone to such lengths to spy on my every move — what exactly are you after? I've told you before, you don't need me to succeed. Why won't you just let this go?
遐蝶和灰子那一趟，我已经破例出手了。再要狮子大开口——未免有点得寸进尺吧？
I already made an exception and got involved with Castorice and Gray Mystery. Asking for more now... isn't that pushing your luck a bit too far?
「我此生机关算尽，却无论如何也预料不到，你我的关系竟会凝至冰点。」
"I've plotted and schemed my whole life, but I never could've predicted our relationship would end up like this."
「为了理清我究竟做错了什么…我花了上百年的时间思考、自省；但你始终不愿给我一个当面坦陈的机会。」
"I've spent centuries trying to figure out where I went wrong, replaying every moment over and over. But you've never given me a chance to explain myself face-to-face."
你…别用那种语气，你知道我最受不了这个。
Don't... don't talk to me like that. You know I can't take it.
「千年以前，那个无知的我…曾因沉默失去生命中最悦耳的浪花。」
"A thousand years ago, out of foolishness... I let my silence steal away the most beautiful sound I'd ever known."
「所以这一次，即便只是徒劳，我也必须把讯息传入你的耳中——我需要你，赛法利娅。黄金裔的使命需要你。」
"So this time, I must say this to you, even if it's all in vain — I need you, Cifera. The Chrysos Heirs' mission needs you."
「我那被推迟太久的终幕…总算要到来了。无论在你心中对我存有多少芥蒂，它都将随我的离去云散烟消。」
"The finale I've delayed for far too long... it's finally here. Whatever resentment you still hold against me will fade once I'm gone."
「回奥赫玛来吧，我请求你。若没有你，他们将无法赢得抗争。」
"Please, come back to Okhema. I'm begging you. Without you, they don't stand a chance."
…嘁。我会考虑的，裁缝女。别再监视我了…除非你想彻底失去我的影踪。
...I'll think about it, seamstress. But stop watching me... unless you want to lose me for good.
「呵…放心吧。即便我十分希望能再听见你的声音，再看一眼你的面庞……」
"Heh... Don't worry. As much as I'd love to hear your voice again, to see your face..."
「…恐怕也不会再有机会了。再见，赛法利娅。」
"...it seems that chance will never come. Goodbye, Cifera."
结果…那宝箱里的东西都被冥河水浸透了，没什么实际价值。
Turns out... everything in that chest was soaked in water from the River of Souls. Nothing valuable left.
啊呀，可惜。我还以为那山羊头底下会藏着什么好宝贝呢。
Ah, what a shame. I thought there'd be some real treasure under that goat's head.
那些藏品以前确实价值连城。只是遭时间冲刷得太久，就失去了原本的样子。
Those relics were once priceless. But time has eroded away all that they once were.
喔…从你嘴巴里说出来，感觉好伤感啊？
Oh... hearing that from you makes it sound so sad.
不对，我感叹这个干嘛！刚才发生的状况，我还没缓过来呢——那个可怕的女人，她到底是什么时候……
Wait, why am I getting all sentimental!? I haven't even processed what just happened — that horrible woman, when did she...
若你下次遇见赛飞儿，替我转告她：<color=#dbc291ff>身为半神，我们永远不可能逃避职责。</color>
If you see her, let her know this: <color=#dbc291ff>As demigods, we can't avoid our duties forever.</color>
Hmm... could it have been back then when...
想起来了？看来用不着我来帮你回忆了哪。她肯定是趁你大意，偷偷把若虫塞进了你的「口袋」里。
Do you remember now? Looks like you don't need me to jog your memory. She must've slipped that nymph into your "pocket" while you were distracted.
别小看那虫子，它跟裁缝女的金线一样神通广大。你稍有松懈就有可能被它接管，像操纵傀儡一样——然后，你就会随口蹦出些平时绝不会说的字句。

Don't underestimate that bug. It's every bit as dangerous as the seamstress's golden thread. Let your guard down for even a second, and it might take over — make you spill secrets you'd never share otherwise.
哇，简直就像…简直就像从黑潮里滋生的洗脑蚀怪一样，太吓人啦！
Whoa, that's like... some brainwashing monster straight out of the black tide. Creepy!
那…赛飞儿大姐头，你是怎么发现异常的？我有点好奇，那小虫到底操纵着我说了什么怪话？
Boss, how did you realize something was wrong? I'm curious — what exactly did that nymph make me say?
Hmph, actually, it gave itself away very early on...
说到负世泰坦，赛飞儿大姐头，你以前是不是和我说起来过…你曾经在刻法勒的祭司院当过学徒？
Speaking of the Worldbearing Titan, Cipher, didn't you tell me once... you used to be an apprentice at Kephale's Priestly Court?
咱俩搭伙作案一千年，能相互分享的话题早就说尽了。唯独那段在黎明云崖的经历，我不曾跟你聊过。
We've been partners in crime for a thousand years. We've talked about everything there is to talk about. Except for that one experience at Dawncloud. I never told you about that.
我绝对…<color=#dbc291ff>绝对不可能和任何人提及那事。</color>
I... <color=#dbc291ff>absolutely wouldn't have shared that with anyone.</color>
不过，呃…大姐头，也有一种可能，阿格莱雅不是故意想要骗你的……
But, uh... Boss Lady, there's a chance Aglaea wasn't trying to trick you...
我印象里，「诡计」的化身对逼人吐露真言的金线深恶痛绝。你绝对不可能替阿格莱雅辩护……
And as far as I know, the embodiment of "Trickery" despises that golden thread, which forces people to speak the truth. You'd never defend Aglaea...
你…还真是机警得可怕呀，桀桀桀……
You... have a terrifyingly sharp mind, hehe...
毕竟，这世上知道你还活着的人就只有我一个嘛。为了让你活过泰坦试炼，我可是设计骗过了全世界哪。
After all, I'm the only one in the world who knows you're still alive. To make sure you survived the Titan trial, I had to fool the entire world.
如果不想让谎言被戳破…你未来也得好好表现哦？
If you want to keep that lie from falling apart... you'd better keep playing your part in the days ahead.
哪怕不是为了我这条不值钱的小命，我也甘心为赛飞儿大姐头赴汤蹈火呀！
Even if it weren't for saving my worthless little life, I'd still walk through fire for Cipher without hesitation!
哼，你被缩减到这幅模样以后，唯一还没退化的就是说话的艺术了。
Hmph, you may have been reduced to this form, but you still haven't lost your way with words.
咳…话说回来，大姐头…那个黑心女人说的话，你应该不会放在心上吧？
*cough* ...Speaking of which, Cipher... you're not taking that wicked woman's words to heart, are you?
咱们这消闲日子过得多快活呀，何必非要趟这趟浑水呢…你说对吧？
Life's been pretty great lately. Why get into trouble now... Don't you think?
也许现在回去一趟也无妨。
Maybe a trip back now wouldn't be too bad.
随便，随便丢给我一件衣服。一块布也行，能遮住伤口就够了。
Anything, just throw me something. A piece of cloth will do, just enough to cover the wounds.
欠下的钱，我会还给你…我保证。
I will pay back the amount I owe... I promise.
对，我是他们嘴里说的黄金裔——力大无穷的英雄！名扬天下的剑客！智慧超群的大学者！
So what if I'm one of those Chrysos Heirs they talk about? Those infinitely strong heroes? World-renowned swordsmen? Exceptionally intelligent scholars!?
真是不好意思哪，那么厉害的一群家伙里，居然也会出现我这种穷人、小偷、骗子！不如我在身上再划一道口子，把这黄色的玩意全都放干……
Well, I am sorry to disappoint! Who knew that group of amazing people would include me! A pauper, thief, con artist! Maybe I should just make another cut to drain all this yellow stuff out of me and-
我会给你衣服，帮你暖和起来。然后……
I'll give you clothes, warm you up, and...
然后…留下来吧，留在我的织坊，直到你的伤势痊愈。
Stay here. Stay in my workshop until you're healed.
你不打算问我吗？问我这些伤是怎么落下的？
Aren't you going to ask me how I got these wounds?
呵，也对，问了又怎么样？我那么擅长撒谎，连你的金线都能骗过——既然确认不了真假，又何必多嘴一问呢？
Heh, right, what's the use? I'm so good at lying, even your golden thread can be fooled. If you can't verify the truth, why bother asking at all?
…我不需要考问，也无需动用金线度量。我知道你所做的一切都是为了生存，不计代价。
...I don't need to ask, nor do I need to use the golden thread. I know everything you do is for survival, at all costs.
留在这里吧。在这里，你不必再忍受饥寒交迫。在我身边，你可以学着缝补已经破碎的自尊。
Stay here. You won't have to deal with the cold or go hungry again. Stay by my side, and you can start putting yourself back together.
你…不怕我会给这里带来坏名声？你不怕我偷偷顺走你贵重的衣服，拿去外面倒卖？
Aren't you... worried I'll ruin this place's reputation? Or that I might sneak off with your precious clothes and sell them?
若是畏惧这些，我便不会向你发出邀请。
I wouldn't have invited you if I were worried about those things.
裁缝女，你真怪。大人们常说，经常撒谎的孩子本性难移……
You're weird, seamstress. You know, they say a child who often lies remains a liar for life...
…我努力试过不去活成他们口中的样子。但讲真的？那太累了…我早就想放弃了。
I've tried not to become a liar. But... honestly? It's just too hard... I'm close to giving up.
你凭什么觉得我不会让你失望？
What makes you think I won't disappoint you?
因为我能感觉得到——并非依靠半神的力量，而是凭着在我胸口跳动的心脏——你喜爱这个地方。
Because I can feel it — not with the power of a demigod, but with the heart that beats in my chest — you love this place.
所以你才会频繁经过。所以你才会羞于停留，因为你害怕自己配不上「金织」的招牌。
That's why you keep coming by but also why you hesitate to stay longer. You worry you'll tarnish the "Goldweaver" name.
接过墨涅塔的神职以后，我已经习惯了让金线替我分辨真诚和虚假。但我想要完成的那份使命，它偏偏需要我学会用心灵去信任、依赖。

After taking over Mnestia's divine authority, I became used to letting the golden thread distinguish sincerity from falsehood. However, the mission I need to complete requires me to learn to trust and rely on my heart.
赛法利娅——你是我交给这世界的一颗真心…也是它向我发起的一次挑战。
Cifera — you're an honest thing I've given to this world... and also a challenge the world has given to me.
留在我身边吧。你有一张美丽的脸孔，它不该常与伤痕跟淤泥作伴。
Stay here with me. You have a beautiful face that deserves better than to be covered in scars and grime.
你说话可真是九折十八弯，让人摸不着头脑哪。
You've got a way of talking that's hard to follow.
那我们就…约定好了。给你一天机会反悔——等践行时一过，再想赶我走可就晚了！
Alright, let's make it a deal. You have one day to change your mind — once the Action Hour passes, there's no turning back.
话说…我不在的时候，你都是靠什么法子寻宝的啊，大姐头？
Tell me... how did you hunt for treasure when I wasn't around, Boss Lady?
哼，想套我的话？门儿都没有。
Hmph, trying to trick me into saying something? Not a chance.
Hehe, you're as sharp as ever...
呼…这感觉，还真神奇…你什么时候学会的这招？
Huh... this feels truly magical... When did you pick up this trick?
呃…自学成才，纯粹自学成才！
过来了！把这大射灯关了吧？还怪刺眼的。
We're here! Can we turn off this spotlight now? It's really blinding.
没问题！用那边的装置把它关了就行。
No problem! Just use the device over there to shut it off.
是金币、宝石还有上等皮革的香气…叫人心情舒畅！
The scent of gold coins, gems, and fine leather... it's so refreshing!
Your legs are long and mine are short!
大姐头，这回咱们指定赚得盆满钵满，不知你打算怎么消费？
Boss Lady, we're set to make a fortune this time. Got any plans on how to spend it?
当然是——分文不花。我那个愚蠢的预言，你忘了？
Of course — spend nothing. Have you forgotten my silly prophecy?
啊…记得，当然记得！桀桀桀……
Ah... I remember, of course! Hehehe...
…咳，那不是扎格列斯之手的控制装置嘛？
...Ahem, isn't that a controller for the Hand of Zagreus?
嚯，这里还守着个大家伙哪？
Ho, there's a big guy guarding this place!
是啊是啊…又大又呆，纯纯一坨傻大个！
Yeah, yeah... big and dumb, just a pure lump of stupidity!
Here we go round the River of Souls~
…你唱的什么乱七八糟的，根本不在调上吧？
...What are you even singing? You're totally out of tune!
熊熊火种在胸中凝结~胸中凝结~凝结！
Twinkle, twinkle, in my chest~ How this Coreflame is the best!
论歌喉，我还是更胜一筹呀，大姐头！
When it comes to singing, I still sound better than you, Boss!
...Go beyond all time and space~ On the Journey of Flame-Chase~
既不回应挑衅，看上去也不打算动武——那他们究竟在等什么？
Are not responding to provocations, nor do they seem intent on fighting. What exactly are they waiting for?
施压。制造不安。植入焦虑。看来，这是他们所选择的策略。
Pressure. Fear. Planting seeds of anxiety. It seems this is the strategy they've chosen.
将抹杀黄金裔作为使命的组织……
An organization that sees it as their mission to eradicate the Chrysos Heirs...
我读到过一些骇人的故事，声称「清洗者」会将记忆残片以炼金之术强加给继任者，以此延续「身份」和「仇恨」……
I've read some chilling accounts, stories of the "Cleaners" using alchemical arts to implant fragments of memories into their successors, ensuring both identity and hatred live on.
据我所知，此乃事实。我们所认识的那位凯妮斯议员，严格来说——其实是历史上第二十七位「凯妮斯」。
From what I know, these stories are true. The Caenis we know today — strictly speaking — is the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th Caenis.
客观而论，「清洗者」的出现是必然，亦是必须。但他们凶险恶毒的行事手段为众人所不齿，因而落得了被史书唾弃的下场。
Objectively, the rise of the Cleaners was both inevitable and necessary. Yet, their ruthless and twisted methods earned them nothing but disdain and condemnation from history.
但他们还是作为一个组织延续至今，甚至还在设法阻挠逐火。
And still, they endure. An organization persisting through time, now working tirelessly to obstruct the Flame-Chase.
他们就那么畏惧黄金裔追求的「再创世」？
Are they truly so terrified of the "Era Nova" the Chrysos Heirs strive for?
即便身处飘摇末世，也总有人能从困局中获益。
Even in these crumbling end times, there are always those who find ways to profit from the chaos.
要让既得利益者为遥远的理想抛弃此世的地位、财富、野心——那或许不比缔造奇迹容易。
To ask the vested interests to abandon their status, wealth, and ambitions in this world for a distant ideal, may be no easier than creating a miracle.
…不知{NICKNAME}现在在哪。如果我被他们盯上了，那{F#她}{M#他}肯定也逃不过这遭。希望一切安好……
...I wonder where {NICKNAME} is now. If they're targeting me, {F#s}he definitely won't escape their notice either. I hope all is well...
总算找到你了，丹恒阁下。传信石版联系不上，圣城卫士险些以为你和{NICKNAME}已经遭遇了不测。
There you are, Lord Dan Heng. We couldn't reach you on the teleslate, so the Holy City Guard almost assumed you and {NICKNAME} had met some terrible fate.
在阴影中爬行的虫豸们，退下吧！阴谋到此为止了。
You pests crawling in the shadows, back off! Your plot ends here.
你们如愿施行了毒计，趁早四散奔逃吧，兴许你们还能争取到一条活命……
You've played your hand. Run while you still can. It might be your only chance to survive.
但我奉劝你们永远别再靠近奥赫玛，否则，愤怒的民众将把你们撕成碎片。
Stay away from Okhema forever. If you set foot there again, the fury of its people will tear you apart.
<color=#dbc291ff>因为阿格莱雅死了——而在圣城公民眼里，你们就是杀害她的凶手！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Because Aglaea is dead, and in the eyes of the holy city's citizens, her blood is on your hands!</color>
看来她对你的判断有所偏误。
Looks like she was wrong about you.
她…？是在说你们的幕后主使么？
She...? Are you talking about the mastermind behind all of this?
她认为你很软弱。她认为，哪怕在对战心中坚信的「恶」时，你在挥剑时仍会有犹疑。
She thought you were weak. She believed that even when you are facing the "evil" that you claim to oppose, you'd hesitate to strike.
会将仁慈误解成软弱，看来你们那位主子自负又愚蠢。
Misinterpreting mercy for weakness shows how arrogant and foolish your master is.
他们几个都还有气息。稍加照顾，几天以后应该就能恢复。
They're still alive. With proper care, they'll pull through in a few days.
但我必须警告你——我已经太久没把剑尖指向人类了，没法保证自己能控制好挥剑的力度。他们能活下来算是运气好……
But I must warn you — I haven't fought a human in ages. I can't guarantee I'll always be able to hold back. They're lucky they're still alive...
你能否和他们一般幸运…想试试吗？
If you feel as lucky as they are, try me.
Bro, you sound kind of scary.
滚吧，别再出现在我们面前。转告你们身后的主子，想阻止逐火之旅，她最好集结一支比鼎盛时的悬锋更雄壮的军队。
Get out of here. Don't show your face around us again. If your master wants to stop the Flame-Chase Journey, she'd better bring an army that makes Kremnos at its peak look like child's play.
我不止一次强调过，白厄阁下…我们不为争端而来。
I've said it more than once, Lord Phainon... we're not here to start a fight.
我们会来这里，<color=#dbc291ff>只是为了保证你们不在别处。</color>
We came only <color=#dbc291ff>to ensure you weren't anywhere else.</color>
不知不觉间，我们已经达成了「拖延时间」的任务……
While you were unaware, we already accomplished our mission — to buy time.
那么，白厄阁下…有缘再会。
So, Lord Phainon... until next time.
我没事。那些家伙竟敢拿公民的性命作为要挟…那就触碰到了底线。
I'm fine. Anyone who uses innocent lives as bargaining chips has gone too far.
但他们其实是冲着黄金裔来的。
But they were after the Chrysos Heirs.
嗯。我猜…元老院的反对派还在做绝望的挣扎，想阻挠逐火。
Hmm. I guess, the opposition within the Council of Elders is still desperately fighting to obstruct the Flame-Chase.
他们真觉得自己有胜算？
Do they think they have a chance?
恐怕也是孤注一掷…我猜，元老院的反对派还在做绝望的挣扎，想阻挠逐火。
Probably a desperate gamble... I guess, the opposition within the Council of Elders is still desperately fighting to obstruct the Flame-Chase Journey.
如果阴谋败露，他们在圣城将如过街狗鼠，人人喊打。哪怕再擅长隐匿行踪……
If the conspiracy is exposed, they'll be hunted down in the holy city like rats with nowhere to run. No matter where they hide...
不止一个人给我传信，这不像玩笑……
I've heard from more than one person. It doesn't seem like a joke.
冷静…这也可能是她的什么计策。直到亲眼确认之前……
Stay calm... this could just be one of her schemes. I won't believe it until I see it for myself...
一切照常。我先给缇宝老师传信，让她尽力安抚公民。我们快马加鞭赶回奥赫玛，去确认城里的状况。假如中途再撞见拦路的敌人……

Stay on course. I'll contact Tribbie and ask her to keep the citizens calm. We'll hurry back to Okhema as fast as possible and assess the situation in the city. If we run into any enemies along the way...
"You're forging a sword for Phainon, aren't you?"
「我已经太久没有目睹过你挥锤淬火的身姿了，刚刚竟看得有些入神。」
"I haven't seen you wield the hammer in so long... I couldn't help but be entranced by the sight."
与我相见，以这幅模样。这意味着……
In this form, you come to me. It means...
「没错。<color=#dbc291ff>此时此刻，我的身形已经破碎。在这世间，我作为『人』的旅程已经来到了终点。</color>」
"That's right. <color=#dbc291ff>At this moment, my physical form is already shattered. My journey as a human in this world has come to an end.</color>"
「我们此前的约定，现在到了兑现它的时候了。」
Of course... The pact, I haven't forgotten.
「我托付给你的那样东西，它还在吗？」
"The thing I entrusted to you, do you still have it?"
过于简陋，容器…配不上你的品位。你坚持如此？
Far too plain, this vessel is... Not worthy of you. Do you still insist?
「过去千年，我手中的所有织物都沾染上了这冰冷的神性。因而，我开始厌恶它们的色彩、触感和气味。」
"Over the past thousand years, every piece of fabric I've worked with has been tainted by my cold divinity. It's made me hate their colors, texture, and scent."
「但这样饰品不同…它是一个孩子赠予我的礼物。她纯真，善良——我多希望自己的童年能活成她的模样。」
"This ornament stands apart... It was a gift from a child. She was pure and kind. I often wished my childhood could have been like hers."
和众人告别…你已计划周全？
How to say goodbye to everyone... have you already planned?
「恐怕这次没有那么周全的计划了。无法和他们一一道别，我倍感遗憾。」
"I'm afraid there's no such detailed plan this time. I deeply regret not being able to say farewell to them one by one."
「但最好的时机已经来到…我的退场将为他们肃清后顾之忧。这件临别赠礼，应该多少能够弥补这仓促一别的遗憾吧？」
"The moment has come... My departure will give them one less thing to worry about. This parting gift should help ease the regret of such a sudden goodbye."
针对泰坦发明，悬锋的铸魂技术。虽能保留神性…但会彻底过滤，人性的残余。
Invented for the Titans, Kremnos's Soul-Forging technology was. Though divinity it retains, filtered out, the remnants of humanity will be.
这是你想要的，阿格莱雅？
Is that what you want, Aglaea?
「你已经与我确认再三了。没错，哈托努斯，我需要你为我这么做。」
"You've confirmed this with me repeatedly. Yes, Chartonus, I need you to do this for me."
「将我的神性凝聚起来，注入这件饰品…或许它还能在未来派上用场，帮助他们完成使命。」
"Condense my divinity into this ornament... It might still be useful in the future to help them complete their mission."
那孩童，不必羡慕…你的人性，已走过属于它的，伟大一生。
Envy that child, there's no need to... Already lived a grand life, your humanity has.
「呵…你的赞赏令我百般安心，大工匠。现在……」
"Heh... your praise puts my heart at ease, Grand Craftsman. Now..."
「…请带我经历命运的最后一次淬炼吧。」
"...please take me through the last tempering that fate has to offer."
城中一片寂静，不安的情绪分秒都在累积。
The city is silent, and tension is building with every passing second.
消息恐怕已经传开了。家家户户都闭门不出…市集的所有店铺都临时关张。
The news has probably spread by now. Every household is locked up tight... and all the market stalls have closed down temporarily.
She really was taken by the Cleaners...
难以置信，她怎么可能被区区几个刺客……
I can't imagine, how she could've been taken down by a handful of assassins...
除非也是她计谋的一环。
Unless it's all a part of her plan.
Something about this feels like a scheme...
无论如何我都无法相信，她会被区区几个刺客……
I just can't believe she'd be taken down by a handful of assassins...
如果这一切都是计策，那缇宝老师一定知道些什么，只是不便在消息中明说。
If this is all part of a larger plan, Tribbie must know something. She just couldn't say it in the message.
啊，你们回来了。状况如何，没受伤吧？
Ah, you're back. How's everything? No injuries, I hope?
放心，清洗者没伤到我们。
Don't worry. The Cleaners didn't lay a hand on us.
克拉特鲁斯阁下，事发时你在城里？究竟发生了什么……
Lord Krateros, were you in the city when it happened? What exactly went down...
很遗憾，没人知道当时的详细状况。
Regrettably, no one knows the details of that moment.
…云石天宫的目击者看到阿格莱雅从黄金裔浴池坠落。
...Eyewitnesses at the Marmoreal Palace saw Aglaea fall from the Chrysos Heir Bath.
圣城卫士上前查看时，她已经没有生命迹象了。
She showed no signs of life by the time the Holy City Guards approached to check.
但他们甚至不敢妄下定论…因为她是活过千年的半神，黄金裔的领袖。这城中的大部分公民都以为她与死亡二字无关。

They were too afraid to jump to conclusions... After all, she was a demigod who'd lived for over a thousand years, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs. Most citizens of this city believed that death couldn't touch her.
她被一把制式奇特的匕首刺穿了心脏。我亲眼看到以后才确信，那是「清洗者」佩戴的暗器。
She was pierced through the heart by a uniquely crafted dagger. I saw it for myself. It's one of the weapons carried by the "Cleaners."
那他们为什么没对我们下手？
Why didn't they go after us?
我和你想的一样…这完全不合逻辑。
I also don't understand... This doesn't add up.
所以她真的是被刺杀的…
在树庭出现的家伙，还有在重渊和丹恒对峙的那些，都没有立刻诉诸暴力，只是监视和威慑。
The ones who appeared in the Grove, and those who confronted Dan Heng in the Abyss, didn't immediately resort to violence. They were just watching and trying to intimidate.
他们没理由，也没那个胆子对阿格莱雅动武。难道……
They didn't have any reason, nor the courage, to attack Aglaea. Perhaps...
径自臆测意义不大。去找缇宝女士吧，她最懂得阿格莱雅的心思。
Speculating blindly won't help. Let's go find Lady Tribbie, as she understands Aglaea's mind best.
我会留在这里，带领卫士维持治安。你们就去弄清这起事情的原委吧——但别花太久，阿格莱雅已逝，必须有人代替她引领奥赫玛。
I'll stay here to lead the guards and maintain order. Find out what happened — but don't take too long. With Aglaea gone, someone has to take her place and lead Okhema.
对了，风堇姑娘…她作为医师宣告了阿格莱雅的死亡。你们或许也该和她聊聊。
Also, Miss Hyacine was the one who declared Aglaea dead. You might want to speak with her.
我们听克拉特鲁斯说了。你…还好么？
We heard from Krateros. Are you... alright?
我没事…事发以后，我就一直陪在缇宝和缇宁老师身边。
I'm fine... I've been staying close to Lady Tribbie and Lady Trinnon after the incident.
你们能这么快赶回来真是太好了…她们现在很需要有人陪伴。
It's great that you could come back so quickly... They need someone with them now.
How are the two of them holding up?
不太好。毕竟我们亲眼看到了阿格莱雅大人的…最后时刻。
Not well. After all, we witnessed Lady Aglaea's... last moments.
嗯…我们目睹了她最后的时刻。
Yes... we witnessed her final moments.
我第一时间就前去尝试治疗了，只是连天空祝福都……
I tried to treat her immediately, but even the sky's blessings...
宣告她的死讯…是我作为医师做过的最艰难的事。
Declaring her death was the hardest thing I've ever had to do as a doctor.
白厄阁下…别勉强自己。现在你的肩膀更沉重了，千万别倒下……
Lord Phainon... don't push yourself. You're carrying a heavier burden now. Please don't fall...
我失去的是一位导师、战友。而缇宝和缇宁老师，她们失去的是千年的牵绊…如同生命的一部分。
What I've lost is a mentor, and a comrade-in-arms. But for Tribbie and Trinnon, they've lost a thousand-year-old bond... like losing a part of their lives.
去休息吧，风堇。你应该很长时间没合眼了吧？后面的事，交给我们就好。
You should rest, Hyacine. You've been awake for a long time, haven't you? We'll handle things from here.
小白，不要！请不要和*我们*道歉。
Snowy, don't! Please don't apologize to us.
你远赴树庭是为了让自己变得强大，强大到能对付威胁到奥赫玛的敌人。你没做错任何事，千万不要苛责自己呀。
You went to the Grove to prepare yourself for the threats to Okhema. You didn't do anything wrong, so don't be hard on yourself.
这段漫长的旅程，*我们*一直都陪在阿雅身边，比谁都清楚她心中所想。
We were always by Agy's side throughout this long journey, so we understood her thoughts better than anyone.
她知道自己看不到逐火之旅的尾声，但还是毫无保留地燃烧自己…为了所有人的明天。
She knew she wouldn't see the end of the Flame-Chase Journey, yet she gave everything without hesitation... for the future of everyone.
我知道阿格莱雅对我的期望。当下，奥赫玛最不需要的就是一个自怨自艾的引路人。
I know what Aglaea expected of me. Right now, the last thing Okhema needs is a leader wallowing in self-pity.
那边的卷轴，是阿雅托付给*我们*的一则留言。她嘱咐*我们*在特别的时候将它转交给你。
The scroll over there was entrusted to us by Agy. She instructed us to hand it over to you when the time was right.
我想，现在…就是那个「特别的时候」啦。
那碗燕麦粥的味道…我还记得哦。
I still remember the taste of that oatmeal...
明早见。到时候，我再帮你准备早餐吧。
See you tomorrow morning. I'll prepare breakfast for you then.
白厄，我谦逊的学生，信赖的同僚——
Phainon, my humble student, my trusted colleague —
在我写下这些文字时，你正与元老院的辩论家唇齿交锋，在硝烟无形的战场上争取逐火之旅的存续。
As I write this, you are locked in a battle of words with the Council of Elders, fighting for the survival of the Flame-Chase Journey on a battlefield where the smoke of war is invisible.
对于将你与{NICKNAME}仓促推上辩论台的决定，我深感惶恐与愧疚。但请你原谅，彼时，我断然不能在你们面前显露出怯懦——因为那定会打击你们的士气。

I deeply regret and feel guilty for hastily pushing you and {NICKNAME} into the debate. But please forgive me — at that moment, I could not afford to show any sign of weakness before you, as it would have crushed your morale.
我本将这场辩论视为惯常之事，以为仅凭在百年岁月中累积的民意与经验便能取胜。但我既低估了凯妮斯和其党羽的狡黠，也低估了自己通感力的退化。

I considered the debate a routine affair, assuming I could win merely with the support and experience we'd accumulated over centuries. But I underestimated Caenis and her party's cunning, and also the deterioration of my own senses.
那陷阱大概是辩手卡勒克提斯设下的。他预先准备好了剪断的金线，在凯妮斯辩论陷入下风时突然将它示于众人面前。
The trap was likely set by the debater Callictis. He had prepared a severed golden thread in advance, revealing it to the public when Caenis was faltering in the debate.
他声称我在用金线阅读众人的思绪，以此在辩论时舞弊。我本有百种方式应对那低级的盘外招，但话语却未经思想的审验便溜出了嘴边……

He claimed I was reading everyone's thoughts with the golden thread to cheat in the debate. I could have countered that low tactic in a hundred ways, but my words slipped out before I could even think about them...
「正因人群中满是如你这般卑鄙的奸宄，我才需以金线监管这圣城中的一切。」
"With deceitful scoundrels like you in the crowd, I have no choice but to rely on the golden thread to keep watch over everything in this holy city."
那番话语引起的反响，无需我解释你亦能想象。那一刻，我顿觉自己时日无多。
You can imagine the reaction that comment provoked. At that moment, I felt my time was running short.
这具躯壳内的神性或许可以永续——但那终究不是「我」的本源。我是人之女，自母亲的胎盘中降生，亦会以人的姿态死去。
The divinity in this body might be eternal — but that is not the essence of "me." I am a daughter of humanity, born of my mother, and I will die as a human.
意识到自己人性将尽之际，我便开始筹划自己的退场。要以怎样的方式离席，才能不浪费这一场迟来的死亡？我一时还未找到最理想的答案。
Realizing that my humanity was fading, I began to plan my exit. What kind of departure would not waste such a belated death? I have yet to find the ideal answer.
但我清楚，自己不能与常人一样在睡梦中安然离去。那些毒蛇，它们畏惧被金线割断蛇头，因此才会一直匍匐于黑暗中。
But I knew I couldn't simply fade away in my sleep like anyone else. The serpents have always lurked in the darkness, terrified of their heads being cut off by the golden thread.
若我的离去平静而无波澜，接踵而至的会是倾巢而出的蛇灾。很遗憾，安享平静的死亡注定是我不可企及的奢侈。
If my departure were to be calm and uneventful, it would only lead to a swarm of those serpents emerging from their nests. Regrettably, a peaceful death is a luxury I cannot afford.
我必须主动示弱，引得那些毒蛇失去耐心，蠢蠢欲动。当它们以为自己将要得偿所愿，露出毒牙咬向我的脚踵时——我将以最后的火焰点燃蛇巢，焚烧阴影中的威胁。

I must feign weakness deliberately, to make those serpents lose patience and act rashly. Just as they think they've struck and sunk their fangs into my heels — that's when I'll strike back, igniting the final blaze to burn away the threats hidden in the shadows.
冲天的火光也许会令人们混乱、畏惧，但我并不担心他们会迷失方向。因为奥赫玛还有你在，白厄。
The blaze soaring into the sky might sow fear and confusion, but I have no worries about people losing their way. After all, Okhema still has you to guide them, Phainon.
你并不完美，白厄。多少个黎明，你的迷茫、鲁莽和多愁善感在我面前上演。沉重的过往压在你的肩上，令你一直痛苦不堪。
You're not perfect, Phainon. I've witnessed your confusion, recklessness, and deep sensitivity dawn after dawn. The heavy burdens of your past have always weighed you down, inflicting deep pain.
但你也是「完美」的。因为你理解并包容所有人的缺憾，你愿意以不设前提的善意鉴出凡人粗坯之下最为珍贵的品质。
Yet, in your way, you are perfect. You embrace everyone's imperfections, always ready to find the precious qualities hidden beneath their rough exteriors, unconditionally.
我想，那或许也是天父刻法勒与其它神明有别之处。它发现自己造物身上的残缺，却依旧选择照耀他们，以无条件的博爱守护他们……

That might be what sets our sky father Kephale apart from other deities. They recognize the imperfections in their creations yet still choose to shine their light on them, offering protection with unconditional love...
白厄，我想让你明白——在你热忱地追逐「纷争」，以为那才是你应当投身的命运时——从始至终，我的想法从未改变：
Phainon, while you zealously pursued "Strife," believing it to be your destined path — from the very beginning, my thoughts have never changed.
<color=#dbc291ff>你是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You are the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.</color>
去完成神谕中的逐火之旅吧。去点亮星辰，给人子带去希望吧。
Go complete the Flame-Chase Journey of the prophecy. Ignite the stars and inspire hope in the hearts of humanity.
我会在西风的尽头，盼待由你开辟出的奇迹。
I will be waiting at the end of the west wind, looking forward to the miracle you will create.
阿格莱雅，我到底何德何能…值得你把炙热的火炬传到我的手上？
Aglaea, how could I possibly be worthy... of the burning torch you've passed into my hands?
丹恒，能请你帮我一个忙吗？
Dan Heng, can you do me a favor?
我能帮到什么，尽管提吧。
Whatever I can help with, just say the word.
请你为克拉特鲁斯阁下带话，让他集结圣城卫士和悬锋族人，挨家挨户地带去消息：明天的明晰时，白厄会在云石天宫宣讲。

Please deliver a message to Lord Krateros. Have him gather the Holy City Guards and the Kremnoans to spread the word from door to door: At the Lucid Hour tomorrow, Phainon will speak at the Marmoreal Palace.
请他们告诉每个人，凡是对圣城的未来和逐火之旅心存顾虑的公民，都应该来参加这次集会。告诉他们，阿格莱雅将希望的种子留给了翁法罗斯。
Urge everyone who has concerns about the holy city's future and the Flame-Chase Journey to attend this gathering. Tell them Aglaea has left Amphoreus the seeds of hope.
谢谢你。各位都经历了惊魂未定的一天，请务必好好休息，整理一下心情。我还要去做好准……
Thank you. It's been a harrowing day for everyone. Please make sure to rest well and collect your thoughts. I need to prepare...
What brings you to Marmoreal Palace?
我本想安顿好一切再去找你。有什么急事吗，哈托努斯？
I planned to get everything settled before coming to see you. Is there something urgent, Chartonus?
How you're holding up, I wanted to see.
比想象中好些，现在看来。
Better than I expected, you seem.
已经没有余地让我犹豫了。必须行动起来，让所有人知道黄金裔的领导没有崩溃。
There's no room for doubt anymore. It's time to take action and show everyone that the leadership of the Chrysos Heirs is still strong.
很正确，你的判断。现在，收下它吧。
Right, your assessment is. Now, here, take this.
<color=#dbc291ff>"Dawnmaker"</color> — the name I've chosen for it.
备战，于黎明前。挥剑，为了明天。符合你的身份，黄金裔。
Before Dawn, prepare for battle. For tomorrow, wield your sword. Befits your stature, it does, Chrysos Heir.
不可思议。你明明没有亲眼见过那名黑衣剑客…只是听我用言语复述，竟然就能还原到如此地步吗？
Unbelievable. You've never seen that black-clad swordmaster... yet you've recreated this so precisely, just from what I described?
为它注入黎明之力，我已经。听从你的意念，它的锋刃将附着金焰。
Imbued it with the power of Dawn, I already have. Guided by your will, gleam with golden flames, its blade will.
Wield it. May triumph always be yours.
谢谢你，哈托努斯——我会用这把长剑守护翁法罗斯的生灵。
Thank you, Chartonus. I will use this sword to protect the beings of Amphoreus.
封存于此，阿格莱雅神性的残留。
Stored here, the remnants of Aglaea's divinity are.
这是她的委托。自己的死亡，她早已预见。
This was her commission. Her death, she had long foreseen.
我难以确认。我们知之甚少，有关神性。
It's difficult to confirm. About divinity, we know very little.
以此种方式，她想陪伴你们，无论如何。
In this way, she wanted to be with you, always.
我明白了，把它交给我保管吧。这样一来…我身上就又多了一件形影不离之物。
I understand. Let me keep it. With this... I'll have another constant companion by my side.
很久以前，有人对我说过：「希望这个世界永远都不需要救世主」。
"May this world never have need for a Deliverer." Someone told me long ago.
但当世界辜负了她的期望、分崩离析的时候，如果看到是我站在人群的前方，带领人们反抗命运……
But when the world dashed her hopes and fell into disarray, if she could see me now — leading from the front, rallying people against their destiny...
他会站出来引领奥赫玛么？
Will he step up to lead Okhema?
没有「金织」女士，圣城该如何延续……
How will the holy city continue without Lady Goldweaver...
不久以前，我在黎明云崖的公民大会上发表了一番讲话。
Not long ago, I spoke at the citizens' assembly at Dawncloud.
那时，为了延续黄金裔逐火的希望，我奋力地思考该用什么样的话术博取人们的支持。
I wrestled with every word, searching for the right ones to rally support and keep the Chrysos Heirs' Flame-Chase alive.
最后，我想起了一位老师的教导：在以口舌为兵器的场合，激愤和盲目是远胜理性的强大武器。
In the end, I remembered a lesson from one of my teachers: In battles where words are weapons, outrage and blind passion often overpower reason.
所以我采取了他的策略。我将站在对立面的论敌贬低为虫豸，抨击他们的品格，并列数他们的罪行。
I followed his strategy. I painted my opponents as nothing more than pests, tore apart their character, and laid out their crimes.
我的策略奏效了。它为我争取到了足够多的票数，让我达成了想要的目标。但事后？我没有感到分毫的喜悦。
The strategy worked. I secured enough votes to achieve my goal. But afterward? There wasn't even a flicker of joy.
因为我很清楚——那场表面上的胜利掩盖了更大的失败。在我为了胜利不顾手段地挑唆对立的情绪时，我已经和自己加入逐火事业的初衷背道而驰。
I realized — that apparent victory masked a deeper failure. In my pursuit of success, I fueled division and strayed far from my very purpose that led me to the Flame-Chase Journey.
这段征途本应凝聚，而非分裂；它本应令我们强大，而非使我们脆弱。
This journey was supposed to unify, not divide. To strengthen us, not weaken us.
过去，是金色的丝线在为我们缝补裂痕。有人会将它比作监视的眼线，掌控的工具，但没人能够否认…是阿格莱雅将这座城市，乃至这个支离破碎的世界缝缀在了一起。

It was the gold thread that mended our rifts in the past. Some saw it as a means of surveillance, a tool of control, but no one can deny that it was Aglaea who held this city, and even this shattered world, together.
但如今她已不在——没错，正如你们听闻的那样——守护圣城千年的半神阿格莱雅，的确已经陨落了。
Now she is gone — yes, as you have heard — the demigod Aglaea, who guarded the holy city for a millennium, has indeed fallen.
Find the murderer! Make them pay!
起初，我的心情也和你们一样。
I felt the same as all of you initially.
起初，我也想在这里与你们一同痛斥罪人的恶行，商讨该如何追讨他们，在他们的头顶降下惩罚……
I wanted to stand here beside you, to condemn the sinners, to discuss retribution, and to see justice brought down upon them...
此刻，城中的金线已经散去，我却没有看到任何人在为脱离掌控雀跃欢呼。在空荡的市集和浴宫，我只把一种情绪收入眼中：不安。
The golden threads that once bound this city have unraveled, yet no one is celebrating their freedom from control. In the empty markets and bath chambers, one feeling lingers: Unease.
因为在场的每个人都心知肚明，防止我们被彼此心底阴暗所伤的最后保障已经消失。从此，除了我们为自己捏塑的道德律令，再也没有哪股神力能替我们抵御恶意。

Deep down, we all know — the last safeguard against the harm we may do to each other is gone. No divine power will protect us from the malice in our hearts. From now on, only the moral code we choose to uphold for ourselves will stand between us and the abyss.
Phainon has a way with words.
There's something special about a man of letters.
If it were me up there, I could do it too.
...You think highly of yourself, don't you?
逐火之旅已经接近尾声，黄金裔唯一需要征服的泰坦仅剩{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}一尊。
The Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its end, with only one Titan left for the Chrysos Heirs to conquer: {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.
可在登临天空以前，我会先向你们发起挑战——我挑战你们心中可能的阴仄与恶意，让你们的心灵先于这片天空放晴！
Before I rise to the skies, I challenge you — cast out the shadows and malice within your hearts. Let your spirits shine brighter than the sky itself!
请允许我见证：哪怕失去了「浪漫」的神权，奥赫玛仍会是末世中的理想乡。在这里，居住着阿格莱雅所期待的、神谕中的新世界所期待的……

Let me bear witness: Even without the divine authority of Romance, Okhema will remain a sanctuary in these end times. A place for the kind people Aglaea dreamed of, the kind of people foretold in prophecy...
更好的人！更好的人！更好的人！
Better people! Better people! Better people!
你们愿意接受挑战…我心存感激。你们令我醒悟：阿格莱雅留给我的或许是世上最质朴的职责。
I appreciate your willingness to accept the challenge... You have reminded me that Aglaea left me perhaps the simplest duty in the world.
要背负创世的命运，我只需付出一样东西。那是她曾慷慨地赠予我的礼物，而我也会转交给你们每个人：<color=#dbc291ff>毫无保留的深信。</color>
To bear the burden of creation, I need only to give one thing. It's a gift she once gave me without hesitation, and now I share it with each of you — <color=#dbc291ff>unshakable faith.</color>
距离翁法罗斯的新生还有一段长路。但我们不会在前进时遗忘过去，因为翁法罗斯的记忆总能造福后人。
There's still a long way to go before Amphoreus is reborn. But we will not forget the past as we move forward, for the memories of Amphoreus will always benefit future generations.
请将这一刻借给我吧。我想征用各位几分钟的光阴，一起缅怀一位庇佑圣城千年的半神……
Allow me this moment. I want to borrow a few minutes of your time to commemorate a demigod who protected the holy city for a millennium...
…她是奥赫玛的改衣师，黄金裔的领袖，「金织」阿格莱雅。而她这一生最大的壮举——
...She was Okhema's dressmaker, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, the Goldweaver Aglaea. And her greatest feat —
我们的歌谣，小白以前最喜欢啦！
That's our song, and Snowy used to love it!
是啊，缇安老师。对于那个心里充满不安的孩子……
Yes, Lady Trianne. For that child filled with anxiety...
…你们的歌谣总能驱散我心里的阴云，哪怕只有短短的一刻。
...your songs always dispelled the clouds in my heart, even if just for a moment.
嘿嘿…小时候的小白，很可爱，很善良！
Hehe... Snowy was so cute and kind when he was little!
现在…唔，变得好大一只，没那么可爱了？但还是很善良哇！
Now... hmm, you've grown so much. Maybe not as cute but still just as kind!
哈哈哈…岁月催人老，这谁都没办法。但善意…是你们帮我滋养了它。
Hahaha... Time spares no one, so there's nothing we can do. But kindness... you helped nurture it in me.
不用谢啦！你的光芒，很耀眼！继续，保持！
Don't mention it! Your light is as bright as ever. Keep it up and stay strong!
听你刚才那番话，是觉得我教给你的辩论术是邪门歪道么？
I heard what you said. Are you suggesting the debate tactics I've taught you are nothing but sleight of hand?
我可没那么说啊，那刻夏老师。毕竟要是没有你传授给我的技巧，逐火之旅还存不存在都两说了。
Not at all, Professor Anaxa. Honestly, without those techniques you taught me, the Flame-Chase Journey might not have survived.
哼…还好你脑子足够清晰。
Hmph... Good thing your head's still clear.
对应刻法勒的黄金裔么…呵，当初在教室里按着你的脑袋背公式的时候，可真没想到你还是这块料。
The Chrysos Heir of Kephale... I had no idea you had it in you while I was drilling those formulas in your head in class.
谁能想得到呢，老师？顺带一说，那些公式我现在也已经忘得一干二净了。
Who could have thought, Professor? By the way, I've completely forgotten those formulas now.
呵，真是不可教也。来世，让我好好教你该如何承担神职吧。
Ha, some things never change. In our next lives, I'll teach you how to truly embrace your divine duties.
Aren't you going to say something?
白厄阁下，你…总是那么平易近人。
Lord Phainon, you... have always been so approachable.
自我们认识起，你就一直将我视作伙伴…我在你身上第一次体会到了什么是普通人间的友谊。
Ever since we first met, you've seen me as a friend... It was the first time I understood what everyday friendship was like.
因为和你一起说笑时，我偶尔会忘记自己是谁…对于拥有我这般力量的人，那非常危险。
Laughing and chatting with you, I sometimes forget who I am... and for someone with my kind of power, that's a real hazard.
啊…原来还有这一层意思。抱歉，我忘记换位思考了。
Ah... I hadn't thought of it that way. Sorry, I forgot to consider your perspective.
请别道歉…因为尽管如此，那些我们一起度过的时光…回想起来还是十分令我开心。
Please, no apologies... Despite everything, thinking back on the times we spent together makes me really happy.
Ha, forget you? Like I'd ever.
咱们之间又不是生离死别，你只是去悬锋城看门了而已，就别掺和这么催人泪下的场合了。
We aren't parting ways forever. You're just off to guard the gates at Castrum Kremnos. Let's not make this a tearful farewell.
呵…你还是那么懂得如何令人不快啊。
Heh... you know just how to make a person uncomfortable.
我有预感，你我在此世还会再见。有机会时再较量一番吧，「救世主」。
I have a feeling we'll meet again in this lifetime. Let's have another showdown then, "Deliverer."
这么自信？现在的我可不比以往了。看见这把剑了吗？这可是刚出哈托努斯锻炉的极品。
That's very confident of you. I've changed since then. Have you seen this sword? It's a masterpiece, freshly forged by Chartonus.
哈…尚未夺得泰坦神权的区区凡夫，口气倒是狂妄得很。
Ha... A bold statement for a mere mortal who hasn't yet claimed the power of a Titan.
回头见，哀丽秘榭的白厄。
See you around, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.
要记得，白厄…完成逐火以后，要把开启创世奇迹的决定交由翁法罗斯的人们。
Remember, Phainon... after completing the Flame-Chase, leave the decision to initiate the Miracle of Genesis to the Amphoreans.
黄金裔是神谕的代行者，而他们——他们才是这个世界的主人。
The Chrysos Heirs are the executors of the prophecy, yet they — the people are the true masters of this world.
放心吧。我一直记得你的教诲——
Rest assured. I always keep your teachings in mind.
「自命不凡的英雄，与桀恶仅有一线之隔」，对么？
"The difference between a presumptuous hero and a tyrant is a fine line." Right?
Well said. You've got a good memory.
已经这个时候了…你没有什么别的话想说吗？
It's late... Anything else you'd like to add?
哪怕只是在你的想象中…我也不擅表露自己脆弱的一面啊。
Even in your imagination... I'm not one to show my vulnerable side.
哈…没关系，让你说出一句毫无遮掩的交心话到底有多难，这我早就知道了。
Ha... no worries. I've long understood how difficult it is for you to open up completely.
谢谢你把我带到了这里，阿格莱雅…你拯救了我。
Thank you for bringing me here, Aglaea... You saved me.
呵…也许我想要拯救的不是你，孩子……
Heh... maybe what I wanted to save wasn't you, child...
…真是一段感伤，却又精彩的旅途呀。
And it's still not over yet... is it?
果然还是被我说中了吧？最后的最后，你还是成为了这个故事里的救世主呀。
I was right. In the end, you did become the Deliverer in this story.
你不在的时间里…很多事都变了。我认识了各种各样的人，也做了很多不同的事。我拾起了一些决心…也放下了一些执念。
A lot has changed while you were away. I've met so many people and tried so many things. I've found new resolve... and I've let go of some attachments.
I'm not the same person I used to be.
你从来都没有变哦，白厄。
You've never changed at all, Phainon.
呵，黎明云崖…我对这里的记忆还真是百味交杂。
Ah, Dawncloud... This place holds so many different kinds of memories.
还记得，那个时候…从这里往山下望，一眼就能辨认出「金织」的招牌。
I remember you could see the "Goldweaver" sign from here, all the way down the mountain.
一千年过去，我的眼神也不如从前那么锐利了哪……
But my eyes aren't what they used to be a thousand years ago...
奥赫玛有没有什么稀罕的宝贝，是连你…唔…连我们的店里都没有的？
Does Okhema have any treasures so rare that not even your... I mean, our shop, has seen?
当然。我听闻，在黎明云崖的某处藏着一颗「全世宝石」，传说它是从黎明机器上脱落的碎屑。
Of course, it has. I heard there's a "Gem of All Worlds" hidden somewhere in Dawncloud. Apparently it's a piece that fell out of the Dawn Device.
作为刻法勒神躯的一部分，它是真正的无价之宝，即便「金织」也无从染指它的珠光。
It's truly a priceless treasure, being a part of Kephale's divine body. Even I, the Goldweaver, cannot witness its glamour.
…哈，我记下啦！那你接着忙店里的事，我先……
...Nice! Got it! Well, please keep looking after the shop while I—
…让我猜猜你在想什么吧，赛法利娅。
你大概已经在盘算要如何混入黎明云崖，将那颗宝石收入囊中了，对么？
You're probably already plotting to sneak into Dawncloud to steal that gem, aren't you?
你大概还想到了下一步：要把它卖出一个好价钱，然后把得来的财富分给圣城的穷人、难民……
And your next move is probably trying to sell it to the highest bidder, then distribute that money to the poor and the refugees in the holy city.
…裁缝女，你真的没在用金线偷看我的想法嘛？
...Look, seamstress. Are you sure you aren't peeking into my head with your golden threads?
你擅长的只是掩饰谎言。可你的同情心，一直跃然脸上。
You might be skilled at covering up lies, but your compassion is all over your face, plain as day.
不要蒙蔽自己。打你的心底…你认为这样做是正确的吗，赛法利娅？
Don't lie to yourself. Do you honestly think this is the right thing to do, Cifera?
…那我还能怎么办？以我的力量能做到的…就只有这些而已。
...What else am I supposed to do? That's the only thing I can do with my power!
裁缝女，你常说，我有成为一个好人，甚至是成为大家眼中的英雄的潜质……
You keep talking about how I have the potential to become a good person, or even what people call a "hero"...
但我不知道该怎么做…我没法像你那样织出金光闪闪的布匹，也没有海瑟音姐姐那么美妙的歌喉，更不可能像缇宝阿姐那样知识渊博……
But I don't know what I need to do to get there... I can't weave golden dresses like you, I can't sing as well as Miss Hysilens, and I definitely don't know as much as big sis Tribbie...
我唯一擅长的东西…就只有在街头领悟的，那些在大家眼里见不得光的活计而已！
The only things I'm good at are the underhanded street smarts that no one even respects!
可即便如此，我也想…想配得上你的选择。小偷也有做梦的权利，对吧……
But... but I still want to be worthy of you. I want to prove that you've made the right choice. Even thieves can dream, right...?
我明白，赛法利娅…我明白。
你有千万个理由控诉，因为宿命就是如此不公。你要走的道路注定更为曲折…在这趟旅程中，你势必要在背光处承受人们的误解。

You are justified in your anger. Destiny is never fair, and your path is doomed to be even worse than everyone else's. You are fated to walk in the dark and bear the world's misunderstanding in this journey.
但你要相信一件事：每个人都是世上独一无二的存在。
But you have to believe that everyone in this world is unique in their own way.
即便算上多洛斯传说中的三百侠盗…我依然坚信，你会是唯一能够承载「诡计」神职的命运之女。
I am convinced that you're the only one who can bear the authority of Trickery, even if you have to contend with the legendary three hundred master thieves of Dolos.
要是能让所有人都相信我就好了…我想让大家都认为，世界是个美好的地方…世上的人们都很单纯善良。
I just want everyone to believe that the world is beautiful and that everyone is simple and kind... If only I could get everyone to believe that...
哪怕我知道那是假话，但只要相信的人足够多…谎言是不是就能成真…？
Would that lie become reality if enough people believed in it? ...Even though it's a lie?
谎言永远都是谎言，赛法利娅……
Lies will always be lies, Cifera.
只是，在某些时候…它的确可以比坦诚高贵。
But sometimes... they can be more noble than the truth.
…你打算就一直在那儿站着？恕我直言，鬼鬼祟祟的风格可不适合你——救世小子。
...Are you really planning to just stand there forever? Honestly, sneaking around doesn't suit you, Deliverer.
哈哈哈…我可没想瞒过你的耳朵，赛飞儿小姐。我只是隐隐感觉到你被思绪缠住了，不想贸然打扰。
Ahaha... I never thought I could slip past your sharp ears, Miss Cipher. I just didn't think it'd be right to interrupt when you're obviously lost in thoughts.
哈…小子，说话还是这么招人待见哪。你之前在大浴场的宣讲，还不赖。我承认，自己有那么一丢丢被触动到。
Hmph. Still as charming with your words as ever, boy. Your speech at the public baths wasn't half bad, I'll admit. It managed to touch my heart just a smidge.
多谢夸奖。直觉是样神奇的东西，当时我就隐约感觉到，你也在场。
Thank you. I had a feeling back then that you were in the audience. Intuition certainly is a thing of wonder.
…哦？那你怎么没当时就把我叫出来，居然还等到现在？
...Oh? And you didn't call me out on the spot? You waited all this time to tell me?
因为…我猜你也需要一段时间来整理好心情，悼念她的离开。
Well... I thought you'd need some time to yourself... after she passed away.
寒暄到此为止。说吧，你遇上什么麻烦了，需要我这个大前辈帮忙？
Enough small talk. Tell me, what kind of trouble did you run into that you need me, the super-old-timer, to step in?
你我一共就见过几次面，每次都是直奔主题…我欣赏你的直爽，「前辈」——那我就有话直说了。
We've only met a couple of times, but you've always gone straight to business. I respect that about you, "old-timer," so I'll cut to the chase.
如你所见，阿格莱雅为黄金裔挣得了全城公民的支持。人们一致认为是元老院中反对逐火的派别谋害了她，公民的激愤让藏在阴影中的险恶无处可躲。

You're probably aware that Aglaea has earned the support of the entire city for the Chrysos Heirs. Everyone believes that she died at the hands of Council members who are against the Flame-Chase, and the citizens' fury has been dragging these schemers out of the shadows one by one.
可即便如此，警报也没有彻底解除。「清洗者」的领袖，元老凯妮斯——我们至今没能找到她的下落。
But they didn't get everybody. To this day, we still haven't found Elder Caenis — the leader of the "Cleaners."
噢，我明白了。你怕她会狗急跳墙，对吧？
Ah. I see. You're afraid she'll do something wild now that she's pushed into a corner, aren't you?
是。刻法勒的火种一直被供奉在议会剧场的上空，我想它会是反对者们阻挠黄金裔的最后底牌。
Yes. I believe that Kephale's Coreflame, forever enshrined above the council theater, would be the opposition's final trump card against the Chrysos Heirs.
再过几日，我们就要启程征讨{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}了。黄金裔远离圣城的这段时间，是他们下手的最佳时机……
We're setting out to campaign against {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} in a few days. With the Chrysos Heirs gone, it'll be their best chance to strike...
你害怕那些落魄的野狗会趁你们离开的时候偷走火种——
You think those desperate dogs will try to snatch the Coreflame while you're gone —
——所以你想找我帮忙，在你缺席的时间里遛遛他们，对么？
— So you want me to give them a nice long walk while you're away, right?
每一点都被押中了，不愧是你。我清楚你的力量，赛飞儿小姐：神速、伪装、来去无形…还有那最让人捉摸不透的，「欺骗」的权柄。
You sure saw right through me, Miss Cipher. I know exactly what you can do. God-like speed, perfect disguises, untraceable movements... And that most enigmatic authority of "Trickery."
请尽管动用你的手段，哪怕要把我们也连带着一起蒙蔽。我只有一个请求：请保护好刻法勒的火种。
I have only one request. Please, use whatever tricks you need to protect Kephale's Coreflame, even if you have to deceive the rest of the Chrysos Heirs as well.
我说，救世小子，你是不是打心底觉得…我压根没有拒绝你的可能？
Hey, Deliverer. Do you honestly think that there's no way I'll turn you down?
要是我不打算管这摊子麻烦事，你还有什么后备计划？
Do you even have any Plan Bs if I decide to nope out on this?
身为「诡计」的半神，恐怕这世界上没有比你更具威力的底牌了——你认为呢，赛飞儿小姐？
As the demigod of Trickery, there are no other trump cards in the world that can out-rank you — I'm sure you know the answer to your own question, Miss Cipher.
一副掌控全局的自信啊…你算是学到了半点她的精髓。
What confidence. You talk as if you have everything in the palm of your hand... Hmph, so you did learn a thing or two from her. I'll give you that.
那就来说些你不知道的事吧。「盗火行者」——据我观察，那家伙可是对奥赫玛虎视眈眈哪。
Then let me tell you something you don't know. The Flame Reaver — they've been watching Okhema closely.
猜不到吧？我一直盯着那家伙的行踪呢。而我得出的结论……
Bet you didn't expect that, huh? I've been tracking them all this time, and this is my conclusion.
那家伙是像条疯狗一样丧失理智，但它绝对不是傻子。你猜它为什么一直没对奥赫玛出手？
That lunatic may have lost their mind, but they're no fool. Why do you think they haven't made a move on Okhema yet?
那刻夏老师分析过这事。当时的结论…大概是因为刻法勒的火种有元老院的秘法保护？
Professor Anaxa once analyzed this. He thought... It was probably because Kephale's Coreflame was protected by the Council of Elders' secret arts?
哈！什么糠包秘法，我动动手指就能破了它的机关。
Ha! Secret arts my foot. I could break those mechanisms with a flick of my finger.
告诉你吧，那家伙之所以没有贸然进攻奥赫玛——多半是因为裁缝女织成的防御网比你们想象中的还要坚固。
Allow me to let you in on the actual secret. They probably held off from attacking Okhema because the seamstress's defense network was way tougher than you thought.
如今她不在了，而你们又打算在城防漏洞百出时出征「晨昏之眼」…啧啧。
Now that she's gone... and you're heading out to battle the Eye of Twilight... with the city's defenses in shambles... tsk tsk tsk.
...What a dangerous situation we find ourselves in.
但既然你主动抛出了话头…我猜，你一定已经想到了应对之法？
But since you're the one who brought it up, I'm guessing that you already have a solution in mind.
你现在还真是冷静得不像样哪……
Just look how ridiculously calm you are right now...
但你没猜错——就把这当做买一赠一的特别服务吧。除了保护刻法勒的火种…我会再卖你们一个人情，顺带陪那条疯狗玩玩。
But you guessed it right. Consider this a two-for-one deal. I'll keep that lunatic entertained on top of protecting Kephale's Coreflame — You owe a big favor after this.
感激不尽。那盗火者实力莫测，请务必小心。
You have my deepest gratitude. That Flame Reaver's power is truly unfathomable. Please be careful.
记住咯，救世小子，这个世上有一条真理：「赛法利娅总会笑到最后」。没必要为一位半神操心，我会完成我该做的事，所以——
Don't forget, Deliverer. There's a fundamental truth in this world. "Cifera will always get the last laugh." No need to worry for a demigod. I'll do my job, so you —
在支付等价的报酬以前，你们可别先死了哪。
Need to make sure you don't die before you pay me.
丹恒，他先我们一步回来了。
Dan Heng came back before us.
听闻如此噩耗，也没有公民有心情入浴了。
No citizen feels like bathing after hearing such terrible news.
接下来…该去找缇宝老师了。
Next... we should visit Lady Tribbie.
Why's the market look so emptied out?
这种时候，哪还有心思开店啊。
As if anyone's keeping shop nowadays.
该不会是他们起了内讧…
Could it be that they're infighting...
Shouldn't the holy city be safe?
危险的不是黑潮，是人啊…
The black tide's not the threat... it's the people...
Heroes... our hearts bleed with yours.
凶手？除了元老院还能是谁？
The murderer? The Council of Elders, obviously.
太歹毒了，那帮权力的走狗…
风堇大人一直守在上面…
你真的…不用再吃药了吗？
So, you... really don't have to take the medicine anymore?
不必了，吾师。药物终究只能稳固我的血肉，但阻止不了灵魂的衰竭。
No need, teacher. Medicine can only steady my flesh, but it cannot stop the decay of my soul.
我已向这世界续借了太多时光——现在，大限到了。
I've already borrowed too much time from this world... And now, the time is up.
此刻…是我最好的离席时机。
Now... is the best time for my exit.
Please don't cry on my account, teacher...
我还有…最后一个任性的请求。可以听我诉说吗？
I have... a final selfish request. Can you lend me an ear?
你说吧…呜呜…*我们*一定会…帮你实现的。
Go ahead... *sob* We will... definitely fulfill it for you.
我希望自己的死亡平静而轻柔。我希望自己了无生机的死躯…不要曝光于众人的视线之下。
I wish for my death to be quiet and gentle. I hope that my lifeless body... will not be exposed to the eyes of the public.
吾师，我的一生中经历了太多的改变。但惟有对一件事的追求，我千年如一……
Teacher, I have faced too many changes in my lifetime. But in the pursuit of one thing alone, I have remained unchanged for a thousand years...
阿雅，你觉得小白他…准备好了吗？
Agy, do you think Snowy is... ready?
千年前，我接过墨涅塔火种的时候…你认为我那时准备好了吗，吾师？
A thousand years ago, when I took up the Coreflame of Mnestia... do you think I was ready then, teacher?
生在这个时代，我们不得不于骇浪中成长，而非做好一切准备后再启航。
Born into this era, we had no choice but to grow amidst the raging waves, not set sail after everything was prepared.
白厄，他会明白的。他会理解我留给他的职责…他已足够成熟，不会再被愤怒或仇恨蒙蔽双眼。
Phainon — he will understand. He will grasp the duty I've left to him... He is mature enough now, no longer blinded by anger or hatred.
Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...
自从树庭遭到黑潮破坏，我就一直想尽量远离这里，远离可能让人感伤的回忆。
I've been trying to stay away from here since the black tide destroyed the Grove... And through that, stay away from the memories that might make me sad.
可风儿却接连把我吹了回来…大概这就是昏光庭院的使命吧？
But the wind keeps pulling me back... Maybe that's the Twilight Courtyard's duty, after all.
我明白，小伊卡——我也很怀念以前和大家一起上课的日子。
I know, Little Ica. I know... I too miss the days when we all studied together.
不过我们这次前来，可是还有更重要的任务哦。白厄阁下已经选定了征伐{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的时日，我作为天空一族的后人……
But we have an even more important mission this time round. Lord Phainon has already set the date to campaign against {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Being a descendant of the Sky people, I...
你说得对，稍微走一会儿神的时间总还是有的。
You're right. At least I can still afford to get lost in thought once in a while.
<color=#dbc291ff>先祖们，请稍等我片刻吧</color>。我在树庭留下的回忆…值得花上一些时间来缅怀。
<color=#dbc291ff>O ancestors, please wait for just a bit longer</color>. The time I spent in the Grove... deserves some reminiscence.
啊，我知道啦。聚焦眼下，不乱跑。
Oh. Got it. Yes, I'll focus and not run off.
我还记得，就是在这里，那刻夏老师给我们上了「那一课」。
This was where Professor Anaxa gave us "the lesson."
当时的情境…还历历在目呢。
I can still see that day in my mind...
…以上，就是你们在树庭的最后一堂课了。
...And that was your last lesson in the Grove.
从今往后，你们都有各自的路要走。从这里学去的知识能帮上多少忙，全看几位参悟的本领。
Now, each of you will head off on your own path. How much the Grove's teachings can help you in the real world depends on how well you can put knowledge into practice.
不过，我告诫你们——假如未来你们做出了什么失格之举，千万别对外宣扬你们是七贤人之一，阿那克萨戈拉斯的学生……
However, heed this warning — If you ever do anything disgraceful out there, don't ever claim you were the student of Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages-
…那刻夏老师，我看日程表上明明还有其它课啊？你是不是搞错了什……
...Professor Anaxa, there are still other classes scheduled on the calendar! Are you sure you didn't —
——首先，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯教授。
其次，更正一下：最后一课代表的是「由我执教的最后一堂课」。从今天起，我要开始闭关研习古代炼金术，一切教学活动都要为之让路。

Secondly, to clarify — The "last lesson" means "the last lesson I will teach you." I will be entering seclusion from today onwards to research ancient alchemy, and all my teaching activities will be put on hold.
啊，我懂了。教授的言下之意，是在暗讽其他老师的课程都够不上格吧？
Ah, I see. So you're saying the lessons taught by all the other teachers aren't good enough to be considered lessons?
尽喜欢耍小聪明和嘴皮功夫——哀丽秘榭的白厄，扣一个学分！
All you do every day is wag that sharp tongue of yours — That's a credit deduction, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae!
I have nothing left to say. Next-
根据树庭的讲义规范，授课教师在最后一个课时的结尾，应当「与学生畅谈卒业后之理想，引导学生走上妥实之道路。」

According to the Grove's protocols for a cohort's final class, the lecturer should take some time in that lesson to "discuss the students' post-graduation aspirations with them and guide them toward a solid path."
这么重要的环节可不能漏了呀，教授？
Surely you can't skip such a crucial step, Professor?
作为助讲的风堇小姐…真是那刻夏老师的克星呀。
The teaching assistant Miss Hyacine is truly Professor Anaxa's nemesis.
…咳，好吧。既然雅辛忒丝如此要求…那就来走一遍流程吧。
...Ahem, fine. Since Hyacinthia insists on this... Let's go through the process.
我看某些人的表达欲如此旺盛…不妨由你先来，哀丽秘榭的白厄——提问：你的理想是什么？
Since some of you are so eager to speak, why don't we start with you, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae? What is your post-graduation aspiration?
嗯…理想倒算不上。我唯一想做的，就是保护好身边所有关心的……
Well... it's not exactly an aspiration, but the only thing I want to do is to protect the people I care about...
…明白了，你想当「英雄」。无聊至极的答案，下一个！
...I see. So you want to be a "hero." How boring. Next!
遐蝶！你从刚才起就一直在偷笑，不如接下来就由你来分享吧？
Castorice! You've been giggling for quite some time. How about you go next?
也许我的回答有些空泛，没有意义，阿那克萨戈拉斯教授……
Perhaps my answer is a bit vague and meaningless, Professor Anaxagoras, but...
我希望这世界能摆脱「死亡」的痛苦，每一位生者都能拥抱甜美的宁静……
I hope the world can be freed from the agony of "death," so that every living being may find calming peace...
天真…天真到让人想为你的童话故事掉泪。
How naive. So naive that it makes me want to weep for your fairy tale.
看吧！这就是我不想参考那册陈腐讲义的原因，因为我得到的尽是些无趣的答案。
See? This is why I don't want to follow those outdated protocols. All I get are boring answers.
雅辛忒丝——既然建议由你提出，那不妨也以你作收尾——将你的「理想」与在座诸位分享吧，让我们看看你的答案有没有过人之处。
Since you suggested this whole process, why don't you wrap this up, Hyacinthia? Share your "aspiration" with everyone, and let's see if yours stands out.
呵呵，幸好我早有准备，可不会被难倒——我的理想，是补全英雄史诗最后的「空白页」。
Good thing I came prepared, hehe! My aspiration is nothing less than completing the final "blank page" at the end of the heroes' epic.
这说法倒是有趣。不妨再多解释一下吧，助讲。
An interesting description. Do explain, assistant.
在树庭求学的这段时间里，我读遍翁法罗斯的英雄史诗，也发现了它们的千篇一律之处——
I've read all of Amphoreus' heroic epics while studying at the Grove, and a common thread came to my attention.
几乎每段史诗的结尾都以英雄的功业作结，却极少有人提到，在他们开创的时代里，芸芸众生如何度日，那些平凡的人们又走过了怎样的艰辛或苦难。
Almost every epic ends with a description of the hero's achievements, but few mention how the everyday people of that time lived. No one recorded the struggles and suffering the commoners endured.
你是想说，比起名垂青史的英雄，你更关注历史边角的普通人？
So you're saying that, instead of legendary heroes, you're more focused on commoners living on the peripheries of historical records?
或许是因为出身吧。我的祖先，<color=#dbc291ff>「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，她高举长枪挑战天空，开创了延续至今的逐火时代</color>。

Perhaps I'm influenced by my background. My ancestor, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose the Daythunder Knight, raised her spear against the Sky and ushered in the Flame-Chasing era that continues to this day.</color>
每一位天空后裔都听着她的故事长大。对于我们，塞涅俄丝的伟大毋庸质疑，但也因此…她伟岸的身影吞没了那个年代。
Her story is told to every child descended from the Skyfolk. We have no doubts about Seliose's greatness, yet... her towering figure overshadowed every record from that entire era.
阳雷骑士的亲人、盟友、伙伴，大战的幸存者、牺牲者…每当我在篝火边思念他们的故事，却总是发现传说的细节早已遗失，只留下塞涅俄丝的名字。

What about the Daythunder Knight's family, allies, and friends? What about the survivors and those who died in the great battles? Whenever I think about their stories by the campfire, I realize the details of those legends have been long lost... and only Seliose's name remains.
不知不觉中，她的光芒变得和艾格勒一样耀眼，盖过了地上万物……
Her brilliance had become as blinding as Aquila's, lording over everything on the ground.
所以，我很庆幸自己活在一个不缺少英雄的年代。
That's why... I'm glad that my era does not lack heroes.
先祖们只有悲伤的过去，但我有需要呵护的未来。我想做的，就是站在英雄们身后，在金色的浪潮将世界推向新生时，尽己所能疗愈每一个可能会溺亡的普通人。

All my ancestors had was a sad past, but I have a future I want to protect. Instead of becoming a hero and ushering in a golden deluge to baptize the world anew, I want to stay in the back line and save all the ordinary humans from drowning in the rising waves.
不必重回天空，而是在大地上和人们一同行走。这是我的愿望，我也相信只有这样，在创世的诗篇被写下的同时……
I wish not to return to the sky, but to walk among the masses on earth. I believe it's the only way for the saga of creation...
我才能为那空白的一页，添上凡人的注脚。
...to include a footnote for the everyday people in its blank page.
回想起自己一字一板的模样…还真让人难为情呀。
Ah... I'm getting embarrassed from remembering how I said all that.
不过，我的想法一直都没变哦。现在，我真的有机会站在英雄们身后，实现自己的理想了呀。
But my beliefs have never changed. Now I really have a chance to stay behind the heroes' frontline and realize my dream.
Dannie! What are you doing here?
没想到又在树庭见面了。白厄说你在为征伐艾格勒作准备，莫非……
I didn't expect to see you again in the Grove. Phainon mentioned you were gearing up for the campaign against Aquila. Are you here to...
猜对啦。要去往艾格勒的天上国度，需要天空一族的后人通过血脉仪式，召唤出先祖之灵，从他们那里获得祝福。
You guessed it. To reach Aquila's realm in the sky, descendants of the Sky people must perform a bloodline ceremony, summon the spirits of our ancestors, and get their blessings.
<color=#dbc291ff>只有这样，地上的生灵才能创造出通往天空的彩虹桥。</color>而我要寻访的第一位先祖，他的灵魂就驻留在树庭。
<color=#dbc291ff>That's the only way for creatures on earth to forge the rainbow bridge to the sky</color>, and the soul of the first ancestor I want to see is here in the Grove.
为了取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种，建立彩虹桥是必需的。如此重要的仪式，你只身行动未免太过冒险。
The rainbow bridge is essential to retrieve the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, but undertaking such a vital ceremony alone is far too risky.
放心吧，有小伊卡跟在我身边——它会保护好我的，对吧？
Don't worry. I have Little Ica with me. You'll protect me, won't you?
乖~说起来，丹宝又在这里找什么呢？
Good Ica~ Well, what brings you here, Dannie?
我在尽己所能把和泰坦有关的神话和相关研究都记录下来。回到星穹列车以后，关于翁法罗斯的一切都会成为智库里的珍贵条目。
I'm collecting as many myths and research about the Titans as I can. Everything about Amphoreus is a valuable addition to our data bank when I get back to the Astral Express.
啊…对哦。如果一切顺利的话，这一役之后，丹宝和灰宝就能回家了吧？
Ah... right. If all goes as planned, you and Grayie will be able to go home after this mission, won't you?
嗯，前提是我们真的能破除「天外之界」的诅咒…尽管我有种预感，此事不会那么一帆风顺。
Yes, assuming we can actually break the curse about 'worlds beyond the sky'... I have a feeling it's not going to be smooth sailing.
嘿，难道丹宝现在也拥有了某种隐藏的预言之力？
Oh? Could it be that you, too, have some kind of hidden powers to make prophecies now?
那倒不是。只是之前和一位元老院议员的交流，让我有些怀疑这一切的真实性。
That's not it, but... I'm starting to question how real everything is after a conversation with a member of the Council of Elders.
我也和你一样没听懂呢，小伊卡。
Nope. I didn't understand that either, Little Ica.
…别在意，有太多事我现在也无法理解。
...Don't worry about it. There's a lot that I still don't understand.
既然已经碰巧见面了，丹宝要不要跟我一起来？
Since we've already met up, why don't you come with me, Dannie?
我也有此意。树庭现在危机四伏，多一个人就多了一层保障。
I was thinking the same thing. The Grove is fraught with danger right now, and an extra pair of hands translates to extra security.
不愧是「列车护卫」，真可靠呀。那，我们走吧？
That's the dependable "Express Guard" for you. So, shall we get going?
对，这就是天空一族的圣物，「彩虹匣」。
This is the divine object of the Sky people, the Chroma Coffer.
根据祖训，当天空之子的后裔准备好再次挑战{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}时…她必须先以彩虹匣苏醒先祖的英魂，并获得他们的赐福。

Our ancestors dictated that when a descendant of the Skyfolk is ready to challenge {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} again... they must first awaken the spirits of their ancestors with the Chroma Coffer and receive their benediction.
只有在完成这一步以后，被选中的天空之子才能重登天空。
Only after this can the chosen Skyfolk re-ascend to the heavens.
是为了防止不够资格的人白白丢了性命吗？
Is it to prevent those who are not qualified from pointlessly losing their lives?
很聪明谨慎的做法，对吧？
这里沉睡着一位先祖的灵魂…现在，我要唤醒他了。
The soul of an ancestor slumbers here... Now, I will awaken them.
我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，继承逐火使命的天空后裔。
I am Hyacinthia from the Twilight Courtyard, a descendant of the Sky who has inherited the duty of Flame-Chase.
兑现我族命运的时间已到，我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
The time has come to fulfill our clan's destiny. I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.
先祖啊，请您给予慷慨的赐福吧……
Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...
仔细聆听风堇与先祖的交谈。
Listen carefully to Hyacine talk with the ancestor.
从远处见证风堇收集赐福。
Witness Hyacine collect blessings from afar.
风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...
一番交谈过后，她从裁判官克里斯普斯处获得了第一道天空赐福。
After a discussion, she obtained the first sky blessing from Magistrate Crispus.
下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?
还记得么？一段时间以前，你推荐我学习法吉娜祭司们的「灵水秘术」……
Remember how you suggested I learn the "secret arts of water" from Phagousa's priests?
我用闲暇时间研习，取得了一些阶段性的成果。<color=#dbc291ff>现在，只要随身携带「灵水」，我就能用秘术开拓出通向创世涡心的通路</color>。

I've been practicing that in my spare time and made some progress. <color=#dbc291ff>Now, as long as I have spirit water with me, I can use those techniques to carve a path directly to the Vortex of Genesis</color>.
啊，我还记得！没想到你会一直坚持到现在，真不愧是丹宝。
Ah, I remember! I didn't expect you to keep at it this long — that's so like you, Dannie.
和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.
毕竟在神话里，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}本就是一位阴晴不定的泰坦嘛。
That makes sense. {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} was always described as a fickle Titan in the myths.
既然丹宝都这么建议了…那我就来验收下你的学习成果吧？
Since you're offering... then let me put your skills to the test, Dannie.
用秘术临时创造的灵水之门远不如祭仪水盆那般稳定，<color=#dbc291ff>恐怕只能允许一人通过。</color>
The spirit water gate formed with this technique isn't as stable as a ritual basin. It'll <color=#dbc291ff>likely only let one person through.</color>
以及，根据法吉娜祭司们的设计——「入口亦为出口」。待你见完先祖的灵魂，就通过涡心回到这里吧——我和小伊卡会在原地等你。
And as Phagousa's priests designed it — "the entrance serves as the exit." You'll need to come back through the vortex once you've met your ancestor's spirit. Little Ica and I will be here waiting.
我明白啦。那就拜托你了，丹宝！
Got it. I'm counting on you, Dannie!
「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
"...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."
是我，雅辛忒丝，天空一族的后裔。很抱歉打断了您的酣眠。
It's I, Hyacinthia, a descendant of the Sky people. I apologize for interrupting your slumber.
您是克里斯普斯阁下，对吗？我在族谱上读到过您的故事。听说您曾是一位正直的裁判官，为许多遭受诬告的公民洗刷了冤屈。
You are Lord Crispus, aren't you? I've read your story in our family tree. You were a righteous judge who vindicated many who were wrongfully accused.
啊…没想到在这个陌生的时代，还能有人记得我的名字。
Ah... I never imagined someone in this era would still remember my name.
我们的血脉和使命…一直延续到了这遥远的年代啊。
So, our bloodline and duty have continued to this distant age...
没错。我之所以会叫醒您，就是希望能够取得您的祝福。
Indeed it has. I have awakened you in the hope of receiving your blessing.
因为逐火之旅将在我的眼前走向完满的结局，而取得{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种则是英雄们将要面临的最后一重挑战。
For the Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its perfect conclusion, and retrieving the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the final challenge the heroes will face.
雅辛忒丝，你很年轻…而且，你的模样也不像是能与泰坦抗衡的斗士。
