Hyacinthia, you look very young... and you do not have the bearings of a warrior who can contend with a Titan.
你要如何令我确信，这祝福不会变成诅咒，反而铺就一位年轻后嗣的绝路？
How can you convince me that this blessing will not turn into a curse, leading a child like you to your demise?
千年以前，<color=#dbc291ff>征服天空的塞涅俄丝留下了传说和遗志，把归还天空泰坦火种的使命交给了自己的后人——您和我。</color>

A thousand years ago, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose who conquered the skies left behind legends and a will, entrusting the mission to return the Sky Titan's Coreflame to her descendants — to people like you and me.</color>
我虽然不是一名战士，但也绝对不会逃避在血脉中流淌了千年的使命。
Though I'm not a warrior, I will not turn away from the mission that has flowed through our blood for a thousand years.
何况我并非孤军奋战…在我身边，聚集了这世上最强大，最坚韧的伙伴们。
And I am not fighting alone... I have the strongest and most tenacious companions in the world.
翁法罗斯已经迎来了一个英雄辈出的时代！取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}火种的重担，已经不需要由被选中的天空之子独自承担了。
Amphoreus is in an era brimming with heroes! The burden of retrieving {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame no longer rests solely on the shoulders of the chosen Skyfolk.
我现在掌握了治愈的力量。我想要缝合天空的裂隙，疗愈人们的伤痛。
I now wield the power of healing. I aim to mend the fissures in the sky and heal the wounds of the people.
我想以自己的意志去诠释天空后裔的使命…以我的方式，为跨越千年的守望画上句号。
I desire to define the mission of the Skyfolk in my own terms... to conclude the vigil that has spanned millennia.
从你的话语里，我感受到了坚韧…并非流于外表，而是包蕴于心。
I sense resilience in your words... not an outward resilience, but something deeper within.
接下我的赐福吧，年轻的雅辛忒丝。愿你能获得羽翼，搭乘彩虹之桥重返天空。
Receive my blessings, young Hyacinthia. May you gain wings to return to the sky via the bridge of rainbows.
感谢您的信任，克里斯普斯阁下。我们一定不会辜负期望……
Thank you for your trust, Lord Crispus. We won't let you down...
我的先祖们都是些强直的人物，想要说服他们并不容易。同他们见面的一幕幕，我已经在心中演练过无数次啦。
My ancestors were all pretty strong-willed people. It won't be easy convincing them. I've run through these upcoming conversations in my head more times than I can count.
看来你的努力没有白费。
Looks like your efforts paid off.
下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?
还记得么？一段时间以前，你推荐我学习法吉娜祭司们的「灵水秘术」……
Remember how you suggested I learn the "secret arts of water" from Phagousa's priests?
我用闲暇时间研习，取得了一些阶段性的成果。<color=#dbc291ff>现在，只要随身携带「灵水」，我就能用秘术开拓出通向创世涡心的通路</color>。

I've been practicing that in my spare time and made some progress. <color=#dbc291ff>Now, as long as I have spirit water with me, I can use those techniques to carve a path directly to the Vortex of Genesis</color>.
啊，我还记得！没想到你会一直坚持到现在，真不愧是丹宝。
Ah, I remember! I didn't expect you to keep at it this long — that's so like you, Dannie.
和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.
毕竟在神话里，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}本就是一位阴晴不定的泰坦嘛。
That makes sense. {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} was always described as a fickle Titan in the myths.
既然丹宝都这么建议了…那我就来验收下你的学习成果吧？
Since you're offering... then let me put your skills to the test, Dannie.
用秘术临时创造的灵水之门远不如祭仪水盆那般稳定，<color=#dbc291ff>恐怕只能允许一人通过。</color>
The spirit water gate formed with this technique isn't as stable as a ritual basin. It'll <color=#dbc291ff>likely only let one person through.</color>
以及，根据法吉娜祭司们的设计——「入口亦为出口」。待你见完先祖的灵魂，就通过涡心回到这里吧——我和小伊卡会在原地等你。
And as Phagousa's priests designed it — "the entrance serves as the exit." You'll need to come back through the vortex once you've met your ancestor's spirit. Little Ica and I will be here waiting.
我明白啦。那就拜托你了，丹宝！
Got it. I'm counting on you, Dannie!
「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
"...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."
创世涡心…真是不可思议，丹宝果真深藏不露呢。
The Vortex of Genesis... unbelievable. Dannie is full of surprises.
就是…和祭仪水盆相比…眩晕感确实有些强烈。
But... This does feel way more disorienting than the ritual basin...
缇宝老师也在？在她身边那位……
Wait, is Lady Tribbie here too? And who is that next to her...?
啊——我大概能猜到那是谁啦。
Ah. I think I know who that is.
…飞儿，你这就要急着赶路了吗？
...Do you have to go already, Ciphy?
好不容易回来奥赫玛一趟，你本可以好好休息一阵的，我们一起叙叙旧……
It's been ages since you were last in Okhema. You could've taken some time to rest, and we could've caught up...
不用了，缇宝阿姐！我早就过惯了四处漂泊的日子，让我在这熙熙攘攘的大城市留守反倒有些不自在。
That's alright, big sister Tribbie! I've gotten used to life on the road. Staying in this bustling city actually feels off.
何况，你那位有出息的学生…可是给我派了个超级艰难的任务哪。
Besides, your prized student... gave me an incredibly tough mission to handle.
你要体谅一下小白呀，飞儿。他还这么年轻，就已经把阿雅留下来的职责全都扛在了肩上……
Cut Snowy some slack, Ciphy. He's still so young, yet he's shouldering all the responsibilities Agy left behind...
而且，小白可不是那种喜欢随便使唤别人的孩子。他会找到你，就说明这件事没有更合适的人选啦。
Besides, Snowy's not the kind to ask for help lightly. Since he came to you, it means you're the best person for the job.
你还真是宠溺他啊，缇宝阿姐。唉，可惜我已经过了那个处处需要被护短的年纪咯……
You really spoil him, big sis Tribbie. Guess I'm past the age for someone to look after me...
…开个玩笑哈，我懂你的意思。那救世小子身上的确有种让人信服的气质，不输当年的阿格莱雅。
...Just kidding, I get it. That Deliverer boy does have a certain charisma about him. It reminds me of Aglaea in her prime.
我这就准备出发了。啊，缇宝阿姐，临走前，我还有个礼物要送给你——
Anyway, I'm about to head out. Oh, big sis Tribbie, before I go — Got a little gift for you.
哇，没想到你还这么有心…这里面装着什么呀？
Wow, didn't expect you to be so thoughtful... What's in it?
嘿嘿…这也是游戏的一环哪。想看到这件礼物的完整面貌，<color=#dbc291ff>就等到天黑以后再打开它吧。</color>
Heh... That's a part of the game too. If you want to see the full picture of what's inside, <color=#dbc291ff>you'll have to wait until nightfall.</color>
送人礼物怎么还带猜谜呀，真是的……
A gift with a mysterious twist? Seriously?
缇宝老师，还有…这位身形轻盈的女士，一定就是赛飞儿小姐吧？
Lady Tribbie, and... this graceful lady must be Miss Cipher.
我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，大家叫我风堇——很高兴认识您！
I'm Hyacinthia from the Twilight Courtyard. Everyone calls me Hyacine — pleased to meet you!
Tsk, bright and cheery as a lamp...
…咳，你好，粉彤彤的后辈。我是赛法利娅，来自早就陨落的城邦多洛斯。其它的…史书传记里都写了，也用不着我再介绍了吧？
...Ahem. Well, hello there, pink child. I'm Cifera from the long-fallen city-state of Dolos. As for the rest... it's all in the history books, so I don't need to repeat it here.
你说自己来自昏光庭院？也就是说……
So you're from the Twilight Courtyard? Does that mean...
您没想错。我是天空一族的后嗣，将要接过「天空」权柄的黄金裔。
Yes, I'm a descendant of the Sky people, the Chrysos Heir about to take over the authority of Sky.
那还真是…人不可貌相。我还以为塞涅俄丝的后裔会更…呃…高大威猛一点儿。
Well, that's... unexpected. I figured Seliose's descendant would be... I don't know. Taller? Stronger?
不能以貌取人呀，飞儿。小风堇在她的领域可是很厉害的专家哦，整个翁法罗斯都没有比她更靠谱的医师啦。
Don't judge a book by its cover, Ciphy. Cinny is a master of her craft. She's the most skilled and dependable physician in all of Amphoreus.
请放心吧，赛飞儿女士。虽然我不像千年前的塞涅俄丝大人那样骁勇善战，但我有信心能完成天空后裔的使命。
Don't worry, Lady Cipher. I may not be as strong and warlike as Lady Seliose from a thousand years ago, but I'm confident I can carry out the mission of the Skyfolk.
哎呀哈，什么使命不使命的，说得那么严肃……
Ahaha, all this talk about missions... you're making it sound way too serious.
小姑娘，要学会优先保护好自己，别什么事都太拼命哈。瞧这张脸蛋，还挺可爱的，别叫艾格勒的爪子挠花了……
You've gotta look out for yourself, girl! Don't push yourself too hard. I'd hate to see that cute face all scratched up by Aquila's claws...
飞儿现在也会这样逗人啦？看来你还惦念着阿雅很久以前的话呢。
Ciphy, cracking jokes? Looks like you haven't forgotten what Agy said all those years ago.
…唔，我还有任务在身，先走一步了。
...Anyway, I've got a mission to handle, so I'll get going.
祝你成功，风堇姑娘——遇到什么难事，让那个救世小子顶在前面就行！
Good luck, Miss Hyacine. And if things get tough, just let that Deliverer take the lead!
赛飞儿发动翻飞之币的能力，瞬移离开了涡心……
Cipher uses the Coin of Whimsy's ability and teleports away from the Vortex...
赛飞儿小姐，真是个急性子呀。
Miss Cipher is in such a hurry.
她一直都是那样啦，别在意。不管怎样，飞儿她愿意回来奥赫玛帮忙…实在是太好了。
Don't worry. She's always been like that... It's good to have her back in Okhema lending a hand.
先不说她的事啦。小风堇会来到这里，是因为你身负的使命吧？
Well, enough about her for now. You're here because of your mission, aren't you, Cinny?
正好，我要去把飞儿送的礼物好好收起来——创世涡心就先让给你啦。
It's the perfect opportunity for me to go and tuck Ciphy's gift away somewhere safe. The Vortex of Genesis is all yours.
…我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
...I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.
先祖啊，请给予您慷慨的赐福吧……
Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...
风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...
一番交谈过后，她从特克菈将军处获得了第二道天空赐福。
After a discussion, she obtained the second sky blessing from General Ektra.
特克菈将军揭示了缇里西庇俄斯曾经留下的预言：<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
General Ektra revealed the prophecy once-foretold by Tribios: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>
特克菈将军…和史料中记载的形象反差很大，是一位相当温柔的人呢。
General Ektra is... so different from how the records described her. She's quite a gentle person.
走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.
…孩子，为何你会出现在我面前？莫非…你是天空一族的后裔？
...Child, what brings you before me? Could it be... you're a descendant of the Sky people?
您没猜错，我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，天空一族逐火使命的继承者。
Yes. I am Hyacinthia of the Twilight Courtyard, the successor of the Sky people's Flame-Chase duty.
您应该是特克菈将军吧？传说在黄金战争中，您曾率领族人与奥赫玛结盟，抵御悬锋军队的进攻——您的战果为天空一族在圣城赢得了一席之地。

You must be General Ektra. Legend has it that during the Chrysos War, you led our people to ally with Okhema and held back the Kremnoan forces. It was your victory that earned the Sky people a place in the holy city.
雅辛忒丝么…看来你对我族的族谱十分熟悉啊，孩子。
Hyacinthia... You seem well-versed in our clan's history.
And this is... the Vortex of Genesis?
对。您看——有十颗星辰已经被点亮，黄金裔的逐火之旅已经临近完成。
It is. Look — ten stars have already been lit. The Chrysos Heirs' Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its end.
那是…{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的火种？
Are those... the Coreflames of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}?
那就是说，<color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音和那位山之民…</color>他们成功履行了自己的使命么？
Does that mean <color=#dbc291ff>Hysilens and the Mountain Dweller</color> successfully carried out their duty?
呵…同为翁法罗斯的支柱，没想到「天空」的宿命要等到千年之后才能完满啊。
Heh... Who would've thought, as a fellow pillar of Amphoreus, the Sky's duty could only be fulfilled after a thousand years?
因为「天空」笼庇万物，它若分崩离析，世界也将被碾碎。所以，阿格莱雅大人才会将{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种作为征途的收尾。

It's because Sky shelters all beneath it. If it were to shatter, the world would fall apart with it. That's why Lady Aglaea made the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} the final step in our campaign.
阿格莱雅…？千年以后？她竟还走在逐火的道路上么……
Aglaea...? Is she still on the Flame-Chase Journey after a thousand years?
…很遗憾，她最近才离开了我们。但您说对了一部分…她的确仍在指引着黄金裔们前行。
...Unfortunately, she has recently left us. But you're right — she was indeed still guiding the Chrysos Heirs forward.
不可思议。那姑娘竟能耐受住时光无情的磨蚀…一直坚持到这个年代。
Incredible. That girl actually managed to endure the merciless erosion of time... and lasted for so long.
我问你，雅辛忒丝——既然你能认出我的身份，那你应当也读过我的亲笔？
Answer me, Hyacinthia. Since you recognize me, you must have also read my writings, no?
和我族相关的史料，我全都熟记在心——当然也包括您留下的亲笔。
Every record regarding my lineage is etched in my memory, including your words.
那么，你应该知道，我曾从某位缇里西庇俄丝那里求得过一则预言。
In that case, you're probably aware of the prophecy I sought from a certain Tribios.
当然——<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
Yes. <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>
不过…很遗憾，至今还没有哪位先祖能解读出这道预言的涵义。
But unfortunately, no ancestor has ever been able to truly decipher its meaning.
原来如此。但缇里西庇俄丝的预言从未落空……
I see. Yet Tribios' prophecies never fail...
或许你会见证它应验，孩子。希望预言能为你带去温柔的命运。
Perhaps you'll be the one to witness its fulfillment, child. May the prophecy lead you to a gentle fate.
谢谢您，特克菈大人。无论预言指向了何种结局，我都会迎头赶上——因为只有尽到了最大的努力，我们才能微笑着面对任何结果…您说对吗？
Thank you, Lady Ektra. Whatever fate the prophecy holds, I'll face it head-on. It's only by giving everything we have that we can truly accept any outcome with a smile... won't you agree?
哈…我喜欢你，孩子。我多希望这场对话能再多延续一阵。
Hah... I like you, child. I wish this conversation could go on a little longer.
收下我的祝福吧，雅辛忒丝。初见你时，我心中确有担忧……
Take my blessing, Hyacinthia. When I first saw you, I indeed had my doubts...
…但你的信念打动了我。如果天空的神性注定要被取代…我希望它能接过你的乐观和温柔。
But your resolve has touched me. If Sky's divinity is fated to pass on... I hope it incorporates your optimism and kindness.
您的认可是无价之宝，将军。请安歇吧…我一定会将您的馈赠物尽其用。
Your blessing is a treasure beyond measure, General. Rest well... I'll make sure your gift is put to its best use.
特克菈将军…和史料中记载的形象反差很大，是一位相当温柔的人呢。
General Ektra is... so different from how the records described her. She's quite a gentle person.
走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.
你回来了。这趟还顺利吗？
You're back. How did it go?
嗯，非常顺利。你的灵水术帮了大忙啦，丹宝。
It went great. Your spirit water art was a huge help, Dannie.
那位先祖的英魂和你说了什么，介意和我说说吗？
Do you mind sharing what your ancestor's spirit said to you?
风堇向丹恒复述了她和特克菈将军的对话……
Hyacine recounts her conversation with General Ektra to Dan Heng...
没什么，听上去一切都很顺利。只是…我有些在意你提到的那则预言。
Nothing. It sounds like everything went smoothly. It's just... I'm a bit concerned about the prophecy you mentioned.
<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>
不知怎么，我好像能从这简短字句中体会到些微的…悲伤。
I can somehow sense a hint of... sadness in those brief words.
是因为丹宝的性格很容易伤春悲秋吧？缇宁大人每天都要解读许多预言，这也只是其中普普通通的一条而已，不必太在意啦。
You've always been a bit of a sensitive soul, haven't you, Dannie? Lady Trinnon deciphers countless prophecies every day, and this one's just another among many. Don't worry too much about it.
走吧，丹宝，别愁眉苦脸的啦。求告先祖最后的一站，我们可是要出个远门咯。
Come on, Dannie. Don't look so gloomy. We're gonna have to take a long trip for the final visit to the ancestors.
最后一站的目的地，是万敌阁下的故乡——悬锋城。
Our final stop is Lord Mydei's home — Castrum Kremnos.
万敌阁下在这里孤身对抗黑潮，日复一日…我有些担心他的状态。
Lord Mydei has been fighting the black tide here alone day after day... I'm worried about him.
他此前还以惊雷捎来消息，要我们提防盗火行者的行动。
He sent a message earlier, carried by thunder, warning us to watch out for the Flame Reaver's actions.
那就说明，他还没有被黑潮的疯狂吞没。
That means he hasn't been consumed by the black tide's madness yet.
我们来到这里是为了完成重要的使命…最好不要介入他的战场。你说呢，丹宝？
We're here to complete an important mission... We shouldn't interfere with his battlefield. Don't you agree, Dannie?
那边——在那里沉睡的英魂，是我的祖母。
There — that sleeping spirit... is my grandmother.
对。我的祖母雅辛缇娅是一位斗士，她也曾替昏光庭院参加过悬锋祭典。
Yes. My grandmother Jacyntha was a warrior. She represented the Twilight Courtyard in the Kremnos Festival.
她一路过关斩将走到了悬锋祭典的最后，只差一步就能为天空之子赢得和平誓约。但…她最终还是败于当时的督战勇士之手。

She fought her way through every challenge and reached the final stage of the Kremnos Festival. She was just one step away from securing a peace treaty for the Skyfolk, but... was ultimately defeated by the champion warrior of that time.
我对祭典上的厮杀细节并没有什么考究， 只在书卷上读到「那是一场光荣的决斗」。
I've never looked too deeply into the details of such ritualistic violence. The scrolls simply described it as "a glorious duel."
但光荣的决斗背后…是悲壮的落幕。祭典结束不久，祖母的伤情恶化，最终逝于异乡…这座算碑就是悬锋人应她的遗愿留下的最后纪念。

But behind the glorious duel... was a tragic end. Not long after the festival, my grandmother's injuries worsened, and she passed away far from home. This Prophecy Tablet was left here by the Kremnoans to honor her final wish.
而祖母的去世，也使得战争阴影下本就摇摇欲坠的昏光庭院最终解体。
Her death marked the final collapse of the Twilight Courtyard, already fragile under the shadow of war.
那位和她展开死斗的悬锋勇士……
And the Kremnoan warrior she fought against...
但你还是救下了他的性命，尽管他夺走了你的至亲。
Yet you still saved his life, even though he took your family.
看到身负重伤的他倒在地上，血流不止…我很难用语言表达那时的复杂心绪。
Seeing him lying there, gravely wounded, bleeding out... I can't put what I felt at that moment into words.
但当我听说，克拉特鲁斯阁下是为了保护缇安老师才挨下了沉痛的一击，我内心的杂念便消散了。
But when I heard Lord Krateros took that fatal blow to protect Lady Trianne... All those tangled feelings faded away.
用白厄阁下的话说，他一定是成为了「更好的人」。
To quote Lord Phainon, Krateros must have done that "to become a better man."
只有足够强大的心灵才能学会宽恕。你并不逊于你的先祖们，风堇。
It takes true courage to forgive. You're every bit as strong as your ancestors, Hyacine.
嘿…你越来越会聊天啦，丹宝。
Heh... You're getting better at this, Dannie.
当她发现唤醒自己的竟是她曾宠爱的孙女…不知道祖母会作何反应呢？
I wonder what she'd think... When the one awaking her turns out to be her beloved granddaughter.
…我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
...I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.
先祖啊，请给予您慷慨的赐福吧……
Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...
仔细聆听风堇与祖母的交谈。
Listen carefully to Hyacine talk with her grandmother.
从远处见证风堇收集赐福。
Witness Hyacine collect blessings from afar.
风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...
一番交谈过后，风堇从祖母雅辛缇娅处获得了第三道天空赐福。
After a discussion, Hyacine obtained the third sky blessing from her grandmother, Jacyntha.
临别之际，祖母最后一次为风堇讲述了那段关于天空的英雄——「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝的传说……
At the moment of parting, Grandmother told Hyacine one last time the legend of the hero of the sky — Seliose the Daythunder Knight...
Is this... the world of the living?
祖母——是我，您的雅辛忒丝。
雅辛忒丝，我的小蜂鸟！为何是你…将我唤醒的怎会是你？！
Hyacinthia, my little hummingbird! Why... how... Why is it you who awakened me???
我从未想过这种情景…我本以为这一天来临时，我会为所有先祖感到释然。但现在……
I have never imagined this... I thought I would feel happy for all my ancestors when this day came, but now...
现在，我甚至无法尽享这与你重逢的喜悦！
I can't even experience the joy of seeing you again!
您还记得…在我刚满八周岁时，您和父亲带我参加人生中第一次天空祭礼时的情境吗？
Do you remember that... you and Father took me to my very first Sky Rite when I was eight?
那时，您让我从四件配饰中选择一件：代表尊贵的烈阳头环，代表力量的雷雨手镯，象征着智慧的冰雪戒指，还有喻义友善的微光吊坠……

Back then, you wanted me to pick one accessory out of four: The sun crown representing nobility, the storm bracelet symbolizing strength, the ice ring embodying wisdom, and the radiant pendant signifying kindness...
祖母，您还记得我那时的选择吗？
Grandmother, do you remember the one I chose?
那时…你吟诵着稚嫩的祷词，为那枚不起眼的吊坠引来了一抹微光……
You spoke an innocent little prayer, infusing a faint thread of light to that modest pendant...
对。而且，您的反应还有些吃惊——因为在过去的几百年间，没有哪个天空一族的孩子跟我做了同样的选择。
Yes, and I remember how surprised you were. In all those centuries, no other child of the Sky people had ever made the same choice I did.
雅辛忒丝…我一度以为你是个怯懦的孩子。
Hyacinthia... There was a time when I thought you were a timid child.
你对兵戈武技兴致寥寥，性格中也全然不见我们一族中的刚强跟硬朗。
You never had much interest in swords or battle, and had no relation to that fiery determination and strength in our blood.
但我始终告诉自己：那没什么不好。如果我的小蜂鸟能在乐观和善意中度过一生，那绝非她的不幸。
Yet I've told myself — that's not a bad thing. If my hummingbird could live her life in kindness and optimism, then it'd be a good thing.
我未曾想过，取回艾格勒火种的重担果真会落在你的身上……
I never thought the burden of retrieving the Coreflame of Aquila would fall to you...
请别替我担心，祖母。在我看来，定义天空之子血脉的不只是杰出的力量，还有我们捏塑世界的天赋。
Don't worry about me, Grandmother. I believe what makes someone a Skyfolk isn't just outstanding strength, but the capacity to shape the world.
千年前，当世界急需一位敢于挑战神明的英雄时，英雄塞涅俄丝站了出来，开启了逐火的时代……
When the world cried out for a hero to challenge the gods a thousand years ago, Seliose stepped forward and began the Flame-Chasing era...
…而在逐火之旅即将步入尾声的这一刻，眼前满目疮痍的世界正急切地呼求着疗愈。
...And now, as the Flame-Chase Journey nears its end, this broken world is crying out for something else — healing.
这是多么美妙的巧合呀——千年的英雄史诗，以「天空」作为开篇，亦由「天空」写下结语……
Isn't it poetic? A saga that spans a thousand years began with Sky, and will also end with Sky...
呵…你还是那么乐观啊，和小时候一模一样。
Heh... you're still as optimistic as ever, just like when you were a kid.
既然你已经下定决心，那就将你的信念贯彻到底吧，雅辛忒丝。
If your mind is set, Hyacinthia, then carry your resolve through to the very end.
带着我的赐福回归天空，俯瞰这个行将接受拯救的世界吧。
Return to the sky with my blessing, and watch over this world on the threshold of salvation.
祖母…谢谢您。但我还剩最后一个请求。
Grandmother... thank you, but I have one last request.
说吧，雅辛忒丝。我们应该还有时间。
Speak, Hyacinthia. We should still have some time.
在您离开以前，可否请您像当年那样…再为我讲述一次天空英雄的传说？
Before you go... could you tell me the tale of the sky hero once more, just like you used to?
那你一定要仔细聆听，我最亲爱的小蜂鸟。毕竟，这就是最后一次了……
Then, listen closely, my dearest hummingbird. After all, this will be the last time...
祖母在最后的日记中说，她希望当使命召唤之时，天空一族的后人能将启程的消息带给她留在世间的魂灵。
In her final diary entry, my grandmother wrote that when the moment of destiny comes, a descendant of the Sky people would deliver the message of their departure to her spirit.
泰坦征伐千载，世界满目疮痍。
For millennia, the Titans waged relentless wars, leaving the world scarred and ravaged.
黄金战争百年，诸邦混乱衰疲。
A century of the Chrysos War plunged the nations into chaos and decay.
直到，一支奔腾着凡人之怒的长枪……
Until a spear, fueled by mortal rage...
刺破那掩埋了救世神谕的烟尘与战火。
Pierced through the smoke and flames that buried the prophecy of deliverance.
捏塑天象的艾格勒，手握惊雷、额戴赫日的百目神鸟……
Aquila, the celestial shaper, the hundred-eyed divine bird crowned with the blazing sun and wielding thunder...
虽为尼卡多利戳盲九十九目，仍独留一只眼睛，怒视那领受它赐福、却举戈相向的晨昏后嗣。
Though struck blind in ninety-nine eyes by Nikador, they kept one eye, glaring at the children of twilight who received divine blessing yet turned their weapons against the gods.
天空的黄金裔，<color=#dbc291ff>「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝</color>，在黄昏时分，身披羽翼、登临晨昏之眼的禁土。
The Chrysos Heir of the Sky, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose the Daythunder Knight</color>, ascended the forbidden lands of the Eye of Twilight at dusk, clad in wings.
她的左侧是狮首的「烈阳之翼」索拉比斯，咆哮中吐纳灼世的神火；
To her left was the lion-headed Solabis, the Sunlit Wings, whose roars breathed divine flames and scorched the world.
她的右侧是马身的「星月之翎」露奈比斯，旋步中踢踏漫天的星罗。
To her right was the horse-bodied Lunabis, the Moonlit Plume, whose graceful steps trampled the stars in the heavens.
一人两兽，向天空的主宰发起挑战，誓将弑夺神明的火种。
The one warrior and her two beasts challenged the ruler of the sky, determined to seize the divine Coreflame through plunder.
泰坦的每声怒吼都横生落雷，泰坦的每次倾身都卷起飓风。
The Titan's every roar summoned lightning bolts, and their every movement stirred cyclones.
泰坦受伤的血液…在世间坠下沸腾的血雨，汇成滚烫的洪流。
The wounded Titan's blood... poured down like boiling rain upon the world and converged into scalding torrents.
战斗的最后，「烈阳之翼」点燃了泰坦的羽翼，「星月之翎」封锁了泰坦的神躯……
In the final moments of the battle, the Sunlit Wings set the Titan's wings aflame, while the Moonlit Plume sealed the divine body...
那翅翼折断、伤痕累累的天空英雄，艰难抬起长枪…将那最后一只恫世的巨眼穿透。
The battered hero of the sky, with her wings broken and her body covered in wounds, struggled to lift her spear... and pierced the last monstrous eye.
泰坦的神躯轰然倒下…与此同时，苍穹撕挦如同裂帛，天空即将与神明一同陨落。
The Titan's divine body crashed to the ground, and with it, the sky tore apart like fabric, about to fall with its god.
凡人的惊惶与祈求，令天空英雄再度起身。
The fear and pleas of mortals urged the hero of the sky to rise again.
「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，世上首度弑神的黄金裔，与两位骁勇的翼兽伙伴，径直冲入艾格勒逐渐溃散的躯干。
Seliose the Daythunder Knight, the first of the Chrysos Heirs to slay a god in this world, charged into the crumbling body of Aquila with her two fearless winged companions.
她与泰坦融为一体，再度撑起天穹，只为世间留下一句激昂的寄语——
She merged with the Titan, holding up the sky once more, only to leave behind a powerful message for the world —
「我的后裔终将领受祝福，脚踏虹桥重登天空…在那创世神谕的终点，从我手中带回这枚火种。」
"My descendants will be blessed and cross the rainbow bridge back to the sky... At the end of the Prophecy of Genesis, they will reclaim the Coreflame from my hands."
A few days later, at Dawncloud...
哇，没想到这么高的地方，居然会这么热闹……
Wow, I didn't expect it to be so lively up here...
这里的人们，是来为黄金裔们送行的吗？
Are these people here to send off the Chrysos Heirs?
白厄在那儿——去找他聊聊吧。
There's Phainon. Let's go talk to him.
…我知道这个要求非常出格，尼莫西妮——希望你能理解。
...I know this is a big ask, Mnemosyne — I hope you understand.
请别这么说，白厄阁下。能成为你托付的对象，我们倍感荣幸。
Please, don't say that, Lord Phainon. It's an honor to for us to be entrusted with this task.
去吧。但愿我们的担忧不会变成现实。
Go, then. Let's hope our concerns don't come true.
愿你们都能平安归来，阁下。
I hope you all return safely, my lord.
You didn't oversleep this time, did you?
A pink puppy woke me up.
…你真的很喜欢这个称呼呢。算了，接受了这个设定后，人家内心已经毫无波澜啦！
...You like calling me that, don't you? Well, I've embraced it now. It doesn't even faze me anymore!
I never show up late for important things.
哈哈哈…真是靠谱。但愿你没有牺牲睡眠时间，接下来可还有一场硬仗啊。
Hahaha... always dependable. I just hope you didn't lose any sleep. We've still got a tough fight ahead.
Well, maybe I'll go back and grab a quick nap.
既来之，则安之。趁着人还没到齐，你可以在这里打个盹。
Since you're here, make yourself comfortable. You can take a nap while we're waiting for everyone else.
你做好准备了吗，战友？不出意外…这就是我们并肩作战的最后一役了。
Ready, comrade? If all goes according to plan... this could be the last battle where we fight at each other's side.
假如翁法罗斯与天外的隔绝的确是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}降下的诅咒，那今天过后，你们就能重返家园了。
If the curse separating Amphoreus from the world beyond the sky is truly {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s doing, then you'll be able to return home after their fall.
A day on the ground feels like ten years in the sky...
当真吗？这我可是第一次听说……
Really? That's the first time I've heard that...
{F#她}{M#他}随便说说的，你别这么轻易就信啦。
{M#He}{F#She} just makes things up. Don't take it too seriously.
That's assuming we can fix the car.
啊…抱歉，这我就爱莫能助了。
Ah... sorry, I'm no help there.
别担心啦。丹恒和我们说过，那位来古士议员能帮上{NICKNAME}的忙。
Don't worry. Dan Heng mentioned that Councillor Lygus can help {NICKNAME} with that.
...You sound a little insincere there, buddy.
我不是还要转生为泰坦吗？
Aren't I supposed to be reincarnating as a Titan?
那可就麻烦了啊…说什么都得在「再创世」之前把你们送回家去。
That would be a problem... We'll need to get you home before Era Nova.
煽情的告别就留给未来吧，正好先在心底酝酿一下情绪。何况之前在浴场玩豹豹…碰碰……
Let's leave the emotional goodbyes for later. That'll give us some time to figure out what we should be feeling at that time. Besides, when we were playing Seal... Slammers...
…咳，海豹冲撞游戏的时候，你不是教过我一句话吗？
...Ahem, that bumping seal game. Didn't you teach me something back then?
"Crack the champagne at halftime to watch victory slip away!"
Well, it's <unbreak>10</unbreak>/<unbreak>12</unbreak>th time now. We can totally open the champagne.
那我就得还你另外一句话了，丹恒教给我的——「行百里者半九十」。
Well, then I have to use something else Dan Heng taught me as come back — "The last mile is the hardest."
「行百里者半九十」——这句是丹恒教我的。道理差不多，就是…更文绉绉一些。
"The last mile is the hardest." — That's from Dan Heng. Same principle, just... more elegantly put.
咦，说到丹恒…他人在哪里呢？
Hey, speaking of Dan Heng... where is he?
他到得最早，已经提前登上崖顶等我们了。我猜，他是不太习惯被这么多双眼睛盯着——
He arrived before everyone else and climbed to the cliff top to wait for us. He's probably not keen on being the center of attention...
白厄大人，请你们一定要平安归来！
Lord Phainon, please make sure you all come back safely!
请打倒冷漠的{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}晨昏之眼{RUBY_E#}，还翁法罗斯一片仁爱的天空吧。
Please defeat the indifferent {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}, and restore a compassionate sky to Amphoreus.
谢谢诸位的祝福！请放心，我们已经做好了万全的准备。
Thank you all for your blessings! Rest assured. We're fully prepared.
不过，今天的主角并不是我。一会儿，等风堇小姐到场的时候——请诸位也不要吝惜自己的鼓舞。
But I'm not the main attraction today. Please don't hesitate to cheer for Miss Hyacine when she arrives.
风堇小姐，被选中的天空之女…昏光庭院的骄傲！
Miss Hyacine, the chosen daughter of the Sky... the pride of the Twilight Courtyard!
她也是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的骄傲。另外……
She's not just the pride of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus as well. And furthermore...
逐火之旅尽管是由黄金裔主持的，但为它做出贡献的绝不只被阿格莱雅选中之人。
While the Flame-Chase Journey is led by the Chrysos Heirs, it's not just those chosen by Aglaea who contributed to it.
也请将感激献给两位来自异邦的勇者吧——为了素不相识的你我，他们甘愿挺身而出，赴汤蹈火！
Let's extend our gratitude to the two warriors of the outlands — who bravely stepped up and risked their lives for those they've never met!
英雄{NICKNAME}！您的故事会被写入史诗，在新世界被众人传唱。
Hero {NICKNAME}, your saga will be chronicled in epics and celebrated across the new world!
身负欧洛尼斯之力的异邦勇士，救世的先驱！
Warrior from the outlands! Endowed with the might of Oronyx! The vanguard of deliverance!
这场面，你已经能应对自如了。
Looks like you've mastered public speaking now.
哈…我们认识也有段时间了，你应该能分出我什么时候在客套，什么时候又是在说真心话。
Ha... After all this time, you should know when I'm just being polite and when I'm genuinely speaking from the heart.
刚才那句话就是我发自内心的赞许，{NICKNAME}。要是那时我没有听从自己的直觉，信任你和丹恒，奥赫玛现在不知道会变成什么模样……
That praise was heartfelt, {NICKNAME}. Had I not trusted my instincts and put my faith in you and Dan Heng, it's hard to imagine what might have become of Okh-
...Ah, the guest of honor has arrived.
奥赫玛的各位——我已经得到了天空一族先祖的赐福。
People of Okhema, I've been blessed by the ancestors of the Sky people.
他们愿意将跨越千年的使命相托，由我去取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
They have agreed to bestow the thousand-year mission to me and to have me claim the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.
现在是光历<unbreak>4932</unbreak>年，英雄塞涅俄丝开启逐火之旅后的第<unbreak>1062</unbreak>个年头。
Today is the year <unbreak>4932</unbreak> of the Light Calendar, <unbreak>1062</unbreak> years since the hero Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey.
我，天空一族的雅辛忒丝，准备好引领人子重登天空了。
I, Hyacinthia of the Sky people, am prepared to lead the children of humanity back to the sky.
历史从不会均匀地呼吸。它时而屏息千年，宛若时光停滞；时而急促地喘息，仿佛要在一瞬之间倾覆世界和文明。

History doesn't breathe evenly. At times, it suspends its breath for millennia as though time has frozen. At other times, it pants rapidly, as if poised to topple the world and our civilization in an instant.
它急促的呼吸掀起了风暴，将你我都卷入了其中。风堇，你作为旁观者见证了四枚火种的回归……
Its hurried gasps have sparked a tempest, sweeping all of us along. Hyacine, as an observer, you've witnessed the return of four Coreflames...
现在，该轮到你履行使命了。这一次，请以亲历者的身份带领我们深入风眼。
And now it's your turn to fulfill your duty. Please, guide us into the heart of the storm as the executioner of this mission.
讨伐{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的队伍——现在终于到齐了。
The team tasked with conquering {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} has finally assembled.
一次又一次，我们在用双手改写一个世界的历史。
We've reshaped the history of the world with our hands over and over.
我想，这次「开拓」的经历…应该足以令阿基维利称羡。
I bet this trailblazing expedition... could even make Akivili jealous.
打完这一仗，我们就回家！
We'll go home as soon as this battle finishes!
精彩的冒险，三月都馋哭了！
Such an exciting adventure! March's gonna be crying with jealousy!
这次「开拓」，即将圆满收尾！
This trailblazing expedition is about to end perfectly!
精神很充沛啊，战友。看来我挑的日子还不错。
So full of energy, comrades. Seems I chose the perfect day.
风堇，接下来就交给你了。
传说，曾经的天空之子分为许多部族。
Legend tells of the Skyfolk once divided into many tribes.
信奉烈阳的「晖之民」，崇拜雷雨的「雨之民」，以雪为兆的「冬之民」……
The Sunfolk worshiped the sun, the Rainfolk were devoted to storms, and the Winterfolk waited for signs in the snow...
祖先们生活在艾格勒的光芒照拂之下，眼中却只容得下一种颜色。
Our ancestors lived under Aquila's light, yet they were blinded to all but one color.
可是他们却忘了——那照拂世间的微光…正是由多种色彩和谐构成。
They forgot that... the light that illuminates the world is made of countless different colors.
所以，彩虹是我最钟爱的气象——它不仅折射出许多色彩，还含有桥梁的寓意。
That's why the rainbow is my favorite, for not only does it reflect the many colors, it is also a bridge.
我想以彩虹桥连接人们的心灵…为世间所有灵魂传递希望。
And I want to use the rainbow bridge to link everyone's hearts... and give hope to every soul on earth.
请以彩虹作为指引，带我回到天空之子阔别千年的家园吧。
With the rainbow as your guide, lead me back to the home of the Skyfolk, a land we have not seen for a thousand years!
这附近一定有先祖的记忆。
There must be memories of an ancestor nearby.
风堇姐姐！愿迈德漠斯捍卫你！
Miss Hyacine! May Mydeimos protect you!
希望黄金裔们能够凯旋…为昏淡的世界带来曙光。
I hope the Chrysos Heirs triumph... and bring light to this darkening world.
他们一定能摘得「天空」的火种…为逐火之旅写下圆满的终章！
They'll surely seize the Coreflame of Sky... and bring the Flame-Chase Journey to its perfect conclusion!
乘着彩虹桥飞行，真是种奇妙的体验。
Flying along the Rainbow Bridge is truly an amazing experience.
传说中{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天空堡垒——没想到有朝一日我竟能亲自踏足。
It's the legendary sky fortress of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} — I never imagined that one day I'd be able to step foot on it.
先祖们曾在天上建立了宏伟的文明，而我们脚下的「晨昏之眼」就是艾格勒的栖地，云间城邦的核心。
My ancestors once built a magnificent civilization among the heavens. The Eye of Twilight, which we are standing on, is the home of Aquila and the heart of the city-state in the clouds.
想必英雄塞涅俄丝就是站在这里向艾格勒宣战，<color=#dbc291ff>翻开了人类逐火征程的第一页……</color>
This must be where the hero Seliose stood when she challenged Aquila and <color=#dbc291ff>began the first step of the Flame-Chase Journey...</color>
我们来到这里，就是为了给由她亲手开启的征程画上句号。
We are here to end the journey she began.
一切事物都会随时间流逝磨损，传说也是如此。但无论它是真是假，我们要做的事不会变。
Even legends are corroded by time, but that won't change what we must do.
It's our turn to challenge the Titan.
对。无论传说的记载有几分真实…我们要做的事不会变。
Yes... What we must do will not change, no matter how much of the legends are true.
根据史料记载：信仰艾格勒的文明掌握着先进的科技。加上地理位置占优，天空之城是黄金战争中唯一能与悬锋城正面对抗的势力。

According to historical records, the civilization that worshiped Aquila once mastered advanced technology, which made their strategically located Sky Castrum the only force that could face Castrum Kremnos head-on in the Chrysos War.
但它内部并不团结。尤其是在神谕降世后…黄金裔掀起的频繁内战令他们实力大减，最终只能藏匿于云中，远离地上的战火。

But they were divided within. The frequent wars started by the Chrysos Heirs drained their power, especially after the prophecy descended. In the end, they had to hide among the clouds, far from the conflicts raging below.
<color=#dbc291ff>据说，是两支最主要的天空部落，晖之民和雨之民之间产生了分歧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Apparently, the division was between the two most important sky tribes, the Sunfolk and the Rainfolk.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>正因无法忍受同胞间无休止的纷争，塞涅俄丝才会把枪尖对准高高在上的泰坦。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And Seliose's frustration towards the endless strife among her people made her turn her spear towards the Titan above.</color>
Where did she go in the end?
塞涅俄丝的英勇超乎常人想象，她率领两头翼兽伙伴将愤怒的泰坦逼入绝境，一同消失在了天空的尽头。
After driving the enraged Titan to the brink of defeat with her two winged companions, they all vanished somewhere in the sky. Her courage was unparalleled.
Was her ATK really that high?
她率领两头翼兽伙伴将愤怒的泰坦逼入绝境，一同消失在了天空的尽头。哪怕传说有夸大其词的成分，塞涅俄丝的战绩也十分惊人。

After driving the enraged Titan to the brink of defeat with her two winged companions, they all vanished somewhere in the sky. Her achievements were unparalleled, even if later legends exaggerated the details.
但她没能终结艾格勒，归还「天空」的火种。有人说，她以自身封印了神明的怒火，将它囚禁在晨昏之眼深处，永世支撑翁法罗斯的苍穹。

Yet she still could not end Aquila nor bring back the Coreflame of Sky. Some say she sealed the wrath of the god within herself, trapping them deep within the Eye of Twilight to support the heavens of Amphoreus forever.
换言之，她和泰坦融为了一体…换做以前，我会把它当作天方夜谭。但有了那刻夏老师的先例，也不足为奇了。
In other words, she became one with the Titan... I would have considered it a fairytale, but after seeing what happened with Professor Anaxa? Not anymore.
历经千年的时光，那位泰坦，和与它共生的英雄…一直在这里俯瞰着大地么？
Has that Titan... and that fused hero... been looking down on the world from here for a thousand years?
我能隐约感受到此处的空旷和浩大，但眼下只有一片漆黑。
I can kind of feel how big and empty this place is, but all I see is darkness.
那团黑暗的背后藏着什么…？
What's on the other side of this?
在天空城邦的习俗中，它连接着翁法罗斯的天幕，天象画壁呈现出的气候，将会转映为现实中的天气。
The Sky city believes that mural to be connected to Amphoreus's sky, and any weather condition depicted on it will become actual weather.
晴空，阴霾，冰雪，雷暴…画壁会映射出艾格勒变幻莫测的情绪。在和平年代，天空祭司们会集结于此，祈求神明以和煦的暖风吹拂世间，带来丰收。

The mural would reflect Aquila's shifting mood, like clear skies, fog, snow, or thunderstorms... The Sky Priests would gather here during peaceful times and pray to the god for warm breezes and good harvests.
如果要用灰宝和丹宝熟悉的词语来形容——把它当作一块巨大的「屏幕」就行啦。
To put it in words that Grayie and Dannie would understand... just think of it as a massive screen.
无论如何，在黑暗中探索一定不是上策。如果能将画壁点亮…它或许能为我们提供前行必要的光源。
In any case, exploring in the dark is never a good option. If we could light up the mural... it might just provide us with the light needed to move forward.
那座显眼的装置，恐怕就是举办仪式用的？去看看吧——环境很黑，请当心脚下。
That really conspicuous device might be part of the ritual? Let's go take a look. It's dark, so watch your feet.
How about it? Got any leads?
完全不知道该怎么启动，如果有前人的智慧帮忙就好了……
I have no idea how to turn it on. If only we had help from the wisdom of those who came before us...
对呀！差点忘了——灰宝，迷宝，能借用两位的力量吗？
That's it! I almost forgot — Grayie, Memmie, can I borrow your powers?
Leave it to the demigod of time.
明白！只要找到散落在附近的记忆就行了，对吧？简单，给人家一点时间……
Got it! We just need to find the scattered memory nearby, right? That's simple. Give me a little time...
搞定！这里人烟稀少，岁月的痕迹清晰可见呢。
Done! There haven't been many people for a while, so the traces of time are super obvious.
I knew you could do it, Memmie! You are a huge help.
还不知道如何启动这个装置，先去聆听先祖们的对话吧。
We still don't know how to turn on this device. Let's hear what the ancestors have to say first.
<color=#dbc291ff>伟大的艾格勒已在金色的云朵间留下了它的化身印记……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The great Aquila has already left a mark of their manifestation among the golden clouds...</color>
神的选择已经明朗，只有我等烈阳之子才是天空的正统…这场战争，注定将以晖之民的胜利作结……
The god's choice is clear: Only we, the Sunborn, are the true heirs of the sky... This war is destined to end in the victory of the Sunfolk...
愿「晨昏之眼」永不闭合，永昼笼罩大地……
May the Eye of Twilight never close. May eternal daylight embrace the land...
<color=#dbc291ff>「在金色的云朵间留下了印记……」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Left a mark among the golden clouds..."</color>
这说的是天象画壁吗？不过，现在什么都看不到……
Is this referring to the celestial mural? But we can't see anything right now...
傲慢的晖之民，泰坦会贬斥你们的骄狂不恭……
Arrogant Sunfolk, the Titan will condemn your brazen disrespect...
但塑造天空的艾格勒啊…<color=#dbc291ff>你为何要回避乌云的追赶？</color>难道晴空和阴雨，不是你平等的造物吗？
But Aquila, you that shaped the sky... <color=#dbc291ff>Why do you avoid the pursuit of dark clouds?</color> Are not clear skies and stormy rains equally your creations?
烈阳的子民将你的行为视作对他们的偏袒，并以此为由挤压我族……
The Sunborn see your behavior as an act of favoritism towards them, and weaponize this reason to oppress my people...
雨之民不会纵容压迫…神明啊，你若沉默不语，那我们就不得不自行锻铸武器，反抗他们为辉光所掩的恶意……
The Rainfolk will not suffer in silence... O god, if you remain silent, we shall have to forge our own weapons and resist the malice concealed under your brilliance...
愿「晨昏之眼」永不睁开，霖雨永不止坠……
May the Eye of Twilight never open, and may torrential rains descend forever...
艾格勒不喜欢阴雨吗…总觉得不可思议，但先把这条线索记下了吧。
Aquila doesn't like rainstorms...? It seems a little hard to believe, but we should write this clue down first.
果真和传闻一样，天空之城内部并不团结。
It is as the rumors said — the Sky Castrum was far from united.
我的猜测没错，这里的确是进行天象仪式的场所。迷宝，还能捞起更多记忆吗？
My guess was right. This venue is indeed where celestial rituals were performed. Memmie, can you retrieve even more memories?
No problem at all. Here goes...
<color=#dbc291ff>「以天空百目之名，吾为世间降下天象。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"In the name of the Sky's Hundred Eyes, I bring celestial phenomena upon the world."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."</color>
你们胆敢私自操弄「浑象仪」，篡改天象？这是渎神！
How dare you tamper with the celestial globe and distort the weather? This is blasphemy!
…泰坦将浑象仪赠予先祖，是为了让我们公平地划分阴晴昼夜，好让万物能在各自钟爱的天象下生长。

...The Titan bequeathed the celestial globe to our ancestors, so that we could divide the light and dark equally between day and night, so that all things could grow beneath the celestial phenomenon they preferred.
但烈阳之子擅自霸占天象画壁，令白昼无尽漫长，大地受尽干旱与暴晒…你们有何颜面指责被欺压至极的雨之民？！

But the Sunborn have asserted control over the celestial mural, and now the days are endless, subjecting the land to drought and burning... And you have the gall to accuse the Rainfolk, who you've oppressed!?
大地？大地是我们的夙敌！
The land? It is our eternal nemesis!
不受艾格勒垂爱的乌云阴雨，要如何带领天空之民赢得黄金战争？
How can storm clouds and rain, unloved by Aquila, lead the Skyfolk to victory in the Chrysos War?
你们的品格同信仰一般脆弱…去找一个不受烈日眷顾的角落，躲在阴影里孤自落泪吧——你们唯一能做到的事，就是暗自哭泣！
Your character is as weak as your faith... Go seek out a corner untouched by the sun, and weep solitary tears in the shadows. That's all you lot know how to do anyway — cry in silence!
呵…那就让你看看吧，我们能做到的事……
Hmph... Then let us show you what we are really made of...
What are you trying to do?
被热浪冲昏头脑的狂信徒……
Fanatics whose minds have been muddled by the heat...
By Aquila above, meet your demise!
Ugh... Ah... What a terrifying memory...
残酷的内乱，令人唏嘘…看来天空城邦并非败于外敌。
The brutal internal strife is sad to see... It appears the Sky cities didn't fall to external threats after all.
骄傲的晖之民将自己视作神选，长期压迫其他部族…而受到迫害的雨之民开始埋怨神明，并暗中谋划反击。

The proud Sunfolk saw themselves as divinely chosen, exacting long-standing oppression on other tribes... And the Rainfolk suffering beneath them began resenting the divine, and plotted their retaliation.
到哪都会发生类似的事…
神明设立舞台，凡人演出戏剧。类似的戏码，「开拓」已不是第一次见证。
The divine set the stage, and the mortals perform the play. This isn't the first time we've witnessed such a scene while trailblazing.
生活在肉眼可见的神明庇佑下，发生这种事也不足为奇。
Not surprising when living in a world with literal gods that you can see.
This blame lies squarely on the Titan's shoulders.
既能使人安心，也能驱人疯狂，这就是信仰的两面。
Faith is a double-edged sword, capable of calming hearts and corrupting them.
无论身处什么时代，人与人的争端注定难以消解。见识了凯妮斯和「清洗者」的作为…也不难理解这段历史了。
No matter the era, conflict among humans is destined to persist. Having witnessed the actions of Caenis and the "Cleaners"... it isn't so hard to understand this piece of history.
…这里一片空寂，恐怕没有赢家。
...There's nothing but empty silence here. I fear there were no winners.
反抗的一方没什么不对。
对错我难以评论，可魔盒一旦被打开，没有人能幸免于难。
I can't judge who was right or wrong, but when the box of misfortune is opened, no one escapes unscathed.
英雄塞涅俄丝…她又是如何看待晖之民和雨之民的世仇的？传说将笔墨聚焦在她征伐神明的事迹上，却对天空子民的下落含混不清。
The hero Seliose... How did she view the ancient feud between the Sunfolk and Rainfolk? The legends focus on her god-slaying expedition, but are hazy on the fall of the Sky denizens.
也许，我能在这里拼凑出历史的原貌。
Perhaps I can piece together the true face of history here.
一步一步来。还记得那位雨之民的吟唱么，风堇？或许那就是开启天象画壁的密钥。
One step at a time. Do you remember the verse that Rainfolk sang, Hyacine? Perhaps that's the key to unlocking the celestial mural.
嗯，我已经记住啦。现在…我们试着唤醒它吧？
Yes, I already memorized it. Now... Shall we try to wake it up?
<color=#dbc291ff>「以天空百目之名，吾为世间降下天象。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"In the name of the Sky's Hundred Eyes, I bring celestial phenomena upon the world."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."</color>
金色的云层，炽烈的辉光……
看，残像提到的<color=#dbc291ff>「化身印记」</color>——
Look, the <color=#dbc291ff>"mark of their manifestation"</color> mentioned by the memory fragment...
真是令人发怵…不知道艾格勒是否也在注视着我们。
How chilling... I wonder if Aquila is also watching us.
记得雨之民提到过，它讨厌阴天。能否利用这点，改变画壁上的天气，影响「化身印记」的行为？
I remember the Rainfolk mentioned the Titan dislikes overcast days. We might be able to use this to our advantage and change how the mark is behaving by changing the weather on the mural?
这么做，不会对奥赫玛产生影响么？
不必担心，恐怕天象画壁早已失去了以前的作用。奥赫玛的白天，倚仗的也是刻法勒背上的黎明机器。
Don't worry. The mural probably lost its original function ages ago. Okhema's light comes from the Dawn Device shouldered by Kephale anyway.
…可这台装置似乎失去动力了。要改变画壁上的天象，得找到别处的浑象仪。
...That being said, there's no power in this device anymore. We have to find another celestial globe if we want to change the weather on the mural.
啊，那边——那个圆盘形状的仪器，我倒是不陌生。
Ah, there — that circular device. I'm quite familiar with it.
那是昏光庭院的<color=#dbc291ff>「西风罗盘」，我们可以用它创造出供人行走的微缩彩虹桥。</color>说不定，能靠它前往晨昏之眼的其它区域。

That's a <color=#dbc291ff>West Wind Compass of the Twilight Courtyard. We can use it to create a miniature rainbow bridge to walk on.</color> Who knows, it might even lead us to other areas of the Eye of Twilight.
从黄金年代流传下来的技术，现在倒是能帮上我们的忙啦。走吧，调试和校准的工作就交给我。
Technology passed down from the golden age is finally proving useful. Let's go. Leave the adjustments and calibrations to me.
That huge golden pool down there...
滚烫的黄金池，据说是驱动晨昏之眼的神性能源。行走的时候，可要一直小心脚下呀。
A boiling pool of gold, said to be the energy source that powers the Eye of Twilight's divinity. You should watch your step as you walk.
嗯…机关结构和昏光庭院使用的有些不同。该怎么说呢…要更复杂一些。
Hmm... the mechanical structure is a bit different from the one used in the Twilight Courtyard. How should I put this... It's a little more complicated.
No fun if there's no challenge.
可能要稍微花上一会儿…但我应该应付得来！
This might take a while... but I think I can manage!
Look, the rainbow bridge has appeared!
干得好，现在我们可以通过……
Well done. Now we can cross...
样子像是奇兽。但这一匹…似乎对我们没有敌意。
It looks like a mythical beast. But this one... doesn't seem hostile towards us.
啊——风堇，莫非它是传说里的……
Ahhh! Hyacine, could it be the legendary...
我…还无法确定。大概要接近一些才好判断。
I'm... not entirely sure. We might be able to tell if we get closer.
不能默认它会对我们友好。保持警惕，跟上去吧。
We can't assume it's friendly. Keep your guard up and follow it.
是幻觉？还是记忆消散了？
An illusion? Or the memory dissipated?
好奇怪。那匹天马和其他记忆不一样，有一股哀伤缠绕着它……
How strange. That pegasus was different from the other memories. It was surrounded in an air of sorrow...
...It's so heavy that it's hard to breathe.
这…是露奈比斯的幻影吗？它会出现在这里，是因为还有未完成的事吗？
Was that... Lunabis's phantom? Did it appear here because it has unfinished business?
若真是这样，维持它形体的执念一定十分强烈，难道是那位塞涅俄丝残存的意志？
If that's really the case, there must be a super strong obsession keeping it in one piece. Could it be some remaining bits of Seliose's will?
现在还无法确定。无论如何，我们先乘升降梯上到晨昏之眼的核心吧。
We can't be sure of that yet. Let's take the elevator up to the Eye of Twilight's core first.
小、小心呀！那一只不是记忆的幻影…它好像，还有生命的气息！
C—Careful! It's not a memory phantom... It looks like it's alive!
但…很扭曲，又很黑暗…就像那些黑潮怪物一样…！
But... it's so twisted, and very shadowy... like those black tide creatures...!
果然，你就是露奈比斯阁下，对吗？
So, you're Lady Lunabis, aren't you?
那，眼前这个正在被侵蚀折磨的生灵…一定就是索拉比斯阁下了。
Then... that corrupted being before us must be Lord Solabis.
你是为了帮助同伴解脱，才把我们引领到这里的吗？
Did you lead us here so we can free your companion?
你已经…被痛苦折磨很久了吧？但你没有放弃，还是拼命维持着一点自我，不愿屈服。
You must have been tormented by pain for so long. But you didn't give up, and you've held on to what little is left of your will with such tenacity.
别害怕，你不再孤单了。我是雅辛忒丝，继承了英雄血脉的医者——
Don't be afraid. You're not alone anymore. I am Hyacinthia, the healer who inherited the hero's bloodline...
——「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，她曾是你们的伙伴，对吗？
...Seliose the Daythunder Knight was once your comrade, wasn't she?
索拉比斯阁下，你的躯壳已被黑潮彻底侵蚀。但我还可以…疗愈你顽强的灵魂，就像露奈比斯阁下一样，即便失去肉身，你的心灵也依旧高洁。

Lord Solabis, your body has been completely corroded by the black tide. But I can still... heal your tenacious soul. Just like Lady Lunabis — even if you've lost your mortal body, your spirit remains pure.
请牢牢抓住自己残存的意识，我会让你…以英魂的姿态再次苏醒。
Please keep holding on to what's left of your will. And I will... reawaken you as a heroic soul.
I wonder how much it understood.
一定能听懂的…虽然深陷黑潮的苦痛，但它是位智慧而坚强的生灵。
It must have understood me... It's a creature of wisdom and tenacity, despite being mired in the agony of the black tide.
安抚结束，还是要靠球棒说话。
Words are done. Time for the bat to do the talking.
战斗无法避免，但我们不是为了摧毁…而是为了救赎。
This battle can't be avoided, but we do not do this for destruction... We do this for salvation.
Do we need to show mercy?
不必了，灰宝。索拉比斯不是随随便便就能战胜的对手。何况…它一定也期待着一场全力以赴的对决。
No need, Grayie. Solabis isn't an opponent that can be defeated easily. Besides... it must be looking forward to an all-out battle.
索拉比斯，传说中陪伴在英雄身边的「烈阳之翼」，如果这场战斗能让你回想起当年的伟绩，那会是我的荣幸……
Solabis, the Sunlit Wings that once accompanied the hero... If this battle can remind you of your great deeds from back then, it would be my honor...
Hold your horses, you're actually speaking!
不必惊讶吧？毕竟这是个粉红小狗都会说话的世界……
No need to be surprised. After all, this is a world where even a pink puppy can speak...
哎呀，怎么连人家都开始这么自称了！
Ugh, I can't believe I'm calling myself that now too!
索拉比斯…你终于苏醒了。
我的意识已经迷失了太久。终于，黑潮的囚笼被打开了。
My consciousness has been lost for far too long. Finally, I have been released from the black tide's cage.
塞涅俄丝的后裔——就是你么，小女孩？
Little girl... Are you Seliose's descendant?
是我，索拉比斯阁下。我的名字是雅辛忒丝，伙伴们都叫我风堇。
It is me, Lord Solabis. My name is Hyacinthia, and my companions call me Hyacine.
雅辛忒丝——你身上没有她的气息。
Hyacinthia — you don't have the scent of her on you.
千年过去，英雄塞涅俄丝的血脉恐怕已经无比纤薄。但天空一族的决心从未被岁月冲蚀，我此行正是为了完成她的遗愿。
It's been a thousand years. Seliose's blood may have thinned in my veins, but the resolve of the Sky people has never been eroded by time. I've journeyed here to fulfill her dying wish.
How much do you know about her dying wish?
我知道…她为了支撑破碎的天空，与泰坦的神躯融为了一体。
I know that... in order to support the shattered sky, she merged herself with the divine body of the Titan.
我也知道，她留下了谏言，令后人有朝一日重返天顶，取走艾格勒的火种。
And I also know that she left behind a message, calling on future generations to one day ascend to the heavens again and reclaim the Coreflame of Aquila.
…自从坠入大地，传说已变成了这般样貌吗？
...Has the legend changed so much since your people fell to the earth?
女孩，你说自己是名医师？
Girl, you said you're a doctor?
只懂疗愈和扶伤…如此柔弱的命格，打算凭借什么挑战天空的化身？
You only know how to heal and tend to wounds... With such a weak lot in life, how do you plan to challenge the embodiment of the heavens?
With this long sword, heroic soul.
如你所见，我们都是雅辛忒丝的伙伴，她的战友。
As you can see, we are all Hyacinthia's companions and comrades.
而我们具备的力量，你刚才已经见识过了。
You've already witnessed our combined strength.
...It's not bad, but still lacking compared to her.
索拉比斯，放下你的孤傲，接受他们的善意吧。
Solabis, let go of your ego and accept their kindness.
你被黑潮所困的岁月里，世界发生了剧变。若我没猜错，战神尼卡多利也是陨落于这几位勇士之手。
You've been trapped in time by the black tide, while great change has spread over the world. If I'm not mistaken, the God of War Nikador also fell to the hands of these warriors.
我们已令其他泰坦一一安息。如今，逐火的终点正是这座天空堡垒的主人。
We've laid all the other Titans to rest, one by one. Now, the final target for the Flame-Chase is the master of this sky fortress.
请引领我们去往艾格勒面前吧，两位英魂。弑神取火的纪元由塞涅俄丝亲手开启，哪怕她无法亲眼看到一个时代的终结，至少你们能代为见证。

Please guide us to an audience with Aquila, heroic souls. Seliose initiated the era of slaying gods and attaining their flames. Even if she could not witness the end of this era, you will all at least bear witness on her behalf.
…自信、凌厉，我倒是从你身上看见了几分她的影子。
Confidence and fierceness — Yes, I do indeed see a shadow of her in you.
Is that a reaction... from the Titan?
或许它感应到了我们的苏醒。
或许我们的气息，让它回忆起了千年前的鏖战。
Perhaps our presence stirred memories of the fierce battle from a thousand years ago.
从过往的记忆那里，我们得知天空的泰坦忌讳阴云。两位或许知道更多细节？
We learned from past memories that the Sky Titan fears dark clouds. Would you know more about this topic?
那忆灵所言为实，但你们还需向导。
What the memosprite said is true, but you all still need a guide.
随我来，让猎神重启吧。雅辛忒丝，还有勇士们。
Follow me, Hyacinthia and fellow warriors. Let the hunt for the gods start again.
千年的时光飞逝，这里的一切仿佛没有任何变化——只是少了人言的嘈杂。
A thousand years have passed, and yet this place feels the same — Just that there is no more human clamor.
这是晖之民的殿堂，烈阳之子们曾在此举办盛大的仪典，感恩艾格勒的馈赠。
This is the hall of the Sunfolk, where the Sunborn once held grand ceremonies to give thanks for Aquila's gifts.
所以…天空泰坦真的在偏袒晖之民吗？
So... Did the Sky Titan really take the side of the Sunfolk?
人们都是那么以为，直到塞涅俄丝的枪尖穿透了艾格勒的怒火。
Everyone thought so until Seliose's spear pierced through Aquila's wrath.
那时，我们才终于明白：艾格勒在躲避的并非云雨，而是蛰伏于阴影中的恐怖。
Only then did we understand that Aquila wasn't hiding from the clouds and rain, but from the horror that lurked within the unlit shadows.
那东西一直蔓延到现在。
That thing has been spreading ever since.
黑潮的威胁逼迫黄金裔完成逐火之旅，迈向神谕中的创世奇迹。
The black tide's threat has forced the Chrysos Heirs to complete our Flame-Chase Journey, heading toward the prophecy's Miracle of Genesis.
「黄金裔」…在我们的时代，那名号会掀起激愤的浪潮。但你们看上去却是受人尊崇的英雄。
"Chrysos Heirs"... In our time, that title used to stir up waves of outrage. But you all seem to be revered as heroes.
都是前人的功劳——缇里西庇俄丝和阿格莱雅，你应该听过这两个名字。
It's all thanks to those who came before us — Tribios and Aglaea. You must've heard of these two names.
哦…走到最后的，竟是她们俩啊。
Mmm... So it was those two who made it to the end.
无关的话就不多谈了。你们知道该如何启动浑象仪。去吧，逼出那画壁上的泰坦。
Let's not elaborate on unrelated topics. You now know how to activate the celestial globe. So go, and force out the Titan in the mural.
通路…被风场装置吸走了？
The road got... sucked away by the wind fan?
别怕！如果有必要，就<color=#dbc291ff>施展「岁月」的神力回溯它吧。</color>
You have nothing to fear! We can <color=#dbc291ff>use the power of Time to rewind it</color> if we have to.
..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."
岁月无情，也许是装置老化损坏了。
Perhaps the device has been damaged during these long merciless years.
看到殿堂两侧那些巨大的「电路」了么？也许我们该试着把它们修好。
Do you see those two giant "circuits" on either side of the hall? Maybe we should try fixing them.
..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."
看来它还不想直面我们。不知是因为胆怯…还是因为它留了后手。
Looks like they're still avoiding us. I wonder if it's cowardice... or if they have something up their sleeve.
如今的艾格勒，恐怕早已失去理智……
I fear the Aquila of present has long lost their sanity...
但本能仍在驱使它远离黑暗，逃避黑潮的围堵。
But instinct still drives them to flee from the shadows, to evade the black tide's encroachment.
勿将秉性与力量混为一谈，勇者。
Do not mistake their behavior for weakness, warrior.
我直面过天空的暴君，它的怒火足以熔化天穹——并非夸大其词，因为翁法罗斯的苍天即是它的权柄。
I have faced down the tyrant of the sky. It is no hyperbole that their raging fire is capable of melting the firmament. Amphoreus's heavens exist because of their authority.
那位英雄的意识还在么？
Does that hero's consciousness still remain?
塞涅俄丝的处境，我无从知晓。
I have no knowledge of Seliose's situation.
但我能断定，主宰那印记的并非她的意识…她绝不会如逃兵般无顾尊严，在乌云的追赶下流窜。
But I am certain that the will behind that mark is not hers... She would not abscond like a disgraceful deserter, willingly exiled by the pursuit of dark clouds.
该离开此地了。露奈比斯在下一站等待你们。
It is time to leave this place. Lunabis awaits you at the next stop.
请等一下，索拉比斯阁下。我…还有一件事想做。
A moment please, Lord Solabis. I... have one more thing I wish to do.
为了遵守与英雄塞涅俄丝的约定，她的后裔用了一千年的时光守望天空。我想，那世世代代为同一个理想而活的先祖们，他们有权知道传说的真相。
To honor the pact with Seliose, her descendants spent a millennium looking up at the sky. I believe my countless ancestors who lived for that purpose deserve to know the truth behind her legend.
如果你不介意我们敲开往世的大门…能否准许我窥探一眼此处的历史？
If you don't mind us knocking on the gates of the past... Maybe I can peek into this place's history...
掌握欧洛尼斯神迹的是你们。我无权阻止你们翻阅那段往事。
You are the ones who hold Oronyx's miracle. I have no authority to prevent you from delving into the past.
迷宝，灰宝，能拜托你们吗？我想给在彼岸等待的先祖们一个交代。
Memmie, Grayie, could I please ask you for this favor? I want to show the truth to my ancestors waiting on the other side.
交给我们吧，这是你的权利。
Leave it to us. This is your right.
如果传说有虚假的成分…那它背后一定有必须被粉饰的理由。
If there are falsehoods in the legends... then there must be a reason for its embellishment.
If the legend is a lie...
那它一定有必须被粉饰为谎言的理由…对吗？
Then there must be a reason behind its falsehood... right?
这里的景象，还有此前的记忆，让我有种奇怪的预感…在塞涅俄丝挑战神明后，天空之子又遭遇了什么？
The scene here, and the previous memories, all give me a strange sense of foreboding... After Seliose challenged the gods, what else did the Skyfolk encounter?
我需要弄清传说的原貌，为了先祖们的灵魂能彻底安息。
I must unveil the true nature of the legend, so that my ancestors' souls may rest in peace.
风堇…真是个好孩子呀。放心吧，有人家在呢！
Hyacine... You're such a good child. Don't worry. I'm here!
这里翻涌的记忆，比入口处更加强烈…人家这就把它们凝结起来，捏捏、捏捏……
The memories surging here are even more intense than at the entrance... I'll gather them up now, and mold them, and mold them...
谢谢你，迷宝。各位，拜托了…和我一起见证历史吧。
Thank you, Memmie. Everyone, please... witness history with me.
能和我一起见证历史吗？
Can you witness history with me?
…黄昏之女，你终于还是步入疯狂了吗？
...Daughter of Dusk, have you finally gone mad?
我就知道…融合了世仇的两族血脉的孩子，迟早会亲手毁灭天空之城。
I knew it... The child with the blood of two feuding clans will one day destroy the Sky Castrum.
你当真要把枪尖对准我们的神明？收手吧！你的鲁莽将会招引神罚……
Will you really point the tip of your spear at our god? Stay your hand! Your recklessness will only bring divine retribution...
（晖之民们在与塞涅俄丝对峙…要聆听这段历史吗？）
(The Sunfolks are facing off against Seliose... Listen to this part of history?)
聆听塞涅俄丝和晖之民的对话。
Listen to the conversation between Seliose and the Sunfolk.
英雄塞涅俄丝，她对晖之民的作为失望透顶，决定斩断一切的源头…他们信仰的神明。
The hero Seliose, disillusioned by the Sunfolk's deeds, decided to sever the source of it all... The god they so blindly placed their faith in.
那时的她心怀仁慈。哪怕言语激愤，心中却满载对人子的慈悲。
She was brimming with compassion at that time. Her words were bursting with anger, but her heart had nothing but mercy for the children of humanity.
…该离开了，雅辛忒丝。露奈比斯在等你们。
...We should get going, Hyacinthia. Lunabis is waiting for you all.
那些无辜的大地之子，只是产生了窥探「天外」的好奇心，就被高高在上的神明施以亡族灭国的审判……
Those innocent children of the earth were sentenced to total annihilation by the god above, while they had nothing more than mere curiosity for things that lie beyond the sky...
低头看看你们自己吧。自称烈阳之子的民族，却受不起这强光的照射，还把被烫得焦烂的肌肤当作神明的馈赠。
Look at yourselves. You call yourselves the Sunborn, and yet you're unable to bear the blinding sunlight. You even consider sunburns and blisters as a gift from the gods.
你们把自己认作神选之人、被艾格勒眷顾的强者，但却不敢对这世上真正的威胁宣战，只敢举剑挥向弱小的同胞。

You declare yourselves the chosen ones, champions favored by Aquila, yet you dare not even declare war upon the true threat of this world. Instead, you raise your swords and rattle them at your weaker brethren.
你们已经病入膏肓了…我的父亲亦是烈阳的信者，他教会了我坚韧和正直，让我向着光芒的方向一路前行——
You are all beyond saving... My father was also a disciple of the Sun, but he taught me resilience and justice and guided me toward the light...
——因为有光的地方就有希望。可怜的人，我在你们身上已经看不到希望…连藏在背光处的影子也比你们更具尊严！
...He taught me wherever there is light, there is hope. Wretched people, I see no hope left in any of you... Even a shadow has more dignity than you lot!
即便如此，黄昏之女！即便如此，你也不该摧毁我们的信仰……
Even so, Daughter of Dusk! Even so, you should not shatter our faith...
…何止是信仰！艾格勒塑造了天空，它就是天空本身——若它殒落了，这世界不知会变成哪般模样！
...Not just our faith! Aquila forged the sky — nay, they are the sky itself! If they fall, what will this world turn into!?
从地平线的尽头传来了神谕。它昭告了一个崭新的时代，一个不被泰坦神明支配，而是由凡人英雄开创的时代。
A prophecy echoes from the horizon's edge. It heralds the advent of a new age, one not ruled by the Titans, but created by mortal heroes.
我选择相信！一切承诺打破旧世强加于我们的枷锁，带给我们掀开新篇章的预兆…我唯有相信！
I choose to believe in that prophecy! I must believe in any sign that promises to break the chains imposed on us by the old era... Any sign that will lead us to a new chapter of the world!
若想阻止我弑神，那你们最好鼓起勇气，拉满长弓。看看是我先被万千支箭矢贯穿…还是你们先被索拉比斯的烈焰燃尽！

If you wish to stop me from slaying the god, you'd better muster your courage and draw your bows. Let's see if I will be pierced by a hail of arrows first... or if you will be burned to ash by Solabis!
我们要怎么对抗你？你是强大的阳雷骑士，是力敌万邦的女武神……
How can we even fight you? You're the powerful Daythunder Knight, a warrior goddess capable of trampling all lands...
我不是神——我只是身处这座牢笼之中，唯一一个有勇气反抗典狱者的凡人。
I am not a god, but the only mortal in this cage who is brave enough to defy the warden.
记忆中的晖之民们陷入了沉默。哪怕在烈日光芒的修饰下，他们的神情仍然暗如尘灰。
The Sunfolks in the memory fall silent. Their expressions are ashen despite being under the bright sunlight.
看吧…你们果真懦弱至极。
See... You are all truly weak beyond measure.
猎场在呼唤我们。走吧，索拉比斯。
The hunting ground beckons. Come, Solabis.
英雄塞涅俄丝，她对晖之民的作为失望透顶，决定斩断一切的源头…他们信仰的神明。
The hero Seliose, disillusioned by the Sunfolk's deeds, decided to sever the source of it all... The god they so blindly placed their faith in.
那时的她心怀仁慈。哪怕言语激愤，心中却满载对人子的慈悲。
She was brimming with compassion at that time. Her words were bursting with anger, but her heart had nothing but mercy for the children of humanity.
…该离开了，雅辛忒丝。露奈比斯在等你们。
...We should get going, Hyacinthia. Lunabis is waiting for you all.
露奈比斯阁下，我们来了！
艾格勒，尽管已被黑潮腐蚀……
Aquila... Even though they have been corrupted by the black tide...
但它仍与这堡垒中的眷属维持着联系。
They still maintain a connection with their Kin in this fortress.
身后也有…保持阵型，当心包围！
They're behind us as well... Maintain formation, and don't get surrounded!
想阻挠我们吗，被囚禁的泰坦？
You think to hinder us, imprisoned Titan?
那么，我们会让你明白…这是无谓的挣扎！
Then, we will make you understand... that resistance is futile!
化身印记——它飞向画壁的另一侧了。
The mark of manifestation. It fled to the other side of the mural.
继续追击，跟着它找到泰坦。即便已经坠入疯狂，艾格勒仍是天空的泰坦…决不能轻敌。
Don't stop. Follow it to the Titan. Even if plunged into madness, Aquila is still the Sky Titan... We mustn't let our guard down.
以下一个「西风罗盘」为目标前进吧，
Let's keep going and aim for the next West Wind Compass.
这是…描绘哪位泰坦的画像？
好像和我翻阅过的所有翁法罗斯神话，都联系不起来。
It doesn't seem to match any of the Amphorean myths I've read.
也许古代天空文明对泰坦的诠释和我们完全不同。
Maybe the ancient sky civilization had a completely different interpretation of the Titans from ours.
但我同意你说的话…这个形象…看起来有些过于陌生了。
But I agree with you... This figure... looks way too alien.
{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的满溢之杯，壁画上描绘了它的破裂。
{RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s Chalice of Plenty... This mural depicts its breaking.
虽然天空与海洋的对立不算严重…但很显然，艾格勒的子民对后者的态度也算不上友善。
Though the conflict between sky and ocean wasn't particularly severe... it is obvious that Aquila's people weren't exactly cordial to the latter.
{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}，艾格勒的夙敌。
和互惠共生的创生三泰坦不同…天空和大地从未停止过对彼此的中伤和讥讽。
Unlike the Three Titans of Creation that co-exist in mutual benefit... the sky and the earth never ceased attacking each other.
但脱离了天空文明的昏光庭院来到凡间生活时，才发现大地同样有着温柔宽厚的一面。
But when the Twilight Courtyard left the sky civilization and came down to the mortal realm to live, they discovered that the earth also possessed a gentle, benevolent side.
人与人，城邦与城邦，神明与神明…我想，一切争斗都源于我们对彼此的误解吧？
Whether between people, cities, and gods... I suppose that all conflicts stem from misunderstandings.
看啊，彩虹桥在引领我们前往下一个目的地。
Look, the rainbow bridge is leading us to our next destination.
继续赶路吧，跟上露奈比斯阁下。
Let's hurry on. Follow Lady Lunabis.
毫无疑问，这张壁画描绘的就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}了。
No question about it. This mural depicts the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}.
这是艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态。
This is Aquila's most common form in the myths.
Do they really look like that?
Perhaps this could be called... concept art?
艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态，就是一只巨大的天空之眼。
Aquila's most common form in the myths looks exactly like a giant eye in the sky.
艾格勒曾和鼎盛时期的尼卡多利展开漫长的拉锯…还是不要小看它为好。
Aquila once engaged in a long, grueling struggle with Nikador in their prime... Best not to underestimate them.
走吧。不出意外，我们很快就能一睹它的真容了。
Let's go. If nothing goes wrong, we'll be able to see their true form very quickly.
现在…我将带领诸位进入雨之民的殿堂。
Now... I shall lead you into the Rainfolk's hall.
聆听塞涅俄丝童年的故事。
啊，小伊卡——你怎么自顾自跑出来了？
Ah, Little Ica — why did you run out on your own?
你是说…你在露奈比斯阁下身上，闻到了熟悉的气息？
You're saying... You smell a familiar scent on Lady Lunabis?
虽然形象上堪称天差地别，但说起来…小伊卡应该也是一只翼兽吧？
They look completely different, but... Little Ica should also be a winged beast, right?
真是命运的奇迹。说不定，我们还是给这世界留下了些什么啊…塞涅俄丝。
Truly a miracle of fate. Perhaps, we did leave something behind for this world... Seliose.
…请继续前进吧，逐火的英雄们。我能感觉到，艾格勒的光芒愈发强烈了。
...Please press on, flame-chasing heroes. I can sense it — the radiance of Aquila shines ever brighter.
传说塞涅俄丝的父亲是一位晖之民战士，终日在外漂泊征战，很少回到晨昏之眼。她的童年，更多是在身为雨之民祭司的母亲身边度过的。
Legend has it Seliose's father was a Sunfolk warrior who spent his years fighting and rarely returned to the Eye of Twilight. Her childhood was mostly spent beside her mother, a Rainfolk priest.
不错，这是真实的历史。也正是在她年幼之时，两个民族的矛盾开始激化。雨之民畏惧塞涅俄丝的另一半血脉，从未真正将她视为同胞。

Correct. That was true. It was also during her formative years that the conflict between the two tribes began intensifying. The Rainfolk feared the other half of Seliose's bloodline, and never truly saw her as one of their own.
Growing up in such an environment, she...
但她没有憎恨那些族人，依然长成了一名热情的少女。
Yet she bore no hatred for her people, and still grew into a passionate young lady.
直到…人们发现她的体内还流淌着黄金色的血液。那是将嫌恶转变为恐惧的最后一剂毒药。
Until... people discovered golden blood ran through her veins. That was the final straw that turned disdain into terror.
什么？史诗的说法是，英雄塞涅俄丝曾离群独居，只为磨砺意志、锻炼武艺。
What!? But the epics said Seliose left to live in solitude so she could train her spirit and hone her martial skills.
没想到…她是因为血统和黄金裔的身份被驱逐出了族群？
I never would have imagined that she... was cast out of her tribe for her lineage and her golden blood.
即便如此，她仍然没有对世界感到绝望。正是在独自旅居的途中，她邂逅了我和索拉比斯。我们一同狩猎、成长、生活，结为同盟。
Even so, she did not despair. She met Solabis and me while she was living alone. We hunted and spent our days together, and forged an alliance.
我想，正是那比命运更坚实的誓约将我和索拉比斯留在了这里，一直守望着这座孤寂的堡垒。
I think that oath, stronger than fate itself, kept Solabis and me here to watch over this abandoned fortress.
哪怕经历了背叛和驱逐，她依然愿意为族人踏上弑神的征途。
Despite experiencing betrayal and exile at the hands of her own people, she was still willing to set out on the path to slay the gods for them.
英雄塞涅俄丝，她对人子的博爱…也是深沉且无条件的么？
Was Seliose's love for humanity truly so... boundless and unconditional?
啊，小伊卡——你怎么自顾自跑出来了？
Ah, Little Ica — why did you run out on your own?
你是说…你在露奈比斯阁下身上，闻到了熟悉的气息？
You're saying... You smell a familiar scent on Lady Lunabis?
虽然形象上堪称天差地别，但说起来…小伊卡应该也是一只翼兽吧？
They look completely different, but... Little Ica should also be a winged beast, right?
真是命运的奇迹。说不定，我们还是给这世界留下了些什么啊…塞涅俄丝。
Truly a miracle of fate. Perhaps, we did leave something behind for this world... Seliose.
…请继续前进吧，逐火的英雄们。我能感觉到，艾格勒的光芒愈发强烈了。
...Please press on, flame-chasing heroes. I can sense it — the radiance of Aquila shines ever brighter.
浑象仪在前方…被黑潮造物把守着。
The celestial globe is right ahead... but there are black tide creatures guarding it.
看来会是一场绕不开的恶战，那就直面它吧。
Looks like we can't skip this fight. Let's go get them.
又是那个能增幅祷言的装置——{NICKNAME}，能交给你吗？
It's another one of those devices that can enhance prayers. Can I leave that to you, {NICKNAME}?
被黑潮侵蚀的眷属…看起来比之前的都要强大。
A Titankin that was corroded by the black tide... It seems it's stronger than before.
在被疯狂彻底吞没前，它也曾是泰坦忠实的随从吧？
Before it was consumed by madness, it must have also faithfully served the Titan, don't you think?
没有哪位医者能治愈一切，面对深陷痛苦而无法被拯救的灵魂……
No healer can heal all, especially faced with souls that are trapped deeply in the clutches of pain...
让它获得体面的解脱，或许就是最温柔的做法。
Granting it a dignified end may be the most compassionate act of all.
这台浑象仪，看上去很完整……
但还是无法启动…是内部故障吗？
But it still won't start... Is there something wrong internally?
也可能不是损坏，只是缺少了能源驱动。
Maybe it's not damaged, but is missing an energy source.
看那边，那些像硬盘一样的巨大物体——
Look there, those massive objects that look like hard drives...
咳…抱歉，我换个说法。看到两侧<color=#dbc291ff>那些泛着蓝光的大型结构了吗？</color>其中有几块突了出来，没有完整地嵌在槽中。
Ahem... Sorry, let me rephrase. Do you see the <color=#dbc291ff>two structures that are glowing blue on both sides?</color> Some of them are protruding out, not fully inserted into the slots.
直觉告诉我，或许它们和浑象仪的能源有关联。
My intuition tells me that they have something to do with the energy source of the celestial globe.
你的直觉一向很准。附近找找吧，看看有没有什么机关……
Your intuition has always been good. Let's look around and see if there are any mechanisms...
…呵，得来全不费工夫。扎格列斯之手，总会在最需要的时候出现。
...Heh, that didn't take much effort. The Hand of Zagreus always appears when it's most needed.
露奈比斯阁下，麻烦你再稍等我们片刻了。
Lady Lunabis, if it's not too much trouble, please wait for a little longer...?
要劳烦的是你们。我已在此处徘徊千年之久，这一时片刻根本算不得「等待」。
It's you all who have to do the work. I've wandered around here for a thousand years, so this brief moment hardly qualifies as "waiting."
…我正好想与这小家伙独处片刻。
...I would like to have a moment alone with this little one.
你的父母，还有他们的父母…一直都陪伴在天空后裔身边吗？
Your parents, and their parents... Have they always been by the Skyfolk's side?
浑象仪还无法运作…先想办法给它补充能源吧。
The celestial globe still isn't working... Let's find a way to supply it with energy first.
外面可能有发疯的泰坦眷属，还是不要擅自行动了。
There might still be rampaging Titankin outside, so it's best not to act alone.
..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."
"Blot out the blazing sun, Celestial Mural!"
我们已经修改了两处画壁的天象，它还能去往哪里？
We've already changed two scenes on the Mural. Where else can they go?
沿着天空子民终日祈望的方向——向上。
In the direction that the denizens of the sky have prayed to their whole lives — upward.
它…会飞到云层之外，我们无法企及的高度吗？
Will they... fly beyond the clouds, to heights that are beyond our reach?
据我们所知，正是艾格勒对世间降下了诅咒，禁止翁法罗斯人触碰天空之外的世界。
As far as we know, it was Aquila that placed the curse on this world, preventing Amphoreans from ever reaching the realm beyond the sky.
A curse that fell from the sky...
我无法证实这种说法的真伪。随塞涅俄丝与艾格勒交战时，那泰坦的化身也曾飞向高空…但它好像从未试图突破天幕，以躲避我们的追击。

I can't verify the truth of this claim. When Seliose fought Aquila, the Titan's incarnation did ascend into the skies... But they never attempted to break through the sky's veil to escape our pursuit.
说不定它不想胜之不武。
It could also be that they didn't want to win unfairly.
也有一种可能…那就是艾格勒——即使作为执掌天空神权的泰坦——也无法突破天空。
There's also another possibility... Maybe even Aquila — the Titan wielding the divine authority of the sky — is not able to break through the sky.
莫非它也无法突破天穹？
Could it be that they, too, were unable to break through the heavens?
也许对神话的解读是错误的…想阻止翁法罗斯人接触天外之界的，可能另有其人。
Perhaps the interpretation of the myth is inaccurate... It might be someone else who seeks to prevent Amphoreans from reaching the world beyond the sky.
真相如何，也只有在打倒它以后才能获知了。
Regardless, we can only know the truth after we've defeated them.
但在继续追击前…{NICKNAME}、迷迷，为风堇揭开历史的面纱吧。传说的真相，还未完全明朗。
Before we press on... {NICKNAME}, Mem, let's unveil the history for Hyacine. The true story behind the legend is yet to be fully revealed.
我也对那位「阳雷骑士」的故事有些好奇…阅读这段记忆再走吧？
I'm also curious about the story of the Daythunder Knight... Why don't we read this part of the memory before leaving?
黄昏之女，是谁允许你回到这阴云之子的圣地？你同时身负异端的血统和黄金的诅咒，驱逐是对你永久的惩罚。
Oh, Daughter of Dusk, who has permitted your return to this sacred land of the Cloudborn? Bearing the blood of heresy and curse of gold, exile is your eternal sentence.
聆听塞涅俄丝与雨之民的对话。
Listen to the conversation between Seliose and the Rainfolk.
继续追随艾格勒飞离的轨迹吧，英雄们。这一次，我会和索拉比斯一同引导你们前行。
Follow the trail Aquila has left, heroes. This time, I will guide you alongside Solabis.
抱歉，小家伙…希望此后我们还有时间一起聊天。
Sorry, little one... I hope we still have time to talk later.
我曾经的族人啊…如今的我已不再是那只尚未成熟的雏鸟，我找到了自己的羽翼。
My kin of old... I am no longer the immature fledgling I once was. I've found my wings.
你们给我套上的枷锁已经锈蚀脱落，我将决定自己应飞向何方。
The shackles you bound me with have rusted away, and I shall decide which direction I'll fly.
至于此番回乡——在我踏上弑神的征程前，信仰将死之神的人们理应知晓一切。
As for this return home — before I embark on my god-slaying quest, those who worship the god who is about to die deserve to know everything.
所以，那可怕的传言是真的……
So, the dreadful rumors are true...
受诅咒的黄昏之女，战无不胜的阳雷骑士，将会飞入云霄，挑战泰坦……
The cursed Daughter of Dusk, the invincible Daythunder Knight, will soar into the heavens to challenge the Titan...
你为何要这么做，塞涅俄丝？你曾是多么热情善良的女孩…在这阴云之子的殿堂里，你曾多么虔诚地向艾格勒祷告！
Why would you do this, Seliose? You were once such a warm-hearted girl... In this hall of the Cloudborn, you prayed so devoutly to Aquila!
因为我看清了泰坦的冷漠，也看厌了凡人在它的漠视之下跳起的悲哀舞步。
I've seen through the Titan's indifference, and grown weary of the tragic dances mortals perform under their neglect.
我看到了你们怪怨神的偏袒，却不敢对那信仰的中心起丝毫的反抗之心。你们懂得如何将刀子插进同胞的后背，却从未有勇气追溯仇恨的源头。

I see how you blame the god for their favoritism, yet lack the courage to rebel against the core of your beliefs. You're quick to turn your blades on your kin, but you never dare to confront the true source of your hatred.
我怜悯你们。我在你们之中长大，也一度将自己视为这部族的一员……
I feel sorry for you. I grew up among you and once saw myself as part of this tribe...
你们受到的迫害已经足够深重。为此，我理解你们对我的憎恶…并原谅你们将我驱逐的决定。
The persecution you've suffered runs deep. For that, I understand your hatred towards me... and I forgive you for casting me out.
也正因我怜悯你们，我将替你们所有人踏上这次征程——
Out of care for you all, I'll walk this path — on behalf of everyone.
就让「晨昏之眼」的陨落成为一段崭新历史的开篇吧。在我归来后，世上将不再有不公的神明……
Let the fall of the "Eye of Twilight" mark the dawn of a new chapter in history. Upon my return, there will be no more unjust gods...
当病态的信仰溃散，人子将迎来新生，阴晴得到弥合、晨昏不再分割。
When a broken faith finally disappears, the children of humanity will be reborn, the skies will mend, and the divide between day and night will fade away.
你是多么单纯啊，黄昏之女…那么强大，却那么天真……
You are so naive, Daughter of Dusk... so powerful, yet so innocent...
我畏惧你…我难以想象，当你发现浅薄且脆弱的凡人无法承受你那沉重的博爱时，会变成多么扭曲的模样……
I fear you... I can't imagine how twisted you may become when you realize that shallow and fragile mortals can't bear the immense weight of your boundless love...
…再见了，我的族人。我会记住你们曾经赐予我的，如绵绵细雨般微薄却清沁的温柔。
...Farewell, my kin. I'll always remember the tenderness you once showed me. Meager but refreshing, like gentle rain.
塞涅俄丝大人…她弑杀泰坦的态度有多坚定，她在和族人告别时的语气就有多悲凉。
Lady Seliose's resolve to slay the Titan was as firm as her farewell to her people was dismal.
但我却从这段记忆里感受到了不祥的征兆…后来发生了什么，露奈比斯阁下？
Yet, from this memory, I sense something ominous... What happened later, Lady Lunabis?
诸位与其听我诉说，不如继续前进、见证。
Rather than listening to me, continue onward and witness for yourselves.
继续追随艾格勒飞离的轨迹吧，英雄们。这一次，我会和索拉比斯一同引导你们前行。
Follow the trail Aquila has left, heroes. This time, I will guide you alongside Solabis.
抱歉，小家伙…希望此后我们还有时间一起聊天。
Sorry, little one... I hope we still have time to talk later.
它飞向了画壁的穹顶…我记得那里。
They soared toward the mural's dome... I remember that place.
聆听：塞涅俄丝与艾格勒的决战
Listen to the final battle between Seliose and Aquila
既然你已下定了决心，那就继续前行吧。
Since you've made your decision, keep moving forward.
我已唤来了虹桥。沿着它行进，在穹顶了结人子与那泰坦的命运纠葛吧。
I've called forth the Rainbow Bridge. Proceed along its path to the dome where the entwined fates of humanity and the Titan must be resolved.
在天象画壁的穹顶，我们给艾格勒带去了致命的一击。
At the Celestial Mural's dome, we dealt Aquila a fatal blow.
「烈阳之翼」点燃了泰坦的羽翼……
The Sunlit Wings set the Titan's Wings aflame...
「星月之翎」封锁了泰坦的神躯……
The Moonlit Plume sealed the divine body...
「伤痕累累的天空英雄…将那最后一只恫世的巨眼穿透。」
"The battered hero of the sky... pierced the last monstrous eye."
看来，传说中描绘决战情景的这一段相当写实呢。
It seems that the legend describing the decisive battle was true.
但总有些事无法被记录下来——那些只有我们见证的事。
But some things cannot be recorded — they were only witnessed by us.
...Would you mind sharing more, honored ones?
艾格勒发出落败的尖啸后，我们望向了地面。
After Aquila's defeated scream, we looked to the ground.
那些仰望我们拼杀的人们——我们看到了他们脸上的神色。
The people who watched us fight — we saw the expressions on their faces.
老人，壮年，青年，幼童。他们无不挂着相同的表情：无以复加的恐惧。
Old and young, adults and children alike, they all shared the same expression — pure, unshakable terror.
我们的胜利没有迎来欢呼或庆贺。恐惧的人群乱作一团，放声哭喊，相互践踏……
Our victory brought no cheers or celebrations. The terrified crowd became chaotic, screaming and trampling each other...
当他们意识到，自己千百年来的信仰竟被一个身负诅咒的混血儿颠覆之后……
When they realized that their centuries-old faith had been overturned by a cursed child of two clans...
他们退化成了失去理性，同类相残的兽。不…这种说法是对兽性的侮辱。即便在翁法罗斯最荒蛮的山林间，我和索拉比斯亦从未目睹过那般疯狂。

They regressed into senseless beasts that devoured their own kin. No... that would be an insult to beasts. Solabis and I have never witnessed such madness, not even in the wildest corners of Amphoreus.
塞涅俄丝，那位英雄…她的想法的确有些天真。
塞涅俄丝的确太天真了。
她或许以为，破釜沉舟之下，所有人都能像她一样觉醒。
She probably thought that, once there's no turning back, everyone would come to their sense like she did.
塞涅俄丝，那位英雄…她的想法的确有些天真。
但…这和历史的记载不同。天空一族流传的神话中，艾格勒重伤之下，意图鱼死网破……
This doesn't align with the historical records. According to the legends of the Sky people, Aquila, gravely wounded, was determined to fight to the end...
为了阻止艾格勒将整个翁法罗斯的天幕作为武器砸向大地，英雄塞涅俄丝选择牺牲自己，封印泰坦……
To prevent Aquila from using the sky of Amphoreus as a weapon to crush the earth, the hero Seliose chose to sacrifice herself, sealing the Titan in the process...
…抹去残酷、流血和平庸者的悲歌，放大英雄的荣光、赞颂他们的功绩——史诗和传说，自古如此。
...Legends and epics have always erased the cruelty, the bloodshed, and the cries of the commoners, while glorifying the heroes and their triumphs.
你会看到传说不为人知的一面，年轻的雅辛忒丝。面对尘封千年的真相，你的步伐还能否如此坚定？
You'll witness a side of the legend that's never been told, young Hyacinthia. With a truth hidden for a millennium before you, can you still walk with the same conviction?
那会是个残酷的真相，注定动摇你的信念。你准备好面对它了吗，风堇姑娘？
It will be a harsh truth, one that is bound to shake your beliefs. Are you ready to face it, Miss Hyacine?
无论那被尘封的历史是什么模样，先祖们的灵魂都会鼓励我做出正确的决定。这份使命，它的重量远大于我自身的好恶与私见。
No matter what the hidden history holds, the spirits of my ancestors will urge me to make the right choice. This mission is far more important than my personal feelings or biases.
如果我要面对的是被篡改的历史，一个传承千年的谎言…那么我愿意相信，那个编织谎言的人也一定有自己的理由跟苦衷。
If what I'm facing is a distorted history, a lie that's lasted for a thousand years... I have to believe the one who created it had their reasons and struggles.
而那个理由，我也愿意假定它出于善意——因为这就是我看待世界的方式，我的选择。
And as for those reasons, I choose to believe they came from a place of goodwill. That's how I see the world.
既然你已下定了决心，那就继续前行吧。
Since you've made your decision, keep moving forward.
我已唤来了虹桥。沿着它行进，在穹顶了结人子与那泰坦的命运纠葛吧。
I've called forth the Rainbow Bridge. Proceed along its path to the dome where the entwined fates of humanity and the Titan must be resolved.
它还在挣扎，想阻止我们…但我们已经把它逼入绝境了。
They're desperately struggling to block our path, but we've backed them into a corner.
和漫长的逐火之旅相比，这点障碍算不上什么。
This hurdle is trivial compared to the endless Flame-Chase Journey.
不管那位泰坦要阻挠我们几次…我都会重新建起桥梁！
I'll restore the bridge every time... No matter how many times the Titan obstructs us!
她曾念念不忘的奇迹…只差一步便能化作现实了啊。
The miracle she never stopped dreaming of... is just one step away from becoming reality.
两位阁下…塞涅俄丝大人是如何变得如此强大的？
Honored ones... how did Lady Seliose become so powerful?
这…听上去是每位成功者必备的特征。
Those... sound like essential traits for every successful individual.
她很特殊。她的决心，比偏执更甚。
She is special. Her resolve goes beyond mere stubbornness.
沿着彩虹桥继续前进吧，英雄们。
Continue forward along the Rainbow Bridge, heroes.
这就是天象画壁的穹顶么…真是令人称奇。
Is this the dome of the celestial mural? It's truly marvelous.
穹顶呈现的仍是烈日的图景。只要让阴云也布满此处的画壁，艾格勒就无处可去了吧？
The dome still displays a vivid sun. By also covering this mural in clouds, we'll leave Aquila with no place to hide.
没错。用诸位已经熟悉的手段让它无处可藏，然后……
Exactly. Employ the tactics you've mastered to expose them, and...
…雅辛忒丝，我们将服从你的意愿，将力量借予诸位，令艾格勒的本体现身。
...Hyacinthia, we will heed your wishes, channeling our strength to reveal Aquila's true form.
千年了，若非有约定傍身，我和露奈比斯恐怕早已和此处的其它事物一般弥散。
It's been a thousand years. Without our pact, Lunabis and I might have dissipated like everything else here.
那约定要我们等待天空之子重返故地…完成回收泰坦火种的使命。
Our pact requires us to await the return of the Skyfolk to their ancestral lands... to complete the mission of reclaiming the Titan's Coreflame.
我们会执行你的意志，风堇姑娘，一如我们曾遵守对塞涅俄丝的承诺。
We will carry out your will, Miss Hyacine, as faithfully as we kept our promise to Seliose.
但在那之前…我们会先揭示历史的全部真相——
But first, we shall reveal the whole truth of history —
<color=#dbc291ff>——在英雄塞涅俄丝开启逐火之旅后，天空之民所遭遇的一切。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>— We will reveal all that befell the Skyfolk after Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey.</color>
小心——有威胁，而且不止一个！
Be careful! There are multiple threats!
更多被黑潮侵染的士兵…过了这么久，它还在守护天空泰坦的领域吗？
Soldiers tainted by the black tide... Do they continue to defend the realm of the Sky Titan after all this time?
也许它们是在守护长眠于此的真相。
Perhaps they are protecting the truth slumbering here.
除了约定中的天空后裔，无人有权阅读此处的记忆。
Aside from the descendants of the sky named in the pact, no one else is entitled to access the memories here.
在那之后到底发生了什么…我也越发好奇了。
I'm increasingly intrigued by what happened next.
先打败这些堕落的守卫，然后……
Let's deal with these fallen guards first, then...
…再来上这最后一堂历史课吧！
...embark on this final lesson in history!
你们履行了自己的职责，卫士…安歇吧。
You have fulfilled your duty, guards... Rest now.
天空的神明，我们来了…你的怨愤和惶恐很快就会结束。
God of the Sky, we are here... Your resentment and terror will soon end.
塞涅俄丝大人…与泰坦融为一体后，你还维持着人类的意识吗？我希望你能看到，自己种下的种子结出了怎样的果实。
Lady Seliose... do you still have your humanity after merging with the Titan? I hope you can witness the harvest of the seeds you once sowed.
现在…就只剩下最后的几步了。
Now... only the final steps remain.
人家能清晰地感觉到，这里的记忆在翻涌。就好像…有许多感情在漫长的岁月中彷徨，不愿就此消失。
I can feel the memories here churning. It's as if countless emotions have lingered through the ages, refusing to fade away.
那些在这里游荡的记忆，他们似乎在祈求什么…好痛苦，好委屈……
The wandering memories here seem to be pleading for something... heavy with pain and grief...
就像…在冥河边徘徊的魂灵……
Like ghosts lingering by the River of Souls...
嗯。逐火之旅已然走到最后，无论所谓的历史真相如何残酷，任何事都不会动摇我完成使命的决心。
Yes. The Flame-Chase Journey is reaching its final chapter. No matter how cruel the truth may be, nothing will sway my determination to finish this mission.
但被尘封的历史真相也必须重见天日，因为凡人的命运不该被经过美化的传说淹没。
The true history buried in time must come to light. The fates of mortals shouldn't be lost beneath polished myths.
我们的想法完全一致，白厄阁下。
We're on the same page, Lord Phainon.
去接触浑象仪吧，雅辛忒丝。
Go to the celestial globe, Hyacinthia.
那些被世界遗忘的过往会在你眼前一一重现。牢牢抓住你那不可动摇的信念，你会需要它的支撑。
The forgotten past will reveal itself to you, one fragment at a time. Hold fast to your resolve — you'll need it to face what lies ahead.
最近过得还好吗？距你离开奥莱诺斯已经过了几个月啦，*我们*很想念在一起的那段时光。
