How have you been lately? It's been a few months since you left Oleinus, and we really miss the times we spent together.
那时，我们一起在乡间奔跑、玩耍，到了晚上就去逗弄邻居家那头坏脾气的大地兽，每天都过得无忧无虑，好像世间所有的烦恼和灾难都与我们无关……
We'd run and play in the countryside, and in the evenings, we'd mess with the grumpy dromas from next door. Every day was carefree as if the troubles of the world had nothing to do with us...
自*我们*和姐妹们分开以来，和你在一起的那段时光，就是*我们*最美妙的记忆啦。
Since we parted with our sisters, the time spent with you has become our most cherished memories.
老实说，听说你打算去追逐神谕，成为英雄时…*我们*还有些后悔，后悔当时为什么要把预言讲给你听……
Honestly, when we learned you planned to pursue the prophecy and become a hero... we couldn't help but feel regret. We regretted telling you about the prophecy in the first place...
因为那就意味着你会离开*我们*身边，去走一条充满危险的道路。如果因此失去一位挚友…那*我们*会非常伤心的。
It meant you would leave our side and embark on a dangerous journey. If it meant losing a dear friend... we would be heartbroken.
不过，现在*我们*已经想通啦——你很强大，塞涅俄丝，你注定要在这个世间留下印记…*我们*相信你有改变世界的力量。
But we have come to accept it. You're strong, Seliose, and you're meant to leave your mark on the world... We believe you have the power to change the world.
而且，*我们*和姐妹们之所以会离开雅努萨波利斯，就是为了给翁法罗斯带去希望和奇迹。而要把奇迹带入现实，光靠*我们*的力量可远远不够呀。
The reason we left Janusopolis was to bring hope and miracles to Amphoreus. But to turn those miracles into reality, our strength alone won't be enough.
所以，*我们*希望你能成为英雄！希望你能让世界上的人们看到，我们应该团结起来，而不是互相争斗……
We hope you will become a hero and show the world that unity, not division, is what we need...
当然，一切的前提还是你能保证自己的安好！我相信，以你的力量一定可以做到。
All of this is only possible if you stay safe! With your ability, we believe you can do it.
感谢你的回信！真没想到，*我们*居然是通过这种形式了解到了你的过去……
Thank you for your letter! Never expected that we would learn about your past in this way...
为什么你没有早些告诉我呢？如果我们早点谈到这些…也许我就能多和你聊聊，帮你解开心结啦……
Why didn't you tell us sooner? We could have helped you untangle your feelings if we had talked about this earlier...
啊，*我们*没有埋怨你的意思哦！*我们*甚至还有些佩服你，因为经历了那么多以后，你居然还能保持那份热情、阳光，真是厉害！
We aren't blaming you! Honestly, we even admire you. After everything you've been through, you've managed to keep that passion and positivity — it's truly impressive!
但…*我们*也知道，有一些伤疤是会陪伴人渡过一辈子的。它永远不会消褪，而且总会在特定的时候隐隐作痛。
But... we also know that some scars stay with you for life. They never fully fade, and they always hurt when you least expect it.
所以，在遇到困难的时候…如果你有什么难以启齿的话想要与人分享，就写信给*我们*吧？
When times get tough... if there's anything you can't bring yourself to say to others, just write to us.
你选择的道路非常艰难，没有必要把所有重担都一个人抗在肩上！要记得，如果想要团结人们、打破心跟心之间的壁障，耐心的沟通和分享是必不可少的环节！

The road you've chosen is tough, but there's no need to bear all the burdens alone! Remember, if you aim to unite people and tear down the barriers between hearts, patient communication and sharing are absolutely crucial.
只是高高在上地发号施令，或是习惯了替别人做决定的人…是很难感受到他人的真心的。
It's hard to truly understand others when you're always giving orders to them or making decisions for them.
*我们*听说啦，你打算以自己的力量挑战艾格勒，终结天空一族的纷争。
Word has reached us that you intend to face Aquila alone and resolve the strife among the Sky people.
*我们*丝毫都不怀疑，你拥有挑战泰坦的力量！但在你正式踏上征程之前，*我们*还想给你讲一个故事…希望还来得及。
We have no doubts that you are strong enough to face the Titans! But before you embark on your journey, we'd like to share a story with you... Hopefully, there's still time.
小的时候，在雅努萨波利斯，妈妈会教我们折纸，把一张张红色的纸片折成各种形状：小鸟，小鱼，头冠，漂亮的衣服……
As kids in Janusopolis, we spent hours with our mom learning origami. She'd take a stack of red paper and guide our hands as we turned them into birds, fish, crowns, and elaborate clothes...
*我们*一直都以为，折纸是一件特别快乐的事。因为每次折出一件成功的作品以后，妈妈总是会看着我们，露出宠爱的笑容。
We always thought there was sheer joy in origami. Every successful fold we made brought a loving smile from Mama.
直到妈妈离开以后…*我们*才发现，折纸本身其实并没有多么快乐…*我们*很快就忘记了那个陪伴了*我们*半个童年的爱好。
It wasn't until after Mama left that we realized origami itself hadn't been the true source of our joy. We soon left behind the hobby that had occupied so much of our childhood.
那时*我们*才终于明白，原来*我们*喜欢的不是折纸这件事本身，而是妈妈对*我们*折出来的作品的反应。
We eventually understood that it wasn't the folding we loved, but Mama's reactions to our creations.
塞涅俄丝，你在回信里说到，你爱着自己的族人，而且想要为他们打败残酷的神明……
Seliose, you wrote of your love for your people and your desire to defeat the cruel gods for them...
从你的字里行间透露出来的激烈情感，让*我们*有些担心…会不会你所说的对于族人的爱，与*我们*对折纸的爱有些相似呢？
Your intense emotions make us wonder... Is your love for your people similar to our love for origami?
请你一定要仔细想想这件事呀。如果你所爱的「人」只是抽象的概念，而非具体的「人」…那样的话，即便在拯救了他们以后…你能获得的或许也只是失望。
Please take a moment to consider this. If your love for "humans" is merely an abstract notion rather than love for specific individuals, you may end up disappointed even after saving them.
对不起，*我们*这次说的话有些沉重啦。但作为朋友，*我们*觉得有必要对你说出这些话…那样，你才能做出对自己负责的选择呀。
We are sorry if our words come across as heavy. However, as your friend, we feel it's important to voice these concerns. That way, you can make choices that are genuinely accountable to yourself.
不行呀…祷言的效力不够持久，没法让风场一直倒转。
It didn't work... The prayer's power didn't last long enough, and we couldn't get the fans to keep turning in the other direction.
没准那台装置能帮到我们？有必要的话就去瞧瞧吧。
Hmm, maybe that device can help? Go check it out if you need to.
Let's have a long jump competition.
别着急走，搭档——先把这里的事处理完吧。
Don't go just yet, partner — let's wrap up what needs to be done here first.
啊，这台装置…好像能增强欧洛尼斯祷言的效力！
Ah! It looks like... this device can amplify the power of Oronyx's Prayer!
试着用它的力量扭转风场的方向吧，搭档？
Why don't you try to change the wind's direction with this thing, partner?
过程很顺利，还剩一处「电路」需要修复……
Smooth sailing so far. We've got one more "circuit" to fix...
继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
Let's keep going and find the tablet on the other side.
过程很顺利，还剩一处「电路」需要修复……
Smooth sailing so far. We've got one more "circuit" to fix...
继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
Let's keep going and find the tablet on the other side.
这道大门…应该是圣堂的出口？
Is this door... the exit to the hall?
把必要的事做完以后再回来吧。
Let's come back after we've done everything we need to do.
岁月流逝，恐怕晨昏之眼早已变成一片废墟。
It's been so long... Maybe the Eye of Twilight has already turned into ruins.
Hmm... I think this should be right?
Deep breaths, and find the way out...
传说中，英雄塞涅俄丝身边有两只翼兽伙伴。
Legend has it that the hero Seliose was always flanked by two winged companions.
索拉比斯和露奈比斯，它们是她的坐骑、战友。
Solabis and Lunabis. They were her steeds and comrades.
假如它们还未逝去，或许能帮助我们对抗艾格勒。
If they are still alive, they might help us confront Aquila.
露奈比斯阁下！是你吗？你听得到吗？
Lady Lunabis! Is that you? Can you hear me?
我是英雄塞涅俄丝的后代…我们是来完成她的使命的！
I am the descendant of the hero Seliose... We have come to complete her mission!
索拉比斯阁下，请挣脱黑潮的掌控……
Lord Solabis, please break free from the control of the black tide...
露奈比斯阁下不和我们一起吗？
Is Lady Lunabis not going with us?
我会在下一站等着你们，小风堇。
I will be waiting for you all at the next destination, Hyacine.
索拉比斯阁下…为何在你苏醒前，露奈比斯阁下一直沉默不语？
Lord Solabis... Why did Lady Lunabis remain silent until you woke up?
晨昏与阴晴，本是一体两面。
Brilliant dawn and shadowed dusk are but two sides of the same coin.
只有二者同时醒来，我们的灵智才算完整。
Our consciousness will only become whole when both are awake at the same time.
巨型电路已经接通了，回去检查一遍浑象仪吧。
The giant circuit has been powered up. Let's go back and check the celestial globe.
艾格勒逃向了堡垒的另一端…追上它吧。
Aquila has fled to the other end of the fortress... Let's chase after them.
露奈比斯会为你们指引方向。
这些壁画…好像不止在刻画天空泰坦。
These murals... seem to depict more than just the Sky Titan.
Shall we stop for a look?
解开「西风罗盘」…来雨之民的殿堂和我汇合吧。
Solve the West Wind Compass... and come meet me in the hall of the Rainfolk.
风堇姑娘…方才，你如何确信自己能让索拉比斯挣脱痛苦？
Miss Hyacine... How were you so certain that you could free Solabis from suffering?
抱歉，我并无万全把握，露奈比斯阁下……
My apologies, Lady Lunabis. I was not all that certain.
但如果身为医者的我都失去了乐观，病患们又如何能燃起生的希望呢？
But if even the healer loses hope, then how will the patients repossess their hope for life?
这里的眷属，似乎都被黑潮侵蚀了。
The Titankin here appear to have all been corrupted by the black tide.
据说黑潮是来自天外的灾厄，若真是如此…天空的防线自然是最先受到冲击的。
It's said the black tide is a calamity from beyond the sky. If that's true... the sky's defenses would naturally be the first to be breached.
塞涅俄丝挑战神明以后，天空之子们去了哪里？
Where did the Skyfolk go after Seliose challenged the god?
和历史上的所有部族一样，被淹没在了时代的乌云中。
Just like the countless tribes throughout history, they were drowned in the dark clouds of time.
有反应了，看来我的猜测没错。
It's reacting. Looks like my guess was right.
不愧是你，灰宝操作扎格列斯之手的样子也越来越熟练啦。
As expected, Grayie is getting more and more skilled at handling the Hand of Zagreus.
走吧，我们回去检查下浑象仪。
Let's go. We should return and check on the celestial globe.
像塞涅俄丝那样强大的英雄…与她结合并传承血脉的另一半，传说中却完全没有记录。
Seliose is such a mighty hero... Yet her partner, who must have walked with her to pass on her bloodline, was completely unrecorded in legend.
他也是一位战士吗？又或者……
Was he also a warrior? Or perhaps...
…你很快就能得到答案了，风堇姑娘。
You will soon have your answer, Miss Hyacine.
索拉比斯阁下在等着我们。
Lord Solabis is waiting for us.
弑神的猎手，能从猎物的声音判断其状态。
A god-slayer can tell the state of their prey by its sounds.
The god's part? I sense resentment. Terror.
But as for her... I cannot sense anything.
艾格勒…它仿佛已经知晓自己的命运。
Aquila... already seems aware of their fate.
我们不会让它等太久，就用泰坦之血为「侵晨」开锋吧。
We won't make them wait for too long. A Titan shall get Dawnmaker to have its first taste of blood.
你手中那把长剑…我似乎在何处见过。
That sword you wield... it seems familiar.
是你的记忆出了偏差么？这把剑不久前才被铸成。
Are you sure about that? This was only recently forged.
Dawnmaker feels lighter and lighter in my hands...
我感觉，自己不止能用剑锋斩除罪恶——
I feel that I can do more than just cut down evil with this blade —
— With golden flames, I can forge a new dawn!
浑象仪就在前方——去逼出艾格勒吧。
The celestial globe is right ahead. Let's go and force Aquila to come out.
那些「电路」似乎都被黑潮侵染了……
These "circuits" all seem to be corroded by the black tide...
但愿那两台<color=#dbc291ff>预言算碑能帮我们解决问题。</color>
Here's hoping those two <color=#dbc291ff>Prophecy Tablets can help us out.</color>
这样一来，祷言应该就能持久回溯啦——
Now the prayer should rewind for even longer —
试着用它操控风场吧，搭档？
Let's try to control the wind's direction with this thing, partner!
总算…但愿这能修好浑象仪。
We've finally made it... Hopefully this is enough to fix the celestial globe.
扎格列斯之手或许能帮我们把「硬盘」复位——
Maybe the Hand of Zagreus can help us to put the "hard drive" back to where it's meant to be...
这样就算完成了吗？还真是…简单粗暴呀。
This is it? That's certainly... pretty crude and simple.
Should we go look for the next one?
灰宝，原来打算靠这种方式打败艾格勒吗？
Wait! Is this how you plan to beat Aquila?
想法不错——可惜现实太过残酷。
Not a bad idea — pity it doesn't work.
一切顺利。继续前进吧，大家。
Okhema's Dawn has come to an end...
不…恐怕太晚了。这片天空已经彻底被黑潮吞没……
No... it's too late. This sky has been completely swallowed by the black tide...
这片黑暗…它的力量恐怕凌驾于泰坦的权能之上。
This darkness... Its power probably surpasses that of the Titans.
Was this not predicted in the prophecy?
假如真有类似的记载…缇宝老师不可能只字未提。
Tribbie would have made sure to warn us if there were any mention of it.
即便风堇接过了天空的神权，她恐怕也无法驱散这片黑暗……
Even if Hyacine takes the divine authority of the sky, she probably won't be able to banish this darkness...
黑潮…它的力量恐怕凌驾于泰坦的权能之上。
The black tide... its power probably surpasses even that of the Titans.
只能寄希望于她能庇佑更多人的生命……
All we can do is hope she can protect as many lives as possible...
这…就是奥赫玛的末日吗……
Is this... the end for Okhema...?
别放弃，我们是领路的人…绝不能自己先丧失方向。
Don't give up. We're the ones leading this journey... so we can't afford to lose our way.
意外才是我们旅途中的常量，无论如何，我们会陪奥赫玛走到最后关头。
The unexpected is always part of our journey. We'll stay with Okhema until the end, no matter what.
那边——你们看到了么？那些破损的结构，似乎变成了虚浮的材质……
Over there — do you see it? The broken structures look like they've turned transparent...
从没见过这种现象…那也是黑潮导致的么？太多的事都欠缺解释…偏偏我们没时间停下来细究。
I've never seen anything like this before... Could the black tide be the cause? There are too many things we don't understand... and we don't have time to figure out.
不能再耽搁了…我们下山。但愿刻法勒的火种还安然无恙——
We can't delay any longer... Let's head down. Hopefully, Kephale's Coreflame is still safe...
赛飞儿小姐，我相信她会尽到自己的职责。
I'm confident that Miss Cipher will do everything in her power to fulfill her duty.
看那儿！刻法勒的火种就被保存在议会的中央。
Over there! Kephale's Coreflame is being kept in the center of the Council.
必须把它取走，带回创世涡心。
We must retrieve it and bring it back to the Vortex of Genesis.
对。最坏的打算…我们必须时刻准备好归还刻法勒的火种。
Right. Worst case scenario... We need to be prepared to return Kephale's Coreflame at any moment.
假如末日真的迫在眉睫，我们就没时间再探究「奇迹」的真相了——相信那刻夏老师的假说是唯一的选择。
If the end is indeed upon us, we no longer have time to investigate the truth behind the miracle — we'll have to trust that Professor Anaxa's hypothesis is the only option.
抱歉，阿格莱雅…我答应过你，要把「再创世」的选择留给翁法罗斯的人们……
Apologies, Aglaea... I promised you that I would leave the choice of Era Nova to the people of Amphoreus...
但如今恐怕没有踌躇的余地。
But I'm afraid there's no room for doubts now.
天父刻法勒，原谅那些无知又卑微的人子吧……
O Sky Father Kephale, please forgive these ignorant and lowly children of humanity...
他们多么地天真，竟把流着金色血液的异端们当成了救世主……
They are so utterly naive that they think of the golden-blooded heretics as Deliverers...
这猩红的天空，还有遍地的烈焰和魔鬼，会洗涤他们的愚蠢……
This bloodred sky, and the raging flames and demons throughout the land, will purge their foolishness...
你不加入我，与我一起向仁慈的刻法勒祈祷吗…？
Why don't you join me in praying to the benevolent Kephale...?
放眼看看这片狼藉的大地吧…这一切，都是你等不敬神明的异端犯下的罪孽……
Cast your eyes on this ravaged land... All of this, sins committed by you blasphemous heretics...
她…已经精神不太正常了。
She... looks like she's got a screw loose.
嗯…我们不该在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
Mm... We should not waste our time on a pitiful madwoman.
我们还有更重要的事…不该在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
We have more important matters to attend to... We shouldn't waste our time on a pitiful madwoman.
You are turning everything upside down!
…别争辩了，无需在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
...No need to argue. We're just wasting our time on a pitiful madwoman.
丹恒是对的。我很想一剑了结你可憎的性命……
Dan Heng is right. My sword yearns to end your pathetic life...
但对穷途末路的你而言，最好的惩罚应该是亲眼看着黄金裔完成使命。
But to a cornered dog like you, the most deserving punishment is to personally witness the Chrysos Heirs fulfill their mission.
这样…你才知道你曾经的恶行是多么无谓而愚蠢。
Only then... will you truly know how meaningless and foolish your past transgressions were.
刻法勒的火种已经消失无踪。你们…要如何践行神谕？
Kephale's Coreflame is long lost to the winds. How will you... fulfill the prophecy?
她已经疯了…以至于满口胡言乱语。
She's gone completely mad... to the point where she's just spewing nonsense.
长久以来，刻法勒的火种都被供奉于此…唯有元老院的核心成员才知道开启火种匣的方法。
For the longest time, Kephale's Coreflame has been worshiped here... Only core members of the Council of Elders know how to activate the Coreflame Casket.
How're we gonna find a core member now?
No... There's no need for such trouble.
只能逼凯妮斯帮我们了。
We'll just have to force Caenis to help us.
No... We don't need her help.
That Lygus, should we seek him out?
No... There's no need to go through that effort.
那刻夏老师教会我的，不止课本上的知识。
Professor Anaxa taught me more than just what was in the textbooks.
黄金裔的罪孽…终于化作了神明的惩罚……
The sins of the Chrysos Heirs... have finally transformed into divine punishment...
我们…无论谁都无法逃脱……
None of us... no one can escape...
Leave her, {NICKNAME}... Focus on the objective.
回来吧，解开火种匣需要借助你的力量。
Come back. We need your powers to open the Coreflame Casket.
在黎明云崖驻留期间，那刻夏老师对各处都进行了…勘察。
During his time at Dawncloud, Professor Anaxa conducted... surveys in various areas.
我还记得他口述的方法——但愿管用。
I still remember the words he used. I hope it works.
「担负世界的全知之父，请将你那慈悲的目光分我一瞥。」
"All-Knowing Father who bears the world, please share a glimpse of your merciful gaze with me."
「降下悬于全世之巅的泰坦心火，供你虔诚的造物瞻望。」
"Cast down the Titan's fire that hangs at the pinnacle of the world, for your devout creations to behold."
还差一步…要解开它的秘术锁…{NICKNAME}，恐怕还要借助你的力量。
One step left... To undo its arcane seal... {NICKNAME}, I may require your strength again.
丹恒，你还能再施展一次灵水术么？
Dan Heng, can you use the spirit water art again?
我随身携带的灵水已经用完了。而且……
I've used up all the spirit water I brought. And...
就在刚才，我们离开晨昏之眼以后…我感觉翁法罗斯的水体和我切断了联系。
Just now, after we left the Eye of Twilight... I felt the waters of Amphoreus severing their connection with me.
这也是黑潮的影响么…看来我们只能跑下山了。
Is this also a result of the black tide...? Looks like all we can do is sprint down the mountain.
呵…你们以为…我彻底疯了？
Heh... You all thought... I completely lost my mind?
假如火种没被动过手脚，一直原封不动地存放于此……
If the Coreflame was never tampered with, and has always remained here untouched...
你们以为…我没有能力将它带走？
You all think... I wouldn't have the power to take it away?
